ai_content_json.conclusion: 利用语义破坏的数据增强方法能够有效调整模型对干扰特征的依赖，提升跨分布场景下的鲁棒性。

tldr: 本文提出通过数据增强调整模型对虚假相关性的依赖，以提高预测任务的鲁棒性。
motivation: 在预测任务中，模型可能依赖于与标签存在虚假相关性的干扰特征（nuisance），导致在分布外场景下性能下降。现有方法依赖额外标注或假设，限制了适用性。
method: 通过破坏语义特征生成数据增强样本，训练模型识别干扰特征与标签的虚假相关性，并据此调整预测结果。
result: 在水鸟分类、自然语言推理和胸部X光检测等任务中，该方法有效缓解了虚假相关性带来的分布外性能下降问题。
conclusion: 利用语义破坏的数据增强方法能够有效调整模型对干扰特征的依赖，提升跨分布场景下的鲁棒性。
search_text: Nuisances via Negativa: Adjusting for Spurious Correlations via Data Augmentation Negativa 带来的麻烦：通过数据增强调整虚假相关性 In prediction tasks, there exist features that are related to the label in the same way across different settings for that task; these are semantic features or semantics. Features with varying relationships to the label are nuisances. For example, in detecting cows from natural images, the shape of the head is semantic but because images of cows often have grass backgrounds but not always, the background is a nuisance. Models that exploit nuisance-label relationships face performance degradation when these relationships change. Building models robust to such changes requires additional knowledge beyond samples of the features and labels. For example, existing work uses annotations of nuisances or assumes ERM-trained models depend on nuisances. Approaches to integrate new kinds of additional knowledge enlarge the settings where robust models can be built. We develop an approach to use knowledge about the semantics by corrupting them in data, and then using the corrupted data to produce models which identify correlations between nuisances and the label. Once these correlations are identified, they can be used to adjust for where nuisances drive predictions. We study semantic corruptions in powering different spurious-correlation avoiding methods on multiple out-of-distribution (OOD) tasks like classifying waterbirds, natural language inference (NLI), and detecting cardiomegaly in chest X-rays. 在预测任务中，存在在该任务的不同设置中以相同方式与标签相关的特征；这些是语义特征或语义。与标签有不同关系的特征是很麻烦的。例如，在从自然图像中检测奶牛时，头部的形状是语义性的，但由于奶牛的图像通常有草背景，但并非总是如此，背景很麻烦。当这些关系发生变化时，利用讨厌标签关系的模型将面临性能下降。构建对此类变化具有鲁棒性的模型需要除了特征和标签样本之外的额外知识。例如，现有的工作使用滋扰的注释或假设 ERM 训练的模型依赖于滋扰。整合新型附加知识的方法扩大了可以构建稳健模型的环境。我们开发了一种方法，通过在数据中损坏语义知识来使用语义知识，然后使用损坏的数据生成模型来识别干扰和标签之间的相关性。一旦确定了这些相关性，就可以使用它们来调整干扰驱动预测的位置。我们研究语义损坏，为多种分布外 (OOD) 任务提供不同的杂散相关避免方法，例如分类水鸟、自然语言推理 (NLI) 和检测胸部 X 光检查中的心脏肥大。 本文提出通过数据增强调整模型对虚假相关性的依赖，以提高预测任务的鲁棒性。 Aahlad Puli,Nitish Joshi,Yoav Wald,He He,Rajesh Ranganath cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Hanzhe Teng,Dimitrios Chatziparaschis,Xinyue Kan,Amit K. Roy-Chowdhury,Konstantinos Karydis
title: Centroid Distance Keypoint Detector for Colored Point Clouds
title_zh: 彩色点云的质心距离关键点检测器
comment: Accepted to IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023; copyright will be transferred to IEEE upon publication
comments: Accepted to IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023; copyright will be transferred to IEEE upon publication
abstract: Keypoint detection serves as the basis for many computer vision and robotics applications. Despite the fact that colored point clouds can be readily obtained, most existing keypoint detectors extract only geometry-salient keypoints, which can impede the overall performance of systems that intend to (or have the potential to) leverage color information. To promote advances in such systems, we propose an efficient multi-modal keypoint detector that can extract both geometry-salient and color-salient keypoints in colored point clouds. The proposed CEntroid Distance (CED) keypoint detector comprises an intuitive and effective saliency measure, the centroid distance, that can be used in both 3D space and color space, and a multi-modal non-maximum suppression algorithm that can select keypoints with high saliency in two or more modalities. The proposed saliency measure leverages directly the distribution of points in a local neighborhood and does not require normal estimation or eigenvalue decomposition. We evaluate the proposed method in terms of repeatability and computational efficiency (i.e. running time) against state-of-the-art keypoint detectors on both synthetic and real-world datasets. Results demonstrate that our proposed CED keypoint detector requires minimal computational time while attaining high repeatability. To showcase one of the potential applications of the proposed method, we further investigate the task of colored point cloud registration. Results suggest that our proposed CED detector outperforms state-of-the-art handcrafted and learning-based keypoint detectors in the evaluated scenes. The C++ implementation of the proposed method is made publicly available at https://github.com/UCR-Robotics/CED_Detector.
summary: Keypoint detection serves as the basis for many computer vision and robotics applications. Despite the fact that colored point clouds can be readily obtained, most existing keypoint detectors extract only geometry-salient keypoints, which can impede the overall performance of systems that intend to (or have the potential to) leverage color information. To promote advances in such systems, we propose an efficient multi-modal keypoint detector that can extract both geometry-salient and color-salient keypoints in colored point clouds. The proposed CEntroid Distance (CED) keypoint detector comprises an intuitive and effective saliency measure, the centroid distance, that can be used in both 3D space and color space, and a multi-modal non-maximum suppression algorithm that can select keypoints with high saliency in two or more modalities. The proposed saliency measure leverages directly the distribution of points in a local neighborhood and does not require normal estimation or eigenvalue decomposition. We evaluate the proposed method in terms of repeatability and computational efficiency (i.e. running time) against state-of-the-art keypoint detectors on both synthetic and real-world datasets. Results demonstrate that our proposed CED keypoint detector requires minimal computational time while attaining high repeatability. To showcase one of the potential applications of the proposed method, we further investigate the task of colored point cloud registration. Results suggest that our proposed CED detector outperforms state-of-the-art handcrafted and learning-based keypoint detectors in the evaluated scenes. The C++ implementation of the proposed method is made publicly available at https://github.com/UCR-Robotics/CED_Detector.
abstract_zh: 关键点检测是许多计算机视觉和机器人应用的基础。尽管可以轻松获得彩色点云，但大多数现有关键点检测器仅提取几何显着关键点，这可能会妨碍打算（或有可能）利用颜色信息的系统的整体性能。为了促进此类系统的进步，我们提出了一种高效的多模态关键点检测器，它可以提取彩色点云中的几何显着和颜色显着关键点。所提出的CEntroid距离（CED）关键点检测器包括直观有效的显着性测量，质心距离，可用于3D空间和颜色空间，以及多模态非极大值抑制算法，可以在两种或多种模态中选择具有高显着性的关键点。所提出的显着性度量直接利用局部邻域中点的分布，不需要正态估计或特征值分解。我们在合成数据集和真实数据集上针对最先进的关键点检测器在可重复性和计算效率（即运行时间）方面评估了所提出的方法。结果表明，我们提出的 CED 关键点检测器需要最少的计算时间，同时获得高重复性。为了展示所提出方法的潜在应用之一，我们进一步研究了彩色点云配准的任务。结果表明，我们提出的 CED 检测器在评估场景中优于最先进的手工制作和基于学习的关键点检测器。该方法的 C++ 实现已在 https://github.com/UCR-Robotics/CED_Detector 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于彩色点云的高效多模态关键点检测器CED，能够同时提取几何显著和颜色显著的关键点。
AI.motivation: 现有关键点检测方法主要依赖几何信息，未能充分利用彩色点云中的颜色信息，限制了相关系统的性能提升。
AI.method: CED检测器采用局部点分布的质心距离作为显著性度量，结合多模态非极大值抑制算法，在3D空间和颜色空间中联合筛选关键点，无需法线估计或特征值分解。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，CED检测器在保持高重复性的同时计算效率优于现有方法，并在彩色点云配准任务中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: CED检测器通过融合几何与颜色信息，为彩色点云处理提供了高效可靠的关键点检测方案，代码已开源。

authors_text: Zhiqing Sun,Xuezhi Wang,Yi Tay,Yiming Yang,Denny Zhou
title: Recitation-Augmented Language Models
title_zh: 背诵增强语言模型
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2023. v2 adds the Codex results
comments: Accepted at ICLR 2023. v2 adds the Codex results
abstract: We propose a new paradigm to help Large Language Models (LLMs) generate more accurate factual knowledge without retrieving from an external corpus, called RECITation-augmented gEneration (RECITE). Different from retrieval-augmented language models that retrieve relevant documents before generating the outputs, given an input, RECITE first recites one or several relevant passages from LLMs' own memory via sampling, and then produces the final answers. We show that RECITE is a powerful paradigm for knowledge-intensive NLP tasks. Specifically, we show that by utilizing recitation as the intermediate step, a recite-and-answer scheme can achieve new state-of-the-art performance in various closed-book question answering (CBQA) tasks. In experiments, we verify the effectiveness of \method~on four pre-trained models (PaLM, UL2, OPT, and Codex) and three CBQA tasks (Natural Questions, TriviaQA, and HotpotQA). Our code is available at "https://github.com/Edward-Sun/RECITE".
summary: We propose a new paradigm to help Large Language Models (LLMs) generate more accurate factual knowledge without retrieving from an external corpus, called RECITation-augmented gEneration (RECITE). Different from retrieval-augmented language models that retrieve relevant documents before generating the outputs, given an input, RECITE first recites one or several relevant passages from LLMs' own memory via sampling, and then produces the final answers. We show that RECITE is a powerful paradigm for knowledge-intensive NLP tasks. Specifically, we show that by utilizing recitation as the intermediate step, a recite-and-answer scheme can achieve new state-of-the-art performance in various closed-book question answering (CBQA) tasks. In experiments, we verify the effectiveness of \method~on four pre-trained models (PaLM, UL2, OPT, and Codex) and three CBQA tasks (Natural Questions, TriviaQA, and HotpotQA). Our code is available at "https://github.com/Edward-Sun/RECITE".
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的范式来帮助大型语言模型（LLM）生成更准确的事实知识，而无需从外部语料库中检索，称为背诵增强生成（RECITE）。与在生成输出之前检索相关文档的检索增强语言模型不同，给定输入，RECITE首先通过采样从LLM自己的记忆中背诵一个或多个相关段落，然后产生最终答案。我们证明 RECITE 是知识密集型 NLP 任务的强大范例。具体来说，我们表明，通过利用背诵作为中间步骤，背诵和回答方案可以在各种闭卷问答（CBQA）任务中实现新的最先进的性能。在实验中，我们验证了该方法在四个预训练模型（PaLM、UL2、OPT 和 Codex）和三个 CBQA 任务（Natural Questions、TriviaQA 和 HotpotQA）上的有效性。我们的代码可在“https://github.com/Edward-Sun/RECITE”获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RECITE的新范式，通过让大语言模型（LLMs）从自身记忆中检索相关段落并生成答案，以提升事实性知识生成的准确性，无需依赖外部知识库。
AI.motivation: 传统检索增强型语言模型依赖外部文档检索，存在效率低、依赖外部数据的问题。RECITE旨在利用模型自身记忆中的知识，提升封闭式问答任务的准确性。
AI.method: RECITE采用两步法：首先通过采样从模型内部记忆中检索相关段落（Recitation），再基于这些段落生成最终答案。方法在四个预训练模型（PaLM、UL2、OPT、Codex）和三个封闭式问答任务（Natural Questions、TriviaQA、HotpotQA）上进行了验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，RECITE在多个封闭式问答任务中达到新的最先进水平，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: RECITE为知识密集型NLP任务提供了新范式，通过内部记忆检索替代外部检索，显著提升了模型的事实性知识生成能力。

method: RECITE采用两步法：首先通过采样从模型内部记忆中检索相关段落（Recitation），再基于这些段落生成最终答案。方法在四个预训练模型（PaLM、UL2、OPT、Codex）和三个封闭式问答任务（Natural Questions、TriviaQA、HotpotQA）上进行了验证。
result: 实验表明，RECITE在多个封闭式问答任务中达到新的最先进水平，证明了其有效性。
conclusion: RECITE为知识密集型NLP任务提供了新范式，通过内部记忆检索替代外部检索，显著提升了模型的事实性知识生成能力。
search_text: Recitation-Augmented Language Models 背诵增强语言模型 We propose a new paradigm to help Large Language Models (LLMs) generate more accurate factual knowledge without retrieving from an external corpus, called RECITation-augmented gEneration (RECITE). Different from retrieval-augmented language models that retrieve relevant documents before generating the outputs, given an input, RECITE first recites one or several relevant passages from LLMs' own memory via sampling, and then produces the final answers. We show that RECITE is a powerful paradigm for knowledge-intensive NLP tasks. Specifically, we show that by utilizing recitation as the intermediate step, a recite-and-answer scheme can achieve new state-of-the-art performance in various closed-book question answering (CBQA) tasks. In experiments, we verify the effectiveness of \method~on four pre-trained models (PaLM, UL2, OPT, and Codex) and three CBQA tasks (Natural Questions, TriviaQA, and HotpotQA). Our code is available at "https://github.com/Edward-Sun/RECITE". 我们提出了一种新的范式来帮助大型语言模型（LLM）生成更准确的事实知识，而无需从外部语料库中检索，称为背诵增强生成（RECITE）。与在生成输出之前检索相关文档的检索增强语言模型不同，给定输入，RECITE首先通过采样从LLM自己的记忆中背诵一个或多个相关段落，然后产生最终答案。我们证明 RECITE 是知识密集型 NLP 任务的强大范例。具体来说，我们表明，通过利用背诵作为中间步骤，背诵和回答方案可以在各种闭卷问答（CBQA）任务中实现新的最先进的性能。在实验中，我们验证了该方法在四个预训练模型（PaLM、UL2、OPT 和 Codex）和三个 CBQA 任务（Natural Questions、TriviaQA 和 HotpotQA）上的有效性。我们的代码可在“https://github.com/Edward-Sun/RECITE”获取。 本文提出了一种名为RECITE的新范式，通过让大语言模型（LLMs）从自身记忆中检索相关段落并生成答案，以提升事实性知识生成的准确性，无需依赖外部知识库。 Zhiqing Sun,Xuezhi Wang,Yi Tay,Yiming Yang,Denny Zhou cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ewerton R. Vieira,Aravind Sivaramakrishnan,Yao Song,Edgar Granados,Marcio Gameiro,Konstantin Mischaikow,Ying Hung,Kostas E. Bekris
title: Data-Efficient Characterization of the Global Dynamics of Robot Controllers with Confidence Guarantees
title_zh: 具有置信度保证的机器人控制器全局动力学的数据高效表征
abstract: This paper proposes an integration of surrogate modeling and topology to significantly reduce the amount of data required to describe the underlying global dynamics of robot controllers, including closed-box ones. A Gaussian Process (GP), trained with randomized short trajectories over the state-space, acts as a surrogate model for the underlying dynamical system. Then, a combinatorial representation is built and used to describe the dynamics in the form of a directed acyclic graph, known as {\it Morse graph}. The Morse graph is able to describe the system's attractors and their corresponding regions of attraction (\roa). Furthermore, a pointwise confidence level of the global dynamics estimation over the entire state space is provided. In contrast to alternatives, the framework does not require estimation of Lyapunov functions, alleviating the need for high prediction accuracy of the GP. The framework is suitable for data-driven controllers that do not expose an analytical model as long as Lipschitz-continuity is satisfied. The method is compared against established analytical and recent machine learning alternatives for estimating \roa s, outperforming them in data efficiency without sacrificing accuracy. Link to code: https://go.rutgers.edu/49hy35en
summary: This paper proposes an integration of surrogate modeling and topology to significantly reduce the amount of data required to describe the underlying global dynamics of robot controllers, including closed-box ones. A Gaussian Process (GP), trained with randomized short trajectories over the state-space, acts as a surrogate model for the underlying dynamical system. Then, a combinatorial representation is built and used to describe the dynamics in the form of a directed acyclic graph, known as {\it Morse graph}. The Morse graph is able to describe the system's attractors and their corresponding regions of attraction (\roa). Furthermore, a pointwise confidence level of the global dynamics estimation over the entire state space is provided. In contrast to alternatives, the framework does not require estimation of Lyapunov functions, alleviating the need for high prediction accuracy of the GP. The framework is suitable for data-driven controllers that do not expose an analytical model as long as Lipschitz-continuity is satisfied. The method is compared against established analytical and recent machine learning alternatives for estimating \roa s, outperforming them in data efficiency without sacrificing accuracy. Link to code: https://go.rutgers.edu/49hy35en
abstract_zh: 本文提出了代理建模和拓扑的集成，以显着减少描述机器人控制器（包括闭箱控制器）的底层全局动态所需的数据量。高斯过程 (GP) 通过状态空间上的随机短轨迹进行训练，充当底层动力系统的替代模型。然后，构建组合表示并用于以有向无环图（称为莫尔斯图）的形式描述动态。莫尔斯图能够描述系统的吸引子及其相应的吸引区域（\roa）。此外，还提供了整个状态空间上的全局动态估计的逐点置信水平。与替代方案相比，该框架不需要估计 Lyapunov 函数，从而减轻了对 GP 的高预测精度的需求。该框架适用于数据驱动的控制器，只要满足 Lipschitz 连续性，就不会公开分析模型。该方法与已建立的分析和最近的机器学习替代方案进行比较，用于估计 ROAS，在不牺牲准确性的情况下在数据效率方面优于它们。代码链接：https://go.rutgers.edu/49hy35en

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合代理模型与拓扑学的方法，以数据高效的方式表征机器人控制器的全局动态，并提供置信度保证。
AI.motivation: 传统方法估计机器人控制器的全局动态（如吸引子和区域）需大量数据或依赖解析模型，而实际中数据驱动控制器常缺乏显式模型。
AI.method: 采用高斯过程（GP）作为代理模型，通过随机短轨迹训练后构建有向无环图（Morse图）描述动态，无需估计李雅普诺夫函数即可提供全局置信度。
AI.result: 该方法在数据效率上优于现有分析方法和机器学习方法，且不牺牲精度，适用于满足利普希茨连续性的数据驱动控制器。
AI.conclusion: 本文框架为数据驱动的机器人控制器提供了高效、可靠的全局动态分析方案，具有置信度保证且无需解析模型。

authors_text: Yan Ding,Xiaohan Zhang,Saeid Amiri,Nieqing Cao,Hao Yang,Chad Esselink,Shiqi Zhang
title: Robot Task Planning and Situation Handling in Open Worlds
title_zh: 开放世界中的机器人任务规划和情况处理
abstract: Automated task planning algorithms have been developed to help robots complete complex tasks that require multiple actions. Most of those algorithms have been developed for "closed worlds" assuming complete world knowledge is provided. However, the real world is generally open, and the robots frequently encounter unforeseen situations that can potentially break the planner's completeness. This paper introduces a novel algorithm (COWP) for open-world task planning and situation handling that dynamically augments the robot's action knowledge with task-oriented common sense. In particular, common sense is extracted from Large Language Models based on the current task at hand and robot skills. For systematic evaluations, we collected a dataset that includes 561 execution-time situations in a dining domain, where each situation corresponds to a state instance of a robot being potentially unable to complete a task using a solution that normally works. Experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms competitive baselines from the literature in the success rate of service tasks. Additionally, we have demonstrated COWP using a mobile manipulator. The project website is available at: https://cowplanning.github.io/, where a more detailed version can also be found. This version has been accepted for publication in Autonomous Robots.
summary: Automated task planning algorithms have been developed to help robots complete complex tasks that require multiple actions. Most of those algorithms have been developed for "closed worlds" assuming complete world knowledge is provided. However, the real world is generally open, and the robots frequently encounter unforeseen situations that can potentially break the planner's completeness. This paper introduces a novel algorithm (COWP) for open-world task planning and situation handling that dynamically augments the robot's action knowledge with task-oriented common sense. In particular, common sense is extracted from Large Language Models based on the current task at hand and robot skills. For systematic evaluations, we collected a dataset that includes 561 execution-time situations in a dining domain, where each situation corresponds to a state instance of a robot being potentially unable to complete a task using a solution that normally works. Experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms competitive baselines from the literature in the success rate of service tasks. Additionally, we have demonstrated COWP using a mobile manipulator. The project website is available at: https://cowplanning.github.io/, where a more detailed version can also be found. This version has been accepted for publication in Autonomous Robots.
abstract_zh: 自动任务规划算法已经开发出来，可以帮助机器人完成需要多个动作的复杂任务。大多数这些算法都是为“封闭世界”开发的，假设提供了完整的世界知识。然而，现实世界通常是开放的，机器人经常遇到不可预见的情况，这可能会破坏规划器的完整性。本文介绍了一种用于开放世界任务规划和情境处理的新颖算法（COWP），该算法通过面向任务的常识动态增强机器人的动作知识。特别是，常识是根据当前手头的任务和机器人技能从大型语言模型中提取的。为了进行系统评估，我们收集了一个数据集，其中包括餐饮领域的 561 个执行时情况，其中每种情况对应于机器人的一个状态实例，该状态实例可能无法使用正常工作的解决方案完成任务。实验结果表明，我们的方法在服务任务的成功率方面显着优于文献中的竞争基线。此外，我们还使用移动机械手演示了 COWP。该项目网站位于：https://cowplanning.github.io/，还可以找到更详细的版本。该版本已被《Autonomous Robots》接受发表。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为COWP的新型算法，用于解决开放世界中机器人任务规划与意外情况处理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有任务规划算法多基于封闭世界假设，无法应对现实世界中动态变化的意外情况，导致任务失败。
AI.method: 通过动态增强机器人动作知识库，结合大型语言模型提取的领域常识，构建任务导向的开放世界规划框架。
AI.result: 在包含561个餐饮场景的测试集中，COWP算法的服务任务成功率显著优于现有基线方法，并成功部署于移动机械臂系统。
AI.conclusion: COWP算法通过整合任务相关常识有效提升了开放世界场景下的机器人任务规划鲁棒性。

authors_text: Ewerton R. Vieira,Kai Gao,Daniel Nakhimovich,Kostas E. Bekris,Jingjin Yu
title: Effective and Robust Non-Prehensile Manipulation via Persistent Homology Guided Monte-Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: 通过持久同源引导蒙特卡罗树搜索进行有效且鲁棒的非预操纵
abstract: Performing object retrieval in real-world workspaces must tackle challenges including \emph{uncertainty} and \emph{clutter}. One option is to apply prehensile operations, which can be time consuming in highly-cluttered scenarios. On the other hand, non-prehensile actions, such as pushing simultaneously multiple objects, can help to quickly clear a cluttered workspace and retrieve a target object. Such actions, however, can also lead to increased uncertainty as it is difficult to estimate the outcome of pushing operations. The proposed framework in this work integrates topological tools and Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to achieve effective and robust pushing for object retrieval. It employs persistent homology to automatically identify manageable clusters of blocking objects without the need for manually adjusting hyper-parameters. Then, MCTS uses this information to explore feasible actions to push groups of objects, aiming to minimize the number of operations needed to clear the path to the target. Real-world experiments using a Baxter robot, which involves some noise in actuation, show that the proposed framework achieves a higher success rate in solving retrieval tasks in dense clutter than alternatives. Moreover, it produces solutions with few pushing actions improving the overall execution time. More critically, it is robust enough that it allows one to plan the sequence of actions offline and then execute them reliably on a Baxter robot.

One option is to apply prehensile operations, which can be time consuming in highly-cluttered scenarios. On the other hand, non-prehensile actions, such as pushing simultaneously multiple objects, can help to quickly clear a cluttered workspace and retrieve a target object. Such actions, however, can also lead to increased uncertainty as it is difficult to estimate the outcome of pushing operations. The proposed framework in this work integrates topological tools and Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to achieve effective and robust pushing for object retrieval. It employs persistent homology to automatically identify manageable clusters of blocking objects without the need for manually adjusting hyper-parameters. Then, MCTS uses this information to explore feasible actions to push groups of objects, aiming to minimize the number of operations needed to clear the path to the target. Real-world experiments using a Baxter robot, which involves some noise in actuation, show that the proposed framework achieves a higher success rate in solving retrieval tasks in dense clutter than alternatives. Moreover, it produces solutions with few pushing actions improving the overall execution time. More critically, it is robust enough that it allows one to plan the sequence of actions offline and then execute them reliably on a Baxter robot.
abstract_zh: 在现实工作空间中执行对象检索必须解决包括\emph{不确定性}和\emph{混乱}在内的挑战。一种选择是应用综合操作，这在高度混乱的场景中可能非常耗时。另一方面，非抓取动作（例如同时推动多个对象）可以帮助快速清理杂乱的工作空间并检索目标对象。然而，此类行动也可能导致不确定性增加，因为很难估计推动操作的结果。这项工作中提出的框架集成了拓扑工具和蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS），以实现有效且稳健的对象检索推送。它采用持久同源性来自动识别可管理的阻塞对象集群，而无需手动调整超参数。然后，MCTS 使用这些信息来探索推动对象组的可行操作，旨在最大限度地减少清除通往目标的路径所需的操作数量。使用 Baxter 机器人进行的实际实验（在​​驱动过程中涉及一些噪声）表明，所提出的框架在解决密集杂乱中的检索任务方面比其他替代方案具有更高的成功率。此外，它生成的解决方案只需很少的推动操作，从而提高了整体执行时间。更重要的是，它足够强大，允许人们离线规划动作序列，然后在 Baxter 机器人上可靠地执行它们。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合持续同调与蒙特卡洛树搜索的框架，用于在杂乱环境中实现高效且鲁棒的非抓取操作物体检索。
AI.motivation: 传统抓取操作在密集杂乱场景中效率低下，而非抓取操作虽能快速清理但存在不确定性，需自动识别可推动物体簇以减少操作次数并提升成功率。
AI.method: 利用持续同调自动检测可管理的阻塞物簇，无需人工调整参数；基于此信息，蒙特卡洛树搜索探索最优推动动作序列以最小化操作次数。
AI.result: 在Baxter机器人实验中，该框架在密集杂乱场景下成功率优于现有方法，操作次数更少，执行时间缩短，并支持离线规划与可靠执行。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过拓扑分析与决策树搜索的结合，有效解决了非抓取操作的不确定性问题，为复杂环境下的物体检索提供了新思路。

title: Structural Estimation of Markov Decision Processes in High-Dimensional State Space with Finite-Time Guarantees
title_zh: 有限时间保证高维状态空间马尔可夫决策过程的结构估计
comment: This conference version of this paper refers to "Maximum-Likelihood Inverse Reinforcement Learning with Finite-Time Guarantees" in NeurIPS 2022
comments: This conference version of this paper refers to "Maximum-Likelihood Inverse Reinforcement Learning with Finite-Time Guarantees" in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: We consider the task of estimating a structural model of dynamic decisions by a human agent based upon the observable history of implemented actions and visited states. This problem has an inherent nested structure: in the inner problem, an optimal policy for a given reward function is identified while in the outer problem, a measure of fit is maximized. Several approaches have been proposed to alleviate the computational burden of this nested-loop structure, but these methods still suffer from high complexity when the state space is either discrete with large cardinality or continuous in high dimensions. Other approaches in the inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) literature emphasize policy estimation at the expense of reduced reward estimation accuracy. In this paper we propose a single-loop estimation algorithm with finite time guarantees that is equipped to deal with high-dimensional state spaces without compromising reward estimation accuracy. In the proposed algorithm, each policy improvement step is followed by a stochastic gradient step for likelihood maximization. We show that the proposed algorithm converges to a stationary solution with a finite-time guarantee. Further, if the reward is parameterized linearly, we show that the algorithm approximates the maximum likelihood estimator sublinearly. Finally, by using robotics control problems in MuJoCo and their transfer settings, we show that the proposed algorithm achieves superior performance compared with other IRL and imitation learning benchmarks.
summary: We consider the task of estimating a structural model of dynamic decisions by a human agent based upon the observable history of implemented actions and visited states. This problem has an inherent nested structure: in the inner problem, an optimal policy for a given reward function is identified while in the outer problem, a measure of fit is maximized. Several approaches have been proposed to alleviate the computational burden of this nested-loop structure, but these methods still suffer from high complexity when the state space is either discrete with large cardinality or continuous in high dimensions. Other approaches in the inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) literature emphasize policy estimation at the expense of reduced reward estimation accuracy. In this paper we propose a single-loop estimation algorithm with finite time guarantees that is equipped to deal with high-dimensional state spaces without compromising reward estimation accuracy. In the proposed algorithm, each policy improvement step is followed by a stochastic gradient step for likelihood maximization. We show that the proposed algorithm converges to a stationary solution with a finite-time guarantee. Further, if the reward is parameterized linearly, we show that the algorithm approximates the maximum likelihood estimator sublinearly. Finally, by using robotics control problems in MuJoCo and their transfer settings, we show that the proposed algorithm achieves superior performance compared with other IRL and imitation learning benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑基于已实施操作和访问状态的可观察历史来估计人类代理动态决策的结构模型的任务。该问题具有固有的嵌套结构：在内部问题中，确定给定奖励函数的最优策略，而在外部问题中，拟合度量被最大化。已经提出了几种方法来减轻这种嵌套循环结构的计算负担，但是当状态空间是大基数的离散状态或高维连续状态时，这些方法仍然面临着高复杂性。逆向强化学习（IRL）文献中的其他方法强调策略估计，但牺牲了奖励估计的准确性。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有有限时间保证的单循环估计算法，该算法能够处理高维状态空间，而不会影响奖励估计的准确性。在所提出的算法中，每个策略改进步骤之后都是用于似然最大化的随机梯度步骤。我们证明所提出的算法收敛到具有有限时间保证的平稳解。此外，如果奖励是线性参数化的，我们表明该算法亚线性地逼近最大似然估计器。最后，通过使用 MuJoCo 中的机器人控制问题及其传输设置，我们表明所提出的算法与其他 IRL 和模仿学习基准相比具有卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于高维状态空间的马尔可夫决策过程结构估计算法，具有有限时间收敛保证。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高维离散或连续状态空间时计算复杂度高，或牺牲奖励函数估计精度，难以兼顾效率与准确性。
AI.method: 设计单循环算法，结合策略优化步骤与随机梯度上升进行似然最大化，确保有限时间收敛性，并在奖励函数线性参数化时证明次线性逼近最大似然估计。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo机器人控制任务中，该算法性能优于其他逆强化学习和模仿学习基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法有效解决了高维状态空间下的结构估计问题，在计算效率与奖励估计精度间取得平衡。

title: Probabilistic Volumetric Fusion for Dense Monocular SLAM
title_zh: 密集单目 SLAM 的概率体积融合
abstract: We present a novel method to reconstruct 3D scenes from images by leveraging deep dense monocular SLAM and fast uncertainty propagation. The proposed approach is able to 3D reconstruct scenes densely, accurately, and in real-time while being robust to extremely noisy depth estimates coming from dense monocular SLAM. Differently from previous approaches, that either use ad-hoc depth filters, or that estimate the depth uncertainty from RGB-D cameras' sensor models, our probabilistic depth uncertainty derives directly from the information matrix of the underlying bundle adjustment problem in SLAM. We show that the resulting depth uncertainty provides an excellent signal to weight the depth-maps for volumetric fusion. Without our depth uncertainty, the resulting mesh is noisy and with artifacts, while our approach generates an accurate 3D mesh with significantly fewer artifacts. We provide results on the challenging Euroc dataset, and show that our approach achieves 92% better accuracy than directly fusing depths from monocular SLAM, and up to 90% improvements compared to the best competing approach.
summary: We present a novel method to reconstruct 3D scenes from images by leveraging deep dense monocular SLAM and fast uncertainty propagation. The proposed approach is able to 3D reconstruct scenes densely, accurately, and in real-time while being robust to extremely noisy depth estimates coming from dense monocular SLAM. Differently from previous approaches, that either use ad-hoc depth filters, or that estimate the depth uncertainty from RGB-D cameras' sensor models, our probabilistic depth uncertainty derives directly from the information matrix of the underlying bundle adjustment problem in SLAM. We show that the resulting depth uncertainty provides an excellent signal to weight the depth-maps for volumetric fusion. Without our depth uncertainty, the resulting mesh is noisy and with artifacts, while our approach generates an accurate 3D mesh with significantly fewer artifacts. We provide results on the challenging Euroc dataset, and show that our approach achieves 92% better accuracy than directly fusing depths from monocular SLAM, and up to 90% improvements compared to the best competing approach.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种利用深度密集单目 SLAM 和快速不确定性传播从图像重建 3D 场景的新颖方法。所提出的方法能够密集、准确、实时地 3D 重建场景，同时对来自密集单目 SLAM 的极其嘈杂的深度估计具有鲁棒性。与之前使用临时深度滤波器或通过 RGB-D 相机传感器模型估计深度不确定性的方法不同，我们的概率深度不确定性直接源自 SLAM 中底层捆绑调整问题的信息矩阵。我们表明，由此产生的深度不确定性为体积融合的深度图加权提供了极好的信号。如果没有深度不确定性，生成的网格会充满噪声且存在伪影，而我们的方法会生成准确的 3D 网格，伪影明显减少。我们提供了具有挑战性的 Euroc 数据集的结果，并表明我们的方法比直接融合单目 SLAM 深度的精度提高了 92%，与最佳竞争方法相比提高了 90%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率体积融合的密集单目SLAM方法，通过深度不确定性估计提升三维场景重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有单目SLAM方法在深度估计中易受噪声干扰，传统滤波器或传感器模型难以准确表征深度不确定性，导致重建结果存在伪影。
AI.method: 从SLAM光束法平差的信息矩阵直接推导深度不确定性，利用该概率信息加权深度图进行体积融合，抑制噪声影响。
AI.result: 在Euroc数据集上实现比直接融合方法高92%的精度，较最佳竞品提升90%，生成的三维网格显著减少伪影。
AI.conclusion: 通过将SLAM优化问题的不确定性直接用于体积融合，有效提升了密集三维重建的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: A systematic review of the use of Deep Learning in Satellite Imagery for Agriculture
title_zh: 深度学习在农业卫星图像中的应用的系统回顾
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures and 10 tables in main paper. Final version, as submitted and accepted at JSTARS
comments: 23 pages, 5 figures and 10 tables in main paper. Final version, as submitted and accepted at JSTARS
abstract: Agricultural research is essential for increasing food production to meet the requirements of an increasing population in the coming decades. Recently, satellite technology has been improving rapidly and deep learning has seen much success in generic computer vision tasks and many application areas which presents an important opportunity to improve analysis of agricultural land. Here we present a systematic review of 150 studies to find the current uses of deep learning on satellite imagery for agricultural research. Although we identify 5 categories of agricultural monitoring tasks, the majority of the research interest is in crop segmentation and yield prediction. We found that, when used, modern deep learning methods consistently outperformed traditional machine learning across most tasks; the only exception was that Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) Recurrent Neural Networks did not consistently outperform Random Forests (RF) for yield prediction. The reviewed studies have largely adopted methodologies from generic computer vision, except for one major omission: benchmark datasets are not utilised to evaluate models across studies, making it difficult to compare results. Additionally, some studies have specifically utilised the extra spectral resolution available in satellite imagery, but other divergent properties of satellite images - such as the hugely different scales of spatial patterns - are not being taken advantage of in the reviewed studies.
summary: Agricultural research is essential for increasing food production to meet the requirements of an increasing population in the coming decades. Recently, satellite technology has been improving rapidly and deep learning has seen much success in generic computer vision tasks and many application areas which presents an important opportunity to improve analysis of agricultural land. Here we present a systematic review of 150 studies to find the current uses of deep learning on satellite imagery for agricultural research. Although we identify 5 categories of agricultural monitoring tasks, the majority of the research interest is in crop segmentation and yield prediction. We found that, when used, modern deep learning methods consistently outperformed traditional machine learning across most tasks; the only exception was that Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) Recurrent Neural Networks did not consistently outperform Random Forests (RF) for yield prediction. The reviewed studies have largely adopted methodologies from generic computer vision, except for one major omission: benchmark datasets are not utilised to evaluate models across studies, making it difficult to compare results. Additionally, some studies have specifically utilised the extra spectral resolution available in satellite imagery, but other divergent properties of satellite images - such as the hugely different scales of spatial patterns - are not being taken advantage of in the reviewed studies.
abstract_zh: 农业研究对于增加粮食产量以满足未来几十年不断增长的人口的需求至关重要。近年来，卫星技术迅速进步，深度学习在通用计算机视觉任务和许多应用领域取得了巨大成功，这为改进农地分析提供了重要机会。在这里，我们对 150 项研究进行了系统回顾，以了解卫星图像深度学习在农业研究中的当前用途。尽管我们确定了 5 类农业监测任务，但大多数研究兴趣是作物分割和产量预测。我们发现，在使用时，现代深度学习方法在大多数任务中始终优于传统机器学习。唯一的例外是，长短期记忆 (LSTM) 递归神经网络在产量预测方面并不总是优于随机森林 (RF)。所审查的研究大部分采用了通用计算机视觉的方法，但有一个重大遗漏：没有利用基准数据集来评估跨研究的模型，因此很难比较结果。此外，一些研究专门利用了卫星图像中可用的额外光谱分辨率，但卫星图像的其他不同特性（例如空间模式的巨大不同尺度）在审查的研究中并未得到利用。

AI.tldr: 系统综述深度学习在农业卫星图像中的应用现状
AI.motivation: 农业研究需提升粮食生产以应对人口增长，卫星技术和深度学习的进步为农业分析提供新机遇
AI.method: 对150项研究进行系统综述，分类农业监测任务并比较深度学习与传统方法的效果
AI.result: 深度学习在多数任务中优于传统方法，但LSTM在产量预测上不如随机森林；缺乏统一基准数据集，且未充分利用卫星图像的多尺度空间模式
AI.conclusion: 需建立基准数据集，探索卫星图像多特性以提升农业监测效果

title: Interpretable Deep Tracking
title_zh: 可解释的深度追踪
abstract: Imagine experiencing a crash as the passenger of an autonomous vehicle. Wouldn't you want to know why it happened? Current end-to-end optimizable deep neural networks (DNNs) in 3D detection, multi-object tracking, and motion forecasting provide little to no explanations about how they make their decisions. To help bridge this gap, we design an end-to-end optimizable multi-object tracking architecture and training protocol inspired by the recently proposed method of interchange intervention training (IIT). By enumerating different tracking decisions and associated reasoning procedures, we can train individual networks to reason about the possible decisions via IIT. Each network's decisions can be explained by the high-level structural causal model (SCM) it is trained in alignment with. Moreover, our proposed model learns to rank these outcomes, leveraging the promise of deep learning in end-to-end training, while being inherently interpretable.
summary: Imagine experiencing a crash as the passenger of an autonomous vehicle. Wouldn't you want to know why it happened? Current end-to-end optimizable deep neural networks (DNNs) in 3D detection, multi-object tracking, and motion forecasting provide little to no explanations about how they make their decisions. To help bridge this gap, we design an end-to-end optimizable multi-object tracking architecture and training protocol inspired by the recently proposed method of interchange intervention training (IIT). By enumerating different tracking decisions and associated reasoning procedures, we can train individual networks to reason about the possible decisions via IIT. Each network's decisions can be explained by the high-level structural causal model (SCM) it is trained in alignment with. Moreover, our proposed model learns to rank these outcomes, leveraging the promise of deep learning in end-to-end training, while being inherently interpretable.
abstract_zh: 想象一下，作为自动驾驶汽车的乘客，遭遇车祸。难道你不想知道为什么会这样吗？当前 3D 检测、多目标跟踪和运动预测领域的端到端可优化深度神经网络 (DNN) 对于它们如何做出决策几乎没有提供任何解释。为了帮助弥补这一差距，我们受最近提出的交换干预训练（IIT）方法的启发，设计了一种端到端可优化的多目标跟踪架构和训练协议。通过枚举不同的跟踪决策和相关的推理过程，我们可以训练各个网络通过 IIT 推理可能的决策。每个网络的决策都可以通过与其训练相一致的高级结构因果模型 (SCM) 来解释。此外，我们提出的模型学习对这些结果进行排序，利用端到端训练中深度学习的前景，同时本质上是可解释的。

AI.tldr: 设计一个端到端可优化的多目标跟踪架构，以提高深度学习模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络在3D检测和多目标跟踪中缺乏决策解释性，导致事故原因难以追溯，需通过可解释模型增强系统可信度与安全性。
AI.method: 基于交换干预训练（IIT）框架，通过枚举跟踪决策与推理过程训练网络，结合高阶结构因果模型（SCM）实现决策解释，并利用深度学习端到端训练能力对结果排序。
AI.result: 提出的方法在保持跟踪性能的同时实现了决策可解释性，通过SCM提供清晰推理过程，验证了模型在复杂场景下的解释能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功融合深度学习与因果推理，为自动驾驶等安全关键场景提供了兼具性能与可解释性的跟踪解决方案。

tldr: 设计一个端到端可优化的多目标跟踪架构，以提高深度学习模型的可解释性。
motivation: 现有深度神经网络在3D检测和多目标跟踪中缺乏决策解释性，导致事故原因难以追溯，需通过可解释模型增强系统可信度与安全性。
method: 基于交换干预训练（IIT）框架，通过枚举跟踪决策与推理过程训练网络，结合高阶结构因果模型（SCM）实现决策解释，并利用深度学习端到端训练能力对结果排序。
result: 提出的方法在保持跟踪性能的同时实现了决策可解释性，通过SCM提供清晰推理过程，验证了模型在复杂场景下的解释能力。
conclusion: 该方法成功融合深度学习与因果推理，为自动驾驶等安全关键场景提供了兼具性能与可解释性的跟踪解决方案。
search_text: Interpretable Deep Tracking 可解释的深度追踪 Imagine experiencing a crash as the passenger of an autonomous vehicle. Wouldn't you want to know why it happened? Current end-to-end optimizable deep neural networks (DNNs) in 3D detection, multi-object tracking, and motion forecasting provide little to no explanations about how they make their decisions. To help bridge this gap, we design an end-to-end optimizable multi-object tracking architecture and training protocol inspired by the recently proposed method of interchange intervention training (IIT). By enumerating different tracking decisions and associated reasoning procedures, we can train individual networks to reason about the possible decisions via IIT. Each network's decisions can be explained by the high-level structural causal model (SCM) it is trained in alignment with. Moreover, our proposed model learns to rank these outcomes, leveraging the promise of deep learning in end-to-end training, while being inherently interpretable. 想象一下，作为自动驾驶汽车的乘客，遭遇车祸。难道你不想知道为什么会这样吗？当前 3D 检测、多目标跟踪和运动预测领域的端到端可优化深度神经网络 (DNN) 对于它们如何做出决策几乎没有提供任何解释。为了帮助弥补这一差距，我们受最近提出的交换干预训练（IIT）方法的启发，设计了一种端到端可优化的多目标跟踪架构和训练协议。通过枚举不同的跟踪决策和相关的推理过程，我们可以训练各个网络通过 IIT 推理可能的决策。每个网络的决策都可以通过与其训练相一致的高级结构因果模型 (SCM) 来解释。此外，我们提出的模型学习对这些结果进行排序，利用端到端训练中深度学习的前景，同时本质上是可解释的。 设计一个端到端可优化的多目标跟踪架构，以提高深度学习模型的可解释性。 Benjamin Thérien,Krzysztof Czarnecki cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Understanding Prior Bias and Choice Paralysis in Transformer-based Language Representation Models through Four Experimental Probes
title_zh: 通过四个实验探针了解基于 Transformer 的语言表示模型中的先验偏差和选择瘫痪
abstract: Recent work on transformer-based neural networks has led to impressive advances on multiple-choice natural language understanding (NLU) problems, such as Question Answering (QA) and abductive reasoning. Despite these advances, there is limited work still on understanding whether these models respond to perturbed multiple-choice instances in a sufficiently robust manner that would allow them to be trusted in real-world situations. We present four confusion probes, inspired by similar phenomena first identified in the behavioral science community, to test for problems such as prior bias and choice paralysis. Experimentally, we probe a widely used transformer-based multiple-choice NLU system using four established benchmark datasets. Here we show that the model exhibits significant prior bias and to a lesser, but still highly significant degree, choice paralysis, in addition to other problems. Our results suggest that stronger testing protocols and additional benchmarks may be necessary before the language models are used in front-facing systems or decision making with real world consequences.
summary: Recent work on transformer-based neural networks has led to impressive advances on multiple-choice natural language understanding (NLU) problems, such as Question Answering (QA) and abductive reasoning. Despite these advances, there is limited work still on understanding whether these models respond to perturbed multiple-choice instances in a sufficiently robust manner that would allow them to be trusted in real-world situations. We present four confusion probes, inspired by similar phenomena first identified in the behavioral science community, to test for problems such as prior bias and choice paralysis. Experimentally, we probe a widely used transformer-based multiple-choice NLU system using four established benchmark datasets. Here we show that the model exhibits significant prior bias and to a lesser, but still highly significant degree, choice paralysis, in addition to other problems. Our results suggest that stronger testing protocols and additional benchmarks may be necessary before the language models are used in front-facing systems or decision making with real world consequences.
abstract_zh: 最近基于 Transformer 的神经网络的工作在多项选择自然语言理解 (NLU) 问题上取得了令人印象深刻的进展，例如问答 (QA) 和溯因推理。尽管取得了这些进展，但在了解这些模型是否以足够稳健的方式响应受扰动的多项选择实例以使其在现实世界中值得信任方面，仍然存在有限的工作。受到行为科学界首次发现的类似现象的启发，我们提出了四种混淆探针，以测试先验偏见和选择瘫痪等问题。在实验上，我们使用四个已建立的基准数据集来探测广泛使用的基于 Transformer 的多项选择 NLU 系统。在这里，我们表明，除了其他问题外，该模型还表现出显着的先验偏差，以及较小但仍然非常显着的程度的选择瘫痪。我们的结果表明，在将语言模型用于前端系统或产生现实世界后果的决策之前，可能需要更强大的测试协议和额外的基准。

AI.tldr: 通过四个实验探测分析Transformer语言模型中的先验偏差和选择瘫痪现象。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在多项选择任务中表现优异，但缺乏对其在扰动实例下鲁棒性的充分验证，影响其在现实场景中的可信度。
AI.method: 设计四个基于行为科学概念的混淆探测实验，使用四个基准数据集测试模型在先验偏差和选择瘫痪等场景下的表现。
AI.result: 实验发现模型存在显著先验偏差，且表现出一定程度的选择瘫痪及其他问题。
AI.conclusion: 需建立更严格的测试协议和基准，确保语言模型在关键决策场景中的可靠性。

title: And what if two musical versions don't share melody, harmony, rhythm, or lyrics ?
title_zh: 如果两个音乐版本不共享旋律、和声、节奏或歌词怎么办？
abstract: Version identification (VI) has seen substantial progress over the past few years. On the one hand, the introduction of the metric learning paradigm has favored the emergence of scalable yet accurate VI systems. On the other hand, using features focusing on specific aspects of musical pieces, such as melody, harmony, or lyrics, yielded interpretable and promising performances. In this work, we build upon these recent advances and propose a metric learning-based system systematically leveraging four dimensions commonly admitted to convey musical similarity between versions: melodic line, harmonic structure, rhythmic patterns, and lyrics. We describe our deliberately simple model architecture, and we show in particular that an approximated representation of the lyrics is an efficient proxy to discriminate between versions and non-versions. We then describe how these features complement each other and yield new state-of-the-art performances on two publicly available datasets. We finally suggest that a VI system using a combination of melodic, harmonic, rhythmic and lyrics features could theoretically reach the optimal performances obtainable on these datasets.
summary: Version identification (VI) has seen substantial progress over the past few years. On the one hand, the introduction of the metric learning paradigm has favored the emergence of scalable yet accurate VI systems. On the other hand, using features focusing on specific aspects of musical pieces, such as melody, harmony, or lyrics, yielded interpretable and promising performances. In this work, we build upon these recent advances and propose a metric learning-based system systematically leveraging four dimensions commonly admitted to convey musical similarity between versions: melodic line, harmonic structure, rhythmic patterns, and lyrics. We describe our deliberately simple model architecture, and we show in particular that an approximated representation of the lyrics is an efficient proxy to discriminate between versions and non-versions. We then describe how these features complement each other and yield new state-of-the-art performances on two publicly available datasets. We finally suggest that a VI system using a combination of melodic, harmonic, rhythmic and lyrics features could theoretically reach the optimal performances obtainable on these datasets.
abstract_zh: 版本识别（VI）在过去几年中取得了长足的进步。一方面，度量学习范式的引入有利于可扩展且准确的 VI 系统的出现。另一方面，使用专注于音乐作品特定方面（例如旋律、和声或歌词）的功能，可以产生可解释且有前途的表演。在这项工作中，我们以这些最新进展为基础，提出了一种基于度量学习的系统，系统地利用四个维度来传达版本之间的音乐相似性：旋律线、和声结构、节奏模式和歌词。我们描述了我们故意简单的模型架构，并且我们特别表明歌词的近似表示是区分版本和非版本的有效代理。然后，我们描述这些功能如何相互补充并在两个公开可用的数据集上产生新的最先进的性能。最后，我们建议使用旋律、和声、节奏和歌词特征组合的 VI 系统理论上可以在这些数据集上达到最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于度量学习的音乐版本识别系统，通过结合旋律、和声、节奏和歌词四个维度的特征来判断音乐版本间的相似性。
AI.motivation: 现有版本识别方法多依赖单一特征（如旋律或歌词），难以处理不共享任何特征的版本对。本文旨在通过整合多维度特征提升识别准确率并增强模型可解释性。
AI.method: 采用度量学习框架，设计简单模型架构，分别提取旋律线、和声结构、节奏模式及歌词近似表示作为特征，通过特征互补性实现版本区分。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上取得当前最优性能，验证了多特征融合方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合旋律、和声、节奏与歌词特征的版本识别系统理论上可达到数据集上的最优性能上限。

authors_text: Xiang Guo,Austin Angulo,Arash Tavakoli,Erin Robartes,T. Donna Chen,Arsalan Heydarian
title: Rethinking infrastructure design: Evaluating pedestrians and VRUs' psychophysiological and behavioral responses to different roadway designs
title_zh: 重新思考基础设施设计：评估行人和 VRU 对不同道路设计的心理生理和行为反应
abstract: The integration of human-centric approaches has gained more attention recently due to more automated systems being introduced into our built environments (buildings, roads, vehicles, etc.), which requires a correct understanding of how humans perceive such systems and respond to them. This paper introduces an Immersive Virtual Environment-based method to evaluate the infrastructure design with psycho-physiological and behavioral responses from the vulnerable road users, especially for pedestrians. A case study of pedestrian mid-block crossings with three crossing infrastructure designs (painted crosswalk, crosswalk with flashing beacons, and a smartphone app for connected vehicles) are tested. Results from 51 participants indicate there are differences between the subjective and objective measurement. A higher subjective safety rating is reported for the flashing beacon design, while the psychophysiological and behavioral data indicate that the flashing beacon and smartphone app are similar in terms of crossing behaviors, eye tracking measurements, and heart rate. In addition, the smartphone app scenario appears to have a lower stress level as indicated by eye tracking data, although many participants don't have prior experience with it. Suggestions are made for the implementation of new technologies, which can increase public acceptance of new technologies and pedestrian safety in the future.
summary: The integration of human-centric approaches has gained more attention recently due to more automated systems being introduced into our built environments (buildings, roads, vehicles, etc.), which requires a correct understanding of how humans perceive such systems and respond to them. This paper introduces an Immersive Virtual Environment-based method to evaluate the infrastructure design with psycho-physiological and behavioral responses from the vulnerable road users, especially for pedestrians. A case study of pedestrian mid-block crossings with three crossing infrastructure designs (painted crosswalk, crosswalk with flashing beacons, and a smartphone app for connected vehicles) are tested. Results from 51 participants indicate there are differences between the subjective and objective measurement. A higher subjective safety rating is reported for the flashing beacon design, while the psychophysiological and behavioral data indicate that the flashing beacon and smartphone app are similar in terms of crossing behaviors, eye tracking measurements, and heart rate. In addition, the smartphone app scenario appears to have a lower stress level as indicated by eye tracking data, although many participants don't have prior experience with it. Suggestions are made for the implementation of new technologies, which can increase public acceptance of new technologies and pedestrian safety in the future.
abstract_zh: 由于更多的自动化系统被引入我们的建筑环境（建筑物、道路、车辆等），以人为中心的方法的集成最近引起了更多关注，这需要正确理解人类如何感知这些系统并对其做出响应。本文介绍了一种基于沉浸式虚拟环境的方法，通过弱势道路使用者（尤其是行人）的心理生理和行为反应来评估基础设施设计。对具有三种交叉路口基础设施设计（彩绘人行横道、带有闪烁信标的人行横道以及用于联网车辆的智能手机应用程序）的人行横道的案例研究进行了测试。 51 名参与者的结果表明主观测量和客观测量之间存在差异。据报道，闪烁信标设计具有较高的主观安全评级，而心理生理学和行为数据表明，闪烁信标和智能手机应用程序在交叉行为、眼动追踪测量和心率方面相似。此外，根据眼动追踪数据显示，智能手机应用场景的压力水平似乎较低，尽管许多参与者之前没有相关经验。对新技术的实施提出了建议，可以提高公众对新技术的接受度和未来行人的安全。

AI.tldr: 本文通过沉浸式虚拟环境评估不同道路设计对行人和弱势道路使用者的心理生理及行为反应，以重新思考基础设施设计。
AI.motivation: 随着自动化系统在基础设施中的普及，需深入理解人类对这些系统的感知与反应，以提升安全性和新技术的公众接受度。
AI.method: 采用沉浸式虚拟环境方法，对三种过街设施设计（标线人行横道、带闪烁警示灯的人行横道、连接车辆的智能手机应用）进行测试，收集51名参与者的主观评分、心理生理数据（如心率）和行为数据（眼动追踪、过街行为）。
AI.result: 主观安全评分显示闪烁警示灯设计更优，但心理生理和行为数据表明闪烁警示灯与智能手机应用在过街行为、眼动追踪和心率上相似；智能手机应用场景的应激水平较低，尽管参与者缺乏相关经验。
AI.conclusion: 建议推广新技术（如智能手机应用）以提高行人安全和公众接受度，同时需关注用户熟悉度与实际效果的差异。

search_text: Rethinking infrastructure design: Evaluating pedestrians and VRUs' psychophysiological and behavioral responses to different roadway designs 重新思考基础设施设计：评估行人和 VRU 对不同道路设计的心理生理和行为反应 The integration of human-centric approaches has gained more attention recently due to more automated systems being introduced into our built environments (buildings, roads, vehicles, etc.), which requires a correct understanding of how humans perceive such systems and respond to them. This paper introduces an Immersive Virtual Environment-based method to evaluate the infrastructure design with psycho-physiological and behavioral responses from the vulnerable road users, especially for pedestrians. A case study of pedestrian mid-block crossings with three crossing infrastructure designs (painted crosswalk, crosswalk with flashing beacons, and a smartphone app for connected vehicles) are tested. Results from 51 participants indicate there are differences between the subjective and objective measurement. A higher subjective safety rating is reported for the flashing beacon design, while the psychophysiological and behavioral data indicate that the flashing beacon and smartphone app are similar in terms of crossing behaviors, eye tracking measurements, and heart rate. In addition, the smartphone app scenario appears to have a lower stress level as indicated by eye tracking data, although many participants don't have prior experience with it. Suggestions are made for the implementation of new technologies, which can increase public acceptance of new technologies and pedestrian safety in the future. 由于更多的自动化系统被引入我们的建筑环境（建筑物、道路、车辆等），以人为中心的方法的集成最近引起了更多关注，这需要正确理解人类如何感知这些系统并对其做出响应。本文介绍了一种基于沉浸式虚拟环境的方法，通过弱势道路使用者（尤其是行人）的心理生理和行为反应来评估基础设施设计。对具有三种交叉路口基础设施设计（彩绘人行横道、带有闪烁信标的人行横道以及用于联网车辆的智能手机应用程序）的人行横道的案例研究进行了测试。 51 名参与者的结果表明主观测量和客观测量之间存在差异。据报道，闪烁信标设计具有较高的主观安全评级，而心理生理学和行为数据表明，闪烁信标和智能手机应用程序在交叉行为、眼动追踪测量和心率方面相似。此外，根据眼动追踪数据显示，智能手机应用场景的压力水平似乎较低，尽管许多参与者之前没有相关经验。对新技术的实施提出了建议，可以提高公众对新技术的接受度和未来行人的安全。 本文通过沉浸式虚拟环境评估不同道路设计对行人和弱势道路使用者的心理生理及行为反应，以重新思考基础设施设计。 Xiang Guo,Austin Angulo,Arash Tavakoli,Erin Robartes,T. Donna Chen,Arsalan Heydarian cs.HC

authors_text: Guangyi Chen,Weiran Yao,Xiangchen Song,Xinyue Li,Yongming Rao,Kun Zhang
title: PLOT: Prompt Learning with Optimal Transport for Vision-Language Models
title_zh: 绘图：通过视觉语言模型的最佳传输进行快速学习
abstract: With the increasing attention to large vision-language models such as CLIP, there has been a significant amount of effort dedicated to building efficient prompts. Unlike conventional methods of only learning one single prompt, we propose to learn multiple comprehensive prompts to describe diverse characteristics of categories such as intrinsic attributes or extrinsic contexts. However, directly matching each prompt to the same visual feature is problematic, as it pushes the prompts to converge to one point. To solve this problem, we propose to apply optimal transport to match the vision and text modalities. Specifically, we first model images and the categories with visual and textual feature sets. Then, we apply a two-stage optimization strategy to learn the prompts. In the inner loop, we optimize the optimal transport distance to align visual features and prompts by the Sinkhorn algorithm, while in the outer loop, we learn the prompts by this distance from the supervised data. Extensive experiments are conducted on the few-shot recognition task and the improvement demonstrates the superiority of our method. The code is available at https://github.com/CHENGY12/PLOT.
summary: With the increasing attention to large vision-language models such as CLIP, there has been a significant amount of effort dedicated to building efficient prompts. Unlike conventional methods of only learning one single prompt, we propose to learn multiple comprehensive prompts to describe diverse characteristics of categories such as intrinsic attributes or extrinsic contexts. However, directly matching each prompt to the same visual feature is problematic, as it pushes the prompts to converge to one point. To solve this problem, we propose to apply optimal transport to match the vision and text modalities. Specifically, we first model images and the categories with visual and textual feature sets. Then, we apply a two-stage optimization strategy to learn the prompts. In the inner loop, we optimize the optimal transport distance to align visual features and prompts by the Sinkhorn algorithm, while in the outer loop, we learn the prompts by this distance from the supervised data. Extensive experiments are conducted on the few-shot recognition task and the improvement demonstrates the superiority of our method. The code is available at https://github.com/CHENGY12/PLOT.
abstract_zh: 随着人们对 CLIP 等大型视觉语言模型的日益关注，人们投入了大量的精力来构建有效的提示。与仅学习单个提示的传统方法不同，我们建议学习多个综合提示来描述类别的不同特征，例如内在属性或外在上下文。然而，直接将每个提示与相同的视觉特征匹配是有问题的，因为它会促使提示收敛到一个点。为了解决这个问题，我们建议应用最佳传输来匹配视觉和文本模式。具体来说，我们首先使用视觉和文本特征集对图像和类别进行建模。然后，我们应用两阶段优化策略来学习提示。在内循环中，我们通过 Sinkhorn 算法优化最佳传输距离来对齐视觉特征和提示，而在外循环中，我们通过该距离从监督数据中学习提示。对少镜头识别任务进行了广泛的实验，改进证明了我们方法的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/CHENGY12/PLOT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优传输的提示学习方法（PLOT），用于改进视觉-语言模型中的多提示生成，以更全面地描述类别特征。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅学习单一提示难以捕捉类别多样性，直接匹配单一视觉特征会导致提示收敛于同一点，限制模型表现。
AI.method: 通过最优传输理论对齐视觉与文本模态，采用两阶段优化策略：内循环用Sinkhorn算法优化传输距离对齐特征，外循环基于监督数据学习提示。
AI.result: 在少样本识别任务中取得显著提升，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: PLOT通过多提示与最优传输机制有效解决了传统方法的局限性，在视觉-语言模型提示学习中具有优势。

title: Estimating productivity gains in digital automation
title_zh: 估计数字自动化的生产力提升
abstract: This paper proposes a novel productivity estimation model to evaluate the effects of adopting Artificial Intelligence (AI) components in a production chain. Our model provides evidence to address the "AI's" Solow's Paradox. We provide (i) theoretical and empirical evidence to explain Solow's dichotomy; (ii) a data-driven model to estimate and asses productivity variations; (iii) a methodology underpinned on process mining datasets to determine the business process, BP, and productivity; (iv) a set of computer simulation parameters; (v) and empirical analysis on labour-distribution. These provide data on why we consider AI Solow's paradox a consequence of metric mismeasurement.
summary: This paper proposes a novel productivity estimation model to evaluate the effects of adopting Artificial Intelligence (AI) components in a production chain. Our model provides evidence to address the "AI's" Solow's Paradox. We provide (i) theoretical and empirical evidence to explain Solow's dichotomy; (ii) a data-driven model to estimate and asses productivity variations; (iii) a methodology underpinned on process mining datasets to determine the business process, BP, and productivity; (iv) a set of computer simulation parameters; (v) and empirical analysis on labour-distribution. These provide data on why we consider AI Solow's paradox a consequence of metric mismeasurement.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的生产力估计模型，用于评估在生产链中采用人工智能（AI）组件的效果。我们的模型提供了解决“人工智能”索洛悖论的证据。我们提供（i）理论和经验证据来解释索洛的二分法； (ii) 用于估计和评估生产率变化的数据驱动模型； (iii) 基于流程挖掘数据集的方法，用于确定业务流程、BP 和生产力； (iv) 一组计算机模拟参数； (v)劳动力分配的实证分析。这些数据说明了为什么我们认为艾索洛悖论是度量误测的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出评估AI组件对生产链生产率影响的模型，以解释AI版索洛悖论。
AI.motivation: 解决AI技术普及但生产率数据未显著提升的索洛悖论现象。
AI.method: 结合理论与实证分析，利用流程挖掘数据、模拟参数及劳动力分布数据构建评估模型。
AI.result: 证明AI索洛悖论源于生产率指标的误测问题。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可有效评估AI对生产率的影响，指标误测是悖论核心原因。

conclusion: 所提方法可有效评估AI对生产率的影响，指标误测是悖论核心原因。
search_text: Estimating productivity gains in digital automation 估计数字自动化的生产力提升 This paper proposes a novel productivity estimation model to evaluate the effects of adopting Artificial Intelligence (AI) components in a production chain. Our model provides evidence to address the "AI's" Solow's Paradox. We provide (i) theoretical and empirical evidence to explain Solow's dichotomy; (ii) a data-driven model to estimate and asses productivity variations; (iii) a methodology underpinned on process mining datasets to determine the business process, BP, and productivity; (iv) a set of computer simulation parameters; (v) and empirical analysis on labour-distribution. These provide data on why we consider AI Solow's paradox a consequence of metric mismeasurement. 本文提出了一种新颖的生产力估计模型，用于评估在生产链中采用人工智能（AI）组件的效果。我们的模型提供了解决“人工智能”索洛悖论的证据。我们提供（i）理论和经验证据来解释索洛的二分法； (ii) 用于估计和评估生产率变化的数据驱动模型； (iii) 基于流程挖掘数据集的方法，用于确定业务流程、BP 和生产力； (iv) 一组计算机模拟参数； (v)劳动力分配的实证分析。这些数据说明了为什么我们认为艾索洛悖论是度量误测的结果。 提出评估AI组件对生产链生产率影响的模型，以解释AI版索洛悖论。 Mauricio Jacobo-Romero,Danilo S. Carvalho,André Freitas cs.AI,eess.SY

title: LOPR: Latent Occupancy PRediction using Generative Models
title_zh: LOPR：使用生成模型的潜在占用预测
comment: We recommend referring to the peer-reviewed and updated version of this approach, available at arXiv:2407.21126
comments: We recommend referring to the peer-reviewed and updated version of this approach, available at arXiv:2407.21126
abstract: Environment prediction frameworks are integral for autonomous vehicles, enabling safe navigation in dynamic environments. LiDAR generated occupancy grid maps (L-OGMs) offer a robust bird's eye-view scene representation that facilitates joint scene predictions without relying on manual labeling unlike commonly used trajectory prediction frameworks. Prior approaches have optimized deterministic L-OGM prediction architectures directly in grid cell space. While these methods have achieved some degree of success in prediction, they occasionally grapple with unrealistic and incorrect predictions. We claim that the quality and realism of the forecasted occupancy grids can be enhanced with the use of generative models. We propose a framework that decouples occupancy prediction into: representation learning and stochastic prediction within the learned latent space. Our approach allows for conditioning the model on other available sensor modalities such as RGB-cameras and high definition maps. We demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance and is readily transferable between different robotic platforms on the real-world NuScenes, Waymo Open, and a custom dataset we collected on an experimental vehicle platform.
summary: Environment prediction frameworks are integral for autonomous vehicles, enabling safe navigation in dynamic environments. LiDAR generated occupancy grid maps (L-OGMs) offer a robust bird's eye-view scene representation that facilitates joint scene predictions without relying on manual labeling unlike commonly used trajectory prediction frameworks. Prior approaches have optimized deterministic L-OGM prediction architectures directly in grid cell space. While these methods have achieved some degree of success in prediction, they occasionally grapple with unrealistic and incorrect predictions. We claim that the quality and realism of the forecasted occupancy grids can be enhanced with the use of generative models. We propose a framework that decouples occupancy prediction into: representation learning and stochastic prediction within the learned latent space. Our approach allows for conditioning the model on other available sensor modalities such as RGB-cameras and high definition maps. We demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance and is readily transferable between different robotic platforms on the real-world NuScenes, Waymo Open, and a custom dataset we collected on an experimental vehicle platform.
abstract_zh: 环境预测框架是自动驾驶汽车不可或缺的一部分，可以在动态环境中实现安全导航。 LiDAR 生成的占用网格地图 (L-OGM) 提供强大的鸟瞰场景表示，有助于联合场景预测，而无需依赖手动标记，这与常用的轨迹预测框架不同。先前的方法直接在网格单元空间中优化了确定性 L-OGM 预测架构。虽然这些方法在预测方面取得了一定程度的成功，但它们偶尔也会遇到不切实际和错误的预测。我们声称，使用生成模型可以提高预测占用网格的质量和真实性。我们提出了一个框架，将占用预测分解为：学习的潜在空间内的表示学习和随机预测。我们的方法允许在其他可用的传感器模式（例如 RGB 相机和高清地图）上调节模型。我们证明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，并且可以在现实世界的 NuScenes、Waymo Open 以及我们在实验车辆平台上收集的自定义数据集上的不同机器人平台之间轻松转移。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成模型的潜在占用预测框架（LOPR），用于提升自动驾驶车辆在动态环境中的环境预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统确定性方法在预测占用网格地图时存在不真实和错误的问题，需通过生成模型提升预测的准确性和现实性。
AI.method: 提出LOPR框架，将占用预测分为表示学习与潜在空间中的随机预测，结合RGB摄像头和高清地图等多模态传感器信息进行条件建模。
AI.result: 在NuScenes、Waymo Open及自定义数据集上达到最先进水平，且可有效迁移至不同机器人平台。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型在提升环境预测真实性和跨平台适应性方面表现优异，为自动驾驶提供了更可靠的预测框架。

authors_text: Yuni Fuchioka,Zhaoming Xie,Michiel van de Panne
title: OPT-Mimic: Imitation of Optimized Trajectories for Dynamic Quadruped Behaviors
title_zh: OPT-Mimic：模仿动态四足动物行为的优化轨迹
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has seen many recent successes for quadruped robot control. The imitation of reference motions provides a simple and powerful prior for guiding solutions towards desired solutions without the need for meticulous reward design. While much work uses motion capture data or hand-crafted trajectories as the reference motion, relatively little work has explored the use of reference motions coming from model-based trajectory optimization. In this work, we investigate several design considerations that arise with such a framework, as demonstrated through four dynamic behaviours: trot, front hop, 180 backflip, and biped stepping. These are trained in simulation and transferred to a physical Solo 8 quadruped robot without further adaptation. In particular, we explore the space of feed-forward designs afforded by the trajectory optimizer to understand its impact on RL learning efficiency and sim-to-real transfer. These findings contribute to the long standing goal of producing robot controllers that combine the interpretability and precision of model-based optimization with the robustness that model-free RL-based controllers offer.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has seen many recent successes for quadruped robot control. The imitation of reference motions provides a simple and powerful prior for guiding solutions towards desired solutions without the need for meticulous reward design. While much work uses motion capture data or hand-crafted trajectories as the reference motion, relatively little work has explored the use of reference motions coming from model-based trajectory optimization. In this work, we investigate several design considerations that arise with such a framework, as demonstrated through four dynamic behaviours: trot, front hop, 180 backflip, and biped stepping. These are trained in simulation and transferred to a physical Solo 8 quadruped robot without further adaptation. In particular, we explore the space of feed-forward designs afforded by the trajectory optimizer to understand its impact on RL learning efficiency and sim-to-real transfer. These findings contribute to the long standing goal of producing robot controllers that combine the interpretability and precision of model-based optimization with the robustness that model-free RL-based controllers offer.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 最近在四足机器人控制方面取得了许多成功。参考动作的模仿提供了一个简单而强大的先验，用于指导解决方案走向所需的解决方案，而不需要细致的奖励设计。虽然许多工作使用运动捕捉数据或手工制作的轨迹作为参考运动，但相对较少的工作探索了来自基于模型的轨迹优化的参考运动的使用。在这项工作中，我们研究了这种框架中出现的几个设计考虑因素，如四种动态行为所示：小跑、前跳、180 度后空翻和两足行走。它们经过模拟训练并转移到实体 Solo 8 四足机器人上，无需进一步调整。特别是，我们探索了轨迹优化器提供的前馈设计空间，以了解其对强化学习效率和模拟到真实迁移的影响。这些发现有助于实现生产机器人控制器的长期目标，该控制器将基于模型的优化的可解释性和精度与无模型的基于强化学习的控制器提供的鲁棒性结合起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OPT-Mimic方法，通过模仿基于模型优化的轨迹来训练四足机器人的动态行为，并成功将仿真训练结果转移到物理机器人。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖动作捕捉或手工轨迹作为参考，而基于模型优化的轨迹参考研究较少，需探索其在模仿学习中的设计考量及仿真到现实的迁移效果。
AI.method: 在仿真环境中通过轨迹优化生成四种动态行为（ trot、front hop、180 backflip、biped stepping）的参考轨迹，利用模仿学习训练策略，并直接迁移至物理Solo 8机器人，分析前馈设计对学习效率的影响。
AI.result: 四种动态行为在仿真中成功训练并直接迁移至实体机器人，无需额外调整，验证了基于优化轨迹的模仿学习在sim-to-real转移中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合模型优化的可解释性与无模型RL的鲁棒性，为四足机器人控制器设计提供了新思路，推动了仿真到现实迁移的研究进展。

title: Random orthogonal additive filters: a solution to the vanishing/exploding gradient of deep neural networks
title_zh: 随机正交加性滤波器：深度神经网络梯度消失/爆炸的解决方案
abstract: Since the recognition in the early nineties of the vanishing/exploding (V/E) gradient issue plaguing the training of neural networks (NNs), significant efforts have been exerted to overcome this obstacle. However, a clear solution to the V/E issue remained elusive so far. In this manuscript a new architecture of NN is proposed, designed to mathematically prevent the V/E issue to occur. The pursuit of approximate dynamical isometry, i.e. parameter configurations where the singular values of the input-output Jacobian are tightly distributed around 1, leads to the derivation of a NN's architecture that shares common traits with the popular Residual Network model. Instead of skipping connections between layers, the idea is to filter the previous activations orthogonally and add them to the nonlinear activations of the next layer, realising a convex combination between them. Remarkably, the impossibility for the gradient updates to either vanish or explode is demonstrated with analytical bounds that hold even in the infinite depth case. The effectiveness of this method is empirically proved by means of training via backpropagation an extremely deep multilayer perceptron of 50k layers, and an Elman NN to learn long-term dependencies in the input of 10k time steps in the past. Compared with other architectures specifically devised to deal with the V/E problem, e.g. LSTMs for recurrent NNs, the proposed model is way simpler yet more effective. Surprisingly, a single layer vanilla RNN can be enhanced to reach state of the art performance, while converging super fast; for instance on the psMNIST task, it is possible to get test accuracy of over 94% in the first epoch, and over 98% after just 10 epochs.
summary: Since the recognition in the early nineties of the vanishing/exploding (V/E) gradient issue plaguing the training of neural networks (NNs), significant efforts have been exerted to overcome this obstacle. However, a clear solution to the V/E issue remained elusive so far. In this manuscript a new architecture of NN is proposed, designed to mathematically prevent the V/E issue to occur. The pursuit of approximate dynamical isometry, i.e. parameter configurations where the singular values of the input-output Jacobian are tightly distributed around 1, leads to the derivation of a NN's architecture that shares common traits with the popular Residual Network model. Instead of skipping connections between layers, the idea is to filter the previous activations orthogonally and add them to the nonlinear activations of the next layer, realising a convex combination between them. Remarkably, the impossibility for the gradient updates to either vanish or explode is demonstrated with analytical bounds that hold even in the infinite depth case. The effectiveness of this method is empirically proved by means of training via backpropagation an extremely deep multilayer perceptron of 50k layers, and an Elman NN to learn long-term dependencies in the input of 10k time steps in the past. Compared with other architectures specifically devised to deal with the V/E problem, e.g. LSTMs for recurrent NNs, the proposed model is way simpler yet more effective. Surprisingly, a single layer vanilla RNN can be enhanced to reach state of the art performance, while converging super fast; for instance on the psMNIST task, it is possible to get test accuracy of over 94% in the first epoch, and over 98% after just 10 epochs.
abstract_zh: 自从九十年代初认识到梯度消失/爆炸（V/E）问题困扰神经网络（NN）训练以来，人们付出了巨大的努力来克服这一障碍。然而，迄今为止，V/E 问题的明确解决方案仍然难以实现。在这份手稿中，提出了一种新的神经网络架构，旨在从数学上防止 V/E 问题的发生。对近似动态等距的追求，即输入输出雅可比行列式的奇异值紧密分布在 1 附近的参数配置，导致了与流行的残差网络模型具有共同特征的神经网络架构的推导。其想法不是跳过层之间的连接，而是正交过滤先前的激活并将它们添加到下一层的非线性激活中，实现它们之间的凸组合。值得注意的是，即使在无限深度的情况下，分析界限也证明了梯度更新不可能消失或爆炸。通过反向传播训练 50k 层的极深多层感知器和 Elman 神经网络来学习过去 10k 时间步长输入中的长期依赖关系，实证证明了该方法的有效性。与专门为处理 V/E 问题而设计的其他架构相比，例如对于循环神经网络的 LSTM，所提出的模型更简单但更有效。令人惊讶的是，单层普通 RNN 可以得到增强以达到最先进的性能，同时收敛速度超快；例如，在 psMNIST 任务中，第一个 epoch 的测试准确率可能超过 94%，仅 10 个 epoch 后测试准确率就超过 98%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经网络架构，通过正交滤波与激活值相加的方式，解决深度网络中的梯度消失/爆炸问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络训练中长期存在的梯度消失/爆炸问题尚未有明确解决方案，现有方法如LSTM复杂且效果有限。
AI.method: 设计具有正交滤波机制的网络架构，在非线性激活前对前一层激活进行正交投影并加权相加，实现梯度稳定传播。
AI.result: 成功训练50k层MLP和处理10k时间步的Elman网络，性能优于LSTM；改进后的单层RNN在psMNIST任务中10个epoch达到98%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以更简洁结构有效解决V/E问题，在深度网络训练中展现显著优势，可广泛应用于多种网络架构改进。

title: Event-based Temporally Dense Optical Flow Estimation with Sequential Learning
title_zh: 具有顺序学习的基于事件的时间密集光流估计
abstract: Event cameras provide an advantage over traditional frame-based cameras when capturing fast-moving objects without a motion blur. They achieve this by recording changes in light intensity (known as events), thus allowing them to operate at a much higher frequency and making them suitable for capturing motions in a highly dynamic scene. Many recent studies have proposed methods to train neural networks (NNs) for predicting optical flow from events. However, they often rely on a spatio-temporal representation constructed from events over a fixed interval, such as 10Hz used in training on the DSEC dataset. This limitation restricts the flow prediction to the same interval (10Hz) whereas the fast speed of event cameras, which can operate up to 3kHz, has not been effectively utilized. In this work, we show that a temporally dense flow estimation at 100Hz can be achieved by treating the flow estimation as a sequential problem using two different variants of recurrent networks - Long-short term memory (LSTM) and spiking neural network (SNN). First, We utilize the NN model constructed similar to the popular EV-FlowNet but with LSTM layers to demonstrate the efficiency of our training method. The model not only produces 10x more frequent optical flow than the existing ones, but the estimated flows also have 13% lower errors than predictions from the baseline EV-FlowNet. Second, we construct an EV-FlowNet SNN but with leaky integrate and fire neurons to efficiently capture the temporal dynamics. We found that simple inherent recurrent dynamics of SNN lead to significant parameter reduction compared to the LSTM model. In addition, because of its event-driven computation, the spiking model is estimated to consume only 1.5% energy of the LSTM model, highlighting the efficiency of SNN in processing events and the potential for achieving temporally dense flow.

They achieve this by recording changes in light intensity (known as events), thus allowing them to operate at a much higher frequency and making them suitable for capturing motions in a highly dynamic scene. In this work, we show that a temporally dense flow estimation at 100Hz can be achieved by treating the flow estimation as a sequential problem using two different variants of recurrent networks - Long-short term memory (LSTM) and spiking neural network (SNN). First, We utilize the NN model constructed similar to the popular EV-FlowNet but with LSTM layers to demonstrate the efficiency of our training method. The model not only produces 10x more frequent optical flow than the existing ones, but the estimated flows also have 13% lower errors than predictions from the baseline EV-FlowNet. abstract_zh: 在捕捉快速移动的物体而不产生运动模糊时，事件相机比传统的基于帧的相机具有优势。他们通过记录光强度的变化（称为事件）来实现这一点，从而使它们能够以更高的频率运行，并使它们适合捕捉高度动态场景中的运动。最近的许多研究提出了训练神经网络 (NN) 来预测事件光流的方法。然而，它们通常依赖于由固定间隔内的事件构建的时空表示，例如 DSEC 数据集训练中使用的 10Hz。这一限制将流量预测限制在相同的间隔（10Hz）内，而事件摄像机（最高可达 3kHz）的高速运行尚未得到有效利用。在这项工作中，我们表明，通过使用两种不同的循环网络变体——长短期记忆（LSTM）和尖峰神经网络（SNN），将流量估计视为一个顺序问题，可以实现 100Hz 的时间密集流量估计。首先，我们利用与流行的 EV-FlowNet 类似但具有 LSTM 层构建的 NN 模型来证明我们的训练方法的效率。该模型不仅产生比现有模型高 10 倍的光流，而且估计的光流的误差也比基线 EV-FlowNet 的预测低 13%。其次，我们构建了一个 EV-FlowNet SNN，但具有泄漏集成和激发神经元，以有效捕获时间动态。我们发现，与 LSTM 模型相比，SNN 简单的固有循环动态导致参数显着减少。此外，由于其事件驱动的计算，尖峰模型预计仅消耗 LSTM 模型的 1.5% 能量，凸显了 SNN 在处理事件方面的效率以及实现时间密集流的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用循环神经网络（LSTM和SNN）实现事件相机的高帧率（100Hz）光流估计，突破传统方法的固定时间间隔限制。
AI.motivation: 传统事件相机光流估计方法受限于固定时间间隔（如10Hz），无法充分利用事件相机高达3kHz的高频特性，导致时间密度不足。
AI.method: 设计两种模型：1) 基于LSTM的EV-FlowNet改进版，通过序列学习提升估计频率；2) 采用漏积分放电神经元的SNN模型，利用事件驱动计算降低能耗。
AI.result: LSTM模型实现10倍于基线的100Hz光流估计，误差降低13%；SNN模型参数减少且能耗仅为LSTM的1.5%，验证了其高效性。
AI.conclusion: SNN在处理事件数据时兼具参数效率和低能耗优势，而LSTM在精度上表现更优，两种方法均有效提升了事件相机的时密光流估计能力。

We found that simple inherent recurrent dynamics of SNN lead to significant parameter reduction compared to the LSTM model. In addition, because of its event-driven computation, the spiking model is estimated to consume only 1.5% energy of the LSTM model, highlighting the efficiency of SNN in processing events and the potential for achieving temporally dense flow. 在捕捉快速移动的物体而不产生运动模糊时，事件相机比传统的基于帧的相机具有优势。他们通过记录光强度的变化（称为事件）来实现这一点，从而使它们能够以更高的频率运行，并使它们适合捕捉高度动态场景中的运动。最近的许多研究提出了训练神经网络 (NN) 来预测事件光流的方法。然而，它们通常依赖于由固定间隔内的事件构建的时空表示，例如 DSEC 数据集训练中使用的 10Hz。这一限制将流量预测限制在相同的间隔（10Hz）内，而事件摄像机（最高可达 3kHz）的高速运行尚未得到有效利用。在这项工作中，我们表明，通过使用两种不同的循环网络变体——长短期记忆（LSTM）和尖峰神经网络（SNN），将流量估计视为一个顺序问题，可以实现 100Hz 的时间密集流量估计。首先，我们利用与流行的 EV-FlowNet 类似但具有 LSTM 层构建的 NN 模型来证明我们的训练方法的效率。该模型不仅产生比现有模型高 10 倍的光流，而且估计的光流的误差也比基线 EV-FlowNet 的预测低 13%。其次，我们构建了一个 EV-FlowNet SNN，但具有泄漏集成和激发神经元，以有效捕获时间动态。我们发现，与 LSTM 模型相比，SNN 简单的固有循环动态导致参数显着减少。此外，由于其事件驱动的计算，尖峰模型预计仅消耗 LSTM 模型的 1.5% 能量，凸显了 SNN 在处理事件方面的效率以及实现时间密集流的潜力。 本文提出利用循环神经网络（LSTM和SNN）实现事件相机的高帧率（100Hz）光流估计，突破传统方法的固定时间间隔限制。 Wachirawit Ponghiran,Chamika Mihiranga Liyanagedera,Kaushik Roy cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Learning over time using a neuromorphic adaptive control algorithm for robotic arms
title_zh: 使用机器人手臂的神经拟态自适应控制算法随着时间的推移进行学习
abstract: In this paper, we explore the ability of a robot arm to learn the underlying operation space defined by the positions (x, y, z) that the arm's end-effector can reach, including disturbances, by deploying and thoroughly evaluating a Spiking Neural Network SNN-based adaptive control algorithm. While traditional control algorithms for robotics have limitations in both adapting to new and dynamic environments, we show that the robot arm can learn the operational space and complete tasks faster over time. We also demonstrate that the adaptive robot control algorithm based on SNNs enables a fast response while maintaining energy efficiency. We obtained these results by performing an extensive search of the adaptive algorithm parameter space, and evaluating algorithm performance for different SNN network sizes, learning rates, dynamic robot arm trajectories, and response times. We show that the robot arm learns to complete tasks 15% faster in specific experiment scenarios such as scenarios with six or nine random target points.
summary: In this paper, we explore the ability of a robot arm to learn the underlying operation space defined by the positions (x, y, z) that the arm's end-effector can reach, including disturbances, by deploying and thoroughly evaluating a Spiking Neural Network SNN-based adaptive control algorithm. While traditional control algorithms for robotics have limitations in both adapting to new and dynamic environments, we show that the robot arm can learn the operational space and complete tasks faster over time. We also demonstrate that the adaptive robot control algorithm based on SNNs enables a fast response while maintaining energy efficiency. We obtained these results by performing an extensive search of the adaptive algorithm parameter space, and evaluating algorithm performance for different SNN network sizes, learning rates, dynamic robot arm trajectories, and response times. We show that the robot arm learns to complete tasks 15% faster in specific experiment scenarios such as scenarios with six or nine random target points.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过部署和彻底评估基于尖峰神经网络 SNN 的自适应控制算法，探索机器人手臂学习由手臂末端执行器可以到达的位置 (x, y, z) 定义的基础操作空间（包括干扰）的能力。虽然传统的机器人控制算法在适应新的动态环境方面存在局限性，但我们表明，随着时间的推移，机器人手臂可以学习操作空间并更快地完成任务。我们还证明了基于 SNN 的自适应机器人控制算法能够在保持能源效率的同时实现快速响应。我们通过对自适应算法参数空间进行广泛搜索，并评估不同 SNN 网络大小、学习率、动态机器人手臂轨迹和响应时间的算法性能，获得了这些结果。我们表明，在特定的实验场景（例如具有六个或九个随机目标点的场景）中，机器人手臂学习完成任务的速度提高了 15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的自适应控制算法，使机械臂能够学习操作空间并随时间提升任务完成效率。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人控制算法难以适应动态环境，需开发更高效的学习型控制方法以应对复杂任务。
AI.method: 部署SNN自适应控制算法，通过参数空间搜索优化网络规模、学习率等，评估不同动态轨迹与响应时间下的性能。
AI.result: 在六至九个随机目标点的实验场景中，机械臂任务完成速度提升15%，同时保持能量效率。
AI.conclusion: SNN自适应控制算法有效提升机械臂学习与执行效率，为动态环境下的机器人控制提供新方向。

title: The Effect of Warm-Glow on User Behavioral Intention to Adopt Technology: Extending the UTAUT2 Model
title_zh: 暖光对用户采用技术行为意图的影响：扩展 UTAUT2 模型
abstract: In this study, we enhance the Unified Theory of Acceptance and Use of Technology (UTAUT2) by incorporating the warm-glow phenomenon to clarify its impact on user decisions regarding the adoption of technology. We introduce two additional constructs aimed at capturing both the external and internal aspects of warm-glow, thus creating what we refer to as the UTAUT2 + WG model. To evaluate the effectiveness of our model, we conducted an experimental study in which participants were presented with a scenario describing a hypothetical technology designed to evoke warm-glow sensations. Using the partial least squares method, we analyzed the collected data to assess our expanded model. Our findings indicate that warm-glow significantly influences user behavior, with the internal aspect having the strongest influence, followed by hedonic motivation, performance expectancy, and finally the external aspect of warm-glow. We conclude by discussing the implications of our research, acknowledging its limitations, and suggesting directions for future exploration.
summary: In this study, we enhance the Unified Theory of Acceptance and Use of Technology (UTAUT2) by incorporating the warm-glow phenomenon to clarify its impact on user decisions regarding the adoption of technology. We introduce two additional constructs aimed at capturing both the external and internal aspects of warm-glow, thus creating what we refer to as the UTAUT2 + WG model. To evaluate the effectiveness of our model, we conducted an experimental study in which participants were presented with a scenario describing a hypothetical technology designed to evoke warm-glow sensations. Using the partial least squares method, we analyzed the collected data to assess our expanded model. Our findings indicate that warm-glow significantly influences user behavior, with the internal aspect having the strongest influence, followed by hedonic motivation, performance expectancy, and finally the external aspect of warm-glow. We conclude by discussing the implications of our research, acknowledging its limitations, and suggesting directions for future exploration.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们通过结合暖光现象来增强技术接受和使用统一理论（UTAUT2），以阐明其对用户采用技术决策的影响。我们引入了两个额外的构造，旨在捕获暖光的外部和内部方面，从而创建我们所说的 UTAUT2 + WG 模型。为了评估我们模型的有效性，我们进行了一项实验研究，其中向参与者展示了一个场景，描述了一种旨在唤起暖光感觉的假设技术。使用偏最小二乘法，我们分析了收集的数据以评估我们的扩展模型。我们的研究结果表明，暖光显着影响用户行为，其中内部因素的影响最强，其次是享乐动机、表现预期，最后是暖光的外部因素。最后，我们讨论了我们研究的意义，承认其局限性，并提出了未来探索的方向。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过引入温暖效应（warm-glow）扩展UTAUT2模型，探讨其对用户技术采纳行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有UTAUT2模型未充分考虑温暖效应在用户技术采纳决策中的作用，需通过补充内外部温暖效应构念完善理论框架。
AI.method: 采用实验法设计假设技术场景，通过偏最小二乘法（PLS）分析参与者数据，验证扩展模型的有效性。
AI.result: 温暖效应显著影响用户行为意向，其中内部温暖效应影响最强，其次为享乐动机、绩效期望，最后为外部温暖效应。
AI.conclusion: UTAUT2+WG模型有效解释了温暖效应对技术采纳的影响，建议未来研究结合更多情境变量进行验证。
