title: CaiRL: A High-Performance Reinforcement Learning Environment Toolkit
title_zh: CaiRL：高性能强化学习环境工具包
comment: Published in 2022 IEEE Conference on Games (CoG)
comments: Published in 2022 IEEE Conference on Games (CoG)
abstract: This paper addresses the dire need for a platform that efficiently provides a framework for running reinforcement learning (RL) experiments. We propose the CaiRL Environment Toolkit as an efficient, compatible, and more sustainable alternative for training learning agents and propose methods to develop more efficient environment simulations. There is an increasing focus on developing sustainable artificial intelligence. However, little effort has been made to improve the efficiency of running environment simulations. The most popular development toolkit for reinforcement learning, OpenAI Gym, is built using Python, a powerful but slow programming language. We propose a toolkit written in C++ with the same flexibility level but works orders of magnitude faster to make up for Python's inefficiency. This would drastically cut climate emissions. CaiRL also presents the first reinforcement learning toolkit with a built-in JVM and Flash support for running legacy flash games for reinforcement learning research. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CaiRL in the classic control benchmark, comparing the execution speed to OpenAI Gym. Furthermore, we illustrate that CaiRL can act as a drop-in replacement for OpenAI Gym to leverage significantly faster training speeds because of the reduced environment computation time.
summary: This paper addresses the dire need for a platform that efficiently provides a framework for running reinforcement learning (RL) experiments. We propose the CaiRL Environment Toolkit as an efficient, compatible, and more sustainable alternative for training learning agents and propose methods to develop more efficient environment simulations. There is an increasing focus on developing sustainable artificial intelligence. However, little effort has been made to improve the efficiency of running environment simulations. The most popular development toolkit for reinforcement learning, OpenAI Gym, is built using Python, a powerful but slow programming language. We propose a toolkit written in C++ with the same flexibility level but works orders of magnitude faster to make up for Python's inefficiency. This would drastically cut climate emissions. CaiRL also presents the first reinforcement learning toolkit with a built-in JVM and Flash support for running legacy flash games for reinforcement learning research. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CaiRL in the classic control benchmark, comparing the execution speed to OpenAI Gym. Furthermore, we illustrate that CaiRL can act as a drop-in replacement for OpenAI Gym to leverage significantly faster training speeds because of the reduced environment computation time.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了对一个平台的迫切需求，该平台能够有效地提供运行强化学习（RL）实验的框架。我们提出 CaiRL 环境工具包作为训练学习代理的高效、兼容且更可持续的替代方案，并提出开发更有效的环境模拟的方法。人们越来越关注开发可持续人工智能。然而，在提高运行环境模拟的效率方面却几乎没有做出什么努力。最流行的强化学习开发工具包 OpenAI Gym 是使用 Python 构建的，Python 是一种功能强大但速度缓慢的编程语言。我们提出了一个用 C++ 编写的工具包，具有相同的灵活性级别，但工作速度要快几个数量级，以弥补 Python 的低效率。这将大幅减少气候排放。 CaiRL 还推出了第一个强化学习工具包，具有内置 JVM 和 Flash 支持，用于运行传统 Flash 游戏以进行强化学习研究。我们在经典控制基准测试中展示了 CaiRL 的有效性，并将执行速度与 OpenAI Gym 进行了比较。此外，我们还说明了 CaiRL 可以作为 OpenAI Gym 的直接替代品，因为环境计算时间减少，可以显着提高训练速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CaiRL工具包，旨在解决现有强化学习环境效率低的问题，提供更高效、可持续的实验平台。
AI.motivation: 当前主流工具OpenAI Gym基于Python效率不足，难以满足可持续AI发展需求，亟需提升环境模拟效率。
AI.method: 采用C++开发CaiRL工具包，内置JVM和Flash支持，兼容OpenAI Gym接口并优化环境计算速度。
AI.result: 在经典控制基准测试中，CaiRL执行速度远超OpenAI Gym，可作为其高效替代方案显著缩短训练时间。
AI.conclusion: CaiRL通过高效计算和兼容性设计，为强化学习研究提供可持续方案，同时支持Legacy Flash游戏研究扩展应用场景。

search_text: CaiRL: A High-Performance Reinforcement Learning Environment Toolkit CaiRL：高性能强化学习环境工具包 This paper addresses the dire need for a platform that efficiently provides a framework for running reinforcement learning (RL) experiments. We propose the CaiRL Environment Toolkit as an efficient, compatible, and more sustainable alternative for training learning agents and propose methods to develop more efficient environment simulations. There is an increasing focus on developing sustainable artificial intelligence. However, little effort has been made to improve the efficiency of running environment simulations. The most popular development toolkit for reinforcement learning, OpenAI Gym, is built using Python, a powerful but slow programming language. We propose a toolkit written in C++ with the same flexibility level but works orders of magnitude faster to make up for Python's inefficiency. This would drastically cut climate emissions. CaiRL also presents the first reinforcement learning toolkit with a built-in JVM and Flash support for running legacy flash games for reinforcement learning research. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CaiRL in the classic control benchmark, comparing the execution speed to OpenAI Gym. Furthermore, we illustrate that CaiRL can act as a drop-in replacement for OpenAI Gym to leverage significantly faster training speeds because of the reduced environment computation time. 本文解决了对一个平台的迫切需求，该平台能够有效地提供运行强化学习（RL）实验的框架。我们提出 CaiRL 环境工具包作为训练学习代理的高效、兼容且更可持续的替代方案，并提出开发更有效的环境模拟的方法。人们越来越关注开发可持续人工智能。然而，在提高运行环境模拟的效率方面却几乎没有做出什么努力。最流行的强化学习开发工具包 OpenAI Gym 是使用 Python 构建的，Python 是一种功能强大但速度缓慢的编程语言。我们提出了一个用 C++ 编写的工具包，具有相同的灵活性级别，但工作速度要快几个数量级，以弥补 Python 的低效率。这将大幅减少气候排放。 CaiRL 还推出了第一个强化学习工具包，具有内置 JVM 和 Flash 支持，用于运行传统 Flash 游戏以进行强化学习研究。我们在经典控制基准测试中展示了 CaiRL 的有效性，并将执行速度与 OpenAI Gym 进行了比较。此外，我们还说明了 CaiRL 可以作为 OpenAI Gym 的直接替代品，因为环境计算时间减少，可以显着提高训练速度。 本文提出CaiRL工具包，旨在解决现有强化学习环境效率低的问题，提供更高效、可持续的实验平台。 Per-Arne Andersen,Morten Goodwin,Ole-Christoffer Granmo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Rafid Mahmood,James Lucas,Jose M. Alvarez,Sanja Fidler,Marc T. Law
title: Optimizing Data Collection for Machine Learning
title_zh: 优化机器学习的数据收集
abstract: Modern deep learning systems require huge data sets to achieve impressive performance, but there is little guidance on how much or what kind of data to collect. Over-collecting data incurs unnecessary present costs, while under-collecting may incur future costs and delay workflows. We propose a new paradigm for modeling the data collection workflow as a formal optimal data collection problem that allows designers to specify performance targets, collection costs, a time horizon, and penalties for failing to meet the targets. Additionally, this formulation generalizes to tasks requiring multiple data sources, such as labeled and unlabeled data used in semi-supervised learning. To solve our problem, we develop Learn-Optimize-Collect (LOC), which minimizes expected future collection costs. Finally, we numerically compare our framework to the conventional baseline of estimating data requirements by extrapolating from neural scaling laws. We significantly reduce the risks of failing to meet desired performance targets on several classification, segmentation, and detection tasks, while maintaining low total collection costs.
summary: Modern deep learning systems require huge data sets to achieve impressive performance, but there is little guidance on how much or what kind of data to collect. Over-collecting data incurs unnecessary present costs, while under-collecting may incur future costs and delay workflows. We propose a new paradigm for modeling the data collection workflow as a formal optimal data collection problem that allows designers to specify performance targets, collection costs, a time horizon, and penalties for failing to meet the targets. Additionally, this formulation generalizes to tasks requiring multiple data sources, such as labeled and unlabeled data used in semi-supervised learning. To solve our problem, we develop Learn-Optimize-Collect (LOC), which minimizes expected future collection costs. Finally, we numerically compare our framework to the conventional baseline of estimating data requirements by extrapolating from neural scaling laws. We significantly reduce the risks of failing to meet desired performance targets on several classification, segmentation, and detection tasks, while maintaining low total collection costs.
abstract_zh: 现代深度学习系统需要大量数据集才能实现令人印象深刻的性能，但对于收集多少数据或收集何种数据却缺乏指导。过度收集数据会产生不必要的当前成本，而收集不足可能会产生未来成本并延迟工作流程。我们提出了一种新的范式，将数据收集工作流程建模为正式的最优数据收集问题，允许设计人员指定性能目标、收集成本、时间范围以及未能达到目标的惩罚。此外，该公式还可以推广到需要多个数据源的任务，例如半监督学习中使用的标记和未标记数据。为了解决我们的问题，我们开发了学习-优化-收集 (LOC)，它可以最大限度地降低预期的未来收集成本。最后，我们通过从神经缩放定律推断来对我们的框架与估计数据需求的传统基线进行数值比较。我们显着降低了在多个分类、分割和检测任务上未能达到预期性能目标的风险，同时保持较低的总收集成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种优化机器学习数据收集的框架，通过平衡数据收集成本与性能目标，减少资源浪费和项目延误风险。
AI.motivation: 深度学习需要大量数据但缺乏数据收集指导，过度收集导致成本浪费，不足则影响性能，亟需系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 构建形式化最优数据收集模型，引入Learn-Optimize-Collect（LOC）方法，综合性能目标、成本、时间及惩罚机制，并支持多数据源场景。
AI.result: 在分类、分割和检测任务中，LOC框架显著降低未达标风险，同时保持低成本，优于传统神经缩放定律估计方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为数据驱动的机器学习提供了结构化优化方案，有效平衡成本与性能，提升数据收集效率。

title: Interpretable Option Discovery using Deep Q-Learning and Variational Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用深度 Q 学习和变分自动编码器进行可解释的选项发现
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, Proceedings of the 3rd International Conference on Intelligent Technologies and Applications
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures, Proceedings of the 3rd International Conference on Intelligent Technologies and Applications
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) is unquestionably a robust framework to train autonomous agents in a wide variety of disciplines. However, traditional deep and shallow model-free RL algorithms suffer from low sample efficiency and inadequate generalization for sparse state spaces. The options framework with temporal abstractions is perhaps the most promising method to solve these problems, but it still has noticeable shortcomings. It only guarantees local convergence, and it is challenging to automate initiation and termination conditions, which in practice are commonly hand-crafted. Our proposal, the Deep Variational Q-Network (DVQN), combines deep generative- and reinforcement learning. The algorithm finds good policies from a Gaussian distributed latent-space, which is especially useful for defining options. The DVQN algorithm uses MSE with KL-divergence as regularization, combined with traditional Q-Learning updates. The algorithm learns a latent-space that represents good policies with state clusters for options. We show that the DVQN algorithm is a promising approach for identifying initiation and termination conditions for option-based reinforcement learning. Experiments show that the DVQN algorithm, with automatic initiation and termination, has comparable performance to Rainbow and can maintain stability when trained for extended periods after convergence.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) is unquestionably a robust framework to train autonomous agents in a wide variety of disciplines. However, traditional deep and shallow model-free RL algorithms suffer from low sample efficiency and inadequate generalization for sparse state spaces. The options framework with temporal abstractions is perhaps the most promising method to solve these problems, but it still has noticeable shortcomings. It only guarantees local convergence, and it is challenging to automate initiation and termination conditions, which in practice are commonly hand-crafted. Our proposal, the Deep Variational Q-Network (DVQN), combines deep generative- and reinforcement learning. The algorithm finds good policies from a Gaussian distributed latent-space, which is especially useful for defining options. The DVQN algorithm uses MSE with KL-divergence as regularization, combined with traditional Q-Learning updates. The algorithm learns a latent-space that represents good policies with state clusters for options. We show that the DVQN algorithm is a promising approach for identifying initiation and termination conditions for option-based reinforcement learning. Experiments show that the DVQN algorithm, with automatic initiation and termination, has comparable performance to Rainbow and can maintain stability when trained for extended periods after convergence.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（RL）无疑是一个强大的框架，可用于训练各种学科的自主代理。然而，传统的深层和浅层无模型强化学习算法存在样本效率低和稀疏状态空间泛化不足的问题。具有时间抽象的选项框架可能是解决这些问题最有前途的方法，但它仍然存在明显的缺点。它仅保证局部收敛，并且自动化启动和终止条件具有挑战性，这在实践中通常是手工制作的。我们的提案深度变分 Q 网络 (DVQN) 结合了深度生成学习和强化学习。该算法从高斯分布潜在空间中找到好的策略，这对于定义选项特别有用。 DVQN算法使用带有KL散度的MSE作为正则化，并结合传统的Q-Learning更新。该算法学习一个潜在空间，该空间代表具有状态集群选项的良好策略。我们证明 DVQN 算法是一种很有前途的方法，用于识别基于选项的强化学习的启动和终止条件。实验表明，具有自动启动和终止功能的DVQN算法具有与Rainbow相当的性能，并且在收敛后长时间训练时仍能保持稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度Q学习和变分自编码器的可解释选项发现方法DVQN，用于改进强化学习中的策略泛化与样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习算法存在样本效率低、稀疏状态空间泛化能力差的问题，而选项框架虽能缓解但难以自动确定初始化和终止条件。
AI.method: 设计Deep Variational Q-Network（DVQN）算法，通过变分自编码器生成高斯分布潜在空间，结合MSE损失与KL散度正则化，利用Q学习更新策略并自动学习选项的初始化/终止条件。
AI.result: 实验表明DVQN在保持长期训练稳定性的同时，性能可与Rainbow算法媲美，且能有效自动识别选项的时空边界条件。
AI.conclusion: DVQN通过潜在空间建模成功解决了选项发现中的关键难题，为基于选项的强化学习提供了可解释且自动化的有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度Q学习和变分自编码器的可解释选项发现方法DVQN，用于改进强化学习中的策略泛化与样本效率。

ai_content.result: 实验表明DVQN在保持长期训练稳定性的同时，性能可与Rainbow算法媲美，且能有效自动识别选项的时空边界条件。
ai_content.conclusion: DVQN通过潜在空间建模成功解决了选项发现中的关键难题，为基于选项的强化学习提供了可解释且自动化的有效解决方案。

search_text: Interpretable Option Discovery using Deep Q-Learning and Variational Autoencoders 使用深度 Q 学习和变分自动编码器进行可解释的选项发现 Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) is unquestionably a robust framework to train autonomous agents in a wide variety of disciplines. However, traditional deep and shallow model-free RL algorithms suffer from low sample efficiency and inadequate generalization for sparse state spaces. The options framework with temporal abstractions is perhaps the most promising method to solve these problems, but it still has noticeable shortcomings. It only guarantees local convergence, and it is challenging to automate initiation and termination conditions, which in practice are commonly hand-crafted. Our proposal, the Deep Variational Q-Network (DVQN), combines deep generative- and reinforcement learning. The algorithm finds good policies from a Gaussian distributed latent-space, which is especially useful for defining options. The DVQN algorithm uses MSE with KL-divergence as regularization, combined with traditional Q-Learning updates. The algorithm learns a latent-space that represents good policies with state clusters for options. We show that the DVQN algorithm is a promising approach for identifying initiation and termination conditions for option-based reinforcement learning. Experiments show that the DVQN algorithm, with automatic initiation and termination, has comparable performance to Rainbow and can maintain stability when trained for extended periods after convergence. 深度强化学习（RL）无疑是一个强大的框架，可用于训练各种学科的自主代理。然而，传统的深层和浅层无模型强化学习算法存在样本效率低和稀疏状态空间泛化不足的问题。具有时间抽象的选项框架可能是解决这些问题最有前途的方法，但它仍然存在明显的缺点。它仅保证局部收敛，并且自动化启动和终止条件具有挑战性，这在实践中通常是手工制作的。我们的提案深度变分 Q 网络 (DVQN) 结合了深度生成学习和强化学习。该算法从高斯分布潜在空间中找到好的策略，这对于定义选项特别有用。 DVQN算法使用带有KL散度的MSE作为正则化，并结合传统的Q-Learning更新。该算法学习一个潜在空间，该空间代表具有状态集群选项的良好策略。我们证明 DVQN 算法是一种很有前途的方法，用于识别基于选项的强化学习的启动和终止条件。实验表明，具有自动启动和终止功能的DVQN算法具有与Rainbow相当的性能，并且在收敛后长时间训练时仍能保持稳定性。 本文提出一种结合深度Q学习和变分自编码器的可解释选项发现方法DVQN，用于改进强化学习中的策略泛化与样本效率。 Per-Arne Andersen,Ole-Christoffer Granmo,Morten Goodwin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yunxiang Zhang,Benjamin Liang,Boyuan Chen,Paul Torrens,S. Farokh Atashzar,Dahua Lin,Qi Sun
title: Force-Aware Interface via Electromyography for Natural VR/AR Interaction
title_zh: 通过肌电图实现自然 VR/AR 交互的力感知接口
abstract: While tremendous advances in visual and auditory realism have been made for virtual and augmented reality (VR/AR), introducing a plausible sense of physicality into the virtual world remains challenging. Closing the gap between real-world physicality and immersive virtual experience requires a closed interaction loop: applying user-exerted physical forces to the virtual environment and generating haptic sensations back to the users. However, existing VR/AR solutions either completely ignore the force inputs from the users or rely on obtrusive sensing devices that compromise user experience. By identifying users' muscle activation patterns while engaging in VR/AR, we design a learning-based neural interface for natural and intuitive force inputs. Specifically, we show that lightweight electromyography sensors, resting non-invasively on users' forearm skin, inform and establish a robust understanding of their complex hand activities. Fuelled by a neural-network-based model, our interface can decode finger-wise forces in real-time with 3.3% mean error, and generalize to new users with little calibration. Through an interactive psychophysical study, we show that human perception of virtual objects' physical properties, such as stiffness, can be significantly enhanced by our interface. We further demonstrate that our interface enables ubiquitous control via finger tapping. Ultimately, we envision our findings to push forward research towards more realistic physicality in future VR/AR.

Closing the gap between real-world physicality and immersive virtual experience requires a closed interaction loop: applying user-exerted physical forces to the virtual environment and generating haptic sensations back to the users. However, existing VR/AR solutions either completely ignore the force inputs from the users or rely on obtrusive sensing devices that compromise user experience. By identifying users' muscle activation patterns while engaging in VR/AR, we design a learning-based neural interface for natural and intuitive force inputs. Specifically, we show that lightweight electromyography sensors, resting non-invasively on users' forearm skin, inform and establish a robust understanding of their complex hand activities. Fuelled by a neural-network-based model, our interface can decode finger-wise forces in real-time with 3.3% mean error, and generalize to new users with little calibration. Through an interactive psychophysical study, we show that human perception of virtual objects' physical properties, such as stiffness, can be significantly enhanced by our interface. We further demonstrate that our interface enables ubiquitous control via finger tapping. Ultimately, we envision our findings to push forward research towards more realistic physicality in future VR/AR.
abstract_zh: 尽管虚拟现实和增强现实 (VR/AR) 在视觉和听觉真实感方面取得了巨大进步，但在虚拟世界中引入合理的物理感仍然具有挑战性。缩小现实世界的物理性和沉浸式虚拟体验之间的差距需要一个封闭的交互循环：将用户施加的物理力施加到虚拟环境并生成触觉反馈给用户。然而，现有的 VR/AR 解决方案要么完全忽略用户的力输入，要么依赖影响用户体验的干扰性传感设备。通过识别用户在使用 VR/AR 时的肌肉激活模式，我们设计了一个基于学习的神经接口，用于自然直观的力输入。具体来说，我们展示了轻量级肌电图传感器，非侵入性地放置在用户前臂皮肤上，可以告知并建立对其复杂手部活动的深入了解。在基于神经网络的模型的推动下，我们的界面可以实时解码手指力，平均误差为 3.3%，并且无需校准即可推广到新用户。通过交互式心理物理学研究，我们表明，我们的界面可以显着增强人类对虚拟对象物理属性（例如刚度）的感知。我们进一步证明我们的界面可以通过手指点击进行无处不在的控制。最终，我们希望我们的研究结果能够推动未来 VR/AR 中更真实的物理性的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于肌电图（EMG）的力感知交互接口，通过非侵入式传感器和神经网络模型实现VR/AR中自然的手部力量输入与反馈。
AI.motivation: 现有VR/AR系统难以实现真实的物理交互，传统方案或忽略用户施力输入，或依赖侵入性设备影响体验，需开发更自然的力感知方法。
AI.method: 使用轻量级非侵入式EMG传感器采集前臂肌肉信号，结合神经网络模型实时解码手指级力量，通过少量校准即可泛化至新用户。
AI.result: 实现3.3%均方误差的实时手指力量解码，显著提升虚拟物体刚度等物理属性的感知精度，并支持通过手指敲击进行控制。
AI.conclusion: 该接口为VR/AR提供了更自然的物理交互方式，推动未来虚拟环境中真实物理反馈的研究与应用。

title: One-shot Detail Retouching with Patch Space Neural Transformation Blending
title_zh: 使用补丁空间神经变换混合进行一次性细节修饰
abstract: Photo retouching is a difficult task for novice users as it requires expert knowledge and advanced tools. Photographers often spend a great deal of time generating high-quality retouched photos with intricate details. In this paper, we introduce a one-shot learning based technique to automatically retouch details of an input image based on just a single pair of before and after example images. Our approach provides accurate and generalizable detail edit transfer to new images. We achieve these by proposing a new representation for image to image maps. Specifically, we propose neural field based transformation blending in the patch space for defining patch to patch transformations for each frequency band. This parametrization of the map with anchor transformations and associated weights, and spatio-spectral localized patches, allows us to capture details well while staying generalizable. We evaluate our technique both on known ground truth filters and artist retouching edits. Our method accurately transfers complex detail retouching edits.
summary: Photo retouching is a difficult task for novice users as it requires expert knowledge and advanced tools. Photographers often spend a great deal of time generating high-quality retouched photos with intricate details. In this paper, we introduce a one-shot learning based technique to automatically retouch details of an input image based on just a single pair of before and after example images. Our approach provides accurate and generalizable detail edit transfer to new images. We achieve these by proposing a new representation for image to image maps. Specifically, we propose neural field based transformation blending in the patch space for defining patch to patch transformations for each frequency band. This parametrization of the map with anchor transformations and associated weights, and spatio-spectral localized patches, allows us to capture details well while staying generalizable. We evaluate our technique both on known ground truth filters and artist retouching edits. Our method accurately transfers complex detail retouching edits.
abstract_zh: 照片修饰对于新手用户来说是一项艰巨的任务，因为它需要专业知识和先进的工具。摄影师经常花费大量时间来生成具有复杂细节的高质量修饰照片。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于一次性学习的技术，可以仅基于一对前后示例图像自动修饰输入图像的细节。我们的方法提供了准确且可概括的细节编辑转移到新图像。我们通过提出图像到图像映射的新表示来实现这些目标。具体来说，我们提出了在补丁空间中基于神经场的变换混合，用于定义每个频带的补丁到补丁的变换。这种具有锚变换和相关权重以及空间光谱局部补丁的地图参数化使我们能够很好地捕捉细节，同时保持可概括性。我们根据已知的地面实况过滤器和艺术家修饰编辑来评估我们的技术。我们的方法可以准确地传输复杂的细节修饰编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单次学习的图像细节润色方法，通过单对示例图像实现细节编辑的自动迁移。
AI.motivation: 传统照片润色需专业技能和复杂工具，耗时且门槛高，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 提出神经场驱动的补丁空间变换混合方法，通过频率带补丁映射与锚定变换参数化实现细节编辑泛化。
AI.result: 方法在真实滤镜与艺术家润色案例中均能准确迁移复杂细节，验证了其有效性与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新表示学习实现了高效、准确的细节润色自动化，具有广泛的应用潜力。

Our method accurately transfers complex detail retouching edits. 照片修饰对于新手用户来说是一项艰巨的任务，因为它需要专业知识和先进的工具。摄影师经常花费大量时间来生成具有复杂细节的高质量修饰照片。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于一次性学习的技术，可以仅基于一对前后示例图像自动修饰输入图像的细节。我们的方法提供了准确且可概括的细节编辑转移到新图像。我们通过提出图像到图像映射的新表示来实现这些目标。具体来说，我们提出了在补丁空间中基于神经场的变换混合，用于定义每个频带的补丁到补丁的变换。这种具有锚变换和相关权重以及空间光谱局部补丁的地图参数化使我们能够很好地捕捉细节，同时保持可概括性。我们根据已知的地面实况过滤器和艺术家修饰编辑来评估我们的技术。我们的方法可以准确地传输复杂的细节修饰编辑。 本文提出一种基于单次学习的图像细节润色方法，通过单对示例图像实现细节编辑的自动迁移。 Fazilet Gokbudak,Cengiz Oztireli cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Cenk Baykal,Khoa Trinh,Fotis Iliopoulos,Gaurav Menghani,Erik Vee
title: Robust Active Distillation
title_zh: 稳健的主动蒸馏
abstract: Distilling knowledge from a large teacher model to a lightweight one is a widely successful approach for generating compact, powerful models in the semi-supervised learning setting where a limited amount of labeled data is available. In large-scale applications, however, the teacher tends to provide a large number of incorrect soft-labels that impairs student performance. The sheer size of the teacher additionally constrains the number of soft-labels that can be queried due to prohibitive computational and/or financial costs. The difficulty in achieving simultaneous \emph{efficiency} (i.e., minimizing soft-label queries) and \emph{robustness} (i.e., avoiding student inaccuracies due to incorrect labels) hurts the widespread application of knowledge distillation to many modern tasks. In this paper, we present a parameter-free approach with provable guarantees to query the soft-labels of points that are simultaneously informative and correctly labeled by the teacher. At the core of our work lies a game-theoretic formulation that explicitly considers the inherent trade-off between the informativeness and correctness of input instances. We establish bounds on the expected performance of our approach that hold even in worst-case distillation instances. We present empirical evaluations on popular benchmarks that demonstrate the improved distillation performance enabled by our work relative to that of state-of-the-art active learning and active distillation methods.
summary: Distilling knowledge from a large teacher model to a lightweight one is a widely successful approach for generating compact, powerful models in the semi-supervised learning setting where a limited amount of labeled data is available. In large-scale applications, however, the teacher tends to provide a large number of incorrect soft-labels that impairs student performance. The sheer size of the teacher additionally constrains the number of soft-labels that can be queried due to prohibitive computational and/or financial costs. The difficulty in achieving simultaneous \emph{efficiency} (i.e., minimizing soft-label queries) and \emph{robustness} (i.e., avoiding student inaccuracies due to incorrect labels) hurts the widespread application of knowledge distillation to many modern tasks. In this paper, we present a parameter-free approach with provable guarantees to query the soft-labels of points that are simultaneously informative and correctly labeled by the teacher. At the core of our work lies a game-theoretic formulation that explicitly considers the inherent trade-off between the informativeness and correctness of input instances. We establish bounds on the expected performance of our approach that hold even in worst-case distillation instances. We present empirical evaluations on popular benchmarks that demonstrate the improved distillation performance enabled by our work relative to that of state-of-the-art active learning and active distillation methods.
abstract_zh: 从大型教师模型中提取知识到轻量级模型是一种广泛成功的方法，可在可用标记数据数量有限的半监督学习环境中生成紧凑、强大的模型。然而，在大规模应用中，教师往往会提供大量不正确的软标签，从而影响学生的表现。由于计算和/或财务成本过高，教师的庞大规模还限制了可以查询的软标签的数量。同时实现\emph{效率}（即最小化软标签查询）和\emph{鲁棒性}（即避免学生因标签不正确而导致的不准确）的困难损害了知识蒸馏在许多现代任务中的广泛应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种无参数方法，具有可证明的保证来查询点的软标签，这些点同时提供信息并由教师正确标记。我们工作的核心是一种博弈论公式，它明确考虑了输入实例的信息性和正确性之间的固有权衡。我们为我们的方法的预期性能设定了界限，即使在最坏情况的蒸馏情况下也是如此。我们对流行的基准进行了实证评估，证明了我们的工作相对于最先进的主动学习和主动蒸馏方法提高了蒸馏性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数-free的方法，通过同时考虑信息量和标签正确性来选择软标签，以提高知识蒸馏的效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 大规模应用中，教师模型生成的软标签可能存在大量错误，且计算成本限制了查询数量，导致效率与鲁棒性难以兼顾。
AI.method: 基于博弈论框架，构建信息量与正确性的权衡模型，并提供最坏情况下的性能保证。
AI.result: 在主流基准测试中，该方法相比现有主动学习和蒸馏方法显著提升了蒸馏效果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作有效解决了知识蒸馏中效率与鲁棒性的矛盾，为现代任务的模型压缩提供了新思路。

title: A Reproducible and Realistic Evaluation of Partial Domain Adaptation Methods
title_zh: 部分域适应方法的可重复且现实的评估
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) aims at classifying unlabeled target images leveraging source labeled ones. In this work, we consider the Partial Domain Adaptation (PDA) variant, where we have extra source classes not present in the target domain. Most successful algorithms use model selection strategies that rely on target labels to find the best hyper-parameters and/or models along training. However, these strategies violate the main assumption in PDA: only unlabeled target domain samples are available. Moreover, there are also inconsistencies in the experimental settings - architecture, hyper-parameter tuning, number of runs - yielding unfair comparisons. The main goal of this work is to provide a realistic evaluation of PDA methods with the different model selection strategies under a consistent evaluation protocol. We evaluate 7 representative PDA algorithms on 2 different real-world datasets using 7 different model selection strategies. Our two main findings are: (i) without target labels for model selection, the accuracy of the methods decreases up to 30 percentage points; (ii) only one method and model selection pair performs well on both datasets. Experiments were performed with our PyTorch framework, BenchmarkPDA, which we open source.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) aims at classifying unlabeled target images leveraging source labeled ones. In this work, we consider the Partial Domain Adaptation (PDA) variant, where we have extra source classes not present in the target domain. Most successful algorithms use model selection strategies that rely on target labels to find the best hyper-parameters and/or models along training. However, these strategies violate the main assumption in PDA: only unlabeled target domain samples are available. Moreover, there are also inconsistencies in the experimental settings - architecture, hyper-parameter tuning, number of runs - yielding unfair comparisons. The main goal of this work is to provide a realistic evaluation of PDA methods with the different model selection strategies under a consistent evaluation protocol. We evaluate 7 representative PDA algorithms on 2 different real-world datasets using 7 different model selection strategies. Our two main findings are: (i) without target labels for model selection, the accuracy of the methods decreases up to 30 percentage points; (ii) only one method and model selection pair performs well on both datasets. Experiments were performed with our PyTorch framework, BenchmarkPDA, which we open source.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在利用源标记图像对未标记目标图像进行分类。在这项工作中，我们考虑部分域适应（PDA）变体，其中我们有目标域中不存在的额外源类。大多数成功的算法都使用模型选择策略，这些策略依赖于目标标签来在训练过程中找到最佳的超参数和/或模型。然而，这些策略违反了 PDA 中的主要假设：只有未标记的目标域样本可用。此外，实验设置（架构、超参数调整、运行次数）也存在不一致，从而产生不公平的比较。这项工作的主要目标是在一致的评估协议下使用不同的模型选择策略对 PDA 方法进行现实的评估。我们使用 7 种不同的模型选择策略在 2 个不同的现实数据集上评估 7 种代表性的 PDA 算法。我们的两个主要发现是：(i) 如果没有用于模型选择的目标标签，该方法的准确性会降低多达 30 个百分点； (ii) 只有一种方法和模型选择对在两个数据集上都表现良好。我们使用我们开源的 PyTorch 框架 BenchmarkPDA 进行了实验。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过一致的评估协议，对部分领域自适应（PDA）方法进行可重复和现实的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有PDA算法在模型选择中依赖目标标签，违反了PDA仅使用未标记目标样本的核心假设，且实验设置不一致导致比较不公平。
AI.method: 使用自研的PyTorch框架BenchmarkPDA，在两个真实数据集上评估7种代表性PDA算法，结合7种不同的模型选择策略进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验发现：不使用目标标签进行模型选择时，方法准确率最多下降30个百分点；仅有1种方法和模型选择组合在两个数据集上表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 模型选择策略对PDA性能影响显著，需在无目标标签条件下优化方法，同时呼吁建立统一的评估标准。

title: Automatic Assessment of Functional Movement Screening Exercises with Deep Learning Architectures
title_zh: 使用深度学习架构自动评估功能运动筛查练习
abstract: (1) Background: The success of physiotherapy depends on the regular and correct performance of movement exercises. A system that automatically evaluates these could support the therapy. Previous approaches in this area rarely rely on Deep Learning methods and do not yet fully use their potential. (2) Methods: Using a measurement system consisting of 17 IMUs, a dataset of four Functional Movement Screening (FMS) exercises is recorded. Exercise execution is evaluated by physiotherapists using the FMS criteria. This dataset is used to train a neural network that assigns the correct FMS score to an exercise repetition. We use an architecture consisting of CNN, LSTM and Dense layers. Based on this framework, we apply various methods to optimize the performance of the network. For the optimization, we perform a extensive hyperparameter optimization. In addition, we are comparing different CNN structures that have been specifically adapted for use with IMU data. Finally, the developed network is trained with the data of different FMS exercises and the performance is compared. (3) Results: The evaluation shows that the presented approach achieves a convincing performance in the classification of unknown repetitions of already known subjects. However, the trained network is yet unable to achieve consistent performance on the data of a previously unknown subjects. Additionally, it can be seen that the performance of the network differs significantly depending on the exercise it is trained for.

Previous approaches in this area rarely rely on Deep Learning methods and do not yet fully use their potential. For the optimization, we perform a extensive hyperparameter optimization. In addition, we are comparing different CNN structures that have been specifically adapted for use with IMU data. However, the trained network is yet unable to achieve consistent performance on the data of a previously unknown subjects. Additionally, it can be seen that the performance of the network differs significantly depending on the exercise it is trained for.
abstract_zh: (1)背景：物理治疗的成功取决于定期、正确的运动练习。自动评估这些的系统可以支持治疗。该领域以前的方法很少依赖深度学习方法，并且尚未充分发挥其潜力。 (2) 方法：使用由 17 个 IMU 组成的测量系统，记录四次功能运动筛选 (FMS) 练习的数据集。运动执行情况由物理治疗师使用 FMS 标准进行评估。该数据集用于训练神经网络，为练习重复分配正确的 FMS 分数。我们使用由 CNN、LSTM 和 Dense 层组成的架构。基于这个框架，我们应用各种方法来优化网络的性能。为了优化，我们执行了广泛的超参数优化。此外，我们还比较了专门针对 IMU 数据使用的不同 CNN 结构。最后，使用不同FMS练习的数据对开发的网络进行训练并比较性能。 (3) 结果：评估表明，所提出的方法在对已知主题的未知重复进行分类方面取得了令人信服的性能。然而，经过训练的网络尚无法在先前未知的受试者数据上实现一致的性能。此外，可以看出，网络的性能根据其训练的练习而显着不同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习架构的自动评估功能性动作筛查（FMS）练习的方法，利用惯性测量单元（IMU）数据训练神经网络以分配FMS评分。
AI.motivation: 物理治疗效果依赖于运动练习的规范执行，现有评估方法未充分挖掘深度学习潜力，需开发更高效的自动评估系统。
AI.method: 采用包含17个IMU的测量系统采集四类FMS练习数据，通过物理治疗师标注评分构建数据集，使用CNN-LSTM混合网络结构并进行超参数优化与不同CNN架构对比实验。
AI.result: 模型在已知受试者的新动作重复分类中表现良好，但对未知受试者数据一致性不足，且不同练习的性能差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了深度学习在FMS评估中的可行性，但需进一步优化跨受试者泛化能力及针对不同练习的模型适配性。

search_text: Automatic Assessment of Functional Movement Screening Exercises with Deep Learning Architectures 使用深度学习架构自动评估功能运动筛查练习 (1) Background: The success of physiotherapy depends on the regular and correct performance of movement exercises. A system that automatically evaluates these could support the therapy. Previous approaches in this area rarely rely on Deep Learning methods and do not yet fully use their potential. (2) Methods: Using a measurement system consisting of 17 IMUs, a dataset of four Functional Movement Screening (FMS) exercises is recorded. Exercise execution is evaluated by physiotherapists using the FMS criteria. This dataset is used to train a neural network that assigns the correct FMS score to an exercise repetition. We use an architecture consisting of CNN, LSTM and Dense layers. Based on this framework, we apply various methods to optimize the performance of the network. For the optimization, we perform a extensive hyperparameter optimization. In addition, we are comparing different CNN structures that have been specifically adapted for use with IMU data. Finally, the developed network is trained with the data of different FMS exercises and the performance is compared. (3) Results: The evaluation shows that the presented approach achieves a convincing performance in the classification of unknown repetitions of already known subjects. However, the trained network is yet unable to achieve consistent performance on the data of a previously unknown subjects. Additionally, it can be seen that the performance of the network differs significantly depending on the exercise it is trained for. title: Offline Reinforcement Learning with Differentiable Function Approximation is Provably Efficient
title_zh: 具有可微函数逼近的离线强化学习被证明是有效的
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning, which aims at optimizing sequential decision-making strategies with historical data, has been extensively applied in real-life applications. State-Of-The-Art algorithms usually leverage powerful function approximators (e.g. neural networks) to alleviate the sample complexity hurdle for better empirical performances. Despite the successes, a more systematic understanding of the statistical complexity for function approximation remains lacking. Towards bridging the gap, we take a step by considering offline reinforcement learning with differentiable function class approximation (DFA). This function class naturally incorporates a wide range of models with nonlinear/nonconvex structures. Most importantly, we show offline RL with differentiable function approximation is provably efficient by analyzing the pessimistic fitted Q-learning (PFQL) algorithm, and our results provide the theoretical basis for understanding a variety of practical heuristics that rely on Fitted Q-Iteration style design. In addition, we further improve our guarantee with a tighter instance-dependent characterization. We hope our work could draw interest in studying reinforcement learning with differentiable function approximation beyond the scope of current research.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning, which aims at optimizing sequential decision-making strategies with historical data, has been extensively applied in real-life applications. State-Of-The-Art algorithms usually leverage powerful function approximators (e.g. neural networks) to alleviate the sample complexity hurdle for better empirical performances. Despite the successes, a more systematic understanding of the statistical complexity for function approximation remains lacking. Towards bridging the gap, we take a step by considering offline reinforcement learning with differentiable function class approximation (DFA). This function class naturally incorporates a wide range of models with nonlinear/nonconvex structures. Most importantly, we show offline RL with differentiable function approximation is provably efficient by analyzing the pessimistic fitted Q-learning (PFQL) algorithm, and our results provide the theoretical basis for understanding a variety of practical heuristics that rely on Fitted Q-Iteration style design. In addition, we further improve our guarantee with a tighter instance-dependent characterization. We hope our work could draw interest in studying reinforcement learning with differentiable function approximation beyond the scope of current research.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习旨在利用历史数据优化顺序决策策略，已广泛应用于现实生活中。最先进的算法通常利用强大的函数逼近器（例如神经网络）来减轻样本复杂性障碍，以获得更好的经验性能。尽管取得了成功，但仍然缺乏对函数逼近的统计复杂性的更系统的理解。为了弥补这一差距，我们采取了一步，考虑使用可微函数类逼近（DFA）的离线强化学习。该函数类自然地包含了各种具有非线性/非凸结构的模型。最重要的是，通过分析悲观拟合 Q 学习 (PFQL) 算法，我们证明了具有可微函数逼近的离线 RL 是有效的，并且我们的结果为理解依赖于拟合 Q 迭代风格设计的各种实用启发式方法提供了理论基础。此外，我们通过更严格的实例相关特征进一步提高了我们的保证。我们希望我们的工作能够引起人们对研究具有可微函数逼近的强化学习的兴趣，超出当前研究的范围。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用可微函数逼近的离线强化学习方法，并证明其理论效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有算法通过函数逼近提升性能，但缺乏对函数逼近统计复杂性的系统性理论分析。
AI.method: 通过分析悲观拟Q学习算法（PFQL），结合实例依赖的 tighter 表征进行理论推导。
AI.result: 证明了可微函数逼近在离线RL中的 provable efficiency，并为实践中的启发式方法提供理论依据。
AI.conclusion: 希望推动学界对可微函数逼近在强化学习中应用的进一步研究。

authors_text: Haoxuan Qu,Li Xu,Yujun Cai,Lin Geng Foo,Jun Liu
title: Heatmap Distribution Matching for Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于人体姿势估计的热图分布匹配
abstract: For tackling the task of 2D human pose estimation, the great majority of the recent methods regard this task as a heatmap estimation problem, and optimize the heatmap prediction using the Gaussian-smoothed heatmap as the optimization objective and using the pixel-wise loss (e.g. MSE) as the loss function. In this paper, we show that optimizing the heatmap prediction in such a way, the model performance of body joint localization, which is the intrinsic objective of this task, may not be consistently improved during the optimization process of the heatmap prediction. To address this problem, from a novel perspective, we propose to formulate the optimization of the heatmap prediction as a distribution matching problem between the predicted heatmap and the dot annotation of the body joint directly. By doing so, our proposed method does not need to construct the Gaussian-smoothed heatmap and can achieve a more consistent model performance improvement during the optimization of the heatmap prediction. We show the effectiveness of our proposed method through extensive experiments on the COCO dataset and the MPII dataset.
summary: For tackling the task of 2D human pose estimation, the great majority of the recent methods regard this task as a heatmap estimation problem, and optimize the heatmap prediction using the Gaussian-smoothed heatmap as the optimization objective and using the pixel-wise loss (e.g. MSE) as the loss function. In this paper, we show that optimizing the heatmap prediction in such a way, the model performance of body joint localization, which is the intrinsic objective of this task, may not be consistently improved during the optimization process of the heatmap prediction. To address this problem, from a novel perspective, we propose to formulate the optimization of the heatmap prediction as a distribution matching problem between the predicted heatmap and the dot annotation of the body joint directly. By doing so, our proposed method does not need to construct the Gaussian-smoothed heatmap and can achieve a more consistent model performance improvement during the optimization of the heatmap prediction. We show the effectiveness of our proposed method through extensive experiments on the COCO dataset and the MPII dataset.
abstract_zh: 为了解决2D人体姿态估计的任务，最近的大多数方法都将该任务视为热图估计问题，并使用高斯平滑热图作为优化目标并使用逐像素损失（例如MSE）作为损失函数来优化热图预测。在本文中，我们表明，以这种方式优化热图预测，在热图预测的优化过程中，作为该任务的内在目标的身体关节定位的模型性能可能不会得到持续改善。为了解决这个问题，从一个新的角度，我们建议将热图预测的优化直接表述为预测热图和身体关节点注释之间的分布匹配问题。通过这样做，我们提出的方法不需要构造高斯平滑热图，并且可以在热图预测优化期间实现更一致的模型性能改进。我们通过对 COCO 数据集和 MPII 数据集的大量实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的热图分布匹配方法，用于改进二维人体姿态估计任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过高斯平滑热图和像素级损失函数优化热图预测，但发现这种方式无法保证人体关键点定位性能的持续提升。
AI.method: 将热图预测优化转化为预测热图与人体关键点标注之间的分布匹配问题，直接使用点标注而非高斯平滑热图进行优化。
AI.result: 在COCO和MPII数据集上的实验表明，该方法在人体姿态估计任务中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接匹配热图分布与点标注，避免了高斯平滑带来的信息损失，实现了更一致的模型性能提升。

result: 在COCO和MPII数据集上的实验表明，该方法在人体姿态估计任务中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
conclusion: 通过直接匹配热图分布与点标注，避免了高斯平滑带来的信息损失，实现了更一致的模型性能提升。
search_text: Heatmap Distribution Matching for Human Pose Estimation 用于人体姿势估计的热图分布匹配 For tackling the task of 2D human pose estimation, the great majority of the recent methods regard this task as a heatmap estimation problem, and optimize the heatmap prediction using the Gaussian-smoothed heatmap as the optimization objective and using the pixel-wise loss (e.g. MSE) as the loss function. In this paper, we show that optimizing the heatmap prediction in such a way, the model performance of body joint localization, which is the intrinsic objective of this task, may not be consistently improved during the optimization process of the heatmap prediction. To address this problem, from a novel perspective, we propose to formulate the optimization of the heatmap prediction as a distribution matching problem between the predicted heatmap and the dot annotation of the body joint directly. By doing so, our proposed method does not need to construct the Gaussian-smoothed heatmap and can achieve a more consistent model performance improvement during the optimization of the heatmap prediction. We show the effectiveness of our proposed method through extensive experiments on the COCO dataset and the MPII dataset. 为了解决2D人体姿态估计的任务，最近的大多数方法都将该任务视为热图估计问题，并使用高斯平滑热图作为优化目标并使用逐像素损失（例如MSE）作为损失函数来优化热图预测。在本文中，我们表明，以这种方式优化热图预测，在热图预测的优化过程中，作为该任务的内在目标的身体关节定位的模型性能可能不会得到持续改善。为了解决这个问题，从一个新的角度，我们建议将热图预测的优化直接表述为预测热图和身体关节点注释之间的分布匹配问题。通过这样做，我们提出的方法不需要构造高斯平滑热图，并且可以在热图预测优化期间实现更一致的模型性能改进。我们通过对 COCO 数据集和 MPII 数据集的大量实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种新的热图分布匹配方法，用于改进二维人体姿态估计任务。 Haoxuan Qu,Li Xu,Yujun Cai,Lin Geng Foo,Jun Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Chaoran Chen,Brad A. Myers,Cem Ergin,Emily Porat,Sijia Li,Chun Wang
title: ScrollTest: Evaluating Scrolling Speed and Accuracy
title_zh: ScrollTest：评估滚动速度和准确性
abstract: Scrolling is an essential interaction technique enabling users to display previously off-screen content. Existing evaluation models for scrolling are often entangled with the selection of content, e.g., when scrolling on the phone for reading. Furthermore, some evaluation models overlook whether the user knows the target position. We have developed ScrollTest, a general-purpose evaluation tool for scrolling speed and accuracy that avoids the need for selection. We tested it across four dimensions: 11 different scrolling techniques/devices, 5 frame heights, 13 scrolling distances, and 2 scrolling conditions (i.e., with or without knowing the target position). The results show that flicking and two-finger scrolling are the fastest; flicking is also relatively precise for scrolling to targets already onscreen, but pressing arrow buttons on the scrollbar is the most accurate for scrolling to nearby targets. Mathematical models of scrolling are highly linear when the target position is unknown but like Fitts' law when known.
summary: Scrolling is an essential interaction technique enabling users to display previously off-screen content. Existing evaluation models for scrolling are often entangled with the selection of content, e.g., when scrolling on the phone for reading. Furthermore, some evaluation models overlook whether the user knows the target position. We have developed ScrollTest, a general-purpose evaluation tool for scrolling speed and accuracy that avoids the need for selection. We tested it across four dimensions: 11 different scrolling techniques/devices, 5 frame heights, 13 scrolling distances, and 2 scrolling conditions (i.e., with or without knowing the target position). The results show that flicking and two-finger scrolling are the fastest; flicking is also relatively precise for scrolling to targets already onscreen, but pressing arrow buttons on the scrollbar is the most accurate for scrolling to nearby targets. Mathematical models of scrolling are highly linear when the target position is unknown but like Fitts' law when known.
abstract_zh: 滚动是一种重要的交互技术，使用户能够显示以前不在屏幕上的内容。现有的滚动评估模型通常与内容的选择纠缠在一起，例如在手机上滚动阅读时。此外，一些评估模型忽略了用户是否知道目标位置。我们开发了 ScrollTest，这是一种通用评估工具，用于评估滚动速度和准确性，无需进行选择。我们在四个维度上对其进行了测试：11 种不同的滚动技术/设备、5 种框架高度、13 种滚动距离和 2 种滚动条件（即，知道或不知道目标位置）。结果表明，轻拂和两指滚动速度最快；轻拂对于滚动到屏幕上已有的目标也相对精确，但按滚动条上的箭头按钮对于滚动到附近的目标是最准确的。当目标位置未知时，滚动的数学模型是高度线性的，但当目标位置已知时，则类似于费茨定律。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ScrollTest工具，用于评估滚动速度和准确性，避免内容选择的干扰。
AI.motivation: 现有滚动评估模型与内容选择纠缠，且忽略用户是否知晓目标位置，需开发更通用的评估工具。
AI.method: 通过测试11种设备、5种框架高度、13种滚动距离及2种条件（知晓/不知晓目标位置），结合数学模型分析滚动表现。
AI.result: 快速滚动技术为滑动和双指滚动；滑动对屏内目标较精准，滚动条箭头按钮对邻近目标最准确；数学模型在未知目标时呈线性，已知目标时类似Fitts定律。
AI.conclusion: ScrollTest提供了通用评估方法，揭示了设备和条件对滚动性能的影响，为界面设计提供依据。

authors_text: B. P. Ashwini,R. Sumathi,H. S. Sudhira
title: A Dynamic Model for Bus Arrival Time Estimation based on Spatial Patterns using Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习的基于空间模式的公交车到达时间估计的动态模型
abstract: The notion of smart cities is being adapted globally to provide a better quality of living. A smart city's smart mobility component focuses on providing smooth and safe commuting for its residents and promotes eco-friendly and sustainable alternatives such as public transit (bus). Among several smart applications, a system that provides up-to-the-minute information like bus arrival, travel duration, schedule, etc., improves the reliability of public transit services. Still, this application needs live information on traffic flow, accidents, events, and the location of the buses. Most cities lack the infrastructure to provide these data. In this context, a bus arrival prediction model is proposed for forecasting the arrival time using limited data sets. The location data of public transit buses and spatial characteristics are used for the study. One of the routes of Tumakuru city service, Tumakuru, India, is selected and divided into two spatial patterns: sections with intersections and sections without intersections. The machine learning model XGBoost is modeled for both spatial patterns individually. A model to dynamically predict bus arrival time is developed using the preceding trip information and the machine learning model to estimate the arrival time at a downstream bus stop. The performance of models is compared based on the R-squared values of the predictions made, and the proposed model established superior results. It is suggested to predict bus arrival in the study area. The proposed model can also be extended to other similar cities with limited traffic-related infrastructure.
summary: The notion of smart cities is being adapted globally to provide a better quality of living. A smart city's smart mobility component focuses on providing smooth and safe commuting for its residents and promotes eco-friendly and sustainable alternatives such as public transit (bus). Still, this application needs live information on traffic flow, accidents, events, and the location of the buses. Most cities lack the infrastructure to provide these data. In this context, a bus arrival prediction model is proposed for forecasting the arrival time using limited data sets. The location data of public transit buses and spatial characteristics are used for the study. It is suggested to predict bus arrival in the study area. The proposed model can also be extended to other similar cities with limited traffic-related infrastructure.
abstract_zh: 智慧城市的概念正在全球范围内得到应用，以提供更好的生活质量。智慧城市的智能交通组件侧重于为其居民提供顺畅、安全的通勤，并推广公共交通（公交车）等环保和可持续的替代方案。在众多智能应用中，提供公交车到达、行程时间、时间表等最新信息的系统提高了公共交通服务的可靠性。尽管如此，该应用程序仍然需要有关交通流量、事故、事件和公交车位置的实时信息。大多数城市缺乏提供这些数据的基础设施。在此背景下，提出了一种公交车到达预测模型，用于使用有限的数据集预测到达时间。公共交通巴士的位置数据和空间特征用于研究。选取印度图马库鲁市图马库鲁城市服务线路之一，分为有交叉口路段和无交叉路口路段两种空间格局。机器学习模型 XGBoost 分别针对两种空间模式进行建模。利用先前行程信息和机器学习模型开发了动态预测公交车到达时间的模型，以估计下游公交车站的到达时间。根据预测的 R 平方值对模型的性能进行比较，所提出的模型取得了优异的结果。建议预测研究区域的公交车到达情况。所提出的模型还可以扩展到交通相关基础设施有限的其他类似城市。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间模式和机器学习的动态公交到站时间预测模型，以解决缺乏实时交通数据的城市公交调度问题。
AI.motivation: 智慧城市需要精准的公交信息提升出行可靠性，但多数城市缺乏实时交通数据基础设施，传统方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 选取印度图迈库尔市公交线路，按路段是否包含交叉口划分空间模式，分别用XGBoost算法建立预测模型，并结合历史行程数据动态估算下游站点到站时间。
AI.result: 模型通过R平方值对比验证，预测效果优于传统方法，在有限数据条件下实现了较高精度的公交到站时间预测。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为数据基础设施薄弱的城市提供了可行的公交预测方案，可扩展至其他类似城市应用。

title: Privacy-Preserving Feature Coding for Machines
title_zh: 机器的隐私保护特征编码
abstract: Automated machine vision pipelines do not need the exact visual content to perform their tasks. Therefore, there is a potential to remove private information from the data without significantly affecting the machine vision accuracy. We present a novel method to create a privacy-preserving latent representation of an image that could be used by a downstream machine vision model. This latent representation is constructed using adversarial training to prevent accurate reconstruction of the input while preserving the task accuracy. Specifically, we split a Deep Neural Network (DNN) model and insert an autoencoder whose purpose is to both reduce the dimensionality as well as remove information relevant to input reconstruction while minimizing the impact on task accuracy. Our results show that input reconstruction ability can be reduced by about 0.8 dB at the equivalent task accuracy, with degradation concentrated near the edges, which is important for privacy. At the same time, 30% bit savings are achieved compared to coding the features directly.
summary: Automated machine vision pipelines do not need the exact visual content to perform their tasks. Therefore, there is a potential to remove private information from the data without significantly affecting the machine vision accuracy. We present a novel method to create a privacy-preserving latent representation of an image that could be used by a downstream machine vision model. This latent representation is constructed using adversarial training to prevent accurate reconstruction of the input while preserving the task accuracy. Specifically, we split a Deep Neural Network (DNN) model and insert an autoencoder whose purpose is to both reduce the dimensionality as well as remove information relevant to input reconstruction while minimizing the impact on task accuracy. Our results show that input reconstruction ability can be reduced by about 0.8 dB at the equivalent task accuracy, with degradation concentrated near the edges, which is important for privacy. At the same time, 30% bit savings are achieved compared to coding the features directly.
abstract_zh: 自动化机器视觉管道不需要精确的视觉内容来执行其任务。因此，有可能从数据中删除私人信息，而不会显着影响机器视觉的准确性。我们提出了一种新颖的方法来创建图像的隐私保护潜在表示，可供下游机器视觉模型使用。这种潜在表示是使用对抗性训练构建的，以防止输入的准确重建，同时保持任务的准确性。具体来说，我们拆分了深度神经网络（DNN）模型并插入了一个自动编码器，其目的是降低维度并删除与输入重建相关的信息，同时最大限度地减少对任务准确性的影响。我们的结果表明，在同等任务精度下，输入重建能力可降低约 0.8 dB，退化集中在边缘附近，这对于隐私很重要。同时，与直接对特征进行编码相比，可以节省 30% 的比特。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种隐私保护的图像特征编码方法，通过对抗训练生成机器视觉模型可用的潜空间表示，同时降低输入重建能力。
AI.motivation: 机器视觉任务无需精确视觉内容，因此可在不显著影响任务精度的前提下移除图像中的隐私信息，现有方法难以平衡隐私保护与模型性能。
AI.method: 将深度神经网络分割并在中间插入自编码器，通过对抗训练同时实现维度压缩、去除重建相关信息以及最小化任务精度损失。
AI.result: 输入重建能力降低约0.8dB（边缘区域降质显著），相比直接编码特征节省30%比特数，任务精度基本保持不变。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证机器视觉性能的同时有效提升隐私保护水平，为安全高效的视觉数据处理提供了新思路。

title: Unpacking Cultural Perceptions of Future Elder Care through Design Fiction
title_zh: 通过设计小说揭示未来老年护理的文化观念
abstract: We present a case using Design Fiction to unpack cultural perceptions of future elder care rooted in the Asian context of Singapore. We created two design fictions, addressing the tensions between filial piety and automated care and the controversy of integrating elder care facilities into residential communities. The design fictions took the visual forms of a shopping web page and a petition site and the public were invited to make fictional decisions. Received in total 109 responses, we identify the key tensions and value conflicts and illustrate them through visual narratives. Further, we propose the Asian perspective of positioning relationships as the protagonist in creating elder care design fiction.
summary: We present a case using Design Fiction to unpack cultural perceptions of future elder care rooted in the Asian context of Singapore. We created two design fictions, addressing the tensions between filial piety and automated care and the controversy of integrating elder care facilities into residential communities. The design fictions took the visual forms of a shopping web page and a petition site and the public were invited to make fictional decisions. Received in total 109 responses, we identify the key tensions and value conflicts and illustrate them through visual narratives. Further, we propose the Asian perspective of positioning relationships as the protagonist in creating elder care design fiction.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个使用设计小说的案例来揭示植根于新加坡亚洲背景的未来老年护理的文化观念。我们创造了两个设计虚构，解决孝道和自动化护理之间的紧张关系，以及将老年护理设施纳入住宅社区的争议。设计虚构作品采用购物网页和请愿网站的视觉形式，并邀请公众做出虚构的决定。我们总共收到 109 份回复，找出关键的紧张局势和价值冲突，并通过视觉叙事来说明它们。此外，我们提出了亚洲视角，将关系定位为创作老年护理设计小说的主角。

AI.tldr: 本文通过设计虚构（Design Fiction）探讨新加坡背景下未来老年护理的文化观念，分析孝道与自动化护理、护理设施社区化等矛盾。
AI.motivation: 针对亚洲文化中老年护理面临的价值冲突，通过设计虚构方法揭示公众隐含的文化认知与潜在需求。
AI.method: 创建两种设计虚构形式（购物网页与请愿网站），邀请公众参与虚构决策，并分析109份反馈中的视觉叙事与价值冲突。
AI.result: 识别出孝道与自动化护理、社区整合等核心矛盾，提出以人际关系为核心构建亚洲视角的老年护理设计虚构框架。
AI.conclusion: 设计虚构可有效揭示文化深层矛盾，未来应强调人际关系在老年护理设计中的核心地位以平衡技术与伦理冲突。

title: Inattentive in social, active in mind: VR-based design intervention for imagining desirable possibilities in the public space
title_zh: 社交中不专心，头脑中活跃：基于 VR 的设计干预，想象公共空间中理想的可能性
abstract: The metro as a form of public transportation is an important urban infrastructure that takes a large population from place A to B every day. To achieve that, it is primarily designed for extreme functionality and efficiency. However, in terms of experiential aesthetics, the metro is seldom people s favourite place. When this modern infrastructure succeeds in serving urban mobility with high performance and efficiency, passengers seem to want more than the guaranteed functional performance. Recently, with the emergence of VR technologies, increasing efforts from design and HCI communities look at the value of VR technology in enhancing commuting experiences, bringing new possibilities of interaction and activities, and potentially transforming social public spaces. This study investigates how and why VR technology could be integrated with a metro ride. We experimented with ten passengers by showing them three 360 videos during their metro ride. The results show the narrative driven scene is most desirable. Despite wearing a VR headset might cause anxiety, our findings indicate a high level of acceptance towards VR experiences based on the finding that it does not challenge the normative behaviours of being a passenger inattentive in social, active in mind and further can enhance the experience. As the takeaway, we propose three strategies of VR content tailored for the metro context in which passengers would find a role participating in the virtual scene and turn the scene to one s own story, and at the same time, maintain physically constrained.
summary: The metro as a form of public transportation is an important urban infrastructure that takes a large population from place A to B every day. To achieve that, it is primarily designed for extreme functionality and efficiency. However, in terms of experiential aesthetics, the metro is seldom people s favourite place. When this modern infrastructure succeeds in serving urban mobility with high performance and efficiency, passengers seem to want more than the guaranteed functional performance. Recently, with the emergence of VR technologies, increasing efforts from design and HCI communities look at the value of VR technology in enhancing commuting experiences, bringing new possibilities of interaction and activities, and potentially transforming social public spaces. This study investigates how and why VR technology could be integrated with a metro ride. We experimented with ten passengers by showing them three 360 videos during their metro ride. The results show the narrative driven scene is most desirable. Despite wearing a VR headset might cause anxiety, our findings indicate a high level of acceptance towards VR experiences based on the finding that it does not challenge the normative behaviours of being a passenger inattentive in social, active in mind and further can enhance the experience. As the takeaway, we propose three strategies of VR content tailored for the metro context in which passengers would find a role participating in the virtual scene and turn the scene to one s own story, and at the same time, maintain physically constrained.
abstract_zh: 地铁作为公共交通的一种形式，是重要的城市基础设施，每天承载大量人口从A地到B地。为了实现这一目标，它的设计主要是为了实现极致的功能和效率。然而，就体验美学而言，地铁很少是人们最喜欢的地方。当这种现代基础设施成功地以高性能和高效率为城市交通提供服务时，乘客似乎想要的不仅仅是有保证的功能性能。近年来，随着 VR 技术的出现，设计和 HCI 社区越来越多地关注 VR 技术在增强通勤体验、带来新的互动和活动可能性以及潜在改变社会公共空间方面的价值。本研究调查了 VR 技术如何以及为何与地铁集成。我们对 10 名乘客进行了实验，在他们乘坐地铁期间向他们展示了三个 360 度视频。结果表明，叙事驱动的场景是最理想的。尽管佩戴 VR 耳机可能会引起焦虑，但我们的研究结果表明人们对 VR 体验的接受度很高，因为它不会挑战乘客在社交中不专心、思维活跃的规范行为，并且可以进一步增强体验。作为结论，我们提出了三种针对地铁环境量身定制的 VR 内容策略，其中乘客会找到参与虚拟场景的角色，并将场景转变为自己的故事，同时保持身体约束。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何将VR技术整合到地铁通勤中，通过叙事驱动的虚拟场景提升乘客的体验。
AI.motivation: 地铁作为城市基础设施虽高效，但缺乏体验美感。VR技术可能通过提供互动和活动新可能，改善通勤体验并重塑公共空间。
AI.method: 通过实验，让十名乘客在地铁旅程中观看三段360度视频，观察其对VR体验的反应及行为变化。
AI.result: 叙事驱动场景最受青睐，尽管佩戴VR设备可能引发焦虑，但乘客对VR体验接受度高，且未干扰其‘社交不注意、思维活跃’的常态行为。
AI.conclusion: 提出三种地铁场景的VR内容策略，使乘客在物理受限的同时参与虚拟场景并将其转化为个人故事。

motivation: 地铁作为城市基础设施虽高效，但缺乏体验美感。VR技术可能通过提供互动和活动新可能，改善通勤体验并重塑公共空间。
method: 通过实验，让十名乘客在地铁旅程中观看三段360度视频，观察其对VR体验的反应及行为变化。
result: 叙事驱动场景最受青睐，尽管佩戴VR设备可能引发焦虑，但乘客对VR体验接受度高，且未干扰其‘社交不注意、思维活跃’的常态行为。
conclusion: 提出三种地铁场景的VR内容策略，使乘客在物理受限的同时参与虚拟场景并将其转化为个人故事。
search_text: Inattentive in social, active in mind: VR-based design intervention for imagining desirable possibilities in the public space 社交中不专心，头脑中活跃：基于 VR 的设计干预，想象公共空间中理想的可能性 The metro as a form of public transportation is an important urban infrastructure that takes a large population from place A to B every day. To achieve that, it is primarily designed for extreme functionality and efficiency. However, in terms of experiential aesthetics, the metro is seldom people s favourite place. When this modern infrastructure succeeds in serving urban mobility with high performance and efficiency, passengers seem to want more than the guaranteed functional performance. Recently, with the emergence of VR technologies, increasing efforts from design and HCI communities look at the value of VR technology in enhancing commuting experiences, bringing new possibilities of interaction and activities, and potentially transforming social public spaces. This study investigates how and why VR technology could be integrated with a metro ride. We experimented with ten passengers by showing them three 360 videos during their metro ride. The results show the narrative driven scene is most desirable. Despite wearing a VR headset might cause anxiety, our findings indicate a high level of acceptance towards VR experiences based on the finding that it does not challenge the normative behaviours of being a passenger inattentive in social, active in mind and further can enhance the experience. As the takeaway, we propose three strategies of VR content tailored for the metro context in which passengers would find a role participating in the virtual scene and turn the scene to one s own story, and at the same time, maintain physically constrained. 地铁作为公共交通的一种形式，是重要的城市基础设施，每天承载大量人口从A地到B地。为了实现这一目标，它的设计主要是为了实现极致的功能和效率。然而，就体验美学而言，地铁很少是人们最喜欢的地方。当这种现代基础设施成功地以高性能和高效率为城市交通提供服务时，乘客似乎想要的不仅仅是有保证的功能性能。近年来，随着 VR 技术的出现，设计和 HCI 社区越来越多地关注 VR 技术在增强通勤体验、带来新的互动和活动可能性以及潜在改变社会公共空间方面的价值。本研究调查了 VR 技术如何以及为何与地铁集成。我们对 10 名乘客进行了实验，在他们乘坐地铁期间向他们展示了三个 360 度视频。结果表明，叙事驱动的场景是最理想的。尽管佩戴 VR 耳机可能会引起焦虑，但我们的研究结果表明人们对 VR 体验的接受度很高，因为它不会挑战乘客在社交中不专心、思维活跃的规范行为，并且可以进一步增强体验。作为结论，我们提出了三种针对地铁环境量身定制的 VR 内容策略，其中乘客会找到参与虚拟场景的角色，并将场景转变为自己的故事，同时保持身体约束。 本文探讨如何将VR技术整合到地铁通勤中，通过叙事驱动的虚拟场景提升乘客的体验。 Yiying Wu,Miikka J. Lehtonen cs.HC

authors_text: Puhao Li,Tengyu Liu,Yuyang Li,Yiran Geng,Yixin Zhu,Yaodong Yang,Siyuan Huang
title: GenDexGrasp: Generalizable Dexterous Grasping
title_zh: GenDexGrasp：通用灵巧抓取
abstract: Generating dexterous grasping has been a long-standing and challenging robotic task. Despite recent progress, existing methods primarily suffer from two issues. First, most prior arts focus on a specific type of robot hand, lacking the generalizable capability of handling unseen ones. Second, prior arts oftentimes fail to rapidly generate diverse grasps with a high success rate. To jointly tackle these challenges with a unified solution, we propose GenDexGrasp, a novel hand-agnostic grasping algorithm for generalizable grasping. GenDexGrasp is trained on our proposed large-scale multi-hand grasping dataset MultiDex synthesized with force closure optimization. By leveraging the contact map as a hand-agnostic intermediate representation, GenDexGrasp efficiently generates diverse and plausible grasping poses with a high success rate and can transfer among diverse multi-fingered robotic hands. Compared with previous methods, GenDexGrasp achieves a three-way trade-off among success rate, inference speed, and diversity. Code is available at https://github.com/tengyu-liu/GenDexGrasp.
summary: Generating dexterous grasping has been a long-standing and challenging robotic task. Despite recent progress, existing methods primarily suffer from two issues. First, most prior arts focus on a specific type of robot hand, lacking the generalizable capability of handling unseen ones. Second, prior arts oftentimes fail to rapidly generate diverse grasps with a high success rate. To jointly tackle these challenges with a unified solution, we propose GenDexGrasp, a novel hand-agnostic grasping algorithm for generalizable grasping. GenDexGrasp is trained on our proposed large-scale multi-hand grasping dataset MultiDex synthesized with force closure optimization. By leveraging the contact map as a hand-agnostic intermediate representation, GenDexGrasp efficiently generates diverse and plausible grasping poses with a high success rate and can transfer among diverse multi-fingered robotic hands. Compared with previous methods, GenDexGrasp achieves a three-way trade-off among success rate, inference speed, and diversity. Code is available at https://github.com/tengyu-liu/GenDexGrasp.
abstract_zh: 产生灵巧的抓取能力一直是一项长期存在且具有挑战性的机器人任务。尽管最近取得了进展，但现有方法主要存在两个问题。首先，大多数现有技术集中于特定类型的机器人手，缺乏处理看不见的机器人手的通用能力。其次，现有技术常常无法以高成功率快速产生多样化的掌握。为了通过统一的解决方案共同应对这些挑战，我们提出了 GenDexGrasp，一种新颖的与手无关的抓取算法，用于通用抓取。 GenDexGrasp 在我们提出的大规模多手抓取数据集 MultiDex 上进行训练，该数据集通过力闭合优化合成。通过利用接触图作为与手无关的中间表示，GenDexGrasp 能够以高成功率有效地生成多样化且合理的抓取姿势，并且可以在不同的多指机器人手之间转移。与之前的方法相比，GenDexGrasp 实现了成功率、推理速度和多样性之间的三向权衡。代码可在 https://github.com/tengyu-liu/GenDexGrasp 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的灵巧抓取算法GenDexGrasp，旨在解决现有机器人抓取方法在跨不同机械手泛化能力和生成多样性抓取效率方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取方法局限于特定机械手结构，且难以快速生成高成功率的多样化抓取姿态，缺乏跨机械手的泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于接触图中间表示，利用大规模多机械手抓取数据集MultiDex（通过力闭合优化生成）训练手无关算法，实现跨多指机械手的高效抓取姿态生成。
AI.result: 在成功率、推理速度和抓取多样性之间取得平衡，实验表明该方法在多种机械手上均能生成高成功率的多样化抓取姿态。
AI.conclusion: GenDexGrasp通过接触图表示和大规模数据集训练，有效解决了机械手无关的通用抓取问题，为跨平台抓取任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Walter Heymans,Marelie H. Davel,Charl van Heerden
title: Efficient acoustic feature transformation in mismatched environments using a Guided-GAN
title_zh: 使用 Guided-GAN 在不匹配的环境中进行高效的声学特征转换
comment: Final published version available at: Efficient acoustic feature transformation in mismatched environments using a Guided-GAN. Speech Communication, 143, pp.10-20
comments: Final published version available at: Efficient acoustic feature transformation in mismatched environments using a Guided-GAN. Speech Communication, 143, pp.10-20
abstract: We propose a new framework to improve automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems in resource-scarce environments using a generative adversarial network (GAN) operating on acoustic input features. The GAN is used to enhance the features of mismatched data prior to decoding, or can optionally be used to fine-tune the acoustic model. We achieve improvements that are comparable to multi-style training (MTR), but at a lower computational cost. With less than one hour of data, an ASR system trained on good quality data, and evaluated on mismatched audio is improved by between 11.5% and 19.7% relative word error rate (WER). Experiments demonstrate that the framework can be very useful in under-resourced environments where training data and computational resources are limited. The GAN does not require parallel training data, because it utilises a baseline acoustic model to provide an additional loss term that guides the generator to create acoustic features that are better classified by the baseline.
summary: We propose a new framework to improve automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems in resource-scarce environments using a generative adversarial network (GAN) operating on acoustic input features. The GAN is used to enhance the features of mismatched data prior to decoding, or can optionally be used to fine-tune the acoustic model. We achieve improvements that are comparable to multi-style training (MTR), but at a lower computational cost. With less than one hour of data, an ASR system trained on good quality data, and evaluated on mismatched audio is improved by between 11.5% and 19.7% relative word error rate (WER). Experiments demonstrate that the framework can be very useful in under-resourced environments where training data and computational resources are limited. The GAN does not require parallel training data, because it utilises a baseline acoustic model to provide an additional loss term that guides the generator to create acoustic features that are better classified by the baseline.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新框架，使用对声学输入特征进行操作的生成对抗网络（GAN）来改进资源稀缺环境中的自动语音识别（ASR）系统。 GAN 用于在解码之前增强不匹配数据的特征，或者可以选择用于微调声学模型。我们实现了与多风格训练（MTR）相当的改进，但计算成本更低。使用不到一小时的数据，使用高质量数据进行训练并根据不匹配的音频进行评估的 ASR 系统的相对字错误率 (WER) 提高了 11.5% 到 19.7%。实验表明，该框架在训练数据和计算资源有限的资源贫乏环境中非常有用。 GAN 不需要并行训练数据，因为它利用基线声学模型来提供额外的损失项，指导生成器创建通过基线更好分类的声学特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Guided-GAN的框架，在资源匮乏环境中提升自动语音识别系统的声学特征转换效率。
AI.motivation: 传统多风格训练方法需要大量计算资源和并行数据，而资源受限场景下难以满足这些要求。
AI.method: 利用GAN对不匹配数据进行特征增强或微调声学模型，通过基线模型提供额外损失项引导生成器优化特征。
AI.result: 在少于1小时数据下，相对词错误率降低11.5%-19.7%，且无需并行训练数据。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在计算成本和数据需求上优于现有方法，适用于资源受限的语音识别场景。

authors_text: Yao Fu,Hao Peng,Ashish Sabharwal,Peter Clark,Tushar Khot
title: Complexity-Based Prompting for Multi-Step Reasoning
title_zh: 基于复杂性的多步推理提示
abstract: We study the task of prompting large-scale language models to perform multi-step reasoning. Existing work shows that when prompted with a chain of thoughts (CoT), sequences of short sentences describing intermediate reasoning steps towards a final answer, large language models can generate new reasoning chains and predict answers for new inputs. A central question is which reasoning examples make the most effective prompts. In this work, we propose complexity-based prompting, a simple and effective example selection scheme for multi-step reasoning. We show that prompts with higher reasoning complexity, i.e., chains with more reasoning steps, achieve substantially better performance on multi-step reasoning tasks over strong baselines. We further extend our complexity-based criteria from prompting (selecting inputs) to decoding (selecting outputs), where we sample multiple reasoning chains from the model, then choose the majority of generated answers from complex reasoning chains (over simple chains). When used to prompt GPT-3 and Codex, our approach substantially improves multi-step reasoning accuracy and achieves new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on three math benchmarks (GSM8K, MultiArith, and MathQA) and two BigBenchHard tasks (Date Understanding and Penguins), with an average +5.3 and up to +18 accuracy improvements. Compared with existing example selection schemes like manual tuning or retrieval-based selection, selection based on reasoning complexity is intuitive, easy to implement, and annotation-efficient. Further results demonstrate the robustness of performance gains from complex prompts under format perturbation and distribution shift.
summary: We study the task of prompting large-scale language models to perform multi-step reasoning. Existing work shows that when prompted with a chain of thoughts (CoT), sequences of short sentences describing intermediate reasoning steps towards a final answer, large language models can generate new reasoning chains and predict answers for new inputs. A central question is which reasoning examples make the most effective prompts. In this work, we propose complexity-based prompting, a simple and effective example selection scheme for multi-step reasoning. We show that prompts with higher reasoning complexity, i.e., chains with more reasoning steps, achieve substantially better performance on multi-step reasoning tasks over strong baselines. We further extend our complexity-based criteria from prompting (selecting inputs) to decoding (selecting outputs), where we sample multiple reasoning chains from the model, then choose the majority of generated answers from complex reasoning chains (over simple chains). When used to prompt GPT-3 and Codex, our approach substantially improves multi-step reasoning accuracy and achieves new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on three math benchmarks (GSM8K, MultiArith, and MathQA) and two BigBenchHard tasks (Date Understanding and Penguins), with an average +5.3 and up to +18 accuracy improvements. Compared with existing example selection schemes like manual tuning or retrieval-based selection, selection based on reasoning complexity is intuitive, easy to implement, and annotation-efficient. Further results demonstrate the robustness of performance gains from complex prompts under format perturbation and distribution shift.
abstract_zh: 我们研究促使大规模语言模型执行多步骤推理的任务。现有的工作表明，当用一系列思想链（CoT）（描述通向最终答案的中间推理步骤的短句子序列）提示时，大型语言模型可以生成新的推理链并预测新输入的答案。一个核心问题是哪些推理示例可以产生最有效的提示。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于复杂性的提示，这是一种简单有效的多步骤推理示例选择方案。我们表明，具有更高推理复杂性的提示，即具有更多推理步骤的链，在多步骤推理任务上比强基线获得更好的性能。我们进一步将基于复杂性的标准从提示（选择输入）扩展到解码（选择输出），其中我们从模型中采样多个推理链，然后从复杂推理链（在简单链上）中选择大多数生成的答案。当用于提示 GPT-3 和 Codex 时，我们的方法大大提高了多步推理的准确性，并在三个数学基准（GSM8K、MultiArith 和 MathQA）和两个 BigBenchHard 任务（日期理解和 Penguins）上实现了新的最先进 (SOTA) 性能，平均提高了 +5.3，准确度提高了 +18。与现有的手动调整或基于检索的选择等示例选择方案相比，基于推理复杂度的选择直观、易于实现且注释高效。进一步的结果证明了在格式扰动和分布变化下复杂提示所带来的性能增益的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于复杂度的提示方法，通过选择高复杂度的多步骤推理示例来提升大型语言模型在多步骤推理任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有提示方法在选择多步骤推理示例时缺乏有效标准，手动调整或检索方法效率低且效果有限，需更直观、易实现的示例选择方案。
AI.method: 提出基于推理复杂度的提示策略，选择步骤更多（复杂度更高）的推理链作为提示，并在解码阶段通过采样生成多个推理链，优先选择复杂链中的多数答案。
AI.result: 在GSM8K、MultiArith、MathQA等基准测试中，该方法平均提升5.3%，最高达18%；在BigBenchHard任务中也取得新SOTA，且在格式扰动和分布偏移下表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 基于复杂度的提示方法直观高效，无需额外标注即可提升多步骤推理性能，且在多种场景下具有鲁棒性，为示例选择提供了新思路。

search_text: Complexity-Based Prompting for Multi-Step Reasoning 基于复杂性的多步推理提示 We study the task of prompting large-scale language models to perform multi-step reasoning. Existing work shows that when prompted with a chain of thoughts (CoT), sequences of short sentences describing intermediate reasoning steps towards a final answer, large language models can generate new reasoning chains and predict answers for new inputs. A central question is which reasoning examples make the most effective prompts. In this work, we propose complexity-based prompting, a simple and effective example selection scheme for multi-step reasoning. We show that prompts with higher reasoning complexity, i.e., chains with more reasoning steps, achieve substantially better performance on multi-step reasoning tasks over strong baselines. We further extend our complexity-based criteria from prompting (selecting inputs) to decoding (selecting outputs), where we sample multiple reasoning chains from the model, then choose the majority of generated answers from complex reasoning chains (over simple chains). When used to prompt GPT-3 and Codex, our approach substantially improves multi-step reasoning accuracy and achieves new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on three math benchmarks (GSM8K, MultiArith, and MathQA) and two BigBenchHard tasks (Date Understanding and Penguins), with an average +5.3 and up to +18 accuracy improvements. Compared with existing example selection schemes like manual tuning or retrieval-based selection, selection based on reasoning complexity is intuitive, easy to implement, and annotation-efficient. Further results demonstrate the robustness of performance gains from complex prompts under format perturbation and distribution shift. 我们研究促使大规模语言模型执行多步骤推理的任务。现有的工作表明，当用一系列思想链（CoT）（描述通向最终答案的中间推理步骤的短句子序列）提示时，大型语言模型可以生成新的推理链并预测新输入的答案。一个核心问题是哪些推理示例可以产生最有效的提示。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于复杂性的提示，这是一种简单有效的多步骤推理示例选择方案。我们表明，具有更高推理复杂性的提示，即具有更多推理步骤的链，在多步骤推理任务上比强基线获得更好的性能。我们进一步将基于复杂性的标准从提示（选择输入）扩展到解码（选择输出），其中我们从模型中采样多个推理链，然后从复杂推理链（在简单链上）中选择大多数生成的答案。当用于提示 GPT-3 和 Codex 时，我们的方法大大提高了多步推理的准确性，并在三个数学基准（GSM8K、MultiArith 和 MathQA）和两个 BigBenchHard 任务（日期理解和 Penguins）上实现了新的最先进 (SOTA) 性能，平均提高了 +5.3，准确度提高了 +18。与现有的手动调整或基于检索的选择等示例选择方案相比，基于推理复杂度的选择直观、易于实现且注释高效。进一步的结果证明了在格式扰动和分布变化下复杂提示所带来的性能增益的稳健性。 本文提出基于复杂度的提示方法，通过选择高复杂度的多步骤推理示例来提升大型语言模型在多步骤推理任务中的性能。 Yao Fu,Hao Peng,Ashish Sabharwal,Peter Clark,Tushar Khot cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: To Improve Is to Change: Towards Improving Mood Prediction by Learning Changes in Emotion
title_zh: 改善就是改变：通过学习情绪变化来改善情绪预测
abstract: Although the terms mood and emotion are closely related and often used interchangeably, they are distinguished based on their duration, intensity and attribution. To date, hardly any computational models have (a) examined mood recognition, and (b) modelled the interplay between mood and emotional state in their analysis. In this paper, as a first step towards mood prediction, we propose a framework that utilises both dominant emotion (or mood) labels, and emotional change labels on the AFEW-VA database. Experiments evaluating unimodal (trained only using mood labels) and multimodal (trained with both mood and emotion change labels) convolutional neural networks confirm that incorporating emotional change information in the network training process can significantly improve the mood prediction performance, thus highlighting the importance of modelling emotion and mood simultaneously for improved performance in affective state recognition.
summary: Although the terms mood and emotion are closely related and often used interchangeably, they are distinguished based on their duration, intensity and attribution. To date, hardly any computational models have (a) examined mood recognition, and (b) modelled the interplay between mood and emotional state in their analysis. In this paper, as a first step towards mood prediction, we propose a framework that utilises both dominant emotion (or mood) labels, and emotional change labels on the AFEW-VA database. Experiments evaluating unimodal (trained only using mood labels) and multimodal (trained with both mood and emotion change labels) convolutional neural networks confirm that incorporating emotional change information in the network training process can significantly improve the mood prediction performance, thus highlighting the importance of modelling emotion and mood simultaneously for improved performance in affective state recognition.
abstract_zh: 尽管情绪和情绪这两个术语密切相关并且经常互换使用，但它们是根据其持续时间、强度和归因来区分的。迄今为止，几乎没有任何计算模型能够（a）检查情绪识别，以及（b）在分析中对情绪和情绪状态之间的相互作用进行建模。在本文中，作为情绪预测的第一步，我们提出了一个框架，该框架利用 AFEW-VA 数据库上的主导情绪（或情绪）标签和情绪变化标签。评估单模态（仅使用情绪标签进行训练）和多模态（同时使用情绪和情绪变化标签进行训练）卷积神经网络的实验证实，在网络训练过程中纳入情绪变化信息可以显着提高情绪预测性能，从而凸显了同时建模情绪和情绪对于提高情感状态识别性能的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过学习情绪变化来改进心情预测的框架，利用AFEW-VA数据库中的主导情绪标签和情绪变化标签进行实验。
AI.motivation: 现有计算模型尚未有效研究心情识别及情绪与心情的交互关系，需探索同时建模情绪和心情以提升情感状态识别性能。
AI.method: 设计单模态（仅使用心情标签）和多模态（结合心情与情绪变化标签）卷积神经网络，对比验证情绪变化信息对心情预测的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，在训练过程中引入情绪变化信息能显著提升心情预测准确率，证明同时建模情绪与心情的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 情绪变化信息对心情预测至关重要，未来情感状态识别应同时考虑情绪动态与心情状态的关联性。

authors_text: Xin Liu,Girish Narayanswamy,Akshay Paruchuri,Xiaoyu Zhang,Jiankai Tang,Yuzhe Zhang,Soumyadip Sengupta,Shwetak Patel,Yuntao Wang,Daniel McDuff
title: rPPG-Toolbox: Deep Remote PPG Toolbox
title_zh: rPPG-Toolbox：深度远程 PPG 工具箱
abstract: Camera-based physiological measurement is a fast growing field of computer vision. Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) utilizes imaging devices (e.g., cameras) to measure the peripheral blood volume pulse (BVP) via photoplethysmography, and enables cardiac measurement via webcams and smartphones. However, the task is non-trivial with important pre-processing, modeling, and post-processing steps required to obtain state-of-the-art results. Replication of results and benchmarking of new models is critical for scientific progress; however, as with many other applications of deep learning, reliable codebases are not easy to find or use. We present a comprehensive toolbox, rPPG-Toolbox, that contains unsupervised and supervised rPPG models with support for public benchmark datasets, data augmentation, and systematic evaluation: \url{https://github.com/ubicomplab/rPPG-Toolbox}
summary: Camera-based physiological measurement is a fast growing field of computer vision. Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) utilizes imaging devices (e.g., cameras) to measure the peripheral blood volume pulse (BVP) via photoplethysmography, and enables cardiac measurement via webcams and smartphones. However, the task is non-trivial with important pre-processing, modeling, and post-processing steps required to obtain state-of-the-art results. Replication of results and benchmarking of new models is critical for scientific progress; however, as with many other applications of deep learning, reliable codebases are not easy to find or use. We present a comprehensive toolbox, rPPG-Toolbox, that contains unsupervised and supervised rPPG models with support for public benchmark datasets, data augmentation, and systematic evaluation: \url{https://github.com/ubicomplab/rPPG-Toolbox}
abstract_zh: 基于相机的生理测量是计算机视觉的一个快速发展的领域。远程光电体积描记法 (rPPG) 利用成像设备（例如相机）通过光电体积描记法测量外周血容量脉搏 (BVP)，并通过网络摄像头和智能手机实现心脏测量。然而，这项任务并不简单，需要重要的预处理、建模和后处理步骤才能获得最先进的结果。结果的复制和新模型的基准测试对于科学进步至关重要；然而，与深度学习的许多其他应用一样，可靠的代码库并不容易找到或使用。我们提出了一个综合工具箱 rPPG-Toolbox，其中包含无监督和监督 rPPG 模型，支持公共基准数据集、数据增强和系统评估：\url{https://github.com/ubicomplab/rPPG-Toolbox}

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为rPPG-Toolbox的深度远程PPG工具箱，用于通过摄像头实现无接触生理信号测量。
AI.motivation: 远程PPG技术需要复杂的预处理、建模和后处理步骤，但现有代码库难以支持结果复现和模型基准测试。
AI.method: 开发包含无监督和监督rPPG模型的工具箱，集成公共数据集、数据增强和系统评估模块。
AI.result: 提供了一个开源工具箱（GitHub链接），支持远程PPG研究的全流程实现与评估。
AI.conclusion: 该工具箱为远程PPG研究提供了标准化平台，推动了无接触生理监测技术的发展。
