title: Spectral Augmentation for Self-Supervised Learning on Graphs
title_zh: 图自监督学习的谱增强
abstract: Graph contrastive learning (GCL), as an emerging self-supervised learning technique on graphs, aims to learn representations via instance discrimination. Its performance heavily relies on graph augmentation to reflect invariant patterns that are robust to small perturbations; yet it still remains unclear about what graph invariance GCL should capture. Recent studies mainly perform topology augmentations in a uniformly random manner in the spatial domain, ignoring its influence on the intrinsic structural properties embedded in the spectral domain. In this work, we aim to find a principled way for topology augmentations by exploring the invariance of graphs from the spectral perspective. We develop spectral augmentation which guides topology augmentations by maximizing the spectral change. Extensive experiments on both graph and node classification tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in self-supervised representation learning. The proposed method also brings promising generalization capability in transfer learning, and is equipped with intriguing robustness property under adversarial attacks. Our study sheds light on a general principle for graph topology augmentation.
summary: Graph contrastive learning (GCL), as an emerging self-supervised learning technique on graphs, aims to learn representations via instance discrimination. Its performance heavily relies on graph augmentation to reflect invariant patterns that are robust to small perturbations; yet it still remains unclear about what graph invariance GCL should capture. Recent studies mainly perform topology augmentations in a uniformly random manner in the spatial domain, ignoring its influence on the intrinsic structural properties embedded in the spectral domain. In this work, we aim to find a principled way for topology augmentations by exploring the invariance of graphs from the spectral perspective. We develop spectral augmentation which guides topology augmentations by maximizing the spectral change. Extensive experiments on both graph and node classification tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in self-supervised representation learning. The proposed method also brings promising generalization capability in transfer learning, and is equipped with intriguing robustness property under adversarial attacks. Our study sheds light on a general principle for graph topology augmentation.
abstract_zh: 图对比学习（GCL）作为一种新兴的图自监督学习技术，旨在通过实例辨别来学习表示。其性能在很大程度上依赖于图增强来反映对小扰动具有鲁棒性的不变模式；然而，目前还不清楚 GCL 应该捕获什么图不变性。最近的研究主要在空间域中以均匀随机的方式进行拓扑增强，忽略了其对嵌入谱域的内在结构特性的影响。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过从谱角度探索图的不变性来找到拓扑增强的原则方法。我们开发了光谱增强，它通过最大化光谱变化来指导拓扑增强。对图和节点分类任务的广泛实验证明了我们的方法在自监督表示学习中的有效性。该方法还为迁移学习带来了良好的泛化能力，并在对抗性攻击下具有令人感兴趣的鲁棒性。我们的研究揭示了图拓扑增强的一般原理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于谱域不变性的图对比学习方法，通过最大化谱变化来指导拓扑增强，提升自监督表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图对比学习方法在空间域随机进行拓扑增强，忽视了谱域中固有的结构特性，导致无法捕捉有效的图不变性。
AI.method: 开发谱增强方法，通过最大化谱变化指导拓扑增强，从谱域视角探索图不变性。
AI.result: 在图分类和节点分类任务中表现优异，具有良好的迁移学习泛化能力和对抗攻击鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为图拓扑增强提供了通用原则，通过谱域视角改进自监督学习效果。

result: 在图分类和节点分类任务中表现优异，具有良好的迁移学习泛化能力和对抗攻击鲁棒性。
conclusion: 该研究为图拓扑增强提供了通用原则，通过谱域视角改进自监督学习效果。
search_text: Spectral Augmentation for Self-Supervised Learning on Graphs 图自监督学习的谱增强 Graph contrastive learning (GCL), as an emerging self-supervised learning technique on graphs, aims to learn representations via instance discrimination. Its performance heavily relies on graph augmentation to reflect invariant patterns that are robust to small perturbations; yet it still remains unclear about what graph invariance GCL should capture. Recent studies mainly perform topology augmentations in a uniformly random manner in the spatial domain, ignoring its influence on the intrinsic structural properties embedded in the spectral domain. In this work, we aim to find a principled way for topology augmentations by exploring the invariance of graphs from the spectral perspective. We develop spectral augmentation which guides topology augmentations by maximizing the spectral change. Extensive experiments on both graph and node classification tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in self-supervised representation learning. The proposed method also brings promising generalization capability in transfer learning, and is equipped with intriguing robustness property under adversarial attacks. Our study sheds light on a general principle for graph topology augmentation. 图对比学习（GCL）作为一种新兴的图自监督学习技术，旨在通过实例辨别来学习表示。其性能在很大程度上依赖于图增强来反映对小扰动具有鲁棒性的不变模式；然而，目前还不清楚 GCL 应该捕获什么图不变性。最近的研究主要在空间域中以均匀随机的方式进行拓扑增强，忽略了其对嵌入谱域的内在结构特性的影响。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过从谱角度探索图的不变性来找到拓扑增强的原则方法。我们开发了光谱增强，它通过最大化光谱变化来指导拓扑增强。对图和节点分类任务的广泛实验证明了我们的方法在自监督表示学习中的有效性。该方法还为迁移学习带来了良好的泛化能力，并在对抗性攻击下具有令人感兴趣的鲁棒性。我们的研究揭示了图拓扑增强的一般原理。 本文提出了一种基于谱域不变性的图对比学习方法，通过最大化谱变化来指导拓扑增强，提升自监督表示学习效果。 Lu Lin,Jinghui Chen,Hongning Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Benign Autoencoders
title_zh: 良性自动编码器
comment: This paper replaces and subsumes arXiv:2110.08884
comments: This paper replaces and subsumes arXiv:2110.08884
abstract: Recent progress in Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) relies on efficient data representations, often featuring encoder-decoder architectures. We formalize the mathematical problem of finding the optimal encoder-decoder pair and characterize its solution, which we name the "benign autoencoder" (BAE). We prove that BAE projects data onto a manifold whose dimension is the optimal compressibility dimension of the generative problem. We highlight surprising connections between BAE and several recent developments in AI, such as conditional GANs, context encoders, stable diffusion, stacked autoencoders, and the learning capabilities of generative models. As an illustration, we show how BAE can find optimal, low-dimensional latent representations that improve the performance of a discriminator under a distribution shift. By compressing "malignant" data dimensions, BAE leads to smoother and more stable gradients.
summary: Recent progress in Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) relies on efficient data representations, often featuring encoder-decoder architectures. We formalize the mathematical problem of finding the optimal encoder-decoder pair and characterize its solution, which we name the "benign autoencoder" (BAE). We prove that BAE projects data onto a manifold whose dimension is the optimal compressibility dimension of the generative problem. We highlight surprising connections between BAE and several recent developments in AI, such as conditional GANs, context encoders, stable diffusion, stacked autoencoders, and the learning capabilities of generative models. As an illustration, we show how BAE can find optimal, low-dimensional latent representations that improve the performance of a discriminator under a distribution shift. By compressing "malignant" data dimensions, BAE leads to smoother and more stable gradients.
abstract_zh: 生成人工智能 (AI) 的最新进展依赖于高效的数据表示，通常采用编码器-解码器架构。我们将寻找最佳编码器-解码器对的数学问题形式化，并表征其解决方案，我们将其命名为“良性自动编码器”（BAE）。我们证明 BAE 将数据投影到一个流形上，该流形的维度是生成问题的最佳可压缩性维度。我们强调 BAE 与人工智能的一些最新发展之间令人惊讶的联系，例如条件 GAN、上下文编码器、稳定扩散、堆叠自动编码器以及生成模型的学习能力。作为说明，我们展示了 BAE 如何找到最佳的低维潜在表示，以提高分布偏移下判别器的性能。通过压缩“恶性”数据维度，BAE 可以产生更平滑、更稳定的梯度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'良性自编码器'（BAE）的数学框架，用于寻找生成问题中最佳压缩维度的最优编码器-解码器对，并探讨其与多种生成模型技术的关联。
AI.motivation: 生成人工智能的进步依赖于高效的数据表示，但现有编码器-解码器架构在压缩数据时可能无法达到最优性能，需探索更优的理论框架以提升模型稳定性与表现。
AI.method: 通过形式化最优编码器-解码器对的数学问题，证明BAE将数据投影至与生成问题最佳压缩维度对应的流形，并分析其与条件GAN、稳定扩散等技术的理论联系。
AI.result: BAE能提取低维潜在表示，提升判别器在分布偏移下的性能；通过压缩'恶性'数据维度，显著改善梯度平滑性与训练稳定性。
AI.conclusion: BAE为生成模型提供了理论支撑，揭示了多种AI技术的内在关联，展示了其在优化表示学习与提升模型鲁棒性方面的潜力。

title: Convex synthesis and verification of control-Lyapunov and barrier functions with input constraints
title_zh: 具有输入约束的控制-Lyapunov 和势垒函数的凸合成和验证
abstract: Control Lyapunov functions (CLFs) and control barrier functions (CBFs) are widely used tools for synthesizing controllers subject to stability and safety constraints. Paired with online optimization, they provide stabilizing control actions that satisfy input constraints and avoid unsafe regions of state-space. Designing CLFs and CBFs with rigorous performance guarantees is computationally challenging. To certify existence of control actions, current techniques not only design a CLF/CBF, but also a nominal controller. This can make the synthesis task more expensive, and performance estimation more conservative. In this work, we characterize polynomial CLFs/CBFs using sum-of-squares conditions, which can be directly certified using convex optimization. This yields a CLF and CBF synthesis technique that does not rely on a nominal controller. We then present algorithms for iteratively enlarging estimates of the stabilizable and safe regions. We demonstrate our algorithms on a 2D toy system, a pendulum and a quadrotor.
summary: Control Lyapunov functions (CLFs) and control barrier functions (CBFs) are widely used tools for synthesizing controllers subject to stability and safety constraints. Paired with online optimization, they provide stabilizing control actions that satisfy input constraints and avoid unsafe regions of state-space. Designing CLFs and CBFs with rigorous performance guarantees is computationally challenging. To certify existence of control actions, current techniques not only design a CLF/CBF, but also a nominal controller. This can make the synthesis task more expensive, and performance estimation more conservative. In this work, we characterize polynomial CLFs/CBFs using sum-of-squares conditions, which can be directly certified using convex optimization. This yields a CLF and CBF synthesis technique that does not rely on a nominal controller. We then present algorithms for iteratively enlarging estimates of the stabilizable and safe regions. We demonstrate our algorithms on a 2D toy system, a pendulum and a quadrotor.
abstract_zh: 控制李亚普诺夫函数 (CLF) 和控制屏障函数 (CBF) 是广泛使用的工具，用于合成受稳定性和安全约束的控制器。与在线优化相结合，它们提供稳定的控制动作，满足输入约束并避免状态空间的不安全区域。设计具有严格性能保证的 CLF 和 CBF 在计算上具有挑战性。为了证明控制行为的存在，当前技术不仅设计了 CLF/CBF，还设计了标称控制器。这会使综合任务更加昂贵，并且性能估计更加保守。在这项工作中，我们使用平方和条件来表征多项式 CLF/CBF，这可以使用凸优化直接进行验证。这产生了不依赖标称控制器的 CLF 和 CBF 合成技术。然后，我们提出了迭代扩大稳定区域和安全区域估计的算法。我们在 2D 玩具系统、摆和四旋翼飞行器上演示了我们的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于凸优化的控制李雅普诺夫函数（CLF）和控制障碍函数（CBF）合成方法，无需依赖名义控制器，并通过迭代算法扩大系统稳定与安全区域的估计。
AI.motivation: 现有CLF/CBF设计需额外设计名义控制器，导致计算成本高且性能估计保守，亟需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 利用多项式CLF/CBF的sum-of-squares条件，通过凸优化直接验证函数存在性，并提出迭代算法扩大稳定/安全区域估计。
AI.result: 在二维玩具系统、摆和四旋翼上验证了算法有效性，证明其能合成满足输入约束的控制器并扩大安全区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过凸优化消除了对名义控制器的依赖，提升了CLF/CBF合成效率与性能估计精度。

authors_text: Hongsuk Choi,Gyeongsik Moon,Matthieu Armando,Vincent Leroy,Kyoung Mu Lee,Gregory Rogez
title: MonoNHR: Monocular Neural Human Renderer
title_zh: MonoNHR：单目神经人体渲染器
comment: Hongsuk Choi and Gyeongsik Moon contributed equally, 15 pages including the reference and supplementary material
comments: Hongsuk Choi and Gyeongsik Moon contributed equally, 15 pages including the reference and supplementary material
abstract: Existing neural human rendering methods struggle with a single image input due to the lack of information in invisible areas and the depth ambiguity of pixels in visible areas. In this regard, we propose Monocular Neural Human Renderer (MonoNHR), a novel approach that renders robust free-viewpoint images of an arbitrary human given only a single image. MonoNHR is the first method that (i) renders human subjects never seen during training in a monocular setup, and (ii) is trained in a weakly-supervised manner without geometry supervision. First, we propose to disentangle 3D geometry and texture features and to condition the texture inference on the 3D geometry features. Second, we introduce a Mesh Inpainter module that inpaints the occluded parts exploiting human structural priors such as symmetry. Experiments on ZJU-MoCap, AIST, and HUMBI datasets show that our approach significantly outperforms the recent methods adapted to the monocular case.
summary: Existing neural human rendering methods struggle with a single image input due to the lack of information in invisible areas and the depth ambiguity of pixels in visible areas. In this regard, we propose Monocular Neural Human Renderer (MonoNHR), a novel approach that renders robust free-viewpoint images of an arbitrary human given only a single image. MonoNHR is the first method that (i) renders human subjects never seen during training in a monocular setup, and (ii) is trained in a weakly-supervised manner without geometry supervision. First, we propose to disentangle 3D geometry and texture features and to condition the texture inference on the 3D geometry features. Second, we introduce a Mesh Inpainter module that inpaints the occluded parts exploiting human structural priors such as symmetry. Experiments on ZJU-MoCap, AIST, and HUMBI datasets show that our approach significantly outperforms the recent methods adapted to the monocular case.
abstract_zh: 由于不可见区域中缺乏信息以及可见区域中像素的深度模糊性，现有的神经人体渲染方法难以处理单个图像输入。在这方面，我们提出了单目神经人类渲染器（MonoNHR），这是一种新颖的方法，只需给定单个图像即可渲染任意人类的鲁棒自由视点图像。 MonoNHR 是第一种方法：(i) 在单目设置的训练过程中呈现从未见过的人类受试者，(ii) 在没有几何监督的情况下以弱监督方式进行训练。首先，我们建议解开 3D 几何和纹理特征，并根据 3D 几何特征调整纹理推断。其次，我们引入了一个 Mesh Inpainter 模块，该模块利用人类结构先验（例如对称性）来修复被遮挡的部分。在 ZJU-MoCap、AIST 和 HUMBI 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最近适应单目情况的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种单目神经人体渲染方法，仅凭单张图像生成任意人类的鲁棒自由视角图像。
AI.motivation: 现有神经人体渲染方法在单图像输入下因信息不足和深度歧义难以生成高质量结果，需解决单目设置下无几何监督的渲染难题。
AI.method: 分离3D几何与纹理特征并条件化纹理推断，引入基于人体结构先验的Mesh Inpainter模块修复遮挡区域。
AI.result: 在ZJU-MoCap、AIST和HUMBI数据集上显著优于现有单目方法，实现训练数据外人类的高质量渲染。
AI.conclusion: MonoNHR通过弱监督学习和结构先验修复机制，有效解决了单目输入下的深度歧义与遮挡问题，为神经渲染领域提供新方向。

search_text: MonoNHR: Monocular Neural Human Renderer MonoNHR：单目神经人体渲染器 Existing neural human rendering methods struggle with a single image input due to the lack of information in invisible areas and the depth ambiguity of pixels in visible areas. In this regard, we propose Monocular Neural Human Renderer (MonoNHR), a novel approach that renders robust free-viewpoint images of an arbitrary human given only a single image. MonoNHR is the first method that (i) renders human subjects never seen during training in a monocular setup, and (ii) is trained in a weakly-supervised manner without geometry supervision. First, we propose to disentangle 3D geometry and texture features and to condition the texture inference on the 3D geometry features. Second, we introduce a Mesh Inpainter module that inpaints the occluded parts exploiting human structural priors such as symmetry. Experiments on ZJU-MoCap, AIST, and HUMBI datasets show that our approach significantly outperforms the recent methods adapted to the monocular case. 由于不可见区域中缺乏信息以及可见区域中像素的深度模糊性，现有的神经人体渲染方法难以处理单个图像输入。在这方面，我们提出了单目神经人类渲染器（MonoNHR），这是一种新颖的方法，只需给定单个图像即可渲染任意人类的鲁棒自由视点图像。 MonoNHR 是第一种方法：(i) 在单目设置的训练过程中呈现从未见过的人类受试者，(ii) 在没有几何监督的情况下以弱监督方式进行训练。首先，我们建议解开 3D 几何和纹理特征，并根据 3D 几何特征调整纹理推断。其次，我们引入了一个 Mesh Inpainter 模块，该模块利用人类结构先验（例如对称性）来修复被遮挡的部分。在 ZJU-MoCap、AIST 和 HUMBI 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最近适应单目情况的方法。 提出一种单目神经人体渲染方法，仅凭单张图像生成任意人类的鲁棒自由视角图像。 Hongsuk Choi,Gyeongsik Moon,Matthieu Armando,Vincent Leroy,Kyoung Mu Lee,Gregory Rogez cs.CV

title: Inability of a graph neural network heuristic to outperform greedy algorithms in solving combinatorial optimization problems like Max-Cut
title_zh: 图神经网络启发式在解决 Max-Cut 等组合优化问题时无法胜过贪婪算法
comment: RevTex4, 2 pages, 1 figure; comment on arXiv:2107.01188. Related information at http://www.physics.emory.edu/faculty/boettcher/
comments: RevTex4, 2 pages, 1 figure; comment on arXiv:2107.01188. Related information at http://www.physics.emory.edu/faculty/boettcher/
abstract: In Nature Machine Intelligence 4, 367 (2022), Schuetz et al provide a scheme to employ graph neural networks (GNN) as a heuristic to solve a variety of classical, NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems. It describes how the network is trained on sample instances and the resulting GNN heuristic is evaluated applying widely used techniques to determine its ability to succeed. Clearly, the idea of harnessing the powerful abilities of such networks to ``learn'' the intricacies of complex, multimodal energy landscapes in such a hands-off approach seems enticing. And based on the observed performance, the heuristic promises to be highly scalable, with a computational cost linear in the input size $n$, although there is likely a significant overhead in the pre-factor due to the GNN itself. However, closer inspection shows that the reported results for this GNN are only minutely better than those for gradient descent and get outperformed by a greedy algorithm, for example, for Max-Cut. The discussion also highlights what I believe are some common misconceptions in the evaluations of heuristics.
summary: In Nature Machine Intelligence 4, 367 (2022), Schuetz et al provide a scheme to employ graph neural networks (GNN) as a heuristic to solve a variety of classical, NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems. It describes how the network is trained on sample instances and the resulting GNN heuristic is evaluated applying widely used techniques to determine its ability to succeed. Clearly, the idea of harnessing the powerful abilities of such networks to ``learn'' the intricacies of complex, multimodal energy landscapes in such a hands-off approach seems enticing. And based on the observed performance, the heuristic promises to be highly scalable, with a computational cost linear in the input size $n$, although there is likely a significant overhead in the pre-factor due to the GNN itself. However, closer inspection shows that the reported results for this GNN are only minutely better than those for gradient descent and get outperformed by a greedy algorithm, for example, for Max-Cut. The discussion also highlights what I believe are some common misconceptions in the evaluations of heuristics.
abstract_zh: 在 Nature Machine Intelligence 4, 367 (2022) 中，Schuetz 等人提供了一种方案，利用图神经网络 (GNN) 作为启发式方法来解决各种经典的 NP 难组合优化问题。它描述了如何在样本实例上训练网络，以及如何应用广泛使用的技术来评估生成的 GNN 启发式以确定其成功的能力。显然，利用此类网络的强大能力，以这种不干涉的方式“学习”复杂的多模式能源景观的复杂性，这一想法似乎很诱人。根据观察到的性能，启发式算法有望实现高度可扩展，计算成本与输入大小 $n$ 成线性关系，尽管由于 GNN 本身的原因，前置因子可能会产生很大的开销。然而，更仔细的检查表明，该 GNN 的报告结果仅比梯度下降的结果好一点点，并且比贪心算法（例如 Max-Cut）的表现要好。讨论还强调了我认为启发法评估中的一些常见误解。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了图神经网络（GNN）启发式方法在解决组合优化问题（如Max-Cut）时的表现，指出其效果未超越贪心算法。
AI.motivation: 探讨GNN作为启发式方法在解决NP难问题中的潜力，同时纠正对启发式方法评估的常见误解。
AI.method: 训练GNN处理组合优化问题的样本实例，并通过标准技术评估其性能，与梯度下降和贪心算法对比。
AI.result: GNN性能仅略优于梯度下降，且在Max-Cut等任务中被贪心算法超越。
AI.conclusion: GNN启发式方法未显著优于传统算法，需重新审视启发式评估的标准与方法。

authors_text: Hengyue Liang,Buyun Liang,Ying Cui,Tim Mitchell,Ju Sun
title: Optimization for Robustness Evaluation beyond $\ell_p$ Metrics
title_zh: 超出 $\ell_p$ 指标的稳健性评估优化
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables, accepted by the 14th International OPT Workshop on Optimization for Machine Learning, and submitted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables, accepted by the 14th International OPT Workshop on Optimization for Machine Learning, and submitted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023)
abstract: Empirical evaluation of deep learning models against adversarial attacks entails solving nontrivial constrained optimization problems. Popular algorithms for solving these constrained problems rely on projected gradient descent (PGD) and require careful tuning of multiple hyperparameters. Moreover, PGD can only handle $\ell_1$, $\ell_2$, and $\ell_\infty$ attack models due to the use of analytical projectors. In this paper, we introduce a novel algorithmic framework that blends a general-purpose constrained-optimization solver PyGRANSO, With Constraint-Folding (PWCF), to add reliability and generality to robustness evaluation. PWCF 1) finds good-quality solutions without the need of delicate hyperparameter tuning, and 2) can handle general attack models, e.g., general $\ell_p$ ($p \geq 0$) and perceptual attacks, which are inaccessible to PGD-based algorithms.
summary: Empirical evaluation of deep learning models against adversarial attacks entails solving nontrivial constrained optimization problems. Popular algorithms for solving these constrained problems rely on projected gradient descent (PGD) and require careful tuning of multiple hyperparameters. Moreover, PGD can only handle $\ell_1$, $\ell_2$, and $\ell_\infty$ attack models due to the use of analytical projectors. In this paper, we introduce a novel algorithmic framework that blends a general-purpose constrained-optimization solver PyGRANSO, With Constraint-Folding (PWCF), to add reliability and generality to robustness evaluation. PWCF 1) finds good-quality solutions without the need of delicate hyperparameter tuning, and 2) can handle general attack models, e.g., general $\ell_p$ ($p \geq 0$) and perceptual attacks, which are inaccessible to PGD-based algorithms.
abstract_zh: 针对对抗性攻击的深度学习模型的实证评估需要解决重要的约束优化问题。解决这些受限问题的流行算法依赖于投影梯度下降（PGD），并且需要仔细调整多个超参数。此外，由于使用了分析投影仪，PGD 只能处理 $\ell_1$、$\ell_2$ 和 $\ell_\infty$ 攻击模型。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的算法框架，该框架融合了通用约束优化求解器 PyGRANSO 和约束折叠（PWCF），以增加鲁棒性评估的可靠性和通用性。 PWCF 1) 不需要精细的超参数调整就可以找到高质量的解决方案，2) 可以处理一般的攻击模型，例如一般的 $\ell_p$ ($p \geq 0$) 和感知攻击，这是基于 PGD 的算法无法访问的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种超越传统ℓ_p度量的鲁棒性评估优化框架，解决深度学习模型对抗攻击评估中的约束优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有PGD算法需精细调参且仅支持ℓ1/ℓ2/ℓ∞攻击模型，难以处理一般ℓ_p（p≥0）和感知攻击等复杂场景。
AI.method: 融合通用约束优化求解器PyGRANSO与约束折叠技术（PWCF），实现无需精细调参且支持任意ℓ_p及感知攻击的鲁棒性评估。
AI.result: PWCF在保持解质量的同时消除超参数敏感性，成功处理PGD无法覆盖的广义攻击模型，提升评估可靠性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过算法创新突破传统ℓ_p限制，为深度学习模型鲁棒性评估提供了更全面、可靠的解决方案。

conclusion: 该框架通过算法创新突破传统ℓ_p限制，为深度学习模型鲁棒性评估提供了更全面、可靠的解决方案。
search_text: Optimization for Robustness Evaluation beyond $\ell_p$ Metrics 超出 $\ell_p$ 指标的稳健性评估优化 Empirical evaluation of deep learning models against adversarial attacks entails solving nontrivial constrained optimization problems. Popular algorithms for solving these constrained problems rely on projected gradient descent (PGD) and require careful tuning of multiple hyperparameters. Moreover, PGD can only handle $\ell_1$, $\ell_2$, and $\ell_\infty$ attack models due to the use of analytical projectors. In this paper, we introduce a novel algorithmic framework that blends a general-purpose constrained-optimization solver PyGRANSO, With Constraint-Folding (PWCF), to add reliability and generality to robustness evaluation. PWCF 1) finds good-quality solutions without the need of delicate hyperparameter tuning, and 2) can handle general attack models, e.g., general $\ell_p$ ($p \geq 0$) and perceptual attacks, which are inaccessible to PGD-based algorithms. 针对对抗性攻击的深度学习模型的实证评估需要解决重要的约束优化问题。解决这些受限问题的流行算法依赖于投影梯度下降（PGD），并且需要仔细调整多个超参数。此外，由于使用了分析投影仪，PGD 只能处理 $\ell_1$、$\ell_2$ 和 $\ell_\infty$ 攻击模型。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的算法框架，该框架融合了通用约束优化求解器 PyGRANSO 和约束折叠（PWCF），以增加鲁棒性评估的可靠性和通用性。 PWCF 1) 不需要精细的超参数调整就可以找到高质量的解决方案，2) 可以处理一般的攻击模型，例如一般的 $\ell_p$ ($p \geq 0$) 和感知攻击，这是基于 PGD 的算法无法访问的。 本文提出一种超越传统ℓ_p度量的鲁棒性评估优化框架，解决深度学习模型对抗攻击评估中的约束优化问题。 Hengyue Liang,Buyun Liang,Ying Cui,Tim Mitchell,Ju Sun cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.SP,math.OC

title: Does Wikidata Support Analogical Reasoning?
title_zh: 维基数据支持类比推理吗？
abstract: Analogical reasoning methods have been built over various resources, including commonsense knowledge bases, lexical resources, language models, or their combination. While the wide coverage of knowledge about entities and events make Wikidata a promising resource for analogical reasoning across situations and domains, Wikidata has not been employed for this task yet. In this paper, we investigate whether the knowledge in Wikidata supports analogical reasoning. Specifically, we study whether relational knowledge is modeled consistently in Wikidata, observing that relevant relational information is typically missing or modeled in an inconsistent way. Our further experiments show that Wikidata can be used to create data for analogy classification, but this requires much manual effort. To facilitate future work that can support analogies, we discuss key desiderata, and devise a set of metrics to guide an automatic method for extracting analogies from Wikidata.
summary: Analogical reasoning methods have been built over various resources, including commonsense knowledge bases, lexical resources, language models, or their combination. While the wide coverage of knowledge about entities and events make Wikidata a promising resource for analogical reasoning across situations and domains, Wikidata has not been employed for this task yet. In this paper, we investigate whether the knowledge in Wikidata supports analogical reasoning. Specifically, we study whether relational knowledge is modeled consistently in Wikidata, observing that relevant relational information is typically missing or modeled in an inconsistent way. Our further experiments show that Wikidata can be used to create data for analogy classification, but this requires much manual effort. To facilitate future work that can support analogies, we discuss key desiderata, and devise a set of metrics to guide an automatic method for extracting analogies from Wikidata.
abstract_zh: 类比推理方法是基于各种资源构建的，包括常识知识库、词汇资源、语言模型或其组合。虽然有关实体和事件的知识的广泛覆盖使维基数据成为跨情况和领域进行类比推理的有前途的资源，但维基数据尚未用于这项任务。在本文中，我们研究了维基数据中的知识是否支持类比推理。具体来说，我们研究维基数据中的关系知识是否一致地建模，观察到相关的关系信息通常缺失或以不一致的方式建模。我们进一步的实验表明，维基数据可用于创建类比分类数据，但这需要大量的手动工作。为了促进未来支持类比的工作，我们讨论了关键的需求，并设计了一组指标来指导从维基数据中提取类比的自动方法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨Wikidata是否支持类比推理，分析其关系知识建模的一致性，并提出自动提取类比的指标。
AI.motivation: Wikidata涵盖广泛实体和事件知识，但尚未被用于类比推理任务，需验证其可行性并解决数据不一致问题。
AI.method: 分析Wikidata中关系信息的完整性与一致性，通过实验验证其用于类比分类的潜力，并设计自动提取类比的评估指标。
AI.result: Wikidata可生成类比分类数据但需大量人工干预，现有数据存在关系信息缺失或不一致的问题。
AI.conclusion: Wikidata具备支持类比推理的潜力，但需改进数据一致性及开发自动化方法，所提指标可指导未来研究。

title: iCTGAN--An Attack Mitigation Technique for Random-vector Attack on Accelerometer-based Gait Authentication Systems
title_zh: iCTGAN——针对基于加速度计的步态认证系统的随机矢量攻击的攻击缓解技术
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, IEEE International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB 2022)
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures, IEEE International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB 2022)
abstract: A recent study showed that commonly (vanilla) studied implementations of accelerometer-based gait authentication systems ($v$ABGait) are susceptible to random-vector attack. The same study proposed a beta noise-assisted implementation ($β$ABGait) to mitigate the attack. In this paper, we assess the effectiveness of the random-vector attack on both $v$ABGait and $β$ABGait using three accelerometer-based gait datasets. In addition, we propose $i$ABGait, an alternative implementation of ABGait, which uses a Conditional Tabular Generative Adversarial Network. Then we evaluate $i$ABGait's resilience against the traditional zero-effort and random-vector attacks. The results show that $i$ABGait mitigates the impact of the random-vector attack to a reasonable extent and outperforms $β$ABGait in most experimental settings.
summary: A recent study showed that commonly (vanilla) studied implementations of accelerometer-based gait authentication systems ($v$ABGait) are susceptible to random-vector attack. The same study proposed a beta noise-assisted implementation ($β$ABGait) to mitigate the attack. In this paper, we assess the effectiveness of the random-vector attack on both $v$ABGait and $β$ABGait using three accelerometer-based gait datasets. In addition, we propose $i$ABGait, an alternative implementation of ABGait, which uses a Conditional Tabular Generative Adversarial Network. Then we evaluate $i$ABGait's resilience against the traditional zero-effort and random-vector attacks. The results show that $i$ABGait mitigates the impact of the random-vector attack to a reasonable extent and outperforms $β$ABGait in most experimental settings.
abstract_zh: 最近的一项研究表明，通常（普通）研究的基于加速度计的步态身份验证系统 ($v$ABGait) 的实现很容易受到随机矢量攻击。同一项研究提出了一种 beta 噪声辅助实现 ($β$ABGait) 来减轻攻击。在本文中，我们使用三个基于加速度计的步态数据集评估随机矢量攻击对 $v$ABGait 和 $β$ABGait 的有效性。此外，我们提出了 $i$ABGait，ABGait 的替代实现，它使用条件表格生成对抗网络。然后我们评估 $i$ABGait 针对传统零努力和随机向量攻击的恢复能力。结果表明，$i$ABGait 在合理程度上减轻了随机向量攻击的影响，并且在大多数实验设置中优于 $β$ABGait。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了随机向量攻击对vABGait和βABGait的影响，并提出了一种基于条件表格生成对抗网络（CTGAN）的iABGait方法以增强系统安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有加速度计步态认证系统易受随机向量攻击，需更有效的缓解方法。
AI.method: 通过条件表格生成对抗网络（CTGAN）构建iABGait，并使用三个数据集进行攻击评估。
AI.result: 实验表明iABGait有效缓解了随机向量攻击，且在多数设置下优于βABGait。
AI.conclusion: iABGait是应对随机向量攻击的有效方法，优于现有βABGait。

title: The boundaries of meaning: a case study in neural machine translation
title_zh: 意义的边界：神经机器翻译的案例研究
abstract: The success of deep learning in natural language processing raises intriguing questions about the nature of linguistic meaning and ways in which it can be processed by natural and artificial systems. One such question has to do with subword segmentation algorithms widely employed in language modeling, machine translation, and other tasks since 2016. These algorithms often cut words into semantically opaque pieces, such as 'period', 'on', 't', and 'ist' in 'period|on|t|ist'. The system then represents the resulting segments in a dense vector space, which is expected to model grammatical relations among them. This representation may in turn be used to map 'period|on|t|ist' (English) to 'par|od|ont|iste' (French). Thus, instead of being modeled at the lexical level, translation is reformulated more generally as the task of learning the best bilingual mapping between the sequences of subword segments of two languages; and sometimes even between pure character sequences: 'p|e|r|i|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t' $\rightarrow$ 'p|a|r|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t|e'. Such subword segmentations and alignments are at work in highly efficient end-to-end machine translation systems, despite their allegedly opaque nature. The computational value of such processes is unquestionable. But do they have any linguistic or philosophical plausibility? I attempt to cast light on this question by reviewing the relevant details of the subword segmentation algorithms and by relating them to important philosophical and linguistic debates, in the spirit of making artificial intelligence more transparent and explainable.
summary: The success of deep learning in natural language processing raises intriguing questions about the nature of linguistic meaning and ways in which it can be processed by natural and artificial systems. One such question has to do with subword segmentation algorithms widely employed in language modeling, machine translation, and other tasks since 2016. These algorithms often cut words into semantically opaque pieces, such as 'period', 'on', 't', and 'ist' in 'period|on|t|ist'. The system then represents the resulting segments in a dense vector space, which is expected to model grammatical relations among them. This representation may in turn be used to map 'period|on|t|ist' (English) to 'par|od|ont|iste' (French). Thus, instead of being modeled at the lexical level, translation is reformulated more generally as the task of learning the best bilingual mapping between the sequences of subword segments of two languages; and sometimes even between pure character sequences: 'p|e|r|i|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t' $\rightarrow$ 'p|a|r|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t|e'. Such subword segmentations and alignments are at work in highly efficient end-to-end machine translation systems, despite their allegedly opaque nature. The computational value of such processes is unquestionable. But do they have any linguistic or philosophical plausibility? I attempt to cast light on this question by reviewing the relevant details of the subword segmentation algorithms and by relating them to important philosophical and linguistic debates, in the spirit of making artificial intelligence more transparent and explainable.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在自然语言处理方面的成功引发了关于语言意义的本质以及自然和人工系统处理语言意义的方式的有趣问题。其中一个问题与自 2016 年以来广泛应用于语言建模、机器翻译和其他任务中的子词分割算法有关。这些算法通常将单词切割成语义上不透明的片段，例如“period|on|t|ist”中的“period”、“on”、“t”和“ist”。然后，系统在密集向量空间中表示生成的片段，预计该空间可以对它们之间的语法关系进行建模。该表示法又可用于将“period|on|t|ist”（英语）映射到“par|od|ont|iste”（法语）。因此，翻译不是在词汇层面上建模，而是被更普遍地重新表述为学习两种语言的子词片段序列之间的最佳双语映射的任务；有时甚至在纯字符序列之间： 'p|e|r|i|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t' $\rightarrow$ 'p|a|r|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t|e'。这种子词分割和对齐在高效的端到端机器翻译系统中发挥着作用，尽管它们据称具有不透明的性质。这些过程的计算价值是毫无疑问的。但它们在语言或哲学上有合理性吗？本着让人工智能更加透明和可解释的精神，我试图通过回顾子词分割算法的相关细节，并将它们与重要的哲学和语言学辩论联系起来，来阐明这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了神经机器翻译中子词分割算法对语言意义建模的影响，分析其计算有效性与语言哲学合理性之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在自然语言处理中的成功引发了关于语言意义本质的讨论，特别是子词分割算法在翻译任务中如何处理语义不透明的片段，亟需从语言学和哲学角度评估其合理性。
AI.method: 通过回顾子词分割算法的技术细节，结合语言哲学与认知科学理论，分析其在双语映射中的表现及与传统语言学理论的关联。
AI.result: 子词分割虽提升翻译效率，但其生成的语义片段缺乏明确语言学解释，揭示了人工智能系统透明性与可解释性之间的张力。
AI.conclusion: 子词分割算法的计算价值毋庸置疑，但其语言哲学基础仍需进一步验证，未来需在技术效率与理论解释性之间寻求平衡。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了神经机器翻译中子词分割算法对语言意义建模的影响，分析其计算有效性与语言哲学合理性之间的关系。
ai_content.motivation: 深度学习在自然语言处理中的成功引发了关于语言意义本质的讨论，特别是子词分割算法在翻译任务中如何处理语义不透明的片段，亟需从语言学和哲学角度评估其合理性。
ai_content.method: 通过回顾子词分割算法的技术细节，结合语言哲学与认知科学理论，分析其在双语映射中的表现及与传统语言学理论的关联。
ai_content.result: 子词分割虽提升翻译效率，但其生成的语义片段缺乏明确语言学解释，揭示了人工智能系统透明性与可解释性之间的张力。
ai_content.conclusion: 子词分割算法的计算价值毋庸置疑，但其语言哲学基础仍需进一步验证，未来需在技术效率与理论解释性之间寻求平衡。

search_text: The boundaries of meaning: a case study in neural machine translation 意义的边界：神经机器翻译的案例研究 The success of deep learning in natural language processing raises intriguing questions about the nature of linguistic meaning and ways in which it can be processed by natural and artificial systems. One such question has to do with subword segmentation algorithms widely employed in language modeling, machine translation, and other tasks since 2016. These algorithms often cut words into semantically opaque pieces, such as 'period', 'on', 't', and 'ist' in 'period|on|t|ist'. The system then represents the resulting segments in a dense vector space, which is expected to model grammatical relations among them. This representation may in turn be used to map 'period|on|t|ist' (English) to 'par|od|ont|iste' (French). Thus, instead of being modeled at the lexical level, translation is reformulated more generally as the task of learning the best bilingual mapping between the sequences of subword segments of two languages; and sometimes even between pure character sequences: 'p|e|r|i|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t' $\rightarrow$ 'p|a|r|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t|e'. Such subword segmentations and alignments are at work in highly efficient end-to-end machine translation systems, despite their allegedly opaque nature. The computational value of such processes is unquestionable. But do they have any linguistic or philosophical plausibility? I attempt to cast light on this question by reviewing the relevant details of the subword segmentation algorithms and by relating them to important philosophical and linguistic debates, in the spirit of making artificial intelligence more transparent and explainable. 深度学习在自然语言处理方面的成功引发了关于语言意义的本质以及自然和人工系统处理语言意义的方式的有趣问题。其中一个问题与自 2016 年以来广泛应用于语言建模、机器翻译和其他任务中的子词分割算法有关。这些算法通常将单词切割成语义上不透明的片段，例如“period|on|t|ist”中的“period”、“on”、“t”和“ist”。然后，系统在密集向量空间中表示生成的片段，预计该空间可以对它们之间的语法关系进行建模。该表示法又可用于将“period|on|t|ist”（英语）映射到“par|od|ont|iste”（法语）。因此，翻译不是在词汇层面上建模，而是被更普遍地重新表述为学习两种语言的子词片段序列之间的最佳双语映射的任务；有时甚至在纯字符序列之间： 'p|e|r|i|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t' $\rightarrow$ 'p|a|r|o|d|o|n|t|i|s|t|e'。这种子词分割和对齐在高效的端到端机器翻译系统中发挥着作用，尽管它们据称具有不透明的性质。这些过程的计算价值是毫无疑问的。但它们在语言或哲学上有合理性吗？本着让人工智能更加透明和可解释的精神，我试图通过回顾子词分割算法的相关细节，并将它们与重要的哲学和语言学辩论联系起来，来阐明这个问题。 本文探讨了神经机器翻译中子词分割算法对语言意义建模的影响，分析其计算有效性与语言哲学合理性之间的关系。 Yuri Balashov cs.CL,cs.AI

title: SAGDA: Achieving $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ Communication Complexity in Federated Min-Max Learning
title_zh: SAGDA：在联合最小-最大学习中实现 $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ 通信复杂性
comment: Published as a conference paper at NeurIPS 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper at NeurIPS 2022
abstract: To lower the communication complexity of federated min-max learning, a natural approach is to utilize the idea of infrequent communications (through multiple local updates) same as in conventional federated learning. However, due to the more complicated inter-outer problem structure in federated min-max learning, theoretical understandings of communication complexity for federated min-max learning with infrequent communications remain very limited in the literature. This is particularly true for settings with non-i.i.d. datasets and partial client participation. To address this challenge, in this paper, we propose a new algorithmic framework called stochastic sampling averaging gradient descent ascent (SAGDA), which i) assembles stochastic gradient estimators from randomly sampled clients as control variates and ii) leverages two learning rates on both server and client sides. We show that SAGDA achieves a linear speedup in terms of both the number of clients and local update steps, which yields an $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ communication complexity that is orders of magnitude lower than the state of the art. Interestingly, by noting that the standard federated stochastic gradient descent ascent (FSGDA) is in fact a control-variate-free special version of SAGDA, we immediately arrive at an $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ communication complexity result for FSGDA. Therefore, through the lens of SAGDA, we also advance the current understanding on communication complexity of the standard FSGDA method for federated min-max learning.
summary: To lower the communication complexity of federated min-max learning, a natural approach is to utilize the idea of infrequent communications (through multiple local updates) same as in conventional federated learning. However, due to the more complicated inter-outer problem structure in federated min-max learning, theoretical understandings of communication complexity for federated min-max learning with infrequent communications remain very limited in the literature. This is particularly true for settings with non-i.i.d. datasets and partial client participation. To address this challenge, in this paper, we propose a new algorithmic framework called stochastic sampling averaging gradient descent ascent (SAGDA), which i) assembles stochastic gradient estimators from randomly sampled clients as control variates and ii) leverages two learning rates on both server and client sides. We show that SAGDA achieves a linear speedup in terms of both the number of clients and local update steps, which yields an $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ communication complexity that is orders of magnitude lower than the state of the art. Interestingly, by noting that the standard federated stochastic gradient descent ascent (FSGDA) is in fact a control-variate-free special version of SAGDA, we immediately arrive at an $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ communication complexity result for FSGDA. Therefore, through the lens of SAGDA, we also advance the current understanding on communication complexity of the standard FSGDA method for federated min-max learning.
abstract_zh: 为了降低联邦最小-最大学习的通信复杂性，一种自然的方法是利用与传统联邦学习相同的不频繁通信的思想（通过多个本地更新）。然而，由于联邦最小-最大学习中更复杂的内部-外部问题结构，文献中对通信不频繁的联邦最小-最大学习的通信复杂性的理论理解仍然非常有限。对于非独立同分布的设置尤其如此。数据集和部分客户参与。为了应对这一挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种称为随机采样平均梯度下降上升（SAGDA）的新算法框架，其中 i）从随机采样的客户端组装随机梯度估计器作为控制变量，ii）在服务器和客户端上利用两种学习率。我们表明，SAGDA 在客户端数量和本地更新步骤方面实现了线性加速，这使得 $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ 通信复杂度比现有技术低几个数量级。有趣的是，通过注意到标准联邦随机梯度下降上升（FSGDA）实际上是 SAGDA 的无控制变量特殊版本，我们立即得出 FSGDA 的 $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ 通信复杂度结果。因此，通过 SAGDA 的视角，我们还推进了当前对联合最小-最大学习的标准 FSGDA 方法的通信复杂性的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAGDA的新算法框架，用于降低联邦最小-最大学习中的通信复杂度。
AI.motivation: 联邦最小-最大学习的通信复杂度较高，尤其在非独立同分布数据和部分客户端参与的情况下，相关理论研究非常有限。
AI.method: SAGDA利用随机采样的客户端生成的随机梯度估计器作为控制变量，并在服务器和客户端使用两种学习率。
AI.result: SAGDA实现了与客户端数量和本地更新步骤成线性的加速，通信复杂度达到$\\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$，比现有方法低几个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 通过SAGDA的视角，不仅改进了联邦最小-最大学习中标准FSGDA方法的通信复杂度理解，也提升了其性能。

title: Belief propagation generalizes backpropagation
title_zh: 置信传播推广了反向传播
abstract: The two most important algorithms in artificial intelligence are backpropagation and belief propagation. In spite of their importance, the connection between them is poorly characterized. We show that when an input to backpropagation is converted into an input to belief propagation so that (loopy) belief propagation can be run on it, then the result of belief propagation encodes the result of backpropagation; thus backpropagation is recovered as a special case of belief propagation. In other words, we prove for apparently the first time that belief propagation generalizes backpropagation. Our analysis is a theoretical contribution, which we motivate with the expectation that it might reconcile our understandings of each of these algorithms, and serve as a guide to engineering researchers seeking to improve the behavior of systems that use one or the other.
summary: The two most important algorithms in artificial intelligence are backpropagation and belief propagation. In spite of their importance, the connection between them is poorly characterized. We show that when an input to backpropagation is converted into an input to belief propagation so that (loopy) belief propagation can be run on it, then the result of belief propagation encodes the result of backpropagation; thus backpropagation is recovered as a special case of belief propagation. In other words, we prove for apparently the first time that belief propagation generalizes backpropagation. Our analysis is a theoretical contribution, which we motivate with the expectation that it might reconcile our understandings of each of these algorithms, and serve as a guide to engineering researchers seeking to improve the behavior of systems that use one or the other.
abstract_zh: 人工智能中最重要的两个算法是反向传播和置信传播。尽管它们很重要，但它们之间的联系却很少被描述。我们证明，当反向传播的输入转换为置信传播的输入以便可以在其上运行（循环）置信传播时，置信传播的结果将编码反向传播的结果；因此，反向传播被恢复为置信传播的一个特例。换句话说，我们显然第一次证明信念传播可以推广反向传播。我们的分析是一种理论贡献，我们希望它能够调和我们对每种算法的理解，并为寻求改进使用其中一种算法的系统的行为的工程研究人员提供指导。

AI.tldr: 本文证明信念传播算法可以泛化反向传播算法，将反向传播作为其特例。
AI.motivation: 旨在调和对反向传播与信念传播两种重要算法的理解差异，并为改进相关系统提供理论指导。
AI.method: 通过将反向传播输入转换为信念传播输入，运行循环信念传播并证明其结果包含反向传播结果。
AI.result: 首次理论上证明信念传播能完全涵盖反向传播，实现算法层面的泛化关系。
AI.conclusion: 该理论贡献可能促进两种算法的统一理解，并为工程实践中的系统优化提供新方向。

We show that when an input to backpropagation is converted into an input to belief propagation so that (loopy) belief propagation can be run on it, then the result of belief propagation encodes the result of backpropagation; thus backpropagation is recovered as a special case of belief propagation. Our analysis is a theoretical contribution, which we motivate with the expectation that it might reconcile our understandings of each of these algorithms, and serve as a guide to engineering researchers seeking to improve the behavior of systems that use one or the other. 人工智能中最重要的两个算法是反向传播和置信传播。尽管它们很重要，但它们之间的联系却很少被描述。我们证明，当反向传播的输入转换为置信传播的输入以便可以在其上运行（循环）置信传播时，置信传播的结果将编码反向传播的结果；因此，反向传播被恢复为置信传播的一个特例。换句话说，我们显然第一次证明信念传播可以推广反向传播。我们的分析是一种理论贡献，我们希望它能够调和我们对每种算法的理解，并为寻求改进使用其中一种算法的系统的行为的工程研究人员提供指导。 本文证明信念传播算法可以泛化反向传播算法，将反向传播作为其特例。 Frederik Eaton cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

title: Throwing Objects into A Moving Basket While Avoiding Obstacles
title_zh: 将物体扔进移动的篮子中，同时避开障碍物
comment: The video of our experiments can be found at https://youtu.be/VmIFF__c_84
comments: The video of our experiments can be found at https://youtu.be/VmIFF__c_84
abstract: The capabilities of a robot will be increased significantly by exploiting throwing behavior. In particular, throwing will enable robots to rapidly place the object into the target basket, located outside its feasible kinematic space, without traveling to the desired location. In previous approaches, the robot often learned a parameterized throwing kernel through analytical approaches, imitation learning, or hand-coding. There are many situations in which such approaches do not work/generalize well due to various object shapes, heterogeneous mass distribution, and also obstacles that might be presented in the environment. It is obvious that a method is needed to modulate the throwing kernel through its meta parameters. In this paper, we tackle object throwing problem through a deep reinforcement learning approach that enables robots to precisely throw objects into moving baskets while there are obstacles obstructing the path. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first group that addresses throwing objects with obstacle avoidance. Such a throwing skill not only increases the physical reachability of a robot arm but also improves the execution time. In particular, the robot detects the pose of the target object, basket, and obstacle at each time step, predicts the proper grasp configuration for the target object, and then infers appropriate parameters to throw the object into the basket. Due to safety constraints, we develop a simulation environment in Gazebo to train the robot and then use the learned policy in real-robot directly. To assess the performers of the proposed approach, we perform extensive sets of experiments in both simulation and real robots in three scenarios. Experimental results showed that the robot could precisely throw a target object into the basket outside its kinematic range and generalize well to new locations and objects without colliding with obstacles.

abstract_zh: 通过利用投掷行为，机器人的能力将显着提高。特别是，投掷将使机器人能够快速将物体放入位于其可行运动空间之外的目标篮中，而无需行进到所需位置。在以前的方法中，机器人经常通过分析方法、模仿学习或手动编码来学习参数化的投掷内核。在许多情况下，由于不同的物体形状、不均匀的质量分布以及环境中可能出现的障碍，这种方法不能很好地工作/推广。显然，需要一种方法来通过其元参数来调节投掷内核。在本文中，我们通过深度强化学习方法解决物体投掷问题，使机器人能够在路径有障碍物的情况下精确地将物体投掷到移动的篮子中。据我们所知，我们是第一个解决投掷物体避障问题的小组。这种投掷技能不仅增加了机械臂的物理可达性，而且还提高了执行时间。特别是，机器人在每个时间步检测目标物体、篮子和障碍物的姿态，预测目标物体的正确抓取配置，然后推断适当的参数以将物体扔进篮子。由于安全限制，我们在 Gazebo 中开发了一个模拟环境来训练机器人，然后直接在真实机器人中使用学习到的策略。为了评估所提出方法的执行者，我们在三种场景中的模拟和真实机器人中进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，机器人可以将超出其运动范围的目标物体精确地扔进篮子中，并很好地泛化到新的位置和物体，而不会与障碍物发生碰撞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的方法，使机器人能够在存在障碍物的情况下将物体精准投掷到移动的篮筐中。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理不同形状物体、质量分布及障碍物环境时泛化能力不足，需开发可调节的投掷策略以提升机器人操作范围和效率。
AI.method: 通过Gazebo构建仿真环境训练深度强化学习模型，实时检测物体、篮筐及障碍物位姿，预测抓取配置并推断投掷参数，最终将策略迁移至真实机器人。
AI.result: 实验表明机器人可精准将物体投掷至运动篮筐（超出其运动学范围），并在新位置和物体上良好泛化，且避免与障碍物碰撞。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度强化学习实现了动态障碍环境下的精准投掷，显著提升了机器人物理操作范围与任务执行效率。

title: Establishing Meta-Decision-Making for AI: An Ontology of Relevance, Representation and Reasoning
title_zh: 建立人工智能元决策：相关性、表示和推理的本体论
comment: This version was peer-reviewed, accepted and presented as part of the AAAI 2021 Fall Symposium FSS-21. 2021
comments: This version was peer-reviewed, accepted and presented as part of the AAAI 2021 Fall Symposium FSS-21. 2021
abstract: We propose an ontology of building decision-making systems, with the aim of establishing Meta-Decision-Making for Artificial Intelligence (AI), improving autonomy, and creating a framework to build metrics and benchmarks upon. To this end, we propose the three parts of Relevance, Representation, and Reasoning, and discuss their value in ensuring safety and mitigating risk in the context of third wave cognitive systems. Our nomenclature reflects the literature on decision-making, and our ontology allows researchers that adopt it to frame their work in relation to one or more of these parts.
summary: We propose an ontology of building decision-making systems, with the aim of establishing Meta-Decision-Making for Artificial Intelligence (AI), improving autonomy, and creating a framework to build metrics and benchmarks upon. To this end, we propose the three parts of Relevance, Representation, and Reasoning, and discuss their value in ensuring safety and mitigating risk in the context of third wave cognitive systems. Our nomenclature reflects the literature on decision-making, and our ontology allows researchers that adopt it to frame their work in relation to one or more of these parts.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了构建决策系统的本体论，旨在建立人工智能（AI）的元决策，提高自主性，并创建一个构建指标和基准的框架。为此，我们提出了相关性、表征和推理三个部分，并讨论了它们在第三波认知系统背景下确保安全和降低风险的价值。我们的命名法反映了有关决策的文献，而我们的本体论允许采用它的研究人员根据这些部分中的一个或多个部分来构建他们的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种构建人工智能元决策系统的本体论框架，通过相关性、表示和推理三个核心部分提升AI自主性与安全性。
AI.motivation: 为解决第三波认知系统中AI决策的自主性不足、安全风险难以量化等问题，需建立统一的评估基准与理论框架。
AI.method: 构建包含‘相关性’（决策目标匹配度）、‘表示’（知识建模方式）、‘推理’（决策逻辑）的三维本体论体系，并与决策理论文献建立映射关系。
AI.result: 形成了可指导AI决策系统设计的理论框架，使研究者能基于三维度定位自身工作，为安全性和风险评估提供结构化分析工具。
AI.conclusion: 该本体论为AI决策系统提供了可扩展的理论基础，有助于推动自主决策能力与安全性的协同发展，促进领域标准化进程。

title: Composition of Differential Privacy & Privacy Amplification by Subsampling
title_zh: 差分隐私与子采样隐私放大的组合
abstract: This chapter is meant to be part of the book "Differential Privacy for Artificial Intelligence Applications." We give an introduction to the most important property of differential privacy -- composition: running multiple independent analyses on the data of a set of people will still be differentially private as long as each of the analyses is private on its own -- as well as the related topic of privacy amplification by subsampling. This chapter introduces the basic concepts and gives proofs of the key results needed to apply these tools in practice.
summary: This chapter is meant to be part of the book "Differential Privacy for Artificial Intelligence Applications." We give an introduction to the most important property of differential privacy -- composition: running multiple independent analyses on the data of a set of people will still be differentially private as long as each of the analyses is private on its own -- as well as the related topic of privacy amplification by subsampling. This chapter introduces the basic concepts and gives proofs of the key results needed to apply these tools in practice.
abstract_zh: 本章是《人工智能应用程序的差异隐私》一书的一部分。我们介绍了差分隐私最重要的属性——组合：对一组人的数据运行多个独立分析，只要每个分析本身都是私有的，就仍然是差分隐私的——以及通过子采样放大隐私的相关主题。本章介绍了基本概念，并给出了在实践中应用这些工具所需的关键结果的证明。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在介绍差分隐私的组合性及子采样隐私增强的基本概念，并提供关键理论证明。
AI.motivation: 为在人工智能应用中有效使用差分隐私，需明确多次数据分析的隐私保证机制及子采样对隐私的增强作用。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与数学证明，阐述差分隐私组合定理及子采样隐私放大效应的数学基础。
AI.result: 建立了差分隐私组合性理论框架，并证明了子采样操作可有效提升隐私保护强度的关键结论。
AI.conclusion: 差分隐私组合性与子采样放大理论为AI场景下的隐私保护提供了可落地的数学工具与分析方法。

search_text: Composition of Differential Privacy & Privacy Amplification by Subsampling 差分隐私与子采样隐私放大的组合 This chapter is meant to be part of the book "Differential Privacy for Artificial Intelligence Applications." We give an introduction to the most important property of differential privacy -- composition: running multiple independent analyses on the data of a set of people will still be differentially private as long as each of the analyses is private on its own -- as well as the related topic of privacy amplification by subsampling. This chapter introduces the basic concepts and gives proofs of the key results needed to apply these tools in practice. 本章是《人工智能应用程序的差异隐私》一书的一部分。我们介绍了差分隐私最重要的属性——组合：对一组人的数据运行多个独立分析，只要每个分析本身都是私有的，就仍然是差分隐私的——以及通过子采样放大隐私的相关主题。本章介绍了基本概念，并给出了在实践中应用这些工具所需的关键结果的证明。 本文旨在介绍差分隐私的组合性及子采样隐私增强的基本概念，并提供关键理论证明。 Thomas Steinke cs.CR,cs.DS,cs.LG

title: DFA: Dynamic Feature Aggregation for Efficient Video Object Detection
title_zh: DFA：用于高效视频对象检测的动态特征聚合
abstract: Video object detection is a fundamental yet challenging task in computer vision. One practical solution is to take advantage of temporal information from the video and apply feature aggregation to enhance the object features in each frame. Though effective, those existing methods always suffer from low inference speeds because they use a fixed number of frames for feature aggregation regardless of the input frame. Therefore, this paper aims to improve the inference speed of the current feature aggregation-based video object detectors while maintaining their performance. To achieve this goal, we propose a vanilla dynamic aggregation module that adaptively selects the frames for feature enhancement. Then, we extend the vanilla dynamic aggregation module to a more effective and reconfigurable deformable version. Finally, we introduce inplace distillation loss to improve the representations of objects aggregated with fewer frames. Extensive experimental results validate the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed methods: On the ImageNet VID benchmark, integrated with our proposed methods, FGFA and SELSA can improve the inference speed by 31% and 76% respectively while getting comparable performance on accuracy.
summary: Video object detection is a fundamental yet challenging task in computer vision. One practical solution is to take advantage of temporal information from the video and apply feature aggregation to enhance the object features in each frame. Though effective, those existing methods always suffer from low inference speeds because they use a fixed number of frames for feature aggregation regardless of the input frame. Therefore, this paper aims to improve the inference speed of the current feature aggregation-based video object detectors while maintaining their performance. To achieve this goal, we propose a vanilla dynamic aggregation module that adaptively selects the frames for feature enhancement. Then, we extend the vanilla dynamic aggregation module to a more effective and reconfigurable deformable version. Finally, we introduce inplace distillation loss to improve the representations of objects aggregated with fewer frames. Extensive experimental results validate the effectiveness and efficiency of our proposed methods: On the ImageNet VID benchmark, integrated with our proposed methods, FGFA and SELSA can improve the inference speed by 31% and 76% respectively while getting comparable performance on accuracy.
abstract_zh: 视频对象检测是计算机视觉中一项基本但具有挑战性的任务。一种实用的解决方案是利用视频中的时间信息并应用特征聚合来增强每帧中的对象特征。尽管有效，但这些现有方法始终存在推理速度较低的问题，因为无论输入帧如何，它们都使用固定数量的帧进行特征聚合。因此，本文旨在提高当前基于特征聚合的视频对象检测器的推理速度，同时保持其性能。为了实现这个目标，我们提出了一个普通的动态聚合模块，它可以自适应地选择帧来进行特征增强。然后，我们将普通动态聚合模块扩展为更有效且可重新配置的变形版本。最后，我们引入就地蒸馏损失来改进用更少的帧聚合的对象的表示。大量的实验结果验证了我们提出的方法的有效性和效率：在 ImageNet VID 基准上，与我们提出的方法集成，FGFA 和 SELSA 可以分别将推理速度提高 31% 和 76%，同时获得相当的准确度性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态特征聚合方法DFA，旨在提升视频目标检测的推理速度同时保持检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频目标检测方法因固定使用帧数进行特征聚合导致推理速度低，需动态适应输入帧数以提升效率。
AI.method: 设计动态聚合模块自适应选择增强帧，扩展为可变形版本，并引入inplace蒸馏损失优化少帧聚合表示。
AI.result: 在ImageNet VID基准测试中，FGFA和SELSA分别提速31%和76%，准确率保持相当水平。
AI.conclusion: 动态特征聚合有效平衡了视频目标检测的速度与精度，验证了方法的高效性与实用性。

title: Generated Faces in the Wild: Quantitative Comparison of Stable Diffusion, Midjourney and DALL-E 2
title_zh: 野外生成的面孔：Stable Diffusion、Midjourney 和 DALL-E 2 的定量比较
abstract: The field of image synthesis has made great strides in the last couple of years. Recent models are capable of generating images with astonishing quality. Fine-grained evaluation of these models on some interesting categories such as faces is still missing. Here, we conduct a quantitative comparison of three popular systems including Stable Diffusion, Midjourney, and DALL-E 2 in their ability to generate photorealistic faces in the wild. We find that Stable Diffusion generates better faces than the other systems, according to the FID score. We also introduce a dataset of generated faces in the wild dubbed GFW, including a total of 15,076 faces. Furthermore, we hope that our study spurs follow-up research in assessing the generative models and improving them. Data and code are available at data and code, respectively.
summary: The field of image synthesis has made great strides in the last couple of years. Recent models are capable of generating images with astonishing quality. Fine-grained evaluation of these models on some interesting categories such as faces is still missing. Here, we conduct a quantitative comparison of three popular systems including Stable Diffusion, Midjourney, and DALL-E 2 in their ability to generate photorealistic faces in the wild. We find that Stable Diffusion generates better faces than the other systems, according to the FID score. We also introduce a dataset of generated faces in the wild dubbed GFW, including a total of 15,076 faces. Furthermore, we hope that our study spurs follow-up research in assessing the generative models and improving them. Data and code are available at data and code, respectively.
abstract_zh: 图像合成领域在过去几年中取得了长足的进步。最近的模型能够生成质量惊人的图像。仍然缺乏对这些模型在一些有趣的类别（例如面部）上的细粒度评估。在这里，我们对 Stable Diffusion、Midjourney 和 DALL-E 2 等三种流行系统在野外生成逼真面孔的能力进行了定量比较。根据 FID 分数，我们发现稳定扩散比其他系统生成更好的人脸。我们还引入了一个名为 GFW 的野外生成人脸数据集，总共包括 15,076 张人脸。此外，我们希望我们的研究能够促进评估生成模型并改进它们的后续研究。数据和代码分别可在数据和代码处获得。

AI.tldr: 本文对Stable Diffusion、Midjourney和DALL-E 2三种模型在生成真实人脸方面的性能进行了定量比较，并引入了包含15,076张人脸的GFW数据集。
AI.motivation: 尽管图像合成技术已取得显著进展，但针对人脸等特定类别的细粒度评估仍不足，亟需系统性比较和标准化数据集支持后续研究。
AI.method: 通过FID分数量化评估三种模型生成的人脸质量，并构建包含生成人脸的GFW数据集以支持未来研究。
AI.result: Stable Diffusion在FID评分上优于其他系统，GFW数据集作为研究资源被公开。
AI.conclusion: Stable Diffusion在人脸生成上表现最佳，研究强调了改进生成模型评估方法的必要性，并通过公开数据集推动后续研究。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Cao,Zaixi Zhang,Jinyuan Jia,Neil Zhenqiang Gong
title: FLCert: Provably Secure Federated Learning against Poisoning Attacks
title_zh: FLCert：可证明安全的联合学习抵御中毒攻击
comment: To appear in Transactions on Information Forensics and Security. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.01854
comments: To appear in Transactions on Information Forensics and Security. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2102.01854
abstract: Due to its distributed nature, federated learning is vulnerable to poisoning attacks, in which malicious clients poison the training process via manipulating their local training data and/or local model updates sent to the cloud server, such that the poisoned global model misclassifies many indiscriminate test inputs or attacker-chosen ones. Existing defenses mainly leverage Byzantine-robust federated learning methods or detect malicious clients. However, these defenses do not have provable security guarantees against poisoning attacks and may be vulnerable to more advanced attacks. In this work, we aim to bridge the gap by proposing FLCert, an ensemble federated learning framework, that is provably secure against poisoning attacks with a bounded number of malicious clients. Our key idea is to divide the clients into groups, learn a global model for each group of clients using any existing federated learning method, and take a majority vote among the global models to classify a test input. Specifically, we consider two methods to group the clients and propose two variants of FLCert correspondingly, i.e., FLCert-P that randomly samples clients in each group, and FLCert-D that divides clients to disjoint groups deterministically. Our extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that the label predicted by our FLCert for a test input is provably unaffected by a bounded number of malicious clients, no matter what poisoning attacks they use.
summary: Due to its distributed nature, federated learning is vulnerable to poisoning attacks, in which malicious clients poison the training process via manipulating their local training data and/or local model updates sent to the cloud server, such that the poisoned global model misclassifies many indiscriminate test inputs or attacker-chosen ones. Existing defenses mainly leverage Byzantine-robust federated learning methods or detect malicious clients. However, these defenses do not have provable security guarantees against poisoning attacks and may be vulnerable to more advanced attacks. In this work, we aim to bridge the gap by proposing FLCert, an ensemble federated learning framework, that is provably secure against poisoning attacks with a bounded number of malicious clients. Our key idea is to divide the clients into groups, learn a global model for each group of clients using any existing federated learning method, and take a majority vote among the global models to classify a test input. Specifically, we consider two methods to group the clients and propose two variants of FLCert correspondingly, i.e., FLCert-P that randomly samples clients in each group, and FLCert-D that divides clients to disjoint groups deterministically. Our extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that the label predicted by our FLCert for a test input is provably unaffected by a bounded number of malicious clients, no matter what poisoning attacks they use.
abstract_zh: 由于其分布式特性，联邦学习很容易受到中毒攻击，其中恶意客户端通过操纵发送到云服务器的本地训练数据和/或本地模型更新来毒害训练过程，从而使中毒的全局模型对许多不加区别的测试输入或攻击者选择的输入进行错误分类。现有的防御主要利用拜占庭稳健的联邦学习方法或检测恶意客户端。然而，这些防御措施没有针对中毒攻击的可证明的安全保证，并且可能容易受到更高级的攻击。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过提出 FLCert（一种集成联合学习框架）来弥补这一差距，该框架已被证明可以安全地抵御有限数量恶意客户端的中毒攻击。我们的关键思想是将客户分组，使用任何现有的联合学习方法为每组客户学习全局模型，并在全局模型中进行多数投票以对测试输入进行分类。具体来说，我们考虑两种对客户端进行分组的方法，并相应地提出两种 FLCert 变体，即在每组中随机采样客户端的 FLCert-P 和确定性地将客户端划分为不相交组的 FLCert-D。我们对多个数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的 FLCert 针对测试输入预测的标签可证明不受有限数量的恶意客户端的影响，无论他们使用何种中毒攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FLCert，一种针对联邦学习中投毒攻击的可证明安全框架。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习防御方法缺乏对投毒攻击的可证明安全性保证，且可能被高级攻击绕过。
AI.method: 通过将客户端分组训练独立全局模型，并采用多数投票机制进行分类，提出FLCert-P（随机分组）和FLCert-D（确定性分组）两种变体。
AI.result: 实验表明，FLCert可证明地抵御有限数量恶意客户端的投毒攻击，预测结果不受攻击影响。
AI.conclusion: FLCert通过分组集成与多数投票机制，在理论层面保障了联邦学习的抗投毒安全性。

search_text: FLCert: Provably Secure Federated Learning against Poisoning Attacks FLCert：可证明安全的联合学习抵御中毒攻击 Due to its distributed nature, federated learning is vulnerable to poisoning attacks, in which malicious clients poison the training process via manipulating their local training data and/or local model updates sent to the cloud server, such that the poisoned global model misclassifies many indiscriminate test inputs or attacker-chosen ones. Existing defenses mainly leverage Byzantine-robust federated learning methods or detect malicious clients. However, these defenses do not have provable security guarantees against poisoning attacks and may be vulnerable to more advanced attacks. In this work, we aim to bridge the gap by proposing FLCert, an ensemble federated learning framework, that is provably secure against poisoning attacks with a bounded number of malicious clients. Our key idea is to divide the clients into groups, learn a global model for each group of clients using any existing federated learning method, and take a majority vote among the global models to classify a test input. Specifically, we consider two methods to group the clients and propose two variants of FLCert correspondingly, i.e., FLCert-P that randomly samples clients in each group, and FLCert-D that divides clients to disjoint groups deterministically. Our extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that the label predicted by our FLCert for a test input is provably unaffected by a bounded number of malicious clients, no matter what poisoning attacks they use. 由于其分布式特性，联邦学习很容易受到中毒攻击，其中恶意客户端通过操纵发送到云服务器的本地训练数据和/或本地模型更新来毒害训练过程，从而使中毒的全局模型对许多不加区别的测试输入或攻击者选择的输入进行错误分类。现有的防御主要利用拜占庭稳健的联邦学习方法或检测恶意客户端。然而，这些防御措施没有针对中毒攻击的可证明的安全保证，并且可能容易受到更高级的攻击。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过提出 FLCert（一种集成联合学习框架）来弥补这一差距，该框架已被证明可以安全地抵御有限数量恶意客户端的中毒攻击。我们的关键思想是将客户分组，使用任何现有的联合学习方法为每组客户学习全局模型，并在全局模型中进行多数投票以对测试输入进行分类。具体来说，我们考虑两种对客户端进行分组的方法，并相应地提出两种 FLCert 变体，即在每组中随机采样客户端的 FLCert-P 和确定性地将客户端划分为不相交组的 FLCert-D。我们对多个数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的 FLCert 针对测试输入预测的标签可证明不受有限数量的恶意客户端的影响，无论他们使用何种中毒攻击。 本文提出FLCert，一种针对联邦学习中投毒攻击的可证明安全框架。 Xiaoyu Cao,Zaixi Zhang,Jinyuan Jia,Neil Zhenqiang Gong cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: The Dynamic of Consensus in Deep Networks and the Identification of Noisy Labels
title_zh: 深度网络中共识的动态和噪声标签的识别
abstract: Deep neural networks have incredible capacity and expressibility, and can seemingly memorize any training set. This introduces a problem when training in the presence of noisy labels, as the noisy examples cannot be distinguished from clean examples by the end of training. Recent research has dealt with this challenge by utilizing the fact that deep networks seem to memorize clean examples much earlier than noisy examples. Here we report a new empirical result: for each example, when looking at the time it has been memorized by each model in an ensemble of networks, the diversity seen in noisy examples is much larger than the clean examples. We use this observation to develop a new method for noisy labels filtration. The method is based on a statistics of the data, which captures the differences in ensemble learning dynamics between clean and noisy data. We test our method on three tasks: (i) noise amount estimation; (ii) noise filtration; (iii) supervised classification. We show that our method improves over existing baselines in all three tasks using a variety of datasets, noise models, and noise levels. Aside from its improved performance, our method has two other advantages. (i) Simplicity, which implies that no additional hyperparameters are introduced. (ii) Our method is modular: it does not work in an end-to-end fashion, and can therefore be used to clean a dataset for any other future usage.
summary: Deep neural networks have incredible capacity and expressibility, and can seemingly memorize any training set. This introduces a problem when training in the presence of noisy labels, as the noisy examples cannot be distinguished from clean examples by the end of training. Recent research has dealt with this challenge by utilizing the fact that deep networks seem to memorize clean examples much earlier than noisy examples. Here we report a new empirical result: for each example, when looking at the time it has been memorized by each model in an ensemble of networks, the diversity seen in noisy examples is much larger than the clean examples. We use this observation to develop a new method for noisy labels filtration. The method is based on a statistics of the data, which captures the differences in ensemble learning dynamics between clean and noisy data. We test our method on three tasks: (i) noise amount estimation; (ii) noise filtration; (iii) supervised classification. We show that our method improves over existing baselines in all three tasks using a variety of datasets, noise models, and noise levels. Aside from its improved performance, our method has two other advantages. (i) Simplicity, which implies that no additional hyperparameters are introduced. (ii) Our method is modular: it does not work in an end-to-end fashion, and can therefore be used to clean a dataset for any other future usage.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络具有令人难以置信的容量和表达能力，并且似乎可以记住任何训练集。在存在噪声标签的情况下进行训练时，这会带来一个问题，因为在训练结束时无法将噪声示例与干净示例区分开来。最近的研究利用深度网络似乎比嘈杂的例子更早记住干净的例子这一事实来应对这一挑战。在这里，我们报告了一个新的实证结果：对于每个例子，当观察网络集合中每个模型记忆它的时间时，在嘈杂的例子中看到的多样性比干净的例子大得多。我们利用这一观察结果开发了一种新的噪声标签过滤方法。该方法基于数​​据统计，捕获干净数据和噪声数据之间集成学习动态的差异。我们在三个任务上测试我们的方法：（i）噪声量估计； (ii) 噪声过滤； (iii) 监督分类。我们使用各种数据集、噪声模型和噪声水平表明，我们的方法在所有三个任务中都比现有基线有所改进。除了改进的性能之外，我们的方法还有另外两个优点。 (i) 简单性，这意味着没有引入额外的超参数。 （ii）我们的方法是模块化的：它不以端到端的方式工作，因此可以用于清理数据集以供将来使用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于集成网络学习动态差异的噪声标签识别方法。
AI.motivation: 深度网络在噪声标签训练中难以区分噪声与干净样本，现有方法依赖记忆时间差异但效果有限，需更有效识别噪声标签的策略。
AI.method: 通过统计集成网络中样本被不同模型记忆时间的多样性差异，利用噪声样本在集成学习动态中表现出更大差异的特性进行过滤。
AI.result: 在噪声量估计、噪声过滤和分类任务中优于现有方法，适用于多种数据集和噪声模型，且无需额外超参数且模块化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过捕捉集成学习动态差异有效识别噪声标签，在性能、简洁性和通用性上优于现有技术。

authors_text: Shamil Mamedov,Alejandro Astudillo,Daniele Ronzani,Wilm Decré,Jean-Philippe Noël,Jan Swevers
title: An optimal open-loop strategy for handling a flexible beam with a robot manipulator
title_zh: 使用机器人操纵器处理柔性梁的最佳开环策略
abstract: Fast and safe manipulation of flexible objects with a robot manipulator necessitates measures to cope with vibrations. Existing approaches either increase the task execution time or require complex models and/or additional instrumentation to measure vibrations. This paper develops a model-based method that overcomes these limitations. It relies on a simple pendulum-like model for modeling the beam, open-loop optimal control for suppressing vibrations, and does not require any exteroceptive sensors. We experimentally show that the proposed method drastically reduces residual vibrations -- at least 90% -- and outperforms the commonly used input shaping (IS) for the same execution time. Besides, our method can also execute the task faster than IS with a minor reduction in vibration suppression performance. The proposed method facilitates the development of new solutions to a wide range of tasks that involve dynamic manipulation of flexible objects.
summary: Fast and safe manipulation of flexible objects with a robot manipulator necessitates measures to cope with vibrations. Existing approaches either increase the task execution time or require complex models and/or additional instrumentation to measure vibrations. This paper develops a model-based method that overcomes these limitations. It relies on a simple pendulum-like model for modeling the beam, open-loop optimal control for suppressing vibrations, and does not require any exteroceptive sensors. We experimentally show that the proposed method drastically reduces residual vibrations -- at least 90% -- and outperforms the commonly used input shaping (IS) for the same execution time. Besides, our method can also execute the task faster than IS with a minor reduction in vibration suppression performance. The proposed method facilitates the development of new solutions to a wide range of tasks that involve dynamic manipulation of flexible objects.
abstract_zh: 使用机器人操纵器快速、安全地操纵柔性物体需要采取措施应对振动。现有方法要么增加任务执行时间，要么需要复杂的模型和/或额外的仪器来测量振动。本文开发了一种克服这些限制的基于模型的方法。它依靠简单的类似钟摆的模型来建模梁，开环最优控制来抑制振动，并且不需要任何外感受传感器。我们通过实验表明，所提出的方法可大幅减少残余振动（至少 90%），并且在相同的执行时间内优于常用的输入整形 (IS)。此外，我们的方法还可以比 IS 更快地执行任务，同时振动抑制性​​能略有下降。所提出的方法有助于为涉及灵活对象动态操作的各种任务开发新的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型的开环最优控制策略，用于机器人操作柔性梁时的振动抑制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在操作柔性物体时要么增加任务时间，要么需要复杂模型或额外传感器，难以兼顾效率与振动控制。
AI.method: 采用简化摆锤模型描述柔性梁，通过开环最优控制算法抑制振动，无需外部传感器。
AI.result: 实验显示振动抑制效果达90%以上，优于传统输入整形方法，且可在相同时间内更快完成任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为动态操作柔性物体提供了高效、低成本的解决方案，推动相关技术发展。

search_text: An optimal open-loop strategy for handling a flexible beam with a robot manipulator 使用机器人操纵器处理柔性梁的最佳开环策略 Fast and safe manipulation of flexible objects with a robot manipulator necessitates measures to cope with vibrations. Existing approaches either increase the task execution time or require complex models and/or additional instrumentation to measure vibrations. This paper develops a model-based method that overcomes these limitations. It relies on a simple pendulum-like model for modeling the beam, open-loop optimal control for suppressing vibrations, and does not require any exteroceptive sensors. We experimentally show that the proposed method drastically reduces residual vibrations -- at least 90% -- and outperforms the commonly used input shaping (IS) for the same execution time. Besides, our method can also execute the task faster than IS with a minor reduction in vibration suppression performance. The proposed method facilitates the development of new solutions to a wide range of tasks that involve dynamic manipulation of flexible objects. 使用机器人操纵器快速、安全地操纵柔性物体需要采取措施应对振动。现有方法要么增加任务执行时间，要么需要复杂的模型和/或额外的仪器来测量振动。本文开发了一种克服这些限制的基于模型的方法。它依靠简单的类似钟摆的模型来建模梁，开环最优控制来抑制振动，并且不需要任何外感受传感器。我们通过实验表明，所提出的方法可大幅减少残余振动（至少 90%），并且在相同的执行时间内优于常用的输入整形 (IS)。此外，我们的方法还可以比 IS 更快地执行任务，同时振动抑制性​​能略有下降。所提出的方法有助于为涉及灵活对象动态操作的各种任务开发新的解决方案。 本文提出一种基于模型的开环最优控制策略，用于机器人操作柔性梁时的振动抑制。 Shamil Mamedov,Alejandro Astudillo,Daniele Ronzani,Wilm Decré,Jean-Philippe Noël,Jan Swevers cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Jiulong Wang,Ruopu Wu,Guokai Chen,Xuhao Chen,Boran Liu,Jixiang Zong,Di Zhao
title: RISC-V Toolchain and Agile Development based Open-source Neuromorphic Processor
title_zh: 基于RISC-V工具链和敏捷开发的开源神经拟态处理器
abstract: In recent decades, neuromorphic computing aiming to imitate brains' behaviors has been developed in various fields of computer science. The Artificial Neural Network (ANN) is an important concept in Artificial Intelligence (AI). It is utilized in recognition and classification. To explore a better way to simulate obtained brain behaviors, which is fast and energy-efficient, on hardware, researchers need an advanced method such as neuromorphic computing. In this case, Spiking Neural Network (SNN) becomes an optimal choice in hardware implementation. Recent works are focusing on accelerating SNN computing. However, most accelerator solutions are based on CPU-accelerator architecture which is energy-inefficient due to the complex control flows in this structure. This paper proposes Wenquxing 22A, a low-power neuromorphic processor that combines general-purpose CPU functions and SNN to efficiently compute it with RISC-V SNN extension instructions. The main idea of Wenquxing 22A is to integrate the SNN calculation unit into the pipeline of a general-purpose CPU to achieve low-power computing with customized RISC-V SNN instructions version 1.0 (RV-SNN V1.0), Streamlined Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF) model, and the binary stochastic Spike-timing-dependent-plasticity (STDP). The source code of Wenquxing 22A is released online on Gitee and GitHub. We apply Wenquxing 22A to the recognition of the MNIST dataset to make a comparison with other SNN systems. Our experiment results show that Wenquxing 22A improves the energy expenses by 5.13 times over the accelerator solution, ODIN, with approximately classification accuracy, 85.00% for 3-bit ODIN online learning, and 91.91% for 1-bit Wenquxing 22A.

The Artificial Neural Network (ANN) is an important concept in Artificial Intelligence (AI). It is utilized in recognition and classification. To explore a better way to simulate obtained brain behaviors, which is fast and energy-efficient, on hardware, researchers need an advanced method such as neuromorphic computing. In this case, Spiking Neural Network (SNN) becomes an optimal choice in hardware implementation. Recent works are focusing on accelerating SNN computing. However, most accelerator solutions are based on CPU-accelerator architecture which is energy-inefficient due to the complex control flows in this structure. This paper proposes Wenquxing 22A, a low-power neuromorphic processor that combines general-purpose CPU functions and SNN to efficiently compute it with RISC-V SNN extension instructions. The main idea of Wenquxing 22A is to integrate the SNN calculation unit into the pipeline of a general-purpose CPU to achieve low-power computing with customized RISC-V SNN instructions version 1.0 (RV-SNN V1.0), Streamlined Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF) model, and the binary stochastic Spike-timing-dependent-plasticity (STDP). The source code of Wenquxing 22A is released online on Gitee and GitHub. We apply Wenquxing 22A to the recognition of the MNIST dataset to make a comparison with other SNN systems. Our experiment results show that Wenquxing 22A improves the energy expenses by 5.13 times over the accelerator solution, ODIN, with approximately classification accuracy, 85.00% for 3-bit ODIN online learning, and 91.91% for 1-bit Wenquxing 22A.
abstract_zh: 近几十年来，旨在模仿大脑行为的神经形态计算在计算机科学的各个领域得到了发展。人工神经网络（ANN）是人工智能（AI）中的一个重要概念。它用于识别和分类。为了探索一种更好的方法来在硬件上模拟获得的快速且节能的大脑行为，研究人员需要一种先进的方法，例如神经形态计算。在这种情况下，尖峰神经网络（SNN）成为硬件实现的最佳选择。最近的工作重点是加速 SNN 计算。然而，大多数加速器解决方案都基于CPU加速器架构，由于该结构中复杂的控制流程，该架构的能源效率低下。本文提出了文曲星 22A，这是一种低功耗神经拟态处理器，它结合了通用 CPU 功能和 SNN，可以使用 RISC-V SNN 扩展指令进行高效计算。文曲星22A的主要思想是将SNN计算单元集成到通用CPU的流水线中，通过定制的RISC-V SNN指令版本1.0（RV-SNN V1.0）、Streamlined Leaky Integrate-and-Fire（LIF）模型和二进制随机Spike-timing-dependent-platy（STDP）来实现低功耗计算。文曲星22A源代码在Gitee和GitHub上在线发布。我们将文曲星22A应用到MNIST数据集的识别中，与其他SNN系统进行比较。我们的实验结果表明，文曲星 22A 比加速器解决方案 ODIN 提高了 5.13 倍的能源消耗，分类准确率约为 3 位 ODIN 在线学习的 85.00%，1 位文曲星 22A 的分类准确率为 91.91%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于RISC-V架构的低功耗神经形态处理器Wenquxing 22A，通过集成SNN计算单元实现高效能计算。
AI.motivation: 传统CPU-加速器架构因复杂控制流导致能效低下，需探索更高效的神经形态计算硬件方案。
AI.method: 将SNN计算单元集成至通用CPU流水线，采用RISC-V SNN扩展指令集（RV-SNN V1.0）、简化LIF模型及二值化STDP算法。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集分类任务中，能效较ODIN加速器提升5.13倍，1位Wenquxing 22A准确率达91.91%。
AI.conclusion: 该处理器在保持较高分类精度的同时显著提升能效，开源代码为神经形态计算研究提供新思路。

title: Occlusion-Aware Crowd Navigation Using People as Sensors
title_zh: 使用人作为传感器的遮挡感知人群导航
comment: 7 pages, 01041552993 figures, Accepted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 7 pages, 01041552993 figures, Accepted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Autonomous navigation in crowded spaces poses a challenge for mobile robots due to the highly dynamic, partially observable environment. Occlusions are highly prevalent in such settings due to a limited sensor field of view and obstructing human agents. Previous work has shown that observed interactive behaviors of human agents can be used to estimate potential obstacles despite occlusions. We propose integrating such social inference techniques into the planning pipeline. We use a variational autoencoder with a specially designed loss function to learn representations that are meaningful for occlusion inference. This work adopts a deep reinforcement learning approach to incorporate the learned representation for occlusion-aware planning. In simulation, our occlusion-aware policy achieves comparable collision avoidance performance to fully observable navigation by estimating agents in occluded spaces. We demonstrate successful policy transfer from simulation to the real-world Turtlebot 2i. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to use social occlusion inference for crowd navigation.
summary: Autonomous navigation in crowded spaces poses a challenge for mobile robots due to the highly dynamic, partially observable environment. Occlusions are highly prevalent in such settings due to a limited sensor field of view and obstructing human agents. Previous work has shown that observed interactive behaviors of human agents can be used to estimate potential obstacles despite occlusions. We propose integrating such social inference techniques into the planning pipeline. We use a variational autoencoder with a specially designed loss function to learn representations that are meaningful for occlusion inference. This work adopts a deep reinforcement learning approach to incorporate the learned representation for occlusion-aware planning. In simulation, our occlusion-aware policy achieves comparable collision avoidance performance to fully observable navigation by estimating agents in occluded spaces. We demonstrate successful policy transfer from simulation to the real-world Turtlebot 2i. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to use social occlusion inference for crowd navigation.
abstract_zh: 由于高度动态、部分可观察的环境，拥挤空间中的自主导航对移动机器人提出了挑战。由于传感器视野有限和人类代理人的阻碍，遮挡在此类环境中非常普遍。之前的工作表明，观察到的人类代理的交互行为可以用来估计潜在的障碍，尽管有遮挡。我们建议将此类社会推理技术整合到规划流程中。我们使用具有专门设计的损失函数的变分自动编码器来学习对遮挡推理有意义的表示。这项工作采用深度强化学习方法，将学习到的表示纳入遮挡感知规划中。在模拟中，我们的遮挡感知策略通过估计遮挡空间中的代理，实现了与完全可观察导航相当的防撞性能。我们展示了从模拟到现实世界 Turtlebot 2i 的成功策略转移。据我们所知，这项工作是第一个使用社交遮挡推理进行人群导航的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用人群作为传感器的遮挡感知导航方法，通过社交推理技术解决移动机器人在拥挤环境中因遮挡导致的导航挑战。
AI.motivation: 在拥挤环境中，机器人因传感器视野限制和人类障碍物遮挡导致环境部分可观测，传统方法难以有效避免碰撞。
AI.method: 设计带有特殊损失函数的变分自编码器学习遮挡表征，并结合深度强化学习实现遮挡感知路径规划，最终在仿真与真实 Turtlebot 2i 机器人上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 仿真中遮挡感知策略的避障性能与完全可观测场景相当，成功将策略迁移至真实机器人并验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本工作首次将社交遮挡推理应用于人群导航，为复杂动态环境下的机器人自主导航提供了新思路。
