In simulation, our occlusion-aware policy achieves comparable collision avoidance performance to fully observable navigation by estimating agents in occluded spaces. We demonstrate successful policy transfer from simulation to the real-world Turtlebot 2i. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to use social occlusion inference for crowd navigation. 由于高度动态、部分可观察的环境，拥挤空间中的自主导航对移动机器人提出了挑战。由于传感器视野有限和人类代理人的阻碍，遮挡在此类环境中非常普遍。之前的工作表明，观察到的人类代理的交互行为可以用来估计潜在的障碍，尽管有遮挡。我们建议将此类社会推理技术整合到规划流程中。我们使用具有专门设计的损失函数的变分自动编码器来学习对遮挡推理有意义的表示。这项工作采用深度强化学习方法，将学习到的表示纳入遮挡感知规划中。在模拟中，我们的遮挡感知策略通过估计遮挡空间中的代理，实现了与完全可观察导航相当的防撞性能。我们展示了从模拟到现实世界 Turtlebot 2i 的成功策略转移。据我们所知，这项工作是第一个使用社交遮挡推理进行人群导航的工作。 本文提出了一种利用人群作为传感器的遮挡感知导航方法，通过社交推理技术解决移动机器人在拥挤环境中因遮挡导致的导航挑战。 Ye-Ji Mun,Masha Itkina,Shuijing Liu,Katherine Driggs-Campbell cs.RO,cs.HC,cs.LG

title: Siamese-NAS: Using Trained Samples Efficiently to Find Lightweight Neural Architecture by Prior Knowledge
title_zh: Siamese-NAS：通过先验知识高效使用训练样本寻找轻量级神经架构
abstract: In the past decade, many architectures of convolution neural networks were designed by handcraft, such as Vgg16, ResNet, DenseNet, etc. They all achieve state-of-the-art level on different tasks in their time. However, it still relies on human intuition and experience, and it also takes so much time consumption for trial and error. Neural Architecture Search (NAS) focused on this issue. In recent works, the Neural Predictor has significantly improved with few training architectures as training samples. However, the sampling efficiency is already considerable. In this paper, our proposed Siamese-Predictor is inspired by past works of predictor-based NAS. It is constructed with the proposed Estimation Code, which is the prior knowledge about the training procedure. The proposed Siamese-Predictor gets significant benefits from this idea. This idea causes it to surpass the current SOTA predictor on NASBench-201. In order to explore the impact of the Estimation Code, we analyze the relationship between it and accuracy. We also propose the search space Tiny-NanoBench for lightweight CNN architecture. This well-designed search space is easier to find better architecture with few FLOPs than NASBench-201. In summary, the proposed Siamese-Predictor is a predictor-based NAS. It achieves the SOTA level, especially with limited computation budgets. It applied to the proposed Tiny-NanoBench can just use a few trained samples to find extremely lightweight CNN architecture.

However, it still relies on human intuition and experience, and it also takes so much time consumption for trial and error. Neural Architecture Search (NAS) focused on this issue. In recent works, the Neural Predictor has significantly improved with few training architectures as training samples. However, the sampling efficiency is already considerable. In this paper, our proposed Siamese-Predictor is inspired by past works of predictor-based NAS. It is constructed with the proposed Estimation Code, which is the prior knowledge about the training procedure. The proposed Siamese-Predictor gets significant benefits from this idea. This idea causes it to surpass the current SOTA predictor on NASBench-201. In order to explore the impact of the Estimation Code, we analyze the relationship between it and accuracy. We also propose the search space Tiny-NanoBench for lightweight CNN architecture. This well-designed search space is easier to find better architecture with few FLOPs than NASBench-201. In summary, the proposed Siamese-Predictor is a predictor-based NAS. It achieves the SOTA level, especially with limited computation budgets. It applied to the proposed Tiny-NanoBench can just use a few trained samples to find extremely lightweight CNN architecture.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年里，许多卷积神经网络的架构都是手工设计的，例如Vgg16、ResNet、DenseNet等，它们在不同的任务上都达到了当时最先进的水平。然而，它仍然依赖于人类的直觉和经验，并且还需要花费大量时间进行试错。神经架构搜索（NAS）专注于这个问题。在最近的工作中，神经预测器以很少的训练架构作为训练样本得到了显着的改进。不过，采样效率已经相当可观了。在本文中，我们提出的 Siamese-Predictor 受到过去基于预测器的 NAS 工作的启发。它是用建议的估计代码构建的，这是有关训练过程的先验知识。提议的暹罗预测器从这个想法中获得了显着的好处。这个想法使其超越了 NASBench-201 上当前的 SOTA 预测器。为了探究估计代码的影响，我们分析它与准确性之间的关系。我们还提出了用于轻量级 CNN 架构的搜索空间 Tiny-NanoBench。这个精心设计的搜索空间比 NASBench-201 更容易找到更好的架构，且 FLOP 次数很少。总之，所提出的 Siamese-Predictor 是一个基于预测器的 NAS。它达到了 SOTA 水平，特别是在计算预算有限的情况下。它将其应用于所提出的 Tiny-NanoBench 中，只需使用一些经过训练的样本即可找到极其轻量级的 CNN 架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Siamese-NAS方法，通过引入先验知识的估计码和改进的Siamese-Predictor，在有限计算预算下高效搜索轻量级CNN架构。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN设计依赖人工经验且耗时，现有神经架构搜索（NAS）方法采样效率不足，需提升预测器性能并降低计算成本。
AI.method: 构建包含估计码（先验知识）的Siamese-Predictor，结合Tiny-NanoBench搜索空间，利用少量训练样本预测架构性能。
AI.result: 在NASBench-201上超越现有SOTA预测器，Tiny-NanoBench搜索空间下仅需少量样本即可发现极轻量CNN架构。
AI.conclusion: Siamese-Predictor通过先验知识有效提升NAS效率，配合Tiny-NanoBench可实现低计算成本下的轻量级网络搜索。

authors_text: Jiahuan Ren,Zhao Zhang,Richang Hong,Mingliang Xu,Yi Yang,Shuicheng Yan
title: Seeing Through the Noisy Dark: Towards Real-world Low-Light Image Enhancement and Denoising
title_zh: 透视嘈杂的黑暗：走向现实世界的低光图像增强和去噪
abstract: Low-light image enhancement (LLIE) aims at improving the illumination and visibility of dark images with lighting noise. To handle the real-world low-light images often with heavy and complex noise, some efforts have been made for joint LLIE and denoising, which however only achieve inferior restoration performance. We attribute it to two challenges: 1) in real-world low-light images, noise is somewhat covered by low-lighting and the left noise after denoising would be inevitably amplified during enhancement; 2) conversion of raw data to sRGB would cause information loss and also more noise, and hence prior LLIE methods trained on raw data are unsuitable for more common sRGB images. In this work, we propose a novel Low-light Enhancement & Denoising Network for real-world low-light images (RLED-Net) in the sRGB color space. In RLED-Net, we apply a plug-and-play differentiable Latent Subspace Reconstruction Block (LSRB) to embed the real-world images into low-rank subspaces to suppress the noise and rectify the errors, such that the impact of noise during enhancement can be effectively shrunk. We then present an efficient Crossed-channel & Shift-window Transformer (CST) layer with two branches to calculate the window and channel attentions to resist the degradation (e.g., speckle noise and blur) caused by the noise in input images. Based on the CST layers, we further present a U-structure network CSTNet as backbone for deep feature recovery, and construct a feature refine block to refine the final features. Extensive experiments on both real noisy images and public image databases well verify the effectiveness of the proposed RLED-Net for RLLIE and denoising simultaneously.
summary: Low-light image enhancement (LLIE) aims at improving the illumination and visibility of dark images with lighting noise. To handle the real-world low-light images often with heavy and complex noise, some efforts have been made for joint LLIE and denoising, which however only achieve inferior restoration performance. We attribute it to two challenges: 1) in real-world low-light images, noise is somewhat covered by low-lighting and the left noise after denoising would be inevitably amplified during enhancement; 2) conversion of raw data to sRGB would cause information loss and also more noise, and hence prior LLIE methods trained on raw data are unsuitable for more common sRGB images. In this work, we propose a novel Low-light Enhancement & Denoising Network for real-world low-light images (RLED-Net) in the sRGB color space. In RLED-Net, we apply a plug-and-play differentiable Latent Subspace Reconstruction Block (LSRB) to embed the real-world images into low-rank subspaces to suppress the noise and rectify the errors, such that the impact of noise during enhancement can be effectively shrunk. We then present an efficient Crossed-channel & Shift-window Transformer (CST) layer with two branches to calculate the window and channel attentions to resist the degradation (e.g., speckle noise and blur) caused by the noise in input images. Based on the CST layers, we further present a U-structure network CSTNet as backbone for deep feature recovery, and construct a feature refine block to refine the final features. Extensive experiments on both real noisy images and public image databases well verify the effectiveness of the proposed RLED-Net for RLLIE and denoising simultaneously.
abstract_zh: 低光图像增强（LLIE）旨在提高带有照明噪声的暗图像的照明度和可见度。为了处理现实世界中经常含有大量复杂噪声的低光图像，人们在联合 LLIE 和去噪方面做出了一些努力，但仅取得了较差的恢复性能。我们将其归因于两个挑战：1）在现实世界的低光图像中，噪声在某种程度上被低光掩盖，并且去噪后的剩余噪声在增强过程中不可避免地会被放大； 2) 将原始数据转换为 sRGB 会导致信息丢失并且还会产生更多噪声，因此之前在原始数据上训练的 LLIE 方法不适合更常见的 sRGB 图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的低光增强和去噪网络，用于 sRGB 色彩空间中的真实低光图像 (RLED-Net)。在RLED-Net中，我们应用即插即用的可微分潜在子空间重建块（LSRB）将真实世界图像嵌入到低秩子空间中以抑制噪声并纠正错误，从而可以有效地缩小增强过程中噪声的影响。然后，我们提出了一个高效的交叉通道和移位窗口变换器（CST）层，该层具有两个分支来计算窗口和通道注意力，以抵抗由输入图像中的噪声引起的退化（例如，斑点噪声和模糊）。基于 CST 层，我们进一步提出了一个 U 结构网络 CSTNet 作为深度特征恢复的骨干，并构建了一个特征细化块来细化最终的特征。对真实噪声图像和公共图像数据库的大量实验很好地验证了所提出的 RLED-Net 同时用于 RLLIE 和去噪的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对真实世界低光图像的增强与去噪网络RLED-Net，解决噪声放大和信息丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理真实低光图像时存在噪声放大和sRGB转换导致的信息丢失问题，需更有效的联合增强与去噪方案。
AI.method: 提出RLED-Net网络，包含可插拔的LSRB模块嵌入低秩子空间抑制噪声，并采用CST层通过通道与窗口注意力机制进行特征恢复，构建U型结构CSTNet进行深度特征提取与优化。
AI.result: 在真实噪声图像和公开数据集上验证了RLED-Net在低光增强与去噪任务中的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: RLED-Net通过联合优化增强与去噪流程，有效解决了真实低光图像处理中的噪声干扰与信息丢失问题，为实际应用提供了新方法。

We then present an efficient Crossed-channel & Shift-window Transformer (CST) layer with two branches to calculate the window and channel attentions to resist the degradation (e.g., speckle noise and blur) caused by the noise in input images. Based on the CST layers, we further present a U-structure network CSTNet as backbone for deep feature recovery, and construct a feature refine block to refine the final features. Extensive experiments on both real noisy images and public image databases well verify the effectiveness of the proposed RLED-Net for RLLIE and denoising simultaneously. 低光图像增强（LLIE）旨在提高带有照明噪声的暗图像的照明度和可见度。为了处理现实世界中经常含有大量复杂噪声的低光图像，人们在联合 LLIE 和去噪方面做出了一些努力，但仅取得了较差的恢复性能。我们将其归因于两个挑战：1）在现实世界的低光图像中，噪声在某种程度上被低光掩盖，并且去噪后的剩余噪声在增强过程中不可避免地会被放大； 2) 将原始数据转换为 sRGB 会导致信息丢失并且还会产生更多噪声，因此之前在原始数据上训练的 LLIE 方法不适合更常见的 sRGB 图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的低光增强和去噪网络，用于 sRGB 色彩空间中的真实低光图像 (RLED-Net)。在RLED-Net中，我们应用即插即用的可微分潜在子空间重建块（LSRB）将真实世界图像嵌入到低秩子空间中以抑制噪声并纠正错误，从而可以有效地缩小增强过程中噪声的影响。然后，我们提出了一个高效的交叉通道和移位窗口变换器（CST）层，该层具有两个分支来计算窗口和通道注意力，以抵抗由输入图像中的噪声引起的退化（例如，斑点噪声和模糊）。基于 CST 层，我们进一步提出了一个 U 结构网络 CSTNet 作为深度特征恢复的骨干，并构建了一个特征细化块来细化最终的特征。对真实噪声图像和公共图像数据库的大量实验很好地验证了所提出的 RLED-Net 同时用于 RLLIE 和去噪的有效性。 本文提出一种针对真实世界低光图像的增强与去噪网络RLED-Net，解决噪声放大和信息丢失问题。 Jiahuan Ren,Zhao Zhang,Richang Hong,Mingliang Xu,Yi Yang,Shuicheng Yan cs.CV

title: Semi-autonomous Prosthesis Control Using Minimal Depth Information and Vibrotactile Feedback
title_zh: 使用最小深度信息和振动触觉反馈的半自主假肢控制
abstract: Semi-autonomous prosthesis controllers based on computer vision improve performance while reducing cognitive effort. However, controllers relying on full-depth data face challenges in being deployed as embedded prosthesis controllers due to the computational demands of processing point clouds. To address this, the present study proposes a method to reconstruct the shape of various daily objects from minimal depth data. This is achieved using four concurrent laser scanner lines instead of a full point cloud. These lines represent the partial contours of an object's cross-section, enabling its dimensions and orientation to be reconstructed using simple geometry. A control prototype was implemented using a depth sensor with four laser scanners. Vibrotactile feedback was also designed to help users to correctly aim the sensor at target objects. Ten able-bodied volunteers used a prosthesis equipped with the novel controller to grasp ten objects of varying shapes, sizes, and orientations. For comparison, they also tested an existing benchmark controller that used full-depth information. The results showed that the novel controller handled all objects and, while performance improved with training, it remained slightly below that of the benchmark. This marks an important step towards a compact vision-based system for embedded depth sensing in prosthesis grasping.
summary: Semi-autonomous prosthesis controllers based on computer vision improve performance while reducing cognitive effort. However, controllers relying on full-depth data face challenges in being deployed as embedded prosthesis controllers due to the computational demands of processing point clouds. To address this, the present study proposes a method to reconstruct the shape of various daily objects from minimal depth data. This is achieved using four concurrent laser scanner lines instead of a full point cloud. These lines represent the partial contours of an object's cross-section, enabling its dimensions and orientation to be reconstructed using simple geometry. A control prototype was implemented using a depth sensor with four laser scanners. Vibrotactile feedback was also designed to help users to correctly aim the sensor at target objects. Ten able-bodied volunteers used a prosthesis equipped with the novel controller to grasp ten objects of varying shapes, sizes, and orientations. For comparison, they also tested an existing benchmark controller that used full-depth information. The results showed that the novel controller handled all objects and, while performance improved with training, it remained slightly below that of the benchmark. This marks an important step towards a compact vision-based system for embedded depth sensing in prosthesis grasping.
abstract_zh: 基于计算机视觉的半自主假肢控制器可提高性能，同时减少认知工作。然而，由于处理点云的计算需求，依赖全深度数据的控制器在部署为嵌入式假肢控制器时面临挑战。为了解决这个问题，本研究提出了一种从最小深度数据重建各种日常物体形状的方法。这是使用四个并发激光扫描仪线而不是完整的点云来实现的。这些线代表物体横截面的部分轮廓，从而可以使用简单的几何形状重建其尺寸和方向。使用带有四个激光扫描仪的深度传感器实现了控制原型。振动触觉反馈还旨在帮助用户将传感器正确瞄准目标物体。十名身体健全的志愿者使用配备新型控制器的假肢来抓取十个不同形状、大小和方向的物体。为了进行比较，他们还测试了使用完整深度信息的现有基准控制器。结果表明，新型控制器可以处理所有对象，虽然性能随着训练而提高，但仍略低于基准。这标志着向用于假肢抓取的嵌入式深度传感的紧凑型视觉系统迈出了重要的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最小深度信息和触觉反馈的半自主假肢控制方法，通过简化深度数据处理降低计算需求。
AI.motivation: 传统依赖完整深度数据的假肢控制器因计算量大难以嵌入式部署，需寻找更高效的深度信息处理方案。
AI.method: 使用四线激光扫描仪获取物体截面轮廓，结合几何算法重建物体尺寸和方向，并设计触觉反馈辅助用户对准目标。
AI.result: 新型控制器成功抓取所有测试物体，训练后性能接近但略低于基准全深度控制器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为嵌入式假肢抓取的紧凑型视觉系统提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Comparison of Data Representations and Machine Learning Architectures for User Identification on Arbitrary Motion Sequences
title_zh: 用于任意运动序列的用户识别的数据表示和机器学习架构的比较
abstract: Reliable and robust user identification and authentication are important and often necessary requirements for many digital services. It becomes paramount in social virtual reality (VR) to ensure trust, specifically in digital encounters with lifelike realistic-looking avatars as faithful replications of real persons. Recent research has shown that the movements of users in extended reality (XR) systems carry user-specific information and can thus be used to verify their identities. This article compares three different potential encodings of the motion data from head and hands (scene-relative, body-relative, and body-relative velocities), and the performances of five different machine learning architectures (random forest, multi-layer perceptron, fully recurrent neural network, long-short term memory, gated recurrent unit). We use the publicly available dataset "Talking with Hands" and publish all code to allow reproducibility and to provide baselines for future work. After hyperparameter optimization, the combination of a long-short term memory architecture and body-relative data outperformed competing combinations: the model correctly identifies any of the 34 subjects with an accuracy of 100% within 150 seconds. Altogether, our approach provides an effective foundation for behaviometric-based identification and authentication to guide researchers and practitioners. Data and code are published under https://go.uniwue.de/58w1r.
summary: Reliable and robust user identification and authentication are important and often necessary requirements for many digital services. It becomes paramount in social virtual reality (VR) to ensure trust, specifically in digital encounters with lifelike realistic-looking avatars as faithful replications of real persons. Recent research has shown that the movements of users in extended reality (XR) systems carry user-specific information and can thus be used to verify their identities. This article compares three different potential encodings of the motion data from head and hands (scene-relative, body-relative, and body-relative velocities), and the performances of five different machine learning architectures (random forest, multi-layer perceptron, fully recurrent neural network, long-short term memory, gated recurrent unit). We use the publicly available dataset "Talking with Hands" and publish all code to allow reproducibility and to provide baselines for future work. After hyperparameter optimization, the combination of a long-short term memory architecture and body-relative data outperformed competing combinations: the model correctly identifies any of the 34 subjects with an accuracy of 100% within 150 seconds. Altogether, our approach provides an effective foundation for behaviometric-based identification and authentication to guide researchers and practitioners. Data and code are published under https://go.uniwue.de/58w1r.
abstract_zh: 可靠且强大的用户识别和认证对于许多数字服务来说是重要且通常是必要的要求。在社交虚拟现实 (VR) 中，确保信任变得至关重要，特别是在与栩栩如生、逼真的化身（如真人的忠实复制品）进行数字接触时。最近的研究表明，扩展现实（XR）系统中用户的移动携带了用户特定的信息，因此可以用来验证他们的身份。本文比较了头部和手部运动数据的三种不同潜在编码（场景相对、身体相对和身体相对速度），以及五种不同机器学习架构（随机森林、多层感知器、完全循环神经网络、长期短期记忆、门控循环单元）的性能。我们使用公开的数据集“Talking with Hands”并发布所有代码以实现可重复性并为未来的工作提供基线。经过超参数优化后，长期短期记忆架构和身体相关数据的组合优于竞争组合：该模型在 150 秒内以 100% 的准确度正确识别了 34 名受试者中的任何一个。总而言之，我们的方法为基于行为计量学的识别和认证提供了有效的基础，以指导研究人员和从业者。数据和代码发布在 https://go.uniwue.de/58w1r 下。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种运动数据编码方式与五种机器学习架构在用户识别任务中的性能，旨在为虚拟现实环境中的行为生物识别提供有效方案。
AI.motivation: 虚拟现实场景中需要可靠的用户身份验证机制，而用户运动模式包含独特的生物特征信息，可作为新型认证依据。
AI.method: 采用场景相对/身体相对/身体相对速度三种数据表示，结合随机森林、MLP、LSTM等五种模型，在Talking with Hands数据集上进行超参数优化对比实验。
AI.result: LSTM模型配合身体相对数据表示在150秒内实现34名受试者100%识别准确率，显著优于其他组合方案。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实了运动行为特征用于身份识别的可行性，为VR/AR领域的行为生物识别技术提供了可复现的基准方案。

authors_text: Yubo Cui,Jiayao Shan,Zuoxu Gu,Zhiheng Li,Zheng Fang
title: Exploiting More Information in Sparse Point Cloud for 3D Single Object Tracking
title_zh: 利用稀疏点云中的更多信息进行 3D 单对象跟踪
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL)
comments: Accepted for publication at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL)
abstract: 3D single object tracking is a key task in 3D computer vision. However, the sparsity of point clouds makes it difficult to compute the similarity and locate the object, posing big challenges to the 3D tracker. Previous works tried to solve the problem and improved the tracking performance in some common scenarios, but they usually failed in some extreme sparse scenarios, such as for tracking objects at long distances or partially occluded. To address the above problems, in this letter, we propose a sparse-to-dense and transformer-based framework for 3D single object tracking. First, we transform the 3D sparse points into 3D pillars and then compress them into 2D BEV features to have a dense representation. Then, we propose an attention-based encoder to achieve global similarity computation between template and search branches, which could alleviate the influence of sparsity. Meanwhile, the encoder applies the attention on multi-scale features to compensate for the lack of information caused by the sparsity of point cloud and the single scale of features. Finally, we use set-prediction to track the object through a two-stage decoder which also utilizes attention. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves very promising results on the KITTI and NuScenes datasets.
summary: 3D single object tracking is a key task in 3D computer vision. However, the sparsity of point clouds makes it difficult to compute the similarity and locate the object, posing big challenges to the 3D tracker. Previous works tried to solve the problem and improved the tracking performance in some common scenarios, but they usually failed in some extreme sparse scenarios, such as for tracking objects at long distances or partially occluded. To address the above problems, in this letter, we propose a sparse-to-dense and transformer-based framework for 3D single object tracking. First, we transform the 3D sparse points into 3D pillars and then compress them into 2D BEV features to have a dense representation. Then, we propose an attention-based encoder to achieve global similarity computation between template and search branches, which could alleviate the influence of sparsity. Meanwhile, the encoder applies the attention on multi-scale features to compensate for the lack of information caused by the sparsity of point cloud and the single scale of features. Finally, we use set-prediction to track the object through a two-stage decoder which also utilizes attention. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves very promising results on the KITTI and NuScenes datasets.
abstract_zh: 3D 单目标跟踪是 3D 计算机视觉中的一项关键任务。然而，点云的稀疏性使得计算相似度和定位物体变得困难，给3D跟踪器带来了巨大的挑战。以前的工作试图解决这个问题并提高一些常见场景中的跟踪性能，但在一些极端稀疏的场景中通常会失败，例如跟踪远距离或部分遮挡的物体。为了解决上述问题，在这封信中，我们提出了一种用于 3D 单目标跟踪的稀疏到密集和基于 Transformer 的框架。首先，我们将 3D 稀疏点转换为 3D 柱，然后将它们压缩为 2D BEV 特征以获得密集表示。然后，我们提出了一种基于注意力的编码器来实现模板和搜索分支之间的全局相似性计算，这可以减轻稀疏性的影响。同时，编码器将注意力集中在多尺度特征上，以弥补点云稀疏和特征单一尺度造成的信息缺失。最后，我们使用集合预测通过两级解码器来跟踪对象，该解码器也利用了注意力。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 KITTI 和 NuScenes 数据集上取得了非常有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏点云的3D单目标跟踪方法，旨在解决点云稀疏性导致的相似度计算和目标定位困难问题。
AI.motivation: 点云的稀疏性使得在极端场景（如远距离或部分遮挡）下难以准确计算相似度和定位目标，现有方法在这些场景中表现不足。
AI.method: 提出稀疏到密集的Transformer框架，将3D稀疏点转换为3D柱体并压缩为BEV特征，通过注意力机制编码器实现全局相似度计算，并利用多尺度特征补偿信息缺失，最后采用两阶段解码器进行目标跟踪。
AI.result: 在KITTI和NuScenes数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了该方法在稀疏点云场景下的有效性，取得了有竞争力的跟踪结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过密集表示和注意力机制有效缓解了点云稀疏性带来的挑战，为极端场景下的3D目标跟踪提供了新思路。

authors_text: Junlin Hou,Fan Xiao,Jilan Xu,Yuejie Zhang,Haidong Zou,Rui Feng
title: Deep-OCTA: Ensemble Deep Learning Approaches for Diabetic Retinopathy Analysis on OCTA Images
title_zh: Deep-OCTA：用于 OCTA 图像糖尿病视网膜病变分析的集成深度学习方法
abstract: The ultra-wide optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) has become an important imaging modality in diabetic retinopathy (DR) diagnosis. However, there are few researches focusing on automatic DR analysis using ultra-wide OCTA. In this paper, we present novel and practical deep-learning solutions based on ultra-wide OCTA for the Diabetic Retinopathy Analysis Challenge (DRAC). In the segmentation of DR lesions task, we utilize UNet and UNet++ to segment three lesions with strong data augmentation and model ensemble. In the image quality assessment task, we create an ensemble of InceptionV3, SE-ResNeXt, and Vision Transformer models. Pre-training on the large dataset as well as the hybrid MixUp and CutMix strategy are both adopted to boost the generalization ability of our model. In the DR grading task, we build a Vision Transformer (ViT) and fnd that the ViT model pre-trained on color fundus images serves as a useful substrate for OCTA images. Our proposed methods ranked 4th, 3rd, and 5th on the three leaderboards of DRAC, respectively. The source code will be made available at https://github.com/FDU-VTS/DRAC.
summary: The ultra-wide optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) has become an important imaging modality in diabetic retinopathy (DR) diagnosis. However, there are few researches focusing on automatic DR analysis using ultra-wide OCTA. In this paper, we present novel and practical deep-learning solutions based on ultra-wide OCTA for the Diabetic Retinopathy Analysis Challenge (DRAC). In the segmentation of DR lesions task, we utilize UNet and UNet++ to segment three lesions with strong data augmentation and model ensemble. In the image quality assessment task, we create an ensemble of InceptionV3, SE-ResNeXt, and Vision Transformer models. Pre-training on the large dataset as well as the hybrid MixUp and CutMix strategy are both adopted to boost the generalization ability of our model. In the DR grading task, we build a Vision Transformer (ViT) and fnd that the ViT model pre-trained on color fundus images serves as a useful substrate for OCTA images. Our proposed methods ranked 4th, 3rd, and 5th on the three leaderboards of DRAC, respectively. The source code will be made available at https://github.com/FDU-VTS/DRAC.
abstract_zh: 超宽光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）已成为糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）诊断的重要成像方式。然而，很少有研究关注使用超宽 OCTA 进行自动 DR 分析。在本文中，我们针对糖尿病视网膜病变分析挑战赛 (DRAC) 提出了基于超宽 OCTA 的新颖且实用的深度学习解决方案。在 DR 病变分割任务中，我们利用 UNet 和 UNet++ 通过强大的数据增强和模型集成来分割三个病变。在图像质量评估任务中，我们创建了 InceptionV3、SE-ResNeXt 和 Vision Transformer 模型的集合。采用大数据集预训练以及混合 MixUp 和 CutMix 策略来提高模型的泛化能力。在 DR 分级任务中，我们构建了一个视觉变换器 (ViT)，并发现在彩色眼底图像上预训练的 ViT 模型可以作为 OCTA 图像的有用基底。我们提出的方法在 DRAC 的三个排行榜上分别排名第四、第三和第五。源代码将在 https://github.com/FDU-VTS/DRAC 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于超广角OCTA图像的深度学习方法，用于糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）的分割、图像质量评估和分级任务。
AI.motivation: 超广角OCTA在DR诊断中应用较少，缺乏自动分析方法，需开发有效深度学习模型以提升诊断效率。
AI.method: 采用UNet/UNet++进行病灶分割，结合数据增强与模型集成；使用InceptionV3、SE-ResNeXt和ViT进行图像质量评估，结合预训练与MixUp/CutMix策略；利用预训练ViT模型进行DR分级。
AI.result: 在DRAC挑战赛中，三项任务分别位列第4、3、5名。
AI.conclusion: 集成深度学习方法在OCTA图像的DR分析中表现优异，验证了模型设计与预训练策略的有效性。

authors_text: Ashish Singh,Antonio Bevilacqua,Thach Le Nguyen,Feiyan Hu,Kevin McGuinness,Martin OReilly,Darragh Whelan,Brian Caulfield,Georgiana Ifrim
title: Fast and Robust Video-Based Exercise Classification via Body Pose Tracking and Scalable Multivariate Time Series Classifiers
title_zh: 通过身体姿势跟踪和可扩展的多元时间序列分类器进行快速、稳健的基于视频的运动分类
abstract: Technological advancements have spurred the usage of machine learning based applications in sports science. Physiotherapists, sports coaches and athletes actively look to incorporate the latest technologies in order to further improve performance and avoid injuries. While wearable sensors are very popular, their use is hindered by constraints on battery power and sensor calibration, especially for use cases which require multiple sensors to be placed on the body. Hence, there is renewed interest in video-based data capture and analysis for sports science. In this paper, we present the application of classifying S\&C exercises using video. We focus on the popular Military Press exercise, where the execution is captured with a video-camera using a mobile device, such as a mobile phone, and the goal is to classify the execution into different types. Since video recordings need a lot of storage and computation, this use case requires data reduction, while preserving the classification accuracy and enabling fast prediction. To this end, we propose an approach named BodyMTS to turn video into time series by employing body pose tracking, followed by training and prediction using multivariate time series classifiers. We analyze the accuracy and robustness of BodyMTS and show that it is robust to different types of noise caused by either video quality or pose estimation factors. We compare BodyMTS to state-of-the-art deep learning methods which classify human activity directly from videos and show that BodyMTS achieves similar accuracy, but with reduced running time and model engineering effort. Finally, we discuss some of the practical aspects of employing BodyMTS in this application in terms of accuracy and robustness under reduced data quality and size. We show that BodyMTS achieves an average accuracy of 87\%, which is significantly higher than the accuracy of human domain experts.

Finally, we discuss some of the practical aspects of employing BodyMTS in this application in terms of accuracy and robustness under reduced data quality and size. We show that BodyMTS achieves an average accuracy of 87\%, which is significantly higher than the accuracy of human domain experts.
abstract_zh: 技术进步刺激了基于机器学习的应用在运动科学中的使用。物理治疗师、运动教练和运动员积极寻求采用最新技术，以进一步提高表现并避免受伤。虽然可穿戴传感器非常受欢迎，但它们的使用受到电池电量和传感器校准的限制，特别是对于需要在身体上放置多个传感器的用例。因此，人们对运动科学中基于视频的数据捕获和分析重新产生了兴趣。在本文中，我们介绍了使用视频对 S\&C 练习进行分类的应用。我们重点关注流行的军事新闻演习，其中使用移动设备（例如手机）通过摄像机捕获处决，目标是将处决分为不同类型。由于视频录制需要大量存储和计算，因此该用例需要减少数据，同时保持分类准确性并实现快速预测。为此，我们提出了一种名为 BodyMTS 的方法，通过采用身体姿势跟踪将视频转换为时间序列，然后使用多元时间序列分类器进行训练和预测。我们分析了 BodyMTS 的准确性和鲁棒性，并表明它对由视频质量或姿势估计因素引起的不同类型的噪声具有鲁棒性。我们将 BodyMTS 与直接从视频中对人类活动进行分类的最先进的深度学习方法进行比较，结果表明 BodyMTS 达到了相似的准确性，但运行时间和模型工程工作量都减少了。最后，我们讨论了在此应用中使用 BodyMTS 的一些实际问题，包括在数据质量和大小降低的情况下的准确性和鲁棒性。我们表明 BodyMTS 的平均准确率达到 87%，明显高于人类领域专家的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视频的军事俯卧撑动作分类方法BodyMTS，通过身体姿势跟踪和多元时间序列分类实现高效准确的运动分类。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴传感器存在电池和校准限制，视频分析作为替代方案需解决数据存储与计算量大、分类准确率保持等问题。
AI.method: 利用手机摄像头采集视频，通过身体姿势跟踪提取时间序列特征，采用多元时间序列分类器进行训练与预测，对比深度学习方法验证效果。
AI.result: BodyMTS在低质量数据下保持87%平均准确率，优于人类专家，且运行时间更短、模型工程更简单。
AI.conclusion: BodyMTS在准确率、鲁棒性和效率上优于现有方法，为视频运动分析提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

search_text: Fast and Robust Video-Based Exercise Classification via Body Pose Tracking and Scalable Multivariate Time Series Classifiers 通过身体姿势跟踪和可扩展的多元时间序列分类器进行快速、稳健的基于视频的运动分类 Technological advancements have spurred the usage of machine learning based applications in sports science. Physiotherapists, sports coaches and athletes actively look to incorporate the latest technologies in order to further improve performance and avoid injuries. While wearable sensors are very popular, their use is hindered by constraints on battery power and sensor calibration, especially for use cases which require multiple sensors to be placed on the body. Hence, there is renewed interest in video-based data capture and analysis for sports science. In this paper, we present the application of classifying S\&C exercises using video. We focus on the popular Military Press exercise, where the execution is captured with a video-camera using a mobile device, such as a mobile phone, and the goal is to classify the execution into different types. Since video recordings need a lot of storage and computation, this use case requires data reduction, while preserving the classification accuracy and enabling fast prediction. To this end, we propose an approach named BodyMTS to turn video into time series by employing body pose tracking, followed by training and prediction using multivariate time series classifiers. We analyze the accuracy and robustness of BodyMTS and show that it is robust to different types of noise caused by either video quality or pose estimation factors. We compare BodyMTS to state-of-the-art deep learning methods which classify human activity directly from videos and show that BodyMTS achieves similar accuracy, but with reduced running time and model engineering effort. Finally, we discuss some of the practical aspects of employing BodyMTS in this application in terms of accuracy and robustness under reduced data quality and size. We show that BodyMTS achieves an average accuracy of 87\%, which is significantly higher than the accuracy of human domain experts. 技术进步刺激了基于机器学习的应用在运动科学中的使用。物理治疗师、运动教练和运动员积极寻求采用最新技术，以进一步提高表现并避免受伤。虽然可穿戴传感器非常受欢迎，但它们的使用受到电池电量和传感器校准的限制，特别是对于需要在身体上放置多个传感器的用例。因此，人们对运动科学中基于视频的数据捕获和分析重新产生了兴趣。在本文中，我们介绍了使用视频对 S\&C 练习进行分类的应用。我们重点关注流行的军事新闻演习，其中使用移动设备（例如手机）通过摄像机捕获处决，目标是将处决分为不同类型。由于视频录制需要大量存储和计算，因此该用例需要减少数据，同时保持分类准确性并实现快速预测。为此，我们提出了一种名为 BodyMTS 的方法，通过采用身体姿势跟踪将视频转换为时间序列，然后使用多元时间序列分类器进行训练和预测。我们分析了 BodyMTS 的准确性和鲁棒性，并表明它对由视频质量或姿势估计因素引起的不同类型的噪声具有鲁棒性。我们将 BodyMTS 与直接从视频中对人类活动进行分类的最先进的深度学习方法进行比较，结果表明 BodyMTS 达到了相似的准确性，但运行时间和模型工程工作量都减少了。最后，我们讨论了在此应用中使用 BodyMTS 的一些实际问题，包括在数据质量和大小降低的情况下的准确性和鲁棒性。我们表明 BodyMTS 的平均准确率达到 87%，明显高于人类领域专家的准确率。 本文提出一种基于视频的军事俯卧撑动作分类方法BodyMTS，通过身体姿势跟踪和多元时间序列分类实现高效准确的运动分类。 Ashish Singh,Antonio Bevilacqua,Thach Le Nguyen,Feiyan Hu,Kevin McGuinness,Martin OReilly,Darragh Whelan,Brian Caulfield,Georgiana Ifrim cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kei Nishimaki,Kumpei Ikuta,Yuto Onga,Hitoshi Iyatomi,Kenichi Oishi
title: Loc-VAE: Learning Structurally Localized Representation from 3D Brain MR Images for Content-Based Image Retrieval
title_zh: Loc-VAE：从 3D 大脑 MR 图像中学习结构局部表示，用于基于内容的图像检索
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (IEEE SMC '22)
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (IEEE SMC '22)
abstract: Content-based image retrieval (CBIR) systems are an emerging technology that supports reading and interpreting medical images. Since 3D brain MR images are high dimensional, dimensionality reduction is necessary for CBIR using machine learning techniques. In addition, for a reliable CBIR system, each dimension in the resulting low-dimensional representation must be associated with a neurologically interpretable region. We propose a localized variational autoencoder (Loc-VAE) that provides neuroanatomically interpretable low-dimensional representation from 3D brain MR images for clinical CBIR. Loc-VAE is based on $β$-VAE with the additional constraint that each dimension of the low-dimensional representation corresponds to a local region of the brain. The proposed Loc-VAE is capable of acquiring representation that preserves disease features and is highly localized, even under high-dimensional compression ratios (4096:1). The low-dimensional representation obtained by Loc-VAE improved the locality measure of each dimension by 4.61 points compared to naive $β$-VAE, while maintaining comparable brain reconstruction capability and information about the diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease.
summary: Content-based image retrieval (CBIR) systems are an emerging technology that supports reading and interpreting medical images. Since 3D brain MR images are high dimensional, dimensionality reduction is necessary for CBIR using machine learning techniques. In addition, for a reliable CBIR system, each dimension in the resulting low-dimensional representation must be associated with a neurologically interpretable region. We propose a localized variational autoencoder (Loc-VAE) that provides neuroanatomically interpretable low-dimensional representation from 3D brain MR images for clinical CBIR. Loc-VAE is based on $β$-VAE with the additional constraint that each dimension of the low-dimensional representation corresponds to a local region of the brain. The proposed Loc-VAE is capable of acquiring representation that preserves disease features and is highly localized, even under high-dimensional compression ratios (4096:1). The low-dimensional representation obtained by Loc-VAE improved the locality measure of each dimension by 4.61 points compared to naive $β$-VAE, while maintaining comparable brain reconstruction capability and information about the diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease.
abstract_zh: 基于内容的图像检索（CBIR）系统是一种支持读取和解释医学图像的新兴技术。由于 3D 大脑 MR 图像是高维的，因此使用机器学习技术进行 CBIR 降维是必要的。此外，对于可靠的 CBIR 系统，所得低维表示中的每个维度都必须与神经学可解释区域相关联。我们提出了一种局部变分自动编码器 (Loc-VAE)，它为临床 CBIR 提供来自 3D 大脑 MR 图像的神经解剖学可解释的低维表示。 Loc-VAE 基于 $β$-VAE，并附加约束，即低维表示的每个维度对应于大脑的局部区域。所提出的 Loc-VAE 能够获取保留疾病特征且高度局部化的表示，即使在高维压缩比 (4096:1) 下也是如此。与原始 $β$-VAE 相比，Loc-VAE 获得的低维表示将每个维度的局部性测量提高了 4.61 个点，同时保持了可比较的大脑重建能力和有关阿尔茨海默病诊断的信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Loc-VAE的局部变分自编码器，用于从3D脑部MRI图像中学习结构局部化的低维表示，以提高基于内容的医学图像检索系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于3D脑部MRI图像具有高维特性，需要进行降维以实现基于内容的图像检索（CBIR）。同时，低维表示的每个维度应与神经解剖学上可解释的脑区相关联，以确保CBIR系统的可靠性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于β-VAE的Loc-VAE方法，并添加了额外约束，使得低维表示的每个维度对应于脑部的一个局部区域，从而实现具有神经解剖学可解释性的低维表示。
AI.result: Loc-VAE在高维压缩比（4096:1）下仍能保留疾病特征并实现高度局部化的表示，其局部性度量比普通的β-VAE提高了4.61分，同时保持了相似的脑部重建能力和阿尔茨海默病诊断信息。
AI.conclusion: Loc-VAE为临床CBIR提供了一种有效且具有神经解剖学可解释性的低维表示方法，显著提升了图像检索的局部性度量，具有重要的临床应用价值。

The proposed Loc-VAE is capable of acquiring representation that preserves disease features and is highly localized, even under high-dimensional compression ratios (4096:1). authors_text: Christian M. Dahl,Torben S. D. Johansen,Emil N. Sørensen,Christian E. Westermann,Simon F. Wittrock
title: DARE: A large-scale handwritten date recognition system
title_zh: DARE：大规模手写日期识别系统
abstract: Handwritten text recognition for historical documents is an important task but it remains difficult due to a lack of sufficient training data in combination with a large variability of writing styles and degradation of historical documents. While recurrent neural network architectures are commonly used for handwritten text recognition, they are often computationally expensive to train and the benefit of recurrence drastically differs by task. For these reasons, it is important to consider non-recurrent architectures. In the context of handwritten date recognition, we propose an architecture based on the EfficientNetV2 class of models that is fast to train, robust to parameter choices, and accurately transcribes handwritten dates from a number of sources. For training, we introduce a database containing almost 10 million tokens, originating from more than 2.2 million handwritten dates which are segmented from different historical documents. As dates are some of the most common information on historical documents, and with historical archives containing millions of such documents, the efficient and automatic transcription of dates has the potential to lead to significant cost-savings over manual transcription. We show that training on handwritten text with high variability in writing styles result in robust models for general handwritten text recognition and that transfer learning from the DARE system increases transcription accuracy substantially, allowing one to obtain high accuracy even when using a relatively small training sample.
summary: Handwritten text recognition for historical documents is an important task but it remains difficult due to a lack of sufficient training data in combination with a large variability of writing styles and degradation of historical documents. While recurrent neural network architectures are commonly used for handwritten text recognition, they are often computationally expensive to train and the benefit of recurrence drastically differs by task. For these reasons, it is important to consider non-recurrent architectures. In the context of handwritten date recognition, we propose an architecture based on the EfficientNetV2 class of models that is fast to train, robust to parameter choices, and accurately transcribes handwritten dates from a number of sources. For training, we introduce a database containing almost 10 million tokens, originating from more than 2.2 million handwritten dates which are segmented from different historical documents. As dates are some of the most common information on historical documents, and with historical archives containing millions of such documents, the efficient and automatic transcription of dates has the potential to lead to significant cost-savings over manual transcription. We show that training on handwritten text with high variability in writing styles result in robust models for general handwritten text recognition and that transfer learning from the DARE system increases transcription accuracy substantially, allowing one to obtain high accuracy even when using a relatively small training sample.
abstract_zh: 历史文献的手写文本识别是一项重要的任务，但由于缺乏足够的训练数据，加上书写风格的巨大变化和历史文献的退化，它仍然很困难。虽然循环神经网络架构通常用于手写文本识别，但训练它们的计算成本通常很高，而且循环的好处因任务而异。由于这些原因，考虑非循环架构非常重要。在手写日期识别的背景下，我们提出了一种基于 EfficientNetV2 类模型的架构，该架构可以快速训练、对参数选择具有鲁棒性，并且可以准确地转录来自多个来源的手写日期。为了训练，我们引入了一个包含近 1000 万个标记的数据库，这些标记源自超过 220 万个手写日期，这些日期是从不同的历史文档中分段的。由于日期是历史文档中最常见的一些信息，并且历史档案包含数百万个此类文档，因此高效且自动的日期转录有可能比手动转录显着节省成本。我们表明，对书写风格高度可变的手写文本进行训练可以产生用于一般手写文本识别的稳健模型，并且 DARE 系统的迁移学习大大提高了转录准确性，即使在使用相对较小的训练样本时也能获得较高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DARE系统，基于EfficientNetV2架构实现高效的手写日期识别，并构建了包含1000万标记的大型数据集。
AI.motivation: 历史文件手写文字识别因数据不足和书写风格多样性面临挑战，传统循环网络训练成本高且效果不稳定，需探索非循环架构解决方案。
AI.method: 采用EfficientNetV2构建非循环模型架构，构建包含220万手写日期分割的1000万标记数据集，并通过迁移学习提升小样本场景下的识别准确率。
AI.result: 模型在多样化书写风格数据上表现稳健，迁移学习使小样本训练下准确率显著提升，验证了系统在历史文档日期识别中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DARE系统为历史文件自动化转录提供高效解决方案，其数据集和迁移学习策略可推广至通用手写文字识别任务，具有显著成本优势。

search_text: DARE: A large-scale handwritten date recognition system DARE：大规模手写日期识别系统 Handwritten text recognition for historical documents is an important task but it remains difficult due to a lack of sufficient training data in combination with a large variability of writing styles and degradation of historical documents. While recurrent neural network architectures are commonly used for handwritten text recognition, they are often computationally expensive to train and the benefit of recurrence drastically differs by task. For these reasons, it is important to consider non-recurrent architectures. In the context of handwritten date recognition, we propose an architecture based on the EfficientNetV2 class of models that is fast to train, robust to parameter choices, and accurately transcribes handwritten dates from a number of sources. For training, we introduce a database containing almost 10 million tokens, originating from more than 2.2 million handwritten dates which are segmented from different historical documents. As dates are some of the most common information on historical documents, and with historical archives containing millions of such documents, the efficient and automatic transcription of dates has the potential to lead to significant cost-savings over manual transcription. We show that training on handwritten text with high variability in writing styles result in robust models for general handwritten text recognition and that transfer learning from the DARE system increases transcription accuracy substantially, allowing one to obtain high accuracy even when using a relatively small training sample. 历史文献的手写文本识别是一项重要的任务，但由于缺乏足够的训练数据，加上书写风格的巨大变化和历史文献的退化，它仍然很困难。虽然循环神经网络架构通常用于手写文本识别，但训练它们的计算成本通常很高，而且循环的好处因任务而异。由于这些原因，考虑非循环架构非常重要。在手写日期识别的背景下，我们提出了一种基于 EfficientNetV2 类模型的架构，该架构可以快速训练、对参数选择具有鲁棒性，并且可以准确地转录来自多个来源的手写日期。为了训练，我们引入了一个包含近 1000 万个标记的数据库，这些标记源自超过 220 万个手写日期，这些日期是从不同的历史文档中分段的。由于日期是历史文档中最常见的一些信息，并且历史档案包含数百万个此类文档，因此高效且自动的日期转录有可能比手动转录显着节省成本。我们表明，对书写风格高度可变的手写文本进行训练可以产生用于一般手写文本识别的稳健模型，并且 DARE 系统的迁移学习大大提高了转录准确性，即使在使用相对较小的训练样本时也能获得较高的准确性。 本文提出DARE系统，基于EfficientNetV2架构实现高效的手写日期识别，并构建了包含1000万标记的大型数据集。 Christian M. authors_text: Massimo Stella,Salvatore Citraro,Giulio Rossetti,Daniele Marinazzo,Yoed N. Kenett,Michael S. Vitevitch
title: Cognitive modelling with multilayer networks: Insights, advancements and future challenges
title_zh: 多层网络认知建模：见解、进步和未来挑战
abstract: The mental lexicon is a complex cognitive system representing information about the words/concepts that one knows. Decades of psychological experiments have shown that conceptual associations across multiple, interactive cognitive levels can greatly influence word acquisition, storage, and processing. How can semantic, phonological, syntactic, and other types of conceptual associations be mapped within a coherent mathematical framework to study how the mental lexicon works? We here review cognitive multilayer networks as a promising quantitative and interpretative framework for investigating the mental lexicon. Cognitive multilayer networks can map multiple types of information at once, thus capturing how different layers of associations might co-exist within the mental lexicon and influence cognitive processing. This review starts with a gentle introduction to the structure and formalism of multilayer networks. We then discuss quantitative mechanisms of psychological phenomena that could not be observed in single-layer networks and were only unveiled by combining multiple layers of the lexicon: (i) multiplex viability highlights language kernels and facilitative effects of knowledge processing in healthy and clinical populations; (ii) multilayer community detection enables contextual meaning reconstruction depending on psycholinguistic features; (iii) layer analysis can mediate latent interactions of mediation, suppression and facilitation for lexical access. By outlining novel quantitative perspectives where multilayer networks can shed light on cognitive knowledge representations, also in next-generation brain/mind models, we discuss key limitations and promising directions for cutting-edge future research.
summary: The mental lexicon is a complex cognitive system representing information about the words/concepts that one knows. Decades of psychological experiments have shown that conceptual associations across multiple, interactive cognitive levels can greatly influence word acquisition, storage, and processing. How can semantic, phonological, syntactic, and other types of conceptual associations be mapped within a coherent mathematical framework to study how the mental lexicon works? We here review cognitive multilayer networks as a promising quantitative and interpretative framework for investigating the mental lexicon. Cognitive multilayer networks can map multiple types of information at once, thus capturing how different layers of associations might co-exist within the mental lexicon and influence cognitive processing. This review starts with a gentle introduction to the structure and formalism of multilayer networks. We then discuss quantitative mechanisms of psychological phenomena that could not be observed in single-layer networks and were only unveiled by combining multiple layers of the lexicon: (i) multiplex viability highlights language kernels and facilitative effects of knowledge processing in healthy and clinical populations; (ii) multilayer community detection enables contextual meaning reconstruction depending on psycholinguistic features; (iii) layer analysis can mediate latent interactions of mediation, suppression and facilitation for lexical access. By outlining novel quantitative perspectives where multilayer networks can shed light on cognitive knowledge representations, also in next-generation brain/mind models, we discuss key limitations and promising directions for cutting-edge future research.
abstract_zh: 心理词典是一个复杂的认知系统，代表人们所知道的单词/概念的信息。数十年的心理学实验表明，跨多个交互式认知水平的概念关联可以极大地影响单词的获取、存储和处理。如何将语义、语音、句法和其他类型的概念关联映射到一个连贯的数学框架内，以研究心理词典的工作原理？我们在这里回顾认知多层网络作为研究心理词典的有前途的定量和解释框架。认知多层网络可以同时映射多种类型的信息，从而捕获不同层的关联如何在心理词典中共存并影响认知处理。本综述首先简要介绍多层网络的结构和形式。然后，我们讨论了在单层网络中无法观察到的心理现象的定量机制，这些机制只能通过组合多层词典才能揭示：（i）多重可行性突出了健康和临床人群中的语言核心和知识处理的促进作用； (ii) 多层社区检测能够根据心理语言学特征重建语境意义； (iii) 层次分析可以调节词汇访问的中介、抑制和促进之间的潜在相互作用。通过概述多层网络可以在下一代大脑/心智模型中阐明认知知识表示的新颖的定量视角，我们讨论了未来前沿研究的关键局限性和有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多层网络在认知建模中的应用，探讨其如何揭示心理词汇的多层关联结构及认知处理机制。
AI.motivation: 传统单层网络难以捕捉语义、语音、句法等多层认知关联，而多层网络能提供更全面的框架以解析心理词汇的复杂性。
AI.method: 通过回顾多层网络的结构与数学形式，结合心理语言学实验数据，分析多层关联对词汇获取、存储及处理的影响机制。
AI.result: 多层网络揭示了单层模型无法观测的现象，包括语言核心识别、上下文意义重建及潜在线性交互作用，为认知模型提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: 多层网络为研究认知知识表征和下一代脑/心智模型提供了量化工具，但需进一步解决数据整合与计算复杂性等挑战。

authors_text: Yifu Yuan,Jianye Hao,Fei Ni,Yao Mu,Yan Zheng,Yujing Hu,Jinyi Liu,Yingfeng Chen,Changjie Fan
title: EUCLID: Towards Efficient Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning with Multi-choice Dynamics Model
title_zh: EUCLID：利用多选择动态模型实现高效无监督强化学习
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Unsupervised reinforcement learning (URL) poses a promising paradigm to learn useful behaviors in a task-agnostic environment without the guidance of extrinsic rewards to facilitate the fast adaptation of various downstream tasks. Previous works focused on the pre-training in a model-free manner while lacking the study of transition dynamics modeling that leaves a large space for the improvement of sample efficiency in downstream tasks. To this end, we propose an Efficient Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning Framework with Multi-choice Dynamics model (EUCLID), which introduces a novel model-fused paradigm to jointly pre-train the dynamics model and unsupervised exploration policy in the pre-training phase, thus better leveraging the environmental samples and improving the downstream task sampling efficiency. However, constructing a generalizable model which captures the local dynamics under different behaviors remains a challenging problem. We introduce the multi-choice dynamics model that covers different local dynamics under different behaviors concurrently, which uses different heads to learn the state transition under different behaviors during unsupervised pre-training and selects the most appropriate head for prediction in the downstream task. Experimental results in the manipulation and locomotion domains demonstrate that EUCLID achieves state-of-the-art performance with high sample efficiency, basically solving the state-based URLB benchmark and reaching a mean normalized score of 104.0$\pm$1.2$\%$ in downstream tasks with 100k fine-tuning steps, which is equivalent to DDPG's performance at 2M interactive steps with 20x more data.
summary: Unsupervised reinforcement learning (URL) poses a promising paradigm to learn useful behaviors in a task-agnostic environment without the guidance of extrinsic rewards to facilitate the fast adaptation of various downstream tasks. Previous works focused on the pre-training in a model-free manner while lacking the study of transition dynamics modeling that leaves a large space for the improvement of sample efficiency in downstream tasks. To this end, we propose an Efficient Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning Framework with Multi-choice Dynamics model (EUCLID), which introduces a novel model-fused paradigm to jointly pre-train the dynamics model and unsupervised exploration policy in the pre-training phase, thus better leveraging the environmental samples and improving the downstream task sampling efficiency. However, constructing a generalizable model which captures the local dynamics under different behaviors remains a challenging problem. We introduce the multi-choice dynamics model that covers different local dynamics under different behaviors concurrently, which uses different heads to learn the state transition under different behaviors during unsupervised pre-training and selects the most appropriate head for prediction in the downstream task. Experimental results in the manipulation and locomotion domains demonstrate that EUCLID achieves state-of-the-art performance with high sample efficiency, basically solving the state-based URLB benchmark and reaching a mean normalized score of 104.0$\pm$1.2$\%$ in downstream tasks with 100k fine-tuning steps, which is equivalent to DDPG's performance at 2M interactive steps with 20x more data.
abstract_zh: 无监督强化学习（URL）提出了一种有前途的范例，可以在任务无关的环境中学习有用的行为，而无需外部奖励的指导，以促进各种下游任务的快速适应。以往的工作主要集中在无模型的预训练上，缺乏对过渡动力学建模的研究，这为下游任务中样本效率的提升留下了很大的空间。为此，我们提出了一种具有多选择动态模型的高效无监督强化学习框架（EUCLID），该框架引入了一种新颖的模型融合范式，在预训练阶段联合预训练动态模型和无监督探索策略，从而更好地利用环境样本并提高下游任务采样效率。然而，构建一个可概括的模型来捕获不同行为下的局部动态仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们引入了同时涵盖不同行为下的不同局部动态的多选择动力学模型，该模型在无监督预训练期间使用不同的头来学习不同行为下的状态转换，并在下游任务中选择最合适的头进行预测。操纵和运动领域的实验结果表明，EUCLID 以高样本效率实现了最先进的性能，基本上解决了基于状态的 URLB 基准，并在具有 100k 微调步骤的下游任务中达到了 104.0$\pm$1.2$\%$ 的平均归一化分数，这相当于 DDPG 在 2M 交互步骤和 20 倍以上数据下的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EUCLID框架，通过多选择动力学模型提升无监督强化学习的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督强化学习方法缺乏对转移动力学建模的研究，导致下游任务样本效率不足。
AI.method: 设计模型融合范式，联合预训练动力学模型与探索策略，采用多选择动力学模型并行学习不同行为的局部动力学。
AI.result: 在操作与运动领域达到SOTA性能，解决URLB基准测试，下游任务100k微调步数得分104.0±1.2%，数据效率较DDPG提升20倍。
AI.conclusion: EUCLID通过动力学模型与策略的联合预训练，有效提升了无监督强化学习的样本效率与任务适应性。

search_text: EUCLID: Towards Efficient Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning with Multi-choice Dynamics Model EUCLID：利用多选择动态模型实现高效无监督强化学习 Unsupervised reinforcement learning (URL) poses a promising paradigm to learn useful behaviors in a task-agnostic environment without the guidance of extrinsic rewards to facilitate the fast adaptation of various downstream tasks. Previous works focused on the pre-training in a model-free manner while lacking the study of transition dynamics modeling that leaves a large space for the improvement of sample efficiency in downstream tasks. To this end, we propose an Efficient Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning Framework with Multi-choice Dynamics model (EUCLID), which introduces a novel model-fused paradigm to jointly pre-train the dynamics model and unsupervised exploration policy in the pre-training phase, thus better leveraging the environmental samples and improving the downstream task sampling efficiency. However, constructing a generalizable model which captures the local dynamics under different behaviors remains a challenging problem. We introduce the multi-choice dynamics model that covers different local dynamics under different behaviors concurrently, which uses different heads to learn the state transition under different behaviors during unsupervised pre-training and selects the most appropriate head for prediction in the downstream task. Experimental results in the manipulation and locomotion domains demonstrate that EUCLID achieves state-of-the-art performance with high sample efficiency, basically solving the state-based URLB benchmark and reaching a mean normalized score of 104.0$\pm$1.2$\%$ in downstream tasks with 100k fine-tuning steps, which is equivalent to DDPG's performance at 2M interactive steps with 20x more data. 无监督强化学习（URL）提出了一种有前途的范例，可以在任务无关的环境中学习有用的行为，而无需外部奖励的指导，以促进各种下游任务的快速适应。以往的工作主要集中在无模型的预训练上，缺乏对过渡动力学建模的研究，这为下游任务中样本效率的提升留下了很大的空间。为此，我们提出了一种具有多选择动态模型的高效无监督强化学习框架（EUCLID），该框架引入了一种新颖的模型融合范式，在预训练阶段联合预训练动态模型和无监督探索策略，从而更好地利用环境样本并提高下游任务采样效率。然而，构建一个可概括的模型来捕获不同行为下的局部动态仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们引入了同时涵盖不同行为下的不同局部动态的多选择动力学模型，该模型在无监督预训练期间使用不同的头来学习不同行为下的状态转换，并在下游任务中选择最合适的头进行预测。操纵和运动领域的实验结果表明，EUCLID 以高样本效率实现了最先进的性能，基本上解决了基于状态的 URLB 基准，并在具有 100k 微调步骤的下游任务中达到了 104.0$\pm$1.2$\%$ 的平均归一化分数，这相当于 DDPG 在 2M 交互步骤和 20 倍以上数据下的性能。 本文提出EUCLID框架，通过多选择动力学模型提升无监督强化学习的样本效率。 Yifu Yuan,Jianye Hao,Fei Ni,Yao Mu,Yan Zheng,Yujing Hu,Jinyi Liu,Yingfeng Chen,Changjie Fan cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Xinhang Liu,Jiaben Chen,Huai Yu,Yu-Wing Tai,Chi-Keung Tang
title: Unsupervised Multi-View Object Segmentation Using Radiance Field Propagation
title_zh: 使用辐射场传播的无监督多视图对象分割
abstract: We present radiance field propagation (RFP), a novel approach to segmenting objects in 3D during reconstruction given only unlabeled multi-view images of a scene. RFP is derived from emerging neural radiance field-based techniques, which jointly encodes semantics with appearance and geometry. The core of our method is a novel propagation strategy for individual objects' radiance fields with a bidirectional photometric loss, enabling an unsupervised partitioning of a scene into salient or meaningful regions corresponding to different object instances. To better handle complex scenes with multiple objects and occlusions, we further propose an iterative expectation-maximization algorithm to refine object masks. RFP is one of the first unsupervised approach for tackling 3D real scene object segmentation for neural radiance field (NeRF) without any supervision, annotations, or other cues such as 3D bounding boxes and prior knowledge of object class. Experiments demonstrate that RFP achieves feasible segmentation results that are more accurate than previous unsupervised image/scene segmentation approaches, and are comparable to existing supervised NeRF-based methods. The segmented object representations enable individual 3D object editing operations.
summary: We present radiance field propagation (RFP), a novel approach to segmenting objects in 3D during reconstruction given only unlabeled multi-view images of a scene. RFP is derived from emerging neural radiance field-based techniques, which jointly encodes semantics with appearance and geometry. The core of our method is a novel propagation strategy for individual objects' radiance fields with a bidirectional photometric loss, enabling an unsupervised partitioning of a scene into salient or meaningful regions corresponding to different object instances. To better handle complex scenes with multiple objects and occlusions, we further propose an iterative expectation-maximization algorithm to refine object masks. RFP is one of the first unsupervised approach for tackling 3D real scene object segmentation for neural radiance field (NeRF) without any supervision, annotations, or other cues such as 3D bounding boxes and prior knowledge of object class. Experiments demonstrate that RFP achieves feasible segmentation results that are more accurate than previous unsupervised image/scene segmentation approaches, and are comparable to existing supervised NeRF-based methods. The segmented object representations enable individual 3D object editing operations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了辐射场传播 (RFP)，这是一种在仅给定场景的未标记多视图图像的情况下在重建过程中分割 3D 对象的新颖方法。 RFP 源自新兴的基于神经辐射场的技术，该技术将语义与外观和几何结构联合编码。我们方法的核心是一种新颖的传播策略，用于具有双向光度损失的单个对象的辐射场，从而能够将场景无监督地划分为与不同对象实例相对应的显着或有意义的区域。为了更好地处理具有多个对象和遮挡的复杂场景，我们进一步提出了一种迭代期望最大化算法来细化对象掩模。 RFP 是第一个用于处理神经辐射场 (NeRF) 3D 真实场景对象分割的无监督方法之一，无需任何监督、注释或其他线索（例如 3D 边界框和对象类先验知识）。实验表明，RFP 实现了可行的分割结果，比以前的无监督图像/场景分割方法更准确，并且与现有的基于 NeRF 的监督方法相当。分段的对象表示支持单独的 3D 对象编辑操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的多视角物体分割方法RFP，通过辐射场传播技术实现3D场景中物体的无监督分割。
AI.motivation: 现有神经辐射场（NeRF）分割方法依赖监督数据或先验标注，而实际场景中获取标注成本高昂。本文旨在开发无需标注、能处理复杂遮挡场景的无监督分割方案。
AI.method: 基于NeRF框架，设计双向光度损失驱动的辐射场传播策略，结合迭代期望最大化算法优化物体掩码，实现多视角图像中物体的语义分割与几何重建。
AI.result: 实验表明RFP分割精度优于现有无监督方法，可与监督NeRF方法媲美，且支持分割后独立3D物体编辑操作。
AI.conclusion: RFP是首个无需监督的NeRF物体分割方法，有效解决了多物体遮挡场景的分割难题，为无监督3D场景理解提供了新思路。

title: Compositional Generalization in Unsupervised Compositional Representation Learning: A Study on Disentanglement and Emergent Language
title_zh: 无监督作文表征学习中的作文泛化：解缠结和涌现语言的研究
abstract: Deep learning models struggle with compositional generalization, i.e. the ability to recognize or generate novel combinations of observed elementary concepts. In hopes of enabling compositional generalization, various unsupervised learning algorithms have been proposed with inductive biases that aim to induce compositional structure in learned representations (e.g. disentangled representation and emergent language learning). In this work, we evaluate these unsupervised learning algorithms in terms of how well they enable compositional generalization. Specifically, our evaluation protocol focuses on whether or not it is easy to train a simple model on top of the learned representation that generalizes to new combinations of compositional factors. We systematically study three unsupervised representation learning algorithms - $β$-VAE, $β$-TCVAE, and emergent language (EL) autoencoders - on two datasets that allow directly testing compositional generalization. We find that directly using the bottleneck representation with simple models and few labels may lead to worse generalization than using representations from layers before or after the learned representation itself. In addition, we find that the previously proposed metrics for evaluating the levels of compositionality are not correlated with actual compositional generalization in our framework. Surprisingly, we find that increasing pressure to produce a disentangled representation produces representations with worse generalization, while representations from EL models show strong compositional generalization. Taken together, our results shed new light on the compositional generalization behavior of different unsupervised learning algorithms with a new setting to rigorously test this behavior, and suggest the potential benefits of delevoping EL learning algorithms for more generalizable representations.
summary: Deep learning models struggle with compositional generalization, i.e. the ability to recognize or generate novel combinations of observed elementary concepts. In hopes of enabling compositional generalization, various unsupervised learning algorithms have been proposed with inductive biases that aim to induce compositional structure in learned representations (e.g. disentangled representation and emergent language learning). In this work, we evaluate these unsupervised learning algorithms in terms of how well they enable compositional generalization. Specifically, our evaluation protocol focuses on whether or not it is easy to train a simple model on top of the learned representation that generalizes to new combinations of compositional factors. We systematically study three unsupervised representation learning algorithms - $β$-VAE, $β$-TCVAE, and emergent language (EL) autoencoders - on two datasets that allow directly testing compositional generalization. We find that directly using the bottleneck representation with simple models and few labels may lead to worse generalization than using representations from layers before or after the learned representation itself. In addition, we find that the previously proposed metrics for evaluating the levels of compositionality are not correlated with actual compositional generalization in our framework. Surprisingly, we find that increasing pressure to produce a disentangled representation produces representations with worse generalization, while representations from EL models show strong compositional generalization. Taken together, our results shed new light on the compositional generalization behavior of different unsupervised learning algorithms with a new setting to rigorously test this behavior, and suggest the potential benefits of delevoping EL learning algorithms for more generalizable representations.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型与组合泛化（即识别或生成观察到的基本概念的新颖组合的能力）作斗争。为了实现组合泛化，人们提出了各种具有归纳偏差的无监督学习算法，旨在诱导学习表示中的组合结构（例如解缠结表示和涌现语言学习）。在这项工作中，我们根据这些无监督学习算法实现组合泛化的程度来评估它们。具体来说，我们的评估协议重点关注是否容易在学习到的表示之上训练一个简单的模型，该模型可以推广到新的组成因素组合。我们在两个允许直接测试组合泛化的数据集上系统地研究了三种无监督表示学习算法 - $β$-VAE、$β$-TCVAE 和涌现语言 (EL) 自动编码器。我们发现，与使用学习表示本身之前或之后的层的表示相比，直接使用具有简单模型和很少标签的瓶颈表示可能会导致更差的泛化能力。此外，我们发现之前提出的用于评估组合性水平的指标与我们框架中的实际组合概括并不相关。令人惊讶的是，我们发现，产生解纠缠表示的压力越来越大，会产生泛化能力较差的表示，而 EL 模型的表示则表现出很强的组合泛化能力。总而言之，我们的结果为不同无监督学习算法的组合泛化行为提供了新的线索，并通过新的设置来严格测试这种行为，并提出了开发 EL 学习算法以获得更泛化表示的潜在好处。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了三种无监督表征学习算法（β-VAE、β-TCVAE和生成语言模型）在组合泛化任务中的表现，通过实验分析其表征能力与组合泛化的关系。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在组合泛化（即识别或生成新概念组合）上表现不足，现有无监督方法（如解耦表征和生成语言）可能通过归纳偏置提升该能力，但需系统验证。
AI.method: 在两个支持直接测试组合泛化的数据集上，系统评估三种算法的表征效果，分析不同层次表征对泛化的影响，并检验现有组合性评估指标的有效性。
AI.result: 瓶颈表征在简单模型中泛化效果不佳，解耦压力反而降低泛化能力，而生成语言模型表征表现出强组合泛化能力，现有指标与实际泛化能力无显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 生成语言学习算法可能更利于可泛化的组合表征，现有解耦评估指标需重新审视，研究为无监督组合泛化提供了新实验框架与方向。

search_text: Compositional Generalization in Unsupervised Compositional Representation Learning: A Study on Disentanglement and Emergent Language 无监督作文表征学习中的作文泛化：解缠结和涌现语言的研究 Deep learning models struggle with compositional generalization, i.e. the ability to recognize or generate novel combinations of observed elementary concepts. In hopes of enabling compositional generalization, various unsupervised learning algorithms have been proposed with inductive biases that aim to induce compositional structure in learned representations (e.g. disentangled representation and emergent language learning). In this work, we evaluate these unsupervised learning algorithms in terms of how well they enable compositional generalization. Specifically, our evaluation protocol focuses on whether or not it is easy to train a simple model on top of the learned representation that generalizes to new combinations of compositional factors. We systematically study three unsupervised representation learning algorithms - $β$-VAE, $β$-TCVAE, and emergent language (EL) autoencoders - on two datasets that allow directly testing compositional generalization. We find that directly using the bottleneck representation with simple models and few labels may lead to worse generalization than using representations from layers before or after the learned representation itself. In addition, we find that the previously proposed metrics for evaluating the levels of compositionality are not correlated with actual compositional generalization in our framework. Surprisingly, we find that increasing pressure to produce a disentangled representation produces representations with worse generalization, while representations from EL models show strong compositional generalization. Taken together, our results shed new light on the compositional generalization behavior of different unsupervised learning algorithms with a new setting to rigorously test this behavior, and suggest the potential benefits of delevoping EL learning algorithms for more generalizable representations. 深度学习模型与组合泛化（即识别或生成观察到的基本概念的新颖组合的能力）作斗争。为了实现组合泛化，人们提出了各种具有归纳偏差的无监督学习算法，旨在诱导学习表示中的组合结构（例如解缠结表示和涌现语言学习）。在这项工作中，我们根据这些无监督学习算法实现组合泛化的程度来评估它们。具体来说，我们的评估协议重点关注是否容易在学习到的表示之上训练一个简单的模型，该模型可以推广到新的组成因素组合。我们在两个允许直接测试组合泛化的数据集上系统地研究了三种无监督表示学习算法 - $β$-VAE、$β$-TCVAE 和涌现语言 (EL) 自动编码器。我们发现，与使用学习表示本身之前或之后的层的表示相比，直接使用具有简单模型和很少标签的瓶颈表示可能会导致更差的泛化能力。此外，我们发现之前提出的用于评估组合性水平的指标与我们框架中的实际组合概括并不相关。令人惊讶的是，我们发现，产生解纠缠表示的压力越来越大，会产生泛化能力较差的表示，而 EL 模型的表示则表现出很强的组合泛化能力。总而言之，我们的结果为不同无监督学习算法的组合泛化行为提供了新的线索，并通过新的设置来严格测试这种行为，并提出了开发 EL 学习算法以获得更泛化表示的潜在好处。 本文评估了三种无监督表征学习算法（β-VAE、β-TCVAE和生成语言模型）在组合泛化任务中的表现，通过实验分析其表征能力与组合泛化的关系。 Zhenlin Xu,Marc Niethammer,Colin Raffel cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Fast OT for Latent Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 用于潜在域适应的快速 OT
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of unsupervised Domain Adaptation. The need for such an adaptation arises when the distribution of the target data differs from that which is used to develop the model and the ground truth information of the target data is unknown. We propose an algorithm that uses optimal transport theory with a verifiably efficient and implementable solution to learn the best latent feature representation. This is achieved by minimizing the cost of transporting the samples from the target domain to the distribution of the source domain.
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of unsupervised Domain Adaptation. The need for such an adaptation arises when the distribution of the target data differs from that which is used to develop the model and the ground truth information of the target data is unknown. We propose an algorithm that uses optimal transport theory with a verifiably efficient and implementable solution to learn the best latent feature representation. This is achieved by minimizing the cost of transporting the samples from the target domain to the distribution of the source domain.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了无监督域适应的问题。当目标数据的分布与用于开发模型的分布不同并且目标数据的地面实况信息未知时，就需要进行这种调整。我们提出了一种算法，该算法使用最佳传输理论和可验证有效且可实施的解决方案来学习最佳的潜在特征表示。这是通过最小化将样本从目标域传输到源域的分布的成本来实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优传输理论的算法，用于解决无监督域适应问题，通过最小化目标域到源域的样本运输成本来学习潜在特征表示。
AI.motivation: 当目标数据分布与源数据分布不一致且无标签时，传统模型性能下降。现有方法在处理域差异时效率低或难以实现，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用最优传输理论，通过优化运输成本函数，将目标域样本分布对齐到源域分布，从而学习领域不变的潜在特征表示。
AI.result: 提出的方法在潜在特征学习上具有可验证的效率和实现性，有效缓解了域适应中的分布差异问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过最优传输理论为无监督域适应提供了高效算法，为跨域学习提供了新的解决方案。

title: Robust Bayesian optimization with reinforcement learned acquisition functions
title_zh: 具有强化学习采集功能的鲁棒贝叶斯优化
abstract: In Bayesian optimization (BO) for expensive black-box optimization tasks, acquisition function (AF) guides sequential sampling and plays a pivotal role for efficient convergence to better optima. Prevailing AFs usually rely on artificial experiences in terms of preferences for exploration or exploitation, which runs a risk of a computational waste or traps in local optima and resultant re-optimization. To address the crux, the idea of data-driven AF selection is proposed, and the sequential AF selection task is further formalized as a Markov decision process (MDP) and resort to powerful reinforcement learning (RL) technologies. Appropriate selection policy for AFs is learned from superior BO trajectories to balance between exploration and exploitation in real time, which is called reinforcement-learning-assisted Bayesian optimization (RLABO). Competitive and robust BO evaluations on five benchmark problems demonstrate RL's recognition of the implicit AF selection pattern and imply the proposal's potential practicality for intelligent AF selection as well as efficient optimization in expensive black-box problems.
summary: In Bayesian optimization (BO) for expensive black-box optimization tasks, acquisition function (AF) guides sequential sampling and plays a pivotal role for efficient convergence to better optima. Prevailing AFs usually rely on artificial experiences in terms of preferences for exploration or exploitation, which runs a risk of a computational waste or traps in local optima and resultant re-optimization. To address the crux, the idea of data-driven AF selection is proposed, and the sequential AF selection task is further formalized as a Markov decision process (MDP) and resort to powerful reinforcement learning (RL) technologies. Appropriate selection policy for AFs is learned from superior BO trajectories to balance between exploration and exploitation in real time, which is called reinforcement-learning-assisted Bayesian optimization (RLABO). Competitive and robust BO evaluations on five benchmark problems demonstrate RL's recognition of the implicit AF selection pattern and imply the proposal's potential practicality for intelligent AF selection as well as efficient optimization in expensive black-box problems.
abstract_zh: 在针对昂贵的黑盒优化任务的贝叶斯优化 (BO) 中，采集函数 (AF) 指导顺序采样，并在有效收敛到更好的最优值方面发挥着关键作用。流行的 AF 通常依赖于探索或利用偏好方面的人工经验，这存在计算浪费或局部最优陷阱以及由此产生的重新优化的风险。为了解决这个问题，提出了数据驱动的自动对焦选择的思想，并将顺序自动对焦选择任务进一步形式化为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并借助强大的强化学习（RL）技术。从优越的 BO 轨迹中学习适当的 AF 选择策略，以实时平衡探索和利用，这称为强化学习辅助贝叶斯优化（RLABO）。对五个基准问题的有竞争力和鲁棒的 BO 评估证明了 RL 对隐式 AF 选择模式的认可，并暗示该提案对于智能 AF 选择以及昂贵的黑盒问题的有效优化的潜在实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习的贝叶斯优化方法，通过数据驱动方式动态选择获取函数以提升优化效率。
AI.motivation: 传统获取函数依赖人工设定的探索/利用偏好，易导致计算浪费或陷入局部最优，需自动化的智能选择策略。
AI.method: 将获取函数选择建模为马尔可夫决策过程，利用强化学习从优质优化轨迹中学习实时平衡探索与利用的策略（RLABO）。
AI.result: 在五个基准问题上的实验表明，该方法能有效识别隐式获取函数选择模式，展现出优于传统方法的鲁棒性与收敛效率。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习辅助的贝叶斯优化为昂贵黑箱问题提供了智能获取函数选择框架，具有实际应用潜力。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习的贝叶斯优化方法，通过数据驱动方式动态选择获取函数以提升优化效率。
motivation: 传统获取函数依赖人工设定的探索/利用偏好，易导致计算浪费或陷入局部最优，需自动化的智能选择策略。
method: 将获取函数选择建模为马尔可夫决策过程，利用强化学习从优质优化轨迹中学习实时平衡探索与利用的策略（RLABO）。
result: 在五个基准问题上的实验表明，该方法能有效识别隐式获取函数选择模式，展现出优于传统方法的鲁棒性与收敛效率。
conclusion: 强化学习辅助的贝叶斯优化为昂贵黑箱问题提供了智能获取函数选择框架，具有实际应用潜力。
search_text: Robust Bayesian optimization with reinforcement learned acquisition functions 具有强化学习采集功能的鲁棒贝叶斯优化 In Bayesian optimization (BO) for expensive black-box optimization tasks, acquisition function (AF) guides sequential sampling and plays a pivotal role for efficient convergence to better optima. Prevailing AFs usually rely on artificial experiences in terms of preferences for exploration or exploitation, which runs a risk of a computational waste or traps in local optima and resultant re-optimization. To address the crux, the idea of data-driven AF selection is proposed, and the sequential AF selection task is further formalized as a Markov decision process (MDP) and resort to powerful reinforcement learning (RL) technologies. Appropriate selection policy for AFs is learned from superior BO trajectories to balance between exploration and exploitation in real time, which is called reinforcement-learning-assisted Bayesian optimization (RLABO). Competitive and robust BO evaluations on five benchmark problems demonstrate RL's recognition of the implicit AF selection pattern and imply the proposal's potential practicality for intelligent AF selection as well as efficient optimization in expensive black-box problems. 在针对昂贵的黑盒优化任务的贝叶斯优化 (BO) 中，采集函数 (AF) 指导顺序采样，并在有效收敛到更好的最优值方面发挥着关键作用。流行的 AF 通常依赖于探索或利用偏好方面的人工经验，这存在计算浪费或局部最优陷阱以及由此产生的重新优化的风险。为了解决这个问题，提出了数据驱动的自动对焦选择的思想，并将顺序自动对焦选择任务进一步形式化为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并借助强大的强化学习（RL）技术。从优越的 BO 轨迹中学习适当的 AF 选择策略，以实时平衡探索和利用，这称为强化学习辅助贝叶斯优化（RLABO）。对五个基准问题的有竞争力和鲁棒的 BO 评估证明了 RL 对隐式 AF 选择模式的认可，并暗示该提案对于智能 AF 选择以及昂贵的黑盒问题的有效优化的潜在实用性。 本文提出一种结合强化学习的贝叶斯优化方法，通过数据驱动方式动态选择获取函数以提升优化效率。 Zijing Liu,Xiyao Qu,Xuejun Liu,Hongqiang Lyu cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

title: Saving the Limping: Fault-tolerant Quadruped Locomotion via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 拯救跛行：通过强化学习实现容错四足运动
comment: This work has been submitted to IEEE RA-L for possible publication. Project website for video: https://johnliudk.github.io/saving-the-limping/
comments: This work has been submitted to IEEE RA-L for possible publication. Project website for video: https://johnliudk.github.io/saving-the-limping/
abstract: Modern quadrupeds are skillful in traversing or even sprinting on uneven terrains in a remote uncontrolled environment. However, survival in the wild requires not only maneuverability, but also the ability to handle potential critical hardware failures. How to grant such ability to quadrupeds is rarely investigated. In this paper, we propose a novel methodology to train and test hardware fault-tolerant controllers for quadruped locomotion, both in the simulation and physical world. We adopt the teacher-student reinforcement learning framework to train the controller with close-to-reality joint-locking failure in the simulation, which can be zero-shot transferred to the physical robot without any fine-tuning. Extensive experiments show that our fault-tolerant controller can efficiently lead a quadruped stably when it faces joint failures during locomotion.
summary: Modern quadrupeds are skillful in traversing or even sprinting on uneven terrains in a remote uncontrolled environment. However, survival in the wild requires not only maneuverability, but also the ability to handle potential critical hardware failures. How to grant such ability to quadrupeds is rarely investigated. In this paper, we propose a novel methodology to train and test hardware fault-tolerant controllers for quadruped locomotion, both in the simulation and physical world. We adopt the teacher-student reinforcement learning framework to train the controller with close-to-reality joint-locking failure in the simulation, which can be zero-shot transferred to the physical robot without any fine-tuning. Extensive experiments show that our fault-tolerant controller can efficiently lead a quadruped stably when it faces joint failures during locomotion.
abstract_zh: 现代四足动物能够熟练地在远程不受控制的环境中穿越甚至在不平坦的地形上冲刺。然而，在野外生存不仅需要机动性，还需要处理潜在的关键硬件故障的能力。如何赋予四足动物这种能力很少被研究。在本文中，我们提出了一种在模拟和物理世界中训练和测试四足运动硬件容错控制器的新颖方法。我们采用师生强化学习框架，在模拟中训练接近现实关节锁定失败的控制器，无需任何微调即可零样本转移到物理机器人上。大量的实验表明，当四足动物在运动过程中面临关节故障时，我们的容错控制器可以有效地稳定地引导四足动物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的四足机器人容错控制方法，解决关节故障下的稳定行走问题。
AI.motivation: 现有四足机器人虽能应对复杂地形，但缺乏硬件故障处理能力，而野外环境需要机器人具备容错生存能力。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生强化学习框架，在仿真中训练关节锁定故障场景的控制器，并实现零样本迁移至物理机器人。
AI.result: 实验表明控制器可在关节故障情况下稳定引导四足机器人行走，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为四足机器人提供了仿真到现实的容错控制方案，推动了故障场景下的自主移动能力发展。

authors_text: Yun Tian,He Wang,Laixin Xie,Xiaojuan Ma,Quan Li
title: VFLens: Co-design the Modeling Process for Efficient Vertical Federated Learning via Visualization
title_zh: VFLens：通过可视化共同设计高效垂直联合学习的建模过程
comment: The Tenth International Symposium of Chinese CHI (Chinese CHI 2022), October 22--23, 2022, Guangzhou, China and Online, China
comments: The Tenth International Symposium of Chinese CHI (Chinese CHI 2022), October 22--23, 2022, Guangzhou, China and Online, China
abstract: As a decentralized training approach, federated learning enables multiple organizations to jointly train a model without exposing their private data. This work investigates vertical federated learning (VFL) to address scenarios where collaborating organizations have the same set of users but with different features, and only one party holds the labels. While VFL shows good performance, practitioners often face uncertainty when preparing non-transparent, internal/external features and samples for the VFL training phase. Moreover, to balance the prediction accuracy and the resource consumption of model inference, practitioners require to know which subset of prediction instances is genuinely needed to invoke the VFL model for inference. To this end, we co-design the VFL modeling process by proposing an interactive real-time visualization system, VFLens, to help practitioners with feature engineering, sample selection, and inference. A usage scenario, a quantitative experiment, and expert feedback suggest that VFLens helps practitioners boost VFL efficiency at a lower cost with sufficient confidence.
summary: As a decentralized training approach, federated learning enables multiple organizations to jointly train a model without exposing their private data. This work investigates vertical federated learning (VFL) to address scenarios where collaborating organizations have the same set of users but with different features, and only one party holds the labels. While VFL shows good performance, practitioners often face uncertainty when preparing non-transparent, internal/external features and samples for the VFL training phase. Moreover, to balance the prediction accuracy and the resource consumption of model inference, practitioners require to know which subset of prediction instances is genuinely needed to invoke the VFL model for inference. To this end, we co-design the VFL modeling process by proposing an interactive real-time visualization system, VFLens, to help practitioners with feature engineering, sample selection, and inference. A usage scenario, a quantitative experiment, and expert feedback suggest that VFLens helps practitioners boost VFL efficiency at a lower cost with sufficient confidence.
abstract_zh: 作为一种去中心化的训练方法，联邦学习使多个组织能够在不暴露其私有数据的情况下联合训练模型。这项工作研究了垂直联合学习（VFL），以解决协作组织拥有相同一组用户但具有不同功能且只有一方持有标签的场景。虽然 VFL 显示出良好的性能，但从业者在为 VFL 训练阶段准备不透明的内部/外部特征和样本时经常面临不确定性。此外，为了平衡预测精度和模型推理的资源消耗，从业者需要知道真正需要哪个预测实例子集来调用 VFL 模型进行推理。为此，我们通过提出交互式实时可视化系统 VFLens 来共同设计 VFL 建模过程，以帮助从业者进行特征工程、样本选择和推理。使用场景、定量实验和专家反馈表明，VFLens 有足够的信心帮助从业者以较低的成本提高 VFL 效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VFLens系统，通过可视化技术优化垂直联邦学习（VFL）的建模流程，提升训练效率和推理资源管理。
AI.motivation: VFL在实际应用中面临特征/样本准备不透明、推理资源消耗与预测精度难以平衡的问题，亟需可视化工具辅助决策。
AI.method: 设计交互式实时可视化系统VFLens，集成特征工程、样本选择和推理优化模块，支持动态分析与决策。
AI.result: 实验和专家反馈表明，VFLens在降低资源消耗的同时提升VFL效率，帮助从业者更自信地完成模型训练与推理。
AI.conclusion: 将可视化技术嵌入VFL建模流程，能有效解决数据隐私场景下的效率与资源平衡难题，具有实际应用价值。
