title: Neural Graphical Models
title_zh: 神经图形模型
abstract: Probabilistic Graphical Models are often used to understand dynamics of a system. They can model relationships between features (nodes) and the underlying distribution. Theoretically these models can represent very complex dependency functions, but in practice often simplifying assumptions are made due to computational limitations associated with graph operations. In this work we introduce Neural Graphical Models (NGMs) which attempt to represent complex feature dependencies with reasonable computational costs. Given a graph of feature relationships and corresponding samples, we capture the dependency structure between the features along with their complex function representations by using a neural network as a multi-task learning framework. We provide efficient learning, inference and sampling algorithms. NGMs can fit generic graph structures including directed, undirected and mixed-edge graphs as well as support mixed input data types. We present empirical studies that show NGMs' capability to represent Gaussian graphical models, perform inference analysis of a lung cancer data and extract insights from a real world infant mortality data provided by Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
summary: Probabilistic Graphical Models are often used to understand dynamics of a system. They can model relationships between features (nodes) and the underlying distribution. Theoretically these models can represent very complex dependency functions, but in practice often simplifying assumptions are made due to computational limitations associated with graph operations. In this work we introduce Neural Graphical Models (NGMs) which attempt to represent complex feature dependencies with reasonable computational costs. Given a graph of feature relationships and corresponding samples, we capture the dependency structure between the features along with their complex function representations by using a neural network as a multi-task learning framework. We provide efficient learning, inference and sampling algorithms. NGMs can fit generic graph structures including directed, undirected and mixed-edge graphs as well as support mixed input data types. We present empirical studies that show NGMs' capability to represent Gaussian graphical models, perform inference analysis of a lung cancer data and extract insights from a real world infant mortality data provided by Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
abstract_zh: 概率图形模型通常用于理解系统的动态。他们可以对特征（节点）和底层分布之间的关系进行建模。理论上，这些模型可以表示非常复杂的依赖函数，但在实践中，由于与图操作相关的计算限制，通常会做出简化的假设。在这项工作中，我们引入了神经图形模型（NGM），它试图以合理的计算成本来表示复杂的特征依赖性。给定特征关系图和相应样本，我们通过使用神经网络作为多任务学习框架来捕获特征之间的依赖结构及其复杂的函数表示。我们提供高效的学习、推理和采样算法。 NGM 可以适应通用图结构，包括有向图、无向图和混合边图，并支持混合输入数据类型。我们提出的实证研究表明 NGM 能够表示高斯图形模型、对肺癌数据进行推理分析以及从疾病控制和预防中心提供的现实世界婴儿死亡率数据中提取见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经图模型（NGMs），通过神经网络框架结合图结构，解决传统概率图模型因计算限制而需简化假设的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统概率图模型虽能表示复杂依赖关系，但实际应用中因图操作计算量大常需简化假设，限制了其建模能力。
AI.method: 以神经网络为多任务学习框架，结合特征关系图与样本数据，实现复杂依赖结构的建模，并提供高效学习、推理与采样算法。
AI.result: 实验验证NGMs可拟合多种图结构（有向、无向、混合边），成功应用于肺癌数据推理及CDC婴儿死亡率数据的洞察提取。
AI.conclusion: NGMs在保持复杂依赖建模能力的同时降低计算成本，为处理混合数据类型的实际问题提供了有效工具。

search_text: Neural Graphical Models 神经图形模型 Probabilistic Graphical Models are often used to understand dynamics of a system. They can model relationships between features (nodes) and the underlying distribution. Theoretically these models can represent very complex dependency functions, but in practice often simplifying assumptions are made due to computational limitations associated with graph operations. In this work we introduce Neural Graphical Models (NGMs) which attempt to represent complex feature dependencies with reasonable computational costs. Given a graph of feature relationships and corresponding samples, we capture the dependency structure between the features along with their complex function representations by using a neural network as a multi-task learning framework. We provide efficient learning, inference and sampling algorithms. NGMs can fit generic graph structures including directed, undirected and mixed-edge graphs as well as support mixed input data types. We present empirical studies that show NGMs' capability to represent Gaussian graphical models, perform inference analysis of a lung cancer data and extract insights from a real world infant mortality data provided by Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. 概率图形模型通常用于理解系统的动态。他们可以对特征（节点）和底层分布之间的关系进行建模。理论上，这些模型可以表示非常复杂的依赖函数，但在实践中，由于与图操作相关的计算限制，通常会做出简化的假设。在这项工作中，我们引入了神经图形模型（NGM），它试图以合理的计算成本来表示复杂的特征依赖性。给定特征关系图和相应样本，我们通过使用神经网络作为多任务学习框架来捕获特征之间的依赖结构及其复杂的函数表示。我们提供高效的学习、推理和采样算法。 NGM 可以适应通用图结构，包括有向图、无向图和混合边图，并支持混合输入数据类型。我们提出的实证研究表明 NGM 能够表示高斯图形模型、对肺癌数据进行推理分析以及从疾病控制和预防中心提供的现实世界婴儿死亡率数据中提取见解。 本文提出神经图模型（NGMs），通过神经网络框架结合图结构，解决传统概率图模型因计算限制而需简化假设的问题。 Harsh Shrivastava,Urszula Chajewska cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Chang Zong,Yueting Zhuang,Weiming Lu,Jian Shao,Siliang Tang
title: Citation Trajectory Prediction via Publication Influence Representation Using Temporal Knowledge Graph
title_zh: 使用时态知识图通过出版物影响表示进行引文轨迹预测
abstract: Predicting the impact of publications in science and technology has become an important research area, which is useful in various real world scenarios such as technology investment, research direction selection, and technology policymaking. Citation trajectory prediction is one of the most popular tasks in this area. Existing approaches mainly rely on mining temporal and graph data from academic articles. Some recent methods are capable of handling cold-start prediction by aggregating metadata features of new publications. However, the implicit factors causing citations and the richer information from handling temporal and attribute features still need to be explored. In this paper, we propose CTPIR, a new citation trajectory prediction framework that is able to represent the influence (the momentum of citation) of either new or existing publications using the history information of all their attributes. Our framework is composed of three modules: difference-preserved graph embedding, fine-grained influence representation, and learning-based trajectory calculation. To test the effectiveness of our framework in more situations, we collect and construct a new temporal knowledge graph dataset from the real world, named AIPatent, which stems from global patents in the field of artificial intelligence. Experiments are conducted on both the APS academic dataset and our contributed AIPatent dataset. The results demonstrate the strengths of our approach in the citation trajectory prediction task.
summary: Predicting the impact of publications in science and technology has become an important research area, which is useful in various real world scenarios such as technology investment, research direction selection, and technology policymaking. Citation trajectory prediction is one of the most popular tasks in this area. Existing approaches mainly rely on mining temporal and graph data from academic articles. Some recent methods are capable of handling cold-start prediction by aggregating metadata features of new publications. However, the implicit factors causing citations and the richer information from handling temporal and attribute features still need to be explored. In this paper, we propose CTPIR, a new citation trajectory prediction framework that is able to represent the influence (the momentum of citation) of either new or existing publications using the history information of all their attributes. Our framework is composed of three modules: difference-preserved graph embedding, fine-grained influence representation, and learning-based trajectory calculation. To test the effectiveness of our framework in more situations, we collect and construct a new temporal knowledge graph dataset from the real world, named AIPatent, which stems from global patents in the field of artificial intelligence. Experiments are conducted on both the APS academic dataset and our contributed AIPatent dataset. The results demonstrate the strengths of our approach in the citation trajectory prediction task.
abstract_zh: 预测科技出版物的影响已成为一个重要的研究领域，在技术投资、研究方向选择和技术政策制定等各种现实场景中都有用。引文轨迹预测是该领域最流行的任务之一。现有方法主要依赖于从学术文章中挖掘时间和图形数据。最近的一些方法能够通过聚合新出版物的元数据特征来处理冷启动预测。然而，引起引用的隐含因素以及处理时间和属性特征带来的更丰富的信息仍然需要探索。在本文中，我们提出了 CTPIR，一种新的引用轨迹预测框架，能够使用其所有属性的历史信息来表示新出版物或现有出版物的影响力（引用势头）。我们的框架由三个模块组成：差异保留图嵌入、细粒度影响表示和基于学习的轨迹计算。为了在更多情况下测试我们的框架的有效性，我们从现实世界中收集并构建了一个新的时态知识图数据集，命名为AIPatent，它源于人工智能领域的全球专利。在 APS 学术数据集和我们贡献的 AIPatent 数据集上进行了实验。结果证明了我们的方法在引文轨迹预测任务中的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CTPIR框架，通过时间知识图谱表示学术出版物的影响力，以预测引用轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以捕捉引用背后的隐含因素及时间与属性特征的丰富信息，需探索新方法处理冷启动问题并利用历史属性数据。
AI.method: 框架包含三个模块：差异保留图嵌入、细粒度影响力表示和基于学习的轨迹计算，并构建了来源于人工智能领域专利的AIPatent时序知识图谱数据集。
AI.result: 在APS学术数据集和AIPatent数据集上的实验验证了该框架在引用轨迹预测任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CTPIR通过整合时间与属性特征提升了引用预测性能，新数据集为未来研究提供了支持。

title: A Smart Recycling Bin Using Waste Image Classification At The Edge
title_zh: 利用边缘垃圾图像分类的智能回收箱
abstract: Rapid economic growth gives rise to the urgent demand for a more efficient waste recycling system. This work thereby developed an innovative recycling bin that automatically separates urban waste to increase the recycling rate. We collected 1800 recycling waste images and combined them with an existing public dataset to train classification models for two embedded systems, Jetson Nano and K210, targeting different markets. The model reached an accuracy of 95.98% on Jetson Nano and 96.64% on K210. A bin program was designed to collect feedback from users. On Jetson Nano, the overall power consumption of the application was reduced by 30% from the previous work to 4.7 W, while the second system, K210, only needed 0.89 W of power to operate. In summary, our work demonstrated a fully functional prototype of an energy-saving, high-accuracy smart recycling bin, which can be commercialized in the future to improve urban waste recycling.
summary: Rapid economic growth gives rise to the urgent demand for a more efficient waste recycling system. This work thereby developed an innovative recycling bin that automatically separates urban waste to increase the recycling rate. We collected 1800 recycling waste images and combined them with an existing public dataset to train classification models for two embedded systems, Jetson Nano and K210, targeting different markets. The model reached an accuracy of 95.98% on Jetson Nano and 96.64% on K210. A bin program was designed to collect feedback from users. On Jetson Nano, the overall power consumption of the application was reduced by 30% from the previous work to 4.7 W, while the second system, K210, only needed 0.89 W of power to operate. In summary, our work demonstrated a fully functional prototype of an energy-saving, high-accuracy smart recycling bin, which can be commercialized in the future to improve urban waste recycling.
abstract_zh: 经济的快速增长迫切需要更高效的废物回收系统。这项工作因此开发了一种创新的回收箱，可以自动分离城市垃圾以提高回收率。我们收集了 1800 张回收垃圾图像，并将其与现有的公共数据集相结合，为 Jetson Nano 和 K210 两个嵌入式系统训练分类模型，针对不同的市场。该模型在 Jetson Nano 上达到了 95.98% 的准确率，在 K210 上达到了 96.64% 的准确率。 bin 程序旨在收集用户的反馈。在 Jetson Nano 上，应用程序的整体功耗比之前的工作降低了 30% 至 4.7 W，而第二个系统 K210 只需要 0.89 W 的功率即可运行。综上所述，我们的工作展示了一个功能齐全的节能、高精度智能回收箱原型，该原型可以在未来商业化以改善城市垃圾回收。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种基于边缘计算的智能回收垃圾桶，通过废物图像分类实现自动垃圾分类，提升回收效率。
AI.motivation: 经济快速发展导致城市废物回收需求激增，传统回收方式效率低下，亟需智能化解决方案以提高回收率。
AI.method: 收集1800张废物图像并结合公开数据集，训练适用于Jetson Nano和K210嵌入式系统的分类模型，优化功耗并设计用户反馈机制。
AI.result: Jetson Nano模型准确率达95.98%，功耗降至4.7W；K210模型准确率达96.64%，功耗仅需0.89W，验证了系统的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了节能、高精度的智能回收垃圾桶原型，未来可商业化推广以改善城市废物回收体系。

tldr: 本文开发了一种基于边缘计算的智能回收垃圾桶，通过废物图像分类实现自动垃圾分类，提升回收效率。
motivation: 经济快速发展导致城市废物回收需求激增，传统回收方式效率低下，亟需智能化解决方案以提高回收率。
method: 收集1800张废物图像并结合公开数据集，训练适用于Jetson Nano和K210嵌入式系统的分类模型，优化功耗并设计用户反馈机制。
result: Jetson Nano模型准确率达95.98%，功耗降至4.7W；K210模型准确率达96.64%，功耗仅需0.89W，验证了系统的高效性。
conclusion: 本研究展示了节能、高精度的智能回收垃圾桶原型，未来可商业化推广以改善城市废物回收体系。
search_text: A Smart Recycling Bin Using Waste Image Classification At The Edge 利用边缘垃圾图像分类的智能回收箱 Rapid economic growth gives rise to the urgent demand for a more efficient waste recycling system. This work thereby developed an innovative recycling bin that automatically separates urban waste to increase the recycling rate. We collected 1800 recycling waste images and combined them with an existing public dataset to train classification models for two embedded systems, Jetson Nano and K210, targeting different markets. The model reached an accuracy of 95.98% on Jetson Nano and 96.64% on K210. A bin program was designed to collect feedback from users. On Jetson Nano, the overall power consumption of the application was reduced by 30% from the previous work to 4.7 W, while the second system, K210, only needed 0.89 W of power to operate. In summary, our work demonstrated a fully functional prototype of an energy-saving, high-accuracy smart recycling bin, which can be commercialized in the future to improve urban waste recycling. 经济的快速增长迫切需要更高效的废物回收系统。这项工作因此开发了一种创新的回收箱，可以自动分离城市垃圾以提高回收率。我们收集了 1800 张回收垃圾图像，并将其与现有的公共数据集相结合，为 Jetson Nano 和 K210 两个嵌入式系统训练分类模型，针对不同的市场。该模型在 Jetson Nano 上达到了 95.98% 的准确率，在 K210 上达到了 96.64% 的准确率。 bin 程序旨在收集用户的反馈。在 Jetson Nano 上，应用程序的整体功耗比之前的工作降低了 30% 至 4.7 W，而第二个系统 K210 只需要 0.89 W 的功率即可运行。综上所述，我们的工作展示了一个功能齐全的节能、高精度智能回收箱原型，该原型可以在未来商业化以改善城市垃圾回收。 本文开发了一种基于边缘计算的智能回收垃圾桶，通过废物图像分类实现自动垃圾分类，提升回收效率。 Xueying Li,Ryan Grammenos cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Wang,Guosheng Lin,Ana García del Molino,Anran Wang,Jiashi Feng,Zhiqi Shen
title: ManiCLIP: Multi-Attribute Face Manipulation from Text
title_zh: ManiCLIP：从文本进行多属性人脸操作
abstract: In this paper we present a novel multi-attribute face manipulation method based on textual descriptions. Previous text-based image editing methods either require test-time optimization for each individual image or are restricted to single attribute editing. Extending these methods to multi-attribute face image editing scenarios will introduce undesired excessive attribute change, e.g., text-relevant attributes are overly manipulated and text-irrelevant attributes are also changed. In order to address these challenges and achieve natural editing over multiple face attributes, we propose a new decoupling training scheme where we use group sampling to get text segments from same attribute categories, instead of whole complex sentences. Further, to preserve other existing face attributes, we encourage the model to edit the latent code of each attribute separately via an entropy constraint. During the inference phase, our model is able to edit new face images without any test-time optimization, even from complex textual prompts. We show extensive experiments and analysis to demonstrate the efficacy of our method, which generates natural manipulated faces with minimal text-irrelevant attribute editing. Code and pre-trained model are available at https://github.com/hwang1996/ManiCLIP.
summary: In this paper we present a novel multi-attribute face manipulation method based on textual descriptions. Previous text-based image editing methods either require test-time optimization for each individual image or are restricted to single attribute editing. Extending these methods to multi-attribute face image editing scenarios will introduce undesired excessive attribute change, e.g., text-relevant attributes are overly manipulated and text-irrelevant attributes are also changed. In order to address these challenges and achieve natural editing over multiple face attributes, we propose a new decoupling training scheme where we use group sampling to get text segments from same attribute categories, instead of whole complex sentences. Further, to preserve other existing face attributes, we encourage the model to edit the latent code of each attribute separately via an entropy constraint. During the inference phase, our model is able to edit new face images without any test-time optimization, even from complex textual prompts. We show extensive experiments and analysis to demonstrate the efficacy of our method, which generates natural manipulated faces with minimal text-irrelevant attribute editing. Code and pre-trained model are available at https://github.com/hwang1996/ManiCLIP.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于文本描述的新颖的多属性人脸操纵方法。以前基于文本的图像编辑方法要么需要对每个单独的图像进行测试时优化，要么仅限于单个属性编辑。将这些方法扩展到多属性人脸图像编辑场景将引入不期望的过度属性改变，例如，文本相关的属性被过度操纵并且文本不相关的属性也被改变。为了解决这些挑战并实现对多个面部属性的自然编辑，我们提出了一种新的解耦训练方案，其中我们使用组采样从相同属性类别中获取文本片段，而不是整个复杂的句子。此外，为了保留其他现有的面部属性，我们鼓励模型通过熵约束分别编辑每个属性的潜在代码。在推理阶段，我们的模型能够编辑新的面部图像，无需任何测试时优化，甚至可以根据复杂的文本提示进行编辑。我们展示了广泛的实验和分析来证明我们的方法的有效性，该方法通过最少的文本无关属性编辑生成自然的操纵面孔。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/hwang1996/ManiCLIP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本描述的多属性人脸编辑方法，能够根据文本指令对人脸图像进行自然且精确的多属性修改。
AI.motivation: 现有文本驱动图像编辑方法在处理多属性人脸编辑时存在过度修改相关属性和意外改变无关属性的问题，且通常需要测试时优化。
AI.method: 通过组采样获取单一属性文本片段进行解耦训练，并利用熵约束分别编辑各属性的潜在代码，实现无需测试优化的多属性编辑。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成自然的人脸图像，有效减少文本无关属性的意外修改，且支持复杂文本提示的直接编辑。
AI.conclusion: ManiCLIP方法解决了多属性文本驱动人脸编辑中的属性冲突问题，提供了高效且可控的编辑方案。

title: Grouped self-attention mechanism for a memory-efficient Transformer
title_zh: 内存高效 Transformer 的分组自注意力机制
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, under review as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures, under review as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Time-series data analysis is important because numerous real-world tasks such as forecasting weather, electricity consumption, and stock market involve predicting data that vary over time. Time-series data are generally recorded over a long period of observation with long sequences owing to their periodic characteristics and long-range dependencies over time. Thus, capturing long-range dependency is an important factor in time-series data forecasting. To solve these problems, we proposed two novel modules, Grouped Self-Attention (GSA) and Compressed Cross-Attention (CCA). With both modules, we achieved a computational space and time complexity of order $O(l)$ with a sequence length $l$ under small hyperparameter limitations, and can capture locality while considering global information. The results of experiments conducted on time-series datasets show that our proposed model efficiently exhibited reduced computational complexity and performance comparable to or better than existing methods.
summary: Time-series data analysis is important because numerous real-world tasks such as forecasting weather, electricity consumption, and stock market involve predicting data that vary over time. Time-series data are generally recorded over a long period of observation with long sequences owing to their periodic characteristics and long-range dependencies over time. Thus, capturing long-range dependency is an important factor in time-series data forecasting. To solve these problems, we proposed two novel modules, Grouped Self-Attention (GSA) and Compressed Cross-Attention (CCA). With both modules, we achieved a computational space and time complexity of order $O(l)$ with a sequence length $l$ under small hyperparameter limitations, and can capture locality while considering global information. The results of experiments conducted on time-series datasets show that our proposed model efficiently exhibited reduced computational complexity and performance comparable to or better than existing methods.
abstract_zh: Time-series data analysis is important because numerous real-world tasks such as forecasting weather, electricity consumption, and stock market involve predicting data that vary over time. Time-series data are generally recorded over a long period of observation with long sequences owing to their periodic characteristics and long-range dependencies over time.因此，捕获长期依赖性是时间序列数据预测的一个重要因素。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了两个新颖的模块：分组自注意力（GSA）和压缩交叉注意力（CCA）。 With both modules, we achieved a computational space and time complexity of order $O(l)$ with a sequence length $l$ under small hyperparameter limitations, and can capture locality while considering global information. The results of experiments conducted on time-series datasets show that our proposed model efficiently exhibited reduced computational complexity and performance comparable to or better than existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分组自注意力机制（GSA）和压缩交叉注意力机制（CCA）的高效Transformer模型，用于处理时间序列数据的长期依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在处理长序列时间数据时计算复杂度高，而时间序列分析需要同时捕捉局部特征与全局依赖关系，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了分组自注意力模块（GSA）和压缩交叉注意力模块（CCA），将计算复杂度降至O(l)，通过分组策略保留局部信息，压缩机制降低全局交互开销。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在多个时间序列数据集上实现了更低的计算复杂度，且预测性能优于或接近现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持模型性能的同时显著提升了时间序列预测的计算效率，为长序列建模提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Zhihuan Kuang,Shi Zong,Jianbing Zhang,Jiajun Chen,Hongfu Liu
title: Music-to-Text Synaesthesia: Generating Descriptive Text from Music Recordings
title_zh: 音乐到文本的联觉：从音乐录音中生成描述性文本
abstract: In this paper, we consider a novel research problem: music-to-text synaesthesia. Different from the classical music tagging problem that classifies a music recording into pre-defined categories, music-to-text synaesthesia aims to generate descriptive texts from music recordings with the same sentiment for further understanding. As existing music-related datasets do not contain the semantic descriptions on music recordings, we collect a new dataset that contains 1,955 aligned pairs of classical music recordings and text descriptions. Based on this, we build a computational model to generate sentences that can describe the content of the music recording. To tackle the highly non-discriminative classical music, we design a group topology-preservation loss, which considers more samples as a group reference and preserves the relative topology among different samples. Extensive experimental results qualitatively and quantitatively demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed model over five heuristics or pre-trained competitive methods and their variants on our collected dataset.
summary: In this paper, we consider a novel research problem: music-to-text synaesthesia. Different from the classical music tagging problem that classifies a music recording into pre-defined categories, music-to-text synaesthesia aims to generate descriptive texts from music recordings with the same sentiment for further understanding. As existing music-related datasets do not contain the semantic descriptions on music recordings, we collect a new dataset that contains 1,955 aligned pairs of classical music recordings and text descriptions. Based on this, we build a computational model to generate sentences that can describe the content of the music recording. To tackle the highly non-discriminative classical music, we design a group topology-preservation loss, which considers more samples as a group reference and preserves the relative topology among different samples. Extensive experimental results qualitatively and quantitatively demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed model over five heuristics or pre-trained competitive methods and their variants on our collected dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑一个新颖的研究问题：音乐到文本的联觉。与将音乐录音分类为预定义类别的古典音乐标记问题不同，音乐到文本的联觉旨在从音乐录音中生成具有相同情感的描述性文本，以供进一步理解。由于现有的音乐相关数据集不包含音乐录音的语义描述，我们收集了一个新的数据集，其中包含 1,955 对对齐的古典音乐录音和文本描述。基于此，我们建立了一个计算模型来生成可以描述音乐录音内容的句子。为了解决高度非歧视性的古典音乐，我们设计了一种组拓扑保留损失，它将更多样本视为组参考，并保留不同样本之间的相对拓扑。大量的实验结果定性和定量地证明了我们提出的模型在五种启发式或预先训练的竞争方法及其在我们收集的数据集上的变体的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出音乐到文本联觉任务，通过生成描述性文本以理解音乐内容。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐数据集缺乏语义描述，需构建新数据集并探索生成模型以提升音乐内容理解。
AI.method: 收集1955对音乐-文本对齐数据集，设计组拓扑保持损失函数的生成模型。
AI.result: 实验结果定性和定量证明模型在生成描述性文本任务上优于五种启发式及预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效生成音乐描述文本，推动了音乐到文本生成领域的发展，并展示了新数据集的潜力。

search_text: Music-to-Text Synaesthesia: Generating Descriptive Text from Music Recordings 音乐到文本的联觉：从音乐录音中生成描述性文本 In this paper, we consider a novel research problem: music-to-text synaesthesia. Different from the classical music tagging problem that classifies a music recording into pre-defined categories, music-to-text synaesthesia aims to generate descriptive texts from music recordings with the same sentiment for further understanding. As existing music-related datasets do not contain the semantic descriptions on music recordings, we collect a new dataset that contains 1,955 aligned pairs of classical music recordings and text descriptions. Based on this, we build a computational model to generate sentences that can describe the content of the music recording. To tackle the highly non-discriminative classical music, we design a group topology-preservation loss, which considers more samples as a group reference and preserves the relative topology among different samples. Extensive experimental results qualitatively and quantitatively demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed model over five heuristics or pre-trained competitive methods and their variants on our collected dataset. 在本文中，我们考虑一个新颖的研究问题：音乐到文本的联觉。与将音乐录音分类为预定义类别的古典音乐标记问题不同，音乐到文本的联觉旨在从音乐录音中生成具有相同情感的描述性文本，以供进一步理解。由于现有的音乐相关数据集不包含音乐录音的语义描述，我们收集了一个新的数据集，其中包含 1,955 对对齐的古典音乐录音和文本描述。基于此，我们建立了一个计算模型来生成可以描述音乐录音内容的句子。为了解决高度非歧视性的古典音乐，我们设计了一种组拓扑保留损失，它将更多样本视为组参考，并保留不同样本之间的相对拓扑。大量的实验结果定性和定量地证明了我们提出的模型在五种启发式或预先训练的竞争方法及其在我们收集的数据集上的变体的有效性。 提出音乐到文本联觉任务，通过生成描述性文本以理解音乐内容。 Zhihuan Kuang,Shi Zong,Jianbing Zhang,Jiajun Chen,Hongfu Liu eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.MM,cs.SD

authors_text: Chee-Kheng Chng,Alvaro Parra Bustos,Benjamin McCarthy,Tat-Jun Chin
title: ROSIA: Rotation-Search-Based Star Identification Algorithm
title_zh: ROSIA：基于旋转搜索的恒星识别算法
comment: 21 pages, 16 figures, Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems
comments: 21 pages, 16 figures, Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems
abstract: This paper presents a rotation-search-based approach for addressing the star identification (Star-ID) problem. The proposed algorithm, ROSIA, is a heuristics-free algorithm that seeks the optimal rotation that maximally aligns the input and catalog stars in their respective coordinates. ROSIA searches the rotation space systematically with the Branch-and-Bound (BnB) method. Crucially affecting the runtime feasibility of ROSIA is the upper bound function that prioritizes the search space. In this paper, we make a theoretical contribution by proposing a tight (provable) upper bound function that enables a 400x speed-up compared to an existing formulation. Coupling the bounding function with an efficient evaluation scheme that leverages stereographic projection and the R-tree data structure, ROSIA achieves feasible operational speed on embedded processors with state-of-the-art performances under different sources of noise. The source code of ROSIA is available at https://github.com/ckchng/ROSIA.
summary: This paper presents a rotation-search-based approach for addressing the star identification (Star-ID) problem. The proposed algorithm, ROSIA, is a heuristics-free algorithm that seeks the optimal rotation that maximally aligns the input and catalog stars in their respective coordinates. ROSIA searches the rotation space systematically with the Branch-and-Bound (BnB) method. Crucially affecting the runtime feasibility of ROSIA is the upper bound function that prioritizes the search space. In this paper, we make a theoretical contribution by proposing a tight (provable) upper bound function that enables a 400x speed-up compared to an existing formulation. Coupling the bounding function with an efficient evaluation scheme that leverages stereographic projection and the R-tree data structure, ROSIA achieves feasible operational speed on embedded processors with state-of-the-art performances under different sources of noise. The source code of ROSIA is available at https://github.com/ckchng/ROSIA.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于旋转搜索的方法来解决恒星识别（Star-ID）问题。所提出的算法 ROSIA 是一种无启发式算法，它寻求最佳旋转，使输入和目录恒星在各自的坐标中最大限度地对齐。 ROSIA 使用分支定界（BnB）方法系统地搜索旋转空间。对 ROSIA 运行时可行性影响最大的是优先考虑搜索空间的上限函数。在本文中，我们提出了一个严格的（可证明的）上限函数，与现有公式相比，可以实现 400 倍的加速，从而做出了理论贡献。 ROSIA 将边界函数与利用立体投影和 R 树数据结构的有效评估方案相结合，在嵌入式处理器上实现了可行的运行速度，并在不同噪声源下具有最先进的性能。 ROSIA 的源代码可在 https://github.com/ckchng/ROSIA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于旋转搜索的星体识别算法ROSIA，用于解决星体识别问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的星体识别算法存在依赖启发式方法、计算效率低的问题，因此需要一种高效且无需启发式的算法。
AI.method: ROSIA采用分支定界法系统搜索旋转空间，并提出了一种严格的上界函数，结合立体投影和R树数据结构进行高效评估。
AI.result: ROSIA相比现有方法速度提升了400倍，并在嵌入式处理器上实现了可行的操作速度和高噪声环境下的高性能。
AI.conclusion: ROSIA是一种无需启发式的高效星体识别算法，适用于嵌入式系统，并具有良好的噪声鲁棒性。

title: Subspace Learning for Feature Selection via Rank Revealing QR Factorization: Unsupervised and Hybrid Approaches with Non-negative Matrix Factorization and Evolutionary Algorithm
title_zh: 通过排名揭示 QR 分解进行特征选择的子空间学习：采用非负矩阵分解和进化算法的无监督和混合方法
abstract: The selection of most informative and discriminative features from high-dimensional data has been noticed as an important topic in machine learning and data engineering. Using matrix factorization-based techniques such as nonnegative matrix factorization for feature selection has emerged as a hot topic in feature selection. The main goal of feature selection using matrix factorization is to extract a subspace which approximates the original space but in a lower dimension. In this study, rank revealing QR (RRQR) factorization, which is computationally cheaper than singular value decomposition (SVD), is leveraged in obtaining the most informative features as a novel unsupervised feature selection technique. This technique uses the permutation matrix of QR for feature selection which is a unique property to this factorization method. Moreover, QR factorization is embedded into non-negative matrix factorization (NMF) objective function as a new unsupervised feature selection method. Lastly, a hybrid feature selection algorithm is proposed by coupling RRQR, as a filter-based technique, and a Genetic algorithm as a wrapper-based technique. In this method, redundant features are removed using RRQR factorization and the most discriminative subset of features are selected using the Genetic algorithm. The proposed algorithm shows to be dependable and robust when compared against state-of-the-art feature selection algorithms in supervised, unsupervised, and semi-supervised settings. All methods are tested on seven available microarray datasets using KNN, SVM and C4.5 classifiers. In terms of evaluation metrics, the experimental results shows that the proposed method is comparable with the state-of-the-art feature selection.
summary: The selection of most informative and discriminative features from high-dimensional data has been noticed as an important topic in machine learning and data engineering. Using matrix factorization-based techniques such as nonnegative matrix factorization for feature selection has emerged as a hot topic in feature selection. The main goal of feature selection using matrix factorization is to extract a subspace which approximates the original space but in a lower dimension. In this study, rank revealing QR (RRQR) factorization, which is computationally cheaper than singular value decomposition (SVD), is leveraged in obtaining the most informative features as a novel unsupervised feature selection technique. This technique uses the permutation matrix of QR for feature selection which is a unique property to this factorization method. Moreover, QR factorization is embedded into non-negative matrix factorization (NMF) objective function as a new unsupervised feature selection method. Lastly, a hybrid feature selection algorithm is proposed by coupling RRQR, as a filter-based technique, and a Genetic algorithm as a wrapper-based technique. In this method, redundant features are removed using RRQR factorization and the most discriminative subset of features are selected using the Genetic algorithm. The proposed algorithm shows to be dependable and robust when compared against state-of-the-art feature selection algorithms in supervised, unsupervised, and semi-supervised settings. All methods are tested on seven available microarray datasets using KNN, SVM and C4.5 classifiers. In terms of evaluation metrics, the experimental results shows that the proposed method is comparable with the state-of-the-art feature selection.
abstract_zh: 从高维数据中选择最具信息性和辨别力的特征已被视为机器学习和数据工程中的一个重要主题。使用基于矩阵分解的技术（例如非负矩阵分解）进行特征选择已成为特征选择中的热门话题。使用矩阵分解进行特征选择的主要目标是提取一个近似原始空间但维度较低的子空间。在本研究中，排名揭示 QR (RRQR) 分解作为一种新颖的无监督特征选择技术，其计算成本比奇异值分解 (SVD) 更便宜，可用于获取最具信息量的特征。该技术使用 QR 置换矩阵进行特征选择，这是该分解方法的独特属性。此外，QR分解作为一种新的无监督特征选择方法被嵌入到非负矩阵分解（NMF）目标函数中。最后，通过耦合作为基于过滤器的技术的RRQR和作为基于包装器的技术的遗传算法，提出了一种混合特征选择算法。在此方法中，使用 RRQR 分解去除冗余特征，并使用遗传算法选择最具辨别力的特征子集。与监督、无监督和半监督设置中最先进的特征选择算法相比，所提出的算法表现出可靠和鲁棒性。所有方法均使用 KNN、SVM 和 C4.5 分类器在七个可用的微阵列数据集上进行测试。在评估指标方面，实验结果表明，所提出的方法与最先进的特征选择相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于子空间学习的特征选择方法，结合秩揭示QR分解（RRQR）、非负矩阵分解（NMF）和遗传算法，实现高效特征选择。
AI.motivation: 高维数据中选择最具信息量和判别性的特征是机器学习的重要课题，传统方法如SVD计算成本高，需探索更高效的无监督及混合特征选择技术。
AI.method: 利用RRQR分解的置换矩阵进行特征选择，将其嵌入NMF目标函数形成无监督方法，并结合RRQR（过滤器方法）与遗传算法（包装器方法）设计混合算法，通过移除冗余特征并筛选判别性子集实现目标。
AI.result: 在七个微阵列数据集上实验表明，该方法在KNN、SVM和C4.5分类器下的性能与现有最先进特征选择方法相当，且在监督、无监督和半监督场景中表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合特征选择算法在计算效率和特征选择效果上具有竞争力，为高维数据处理提供了可靠方案。

method: 利用RRQR分解的置换矩阵进行特征选择，将其嵌入NMF目标函数形成无监督方法，并结合RRQR（过滤器方法）与遗传算法（包装器方法）设计混合算法，通过移除冗余特征并筛选判别性子集实现目标。
result: 在七个微阵列数据集上实验表明，该方法在KNN、SVM和C4.5分类器下的性能与现有最先进特征选择方法相当，且在监督、无监督和半监督场景中表现稳健。
conclusion: 提出的混合特征选择算法在计算效率和特征选择效果上具有竞争力，为高维数据处理提供了可靠方案。
search_text: Subspace Learning for Feature Selection via Rank Revealing QR Factorization: Unsupervised and Hybrid Approaches with Non-negative Matrix Factorization and Evolutionary Algorithm 通过排名揭示 QR 分解进行特征选择的子空间学习：采用非负矩阵分解和进化算法的无监督和混合方法 The selection of most informative and discriminative features from high-dimensional data has been noticed as an important topic in machine learning and data engineering. Using matrix factorization-based techniques such as nonnegative matrix factorization for feature selection has emerged as a hot topic in feature selection. The main goal of feature selection using matrix factorization is to extract a subspace which approximates the original space but in a lower dimension. In this study, rank revealing QR (RRQR) factorization, which is computationally cheaper than singular value decomposition (SVD), is leveraged in obtaining the most informative features as a novel unsupervised feature selection technique. This technique uses the permutation matrix of QR for feature selection which is a unique property to this factorization method. Moreover, QR factorization is embedded into non-negative matrix factorization (NMF) objective function as a new unsupervised feature selection method. Lastly, a hybrid feature selection algorithm is proposed by coupling RRQR, as a filter-based technique, and a Genetic algorithm as a wrapper-based technique. In this method, redundant features are removed using RRQR factorization and the most discriminative subset of features are selected using the Genetic algorithm. The proposed algorithm shows to be dependable and robust when compared against state-of-the-art feature selection algorithms in supervised, unsupervised, and semi-supervised settings. All methods are tested on seven available microarray datasets using KNN, SVM and C4.5 classifiers. In terms of evaluation metrics, the experimental results shows that the proposed method is comparable with the state-of-the-art feature selection. 从高维数据中选择最具信息性和辨别力的特征已被视为机器学习和数据工程中的一个重要主题。使用基于矩阵分解的技术（例如非负矩阵分解）进行特征选择已成为特征选择中的热门话题。使用矩阵分解进行特征选择的主要目标是提取一个近似原始空间但维度较低的子空间。在本研究中，排名揭示 QR (RRQR) 分解作为一种新颖的无监督特征选择技术，其计算成本比奇异值分解 (SVD) 更便宜，可用于获取最具信息量的特征。该技术使用 QR 置换矩阵进行特征选择，这是该分解方法的独特属性。此外，QR分解作为一种新的无监督特征选择方法被嵌入到非负矩阵分解（NMF）目标函数中。最后，通过耦合作为基于过滤器的技术的RRQR和作为基于包装器的技术的遗传算法，提出了一种混合特征选择算法。在此方法中，使用 RRQR 分解去除冗余特征，并使用遗传算法选择最具辨别力的特征子集。与监督、无监督和半监督设置中最先进的特征选择算法相比，所提出的算法表现出可靠和鲁棒性。所有方法均使用 KNN、SVM 和 C4.5 分类器在七个可用的微阵列数据集上进行测试。在评估指标方面，实验结果表明，所提出的方法与最先进的特征选择相当。 本文提出一种基于子空间学习的特征选择方法，结合秩揭示QR分解（RRQR）、非负矩阵分解（NMF）和遗传算法，实现高效特征选择。 Amir Moslemi,Arash Ahmadian cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Awais Khan,Khalid Mahmood Malik,James Ryan,Mikul Saravanan
title: Voice Spoofing Countermeasures: Taxonomy, State-of-the-art, experimental analysis of generalizability, open challenges, and the way forward
title_zh: 语音欺骗对策：分类、最先进的技术、普遍性的实验分析、开放的挑战和前进的道路
abstract: Malicious actors may seek to use different voice-spoofing attacks to fool ASV systems and even use them for spreading misinformation. Various countermeasures have been proposed to detect these spoofing attacks. Due to the extensive work done on spoofing detection in automated speaker verification (ASV) systems in the last 6-7 years, there is a need to classify the research and perform qualitative and quantitative comparisons on state-of-the-art countermeasures. Additionally, no existing survey paper has reviewed integrated solutions to voice spoofing evaluation and speaker verification, adversarial/antiforensics attacks on spoofing countermeasures, and ASV itself, or unified solutions to detect multiple attacks using a single model. Further, no work has been done to provide an apples-to-apples comparison of published countermeasures in order to assess their generalizability by evaluating them across corpora. In this work, we conduct a review of the literature on spoofing detection using hand-crafted features, deep learning, end-to-end, and universal spoofing countermeasure solutions to detect speech synthesis (SS), voice conversion (VC), and replay attacks. Additionally, we also review integrated solutions to voice spoofing evaluation and speaker verification, adversarial and anti-forensics attacks on voice countermeasures, and ASV. The limitations and challenges of the existing spoofing countermeasures are also presented. We report the performance of these countermeasures on several datasets and evaluate them across corpora. For the experiments, we employ the ASVspoof2019 and VSDC datasets along with GMM, SVM, CNN, and CNN-GRU classifiers. (For reproduceability of the results, the code of the test bed can be found in our GitHub Repository.
summary: Malicious actors may seek to use different voice-spoofing attacks to fool ASV systems and even use them for spreading misinformation. Various countermeasures have been proposed to detect these spoofing attacks. Due to the extensive work done on spoofing detection in automated speaker verification (ASV) systems in the last 6-7 years, there is a need to classify the research and perform qualitative and quantitative comparisons on state-of-the-art countermeasures. Additionally, no existing survey paper has reviewed integrated solutions to voice spoofing evaluation and speaker verification, adversarial/antiforensics attacks on spoofing countermeasures, and ASV itself, or unified solutions to detect multiple attacks using a single model. Further, no work has been done to provide an apples-to-apples comparison of published countermeasures in order to assess their generalizability by evaluating them across corpora. In this work, we conduct a review of the literature on spoofing detection using hand-crafted features, deep learning, end-to-end, and universal spoofing countermeasure solutions to detect speech synthesis (SS), voice conversion (VC), and replay attacks. Additionally, we also review integrated solutions to voice spoofing evaluation and speaker verification, adversarial and anti-forensics attacks on voice countermeasures, and ASV. The limitations and challenges of the existing spoofing countermeasures are also presented. We report the performance of these countermeasures on several datasets and evaluate them across corpora. For the experiments, we employ the ASVspoof2019 and VSDC datasets along with GMM, SVM, CNN, and CNN-GRU classifiers. (For reproduceability of the results, the code of the test bed can be found in our GitHub Repository.
abstract_zh: 恶意行为者可能会寻求使用不同的语音欺骗攻击来欺骗 ASV 系统，甚至利用它们来传播错误信息。已经提出了各种对策来检测这些欺骗攻击。由于过去 6-7 年在自动说话人验证 (ASV) 系统中的欺骗检测方面所做的大量工作，有必要对研究进行分类并对最先进的对策进行定性和定量比较。此外，现有的调查论文还没有审查语音欺骗评估和说话人验证的集成解决方案、欺骗对策的对抗/反取证攻击以及 ASV 本身，或者使用单一模型检测多种攻击的统一解决方案。此外，还没有开展对已发布的对策进行同类比较的工作，以便通过跨语料库评估它们来评估其普遍性。在这项工作中，我们回顾了有关使用手工特征、深度学习、端到端和通用欺骗对策解决方案来检测语音合成 (SS)、语音转换 (VC) 和重放攻击的欺骗检测的文献。此外，我们还审查了语音欺骗评估和说话人验证、针对语音对策的对抗性和反取证攻击以及 ASV 的集成解决方案。还提出了现有欺骗对策的局限性和挑战。我们报告这些对策在多个数据集上的表现，并跨语料库对其进行评估。在实验中，我们使用 ASVspoof2019 和 VSDC 数据集以及 GMM、SVM、CNN 和 CNN-GRU 分类器。 （为了结果的可重现性，测试台的代码可以在我们的 GitHub 存储库中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文综述语音欺骗防御技术，分类现有方法，比较其性能，并分析挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对语音欺骗检测的全面分类、跨数据集性能比较及集成解决方案的系统性综述。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾分类防御方法（手工特征、深度学习等），使用ASVspoof2019和VSDC数据集，结合GMM、SVM、CNN等分类器进行跨语料库实验评估。
AI.result: 报告了不同防御措施在多个数据集上的性能，揭示其泛化能力差异，并分析了现有方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在跨数据集泛化上存在挑战，需进一步研究集成方案及对抗攻击的鲁棒性，未来应加强多任务学习与数据增强技术。

authors_text: Xue Liu,Dan Sun,Xiaobo Cao,Hao Ye,Wei Wei
title: Metric Distribution to Vector: Constructing Data Representation via Broad-Scale Discrepancies
title_zh: 向量的度量分布：通过大规模差异构建数据表示
abstract: Graph embedding provides a feasible methodology to conduct pattern classification for graph-structured data by mapping each data into the vectorial space. Various pioneering works are essentially coding method that concentrates on a vectorial representation about the inner properties of a graph in terms of the topological constitution, node attributions, link relations, etc. However, the classification for each targeted data is a qualitative issue based on understanding the overall discrepancies within the dataset scale. From the statistical point of view, these discrepancies manifest a metric distribution over the dataset scale if the distance metric is adopted to measure the pairwise similarity or dissimilarity. Therefore, we present a novel embedding strategy named $\mathbf{MetricDistribution2vec}$ to extract such distribution characteristics into the vectorial representation for each data. We demonstrate the application and effectiveness of our representation method in the supervised prediction tasks on extensive real-world structural graph datasets. The results have gained some unexpected increases compared with a surge of baselines on all the datasets, even if we take the lightweight models as classifiers. Moreover, the proposed methods also conducted experiments in Few-Shot classification scenarios, and the results still show attractive discrimination in rare training samples based inference.
summary: Graph embedding provides a feasible methodology to conduct pattern classification for graph-structured data by mapping each data into the vectorial space. Various pioneering works are essentially coding method that concentrates on a vectorial representation about the inner properties of a graph in terms of the topological constitution, node attributions, link relations, etc. However, the classification for each targeted data is a qualitative issue based on understanding the overall discrepancies within the dataset scale. From the statistical point of view, these discrepancies manifest a metric distribution over the dataset scale if the distance metric is adopted to measure the pairwise similarity or dissimilarity. Therefore, we present a novel embedding strategy named $\mathbf{MetricDistribution2vec}$ to extract such distribution characteristics into the vectorial representation for each data. We demonstrate the application and effectiveness of our representation method in the supervised prediction tasks on extensive real-world structural graph datasets. The results have gained some unexpected increases compared with a surge of baselines on all the datasets, even if we take the lightweight models as classifiers. Moreover, the proposed methods also conducted experiments in Few-Shot classification scenarios, and the results still show attractive discrimination in rare training samples based inference.
abstract_zh: 图嵌入提供了一种可行的方法，通过将每个数据映射到向量空间来对图结构数据进行模式分类。各种开创性工作本质上都是编码方法，集中于图的拓扑构成、节点属性、链接关系等内部属性的向量表示。然而，每个目标数据的分类是一个基于理解数据集规模内的整体差异的定性问题。从统计的角度来看，如果采用距离度量来衡量成对的相似性或相异性，这些差异体现了数据集规模上的度量分布。因此，我们提出了一种名为 $\mathbf{MetricDistribution2vec}$ 的新颖嵌入策略，将这种分布特征提取到每个数据的向量表示中。我们展示了我们的表示方法在广泛的现实世界结构图数据集的监督预测任务中的应用和有效性。即使我们采用轻量级模型作为分类器，与所有数据集上的基线激增相比，结果也获得了一些意想不到的增长。此外，所提出的方法还在Few-Shot分类场景中进行了实验，结果在基于稀有训练样本的推理中仍然显示出有吸引力的辨别力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MetricDistribution2vec的新方法，通过捕捉数据集尺度上的度量分布特性，将图结构数据映射为向量表示以提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图嵌入方法主要关注图的局部属性（如拓扑结构、节点属性），但忽视了数据集尺度上的整体差异性，而这种差异性对分类任务具有重要影响。
AI.method: 通过采用距离度量计算数据对的相似性/差异性，将全局度量分布特征编码到向量表示中，构建名为MetricDistribution2vec的嵌入策略。
AI.result: 在多个真实结构图数据集的监督预测任务中，该方法在轻量级分类器下均优于现有基线方法，且在少样本分类场景中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: MetricDistribution2vec通过建模数据集尺度的度量分布，为图结构数据的表示学习提供了新视角，在多种任务场景下均具有竞争力。

conclusion: MetricDistribution2vec通过建模数据集尺度的度量分布，为图结构数据的表示学习提供了新视角，在多种任务场景下均具有竞争力。
search_text: Metric Distribution to Vector: Constructing Data Representation via Broad-Scale Discrepancies 向量的度量分布：通过大规模差异构建数据表示 Graph embedding provides a feasible methodology to conduct pattern classification for graph-structured data by mapping each data into the vectorial space. Various pioneering works are essentially coding method that concentrates on a vectorial representation about the inner properties of a graph in terms of the topological constitution, node attributions, link relations, etc. However, the classification for each targeted data is a qualitative issue based on understanding the overall discrepancies within the dataset scale. From the statistical point of view, these discrepancies manifest a metric distribution over the dataset scale if the distance metric is adopted to measure the pairwise similarity or dissimilarity. Therefore, we present a novel embedding strategy named $\mathbf{MetricDistribution2vec}$ to extract such distribution characteristics into the vectorial representation for each data. We demonstrate the application and effectiveness of our representation method in the supervised prediction tasks on extensive real-world structural graph datasets. The results have gained some unexpected increases compared with a surge of baselines on all the datasets, even if we take the lightweight models as classifiers. Moreover, the proposed methods also conducted experiments in Few-Shot classification scenarios, and the results still show attractive discrimination in rare training samples based inference. 图嵌入提供了一种可行的方法，通过将每个数据映射到向量空间来对图结构数据进行模式分类。各种开创性工作本质上都是编码方法，集中于图的拓扑构成、节点属性、链接关系等内部属性的向量表示。然而，每个目标数据的分类是一个基于理解数据集规模内的整体差异的定性问题。从统计的角度来看，如果采用距离度量来衡量成对的相似性或相异性，这些差异体现了数据集规模上的度量分布。因此，我们提出了一种名为 $\mathbf{MetricDistribution2vec}$ 的新颖嵌入策略，将这种分布特征提取到每个数据的向量表示中。我们展示了我们的表示方法在广泛的现实世界结构图数据集的监督预测任务中的应用和有效性。即使我们采用轻量级模型作为分类器，与所有数据集上的基线激增相比，结果也获得了一些意想不到的增长。此外，所提出的方法还在Few-Shot分类场景中进行了实验，结果在基于稀有训练样本的推理中仍然显示出有吸引力的辨别力。 本文提出一种名为MetricDistribution2vec的新方法，通过捕捉数据集尺度上的度量分布特性，将图结构数据映射为向量表示以提升分类性能。 Xue Liu,Dan Sun,Xiaobo Cao,Hao Ye,Wei Wei cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Yijun Cao,Xianshi Zhang,Fuya Luo,Chuan Lin,Yongjie Li
title: Unsupervised Visual Odometry and Action Integration for PointGoal Navigation in Indoor Environment
title_zh: 室内环境中 PointGoal 导航的无监督视觉里程计和动作集成
abstract: PointGoal navigation in indoor environment is a fundamental task for personal robots to navigate to a specified point. Recent studies solved this PointGoal navigation task with near-perfect success rate in photo-realistically simulated environments, under the assumptions with noiseless actuation and most importantly, perfect localization with GPS and compass sensors. However, accurate GPS signalis difficult to be obtained in real indoor environment. To improve the PointGoal navigation accuracy without GPS signal, we use visual odometry (VO) and propose a novel action integration module (AIM) trained in unsupervised manner. Sepecifically, unsupervised VO computes the relative pose of the agent from the re-projection error of two adjacent frames, and then replaces the accurate GPS signal with the path integration. The pseudo position estimated by VO is used to train action integration which assists agent to update their internal perception of location and helps improve the success rate of navigation. The training and inference process only use RGB, depth, collision as well as self-action information. The experiments show that the proposed system achieves satisfactory results and outperforms the partially supervised learning algorithms on the popular Gibson dataset.
summary: PointGoal navigation in indoor environment is a fundamental task for personal robots to navigate to a specified point. Recent studies solved this PointGoal navigation task with near-perfect success rate in photo-realistically simulated environments, under the assumptions with noiseless actuation and most importantly, perfect localization with GPS and compass sensors. However, accurate GPS signalis difficult to be obtained in real indoor environment. To improve the PointGoal navigation accuracy without GPS signal, we use visual odometry (VO) and propose a novel action integration module (AIM) trained in unsupervised manner. Sepecifically, unsupervised VO computes the relative pose of the agent from the re-projection error of two adjacent frames, and then replaces the accurate GPS signal with the path integration. The pseudo position estimated by VO is used to train action integration which assists agent to update their internal perception of location and helps improve the success rate of navigation. The training and inference process only use RGB, depth, collision as well as self-action information. The experiments show that the proposed system achieves satisfactory results and outperforms the partially supervised learning algorithms on the popular Gibson dataset.
abstract_zh: 室内环境中的PointGoal导航是个人机器人导航到指定点的基本任务。最近的研究在无噪音驱动的假设下，以及最重要的是使用 GPS 和罗盘传感器进行完美定位的假设下，在逼真的模拟环境中以近乎完美的成功率解决了 PointGoal 导航任务。然而，在真实的室内环境中很难获得准确的GPS信号。为了在没有 GPS 信号的情况下提高 PointGoal 导航精度，我们使用视觉里程计 (VO) 并提出了一种以无监督方式训练的新型动作集成模块 (AIM)。具体来说，无监督 VO 根据两个相邻帧的重投影误差计算智能体的相对姿态，然后用路径积分代替精确的 GPS 信号。 VO估计的伪位置用于训练动作集成，帮助智能体更新其内部位置感知，有助于提高导航的成功率。训练和推理过程仅使用 RGB、深度、碰撞以及自动作信息。实验表明，所提出的系统在流行的吉布森数据集上取得了令人满意的结果，并且优于部分监督学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需GPS的室内点目标导航方法，结合无监督视觉里程计与动作集成模块提升导航精度。
AI.motivation: 现有室内导航依赖GPS信号但实际环境中难以获取精准GPS，需开发无需外部定位的自主导航方案。
AI.method: 通过无监督视觉里程计计算相邻帧重投影误差估计相对位姿，结合动作集成模块利用RGB/深度/碰撞数据训练路径整合模型。
AI.result: 在Gibson数据集上导航成功率超越部分监督学习算法，验证了无GPS环境下系统的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过视觉里程计与动作感知的融合，为复杂室内环境下的自主导航提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Xingyu Chen,Ruonan Zhang,Ji Jiang,Yan Wang,Ge Li,Thomas H. Li
title: Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation: Solving the Edge-Fattening Problem
title_zh: 自监督单目深度估计：解决边缘肥化问题
abstract: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation (MDE) models universally suffer from the notorious edge-fattening issue. Triplet loss, as a widespread metric learning strategy, has largely succeeded in many computer vision applications. In this paper, we redesign the patch-based triplet loss in MDE to alleviate the ubiquitous edge-fattening issue. We show two drawbacks of the raw triplet loss in MDE and demonstrate our problem-driven redesigns. First, we present a min. operator based strategy applied to all negative samples, to prevent well-performing negatives sheltering the error of edge-fattening negatives. Second, we split the anchor-positive distance and anchor-negative distance from within the original triplet, which directly optimizes the positives without any mutual effect with the negatives. Extensive experiments show the combination of these two small redesigns can achieve unprecedented results: Our powerful and versatile triplet loss not only makes our model outperform all previous SoTA by a large margin, but also provides substantial performance boosts to a large number of existing models, while introducing no extra inference computation at all.
summary: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation (MDE) models universally suffer from the notorious edge-fattening issue. Triplet loss, as a widespread metric learning strategy, has largely succeeded in many computer vision applications. In this paper, we redesign the patch-based triplet loss in MDE to alleviate the ubiquitous edge-fattening issue. We show two drawbacks of the raw triplet loss in MDE and demonstrate our problem-driven redesigns. First, we present a min. operator based strategy applied to all negative samples, to prevent well-performing negatives sheltering the error of edge-fattening negatives. Second, we split the anchor-positive distance and anchor-negative distance from within the original triplet, which directly optimizes the positives without any mutual effect with the negatives. Extensive experiments show the combination of these two small redesigns can achieve unprecedented results: Our powerful and versatile triplet loss not only makes our model outperform all previous SoTA by a large margin, but also provides substantial performance boosts to a large number of existing models, while introducing no extra inference computation at all.
abstract_zh: 自监督单目深度估计（MDE）模型普遍存在臭名昭著的边缘肥厚问题。三重态损失作为一种广泛使用的度量学习策略，在许多计算机视觉应用中取得了很大的成功。在本文中，我们重新设计了 MDE 中基于补丁的三元组损失，以缓解普遍存在的边缘肥厚问题。我们展示了 MDE 中原始三重态损失的两个缺点，并展示了我们的问题驱动的重新设计。首先，我们介绍一下。基于算子的策略应用于所有负样本，以防止表现良好的负样本掩盖边缘肥厚负样本的错误。其次，我们从原始三元组中分离出锚点-正值距离和锚点-负值距离，这直接优化了正值，而与负值没有任何相互影响。大量的实验表明，这两个小的重新设计的结合可以取得前所未有的结果：我们强大且通用的三元组损失不仅使我们的模型大幅优于以前的所有 SoTA，而且还为大量现有模型提供了显着的性能提升，同时根本不引入额外的推理计算。

AI.tldr: 本文针对自监督单目深度估计中的边缘加粗问题，提出改进的三元组损失方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督单目深度估计模型普遍存在边缘加粗问题，而传统三元组损失在该任务中存在两个关键缺陷：负样本干扰和正负样本相互影响。
AI.method: 提出两种改进：1) 对所有负样本应用min操作符策略，避免优质负样本掩盖边缘加粗负样本的误差；2) 分离锚-正样本距离与锚-负样本距离，实现正样本独立优化。
AI.result: 改进方法使模型性能大幅超越现有SOTA，同时显著提升多个现有模型表现，且不增加推理计算量。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性改进三元组损失设计，有效解决了边缘加粗问题，为单目深度估计提供更优解决方案。

authors_text: A. K. M. Salman Hosain,Md Humaion Kabir Mehedi,Irteza Enan Kabir
title: PCONet: A Convolutional Neural Network Architecture to Detect Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) from Ovarian Ultrasound Images
title_zh: PCONet：一种卷积神经网络架构，用于从卵巢超声图像中检测多囊卵巢综合症 (PCOS)
abstract: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) is an endrocrinological dysfunction prevalent among women of reproductive age. PCOS is a combination of syndromes caused by an excess of androgens - a group of sex hormones - in women. Syndromes including acne, alopecia, hirsutism, hyperandrogenaemia, oligo-ovulation, etc. are caused by PCOS. It is also a major cause of female infertility. An estimated 15% of reproductive-aged women are affected by PCOS globally. The necessity of detecting PCOS early due to the severity of its deleterious effects cannot be overstated. In this paper, we have developed PCONet - a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) - to detect polycistic ovary from ovarian ultrasound images. We have also fine tuned InceptionV3 - a pretrained convolutional neural network of 45 layers - by utilizing the transfer learning method to classify polcystic ovarian ultrasound images. We have compared these two models on various quantitative performance evaluation parameters and demonstrated that PCONet is the superior one among these two with an accuracy of 98.12%, whereas the fine tuned InceptionV3 showcased an accuracy of 96.56% on test images.
summary: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) is an endrocrinological dysfunction prevalent among women of reproductive age. PCOS is a combination of syndromes caused by an excess of androgens - a group of sex hormones - in women. Syndromes including acne, alopecia, hirsutism, hyperandrogenaemia, oligo-ovulation, etc. are caused by PCOS. It is also a major cause of female infertility. An estimated 15% of reproductive-aged women are affected by PCOS globally. The necessity of detecting PCOS early due to the severity of its deleterious effects cannot be overstated. In this paper, we have developed PCONet - a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) - to detect polycistic ovary from ovarian ultrasound images. We have also fine tuned InceptionV3 - a pretrained convolutional neural network of 45 layers - by utilizing the transfer learning method to classify polcystic ovarian ultrasound images. We have compared these two models on various quantitative performance evaluation parameters and demonstrated that PCONet is the superior one among these two with an accuracy of 98.12%, whereas the fine tuned InceptionV3 showcased an accuracy of 96.56% on test images.
abstract_zh: 多囊卵巢综合症（PCOS）是一种常见于育龄妇女的内分泌功能障碍。多囊卵巢综合症是由女性体内雄激素（一组性激素）过量引起的综合综合征。痤疮、脱发、多毛症、高雄激素血症、少排卵等综合症都是由多囊卵巢综合症引起的。这也是导致女性不孕的重要原因。据估计，全球有 15% 的育龄女性受到 PCOS 的影响。由于 PCOS 有害影响的严重性，尽早发现 PCOS 的必要性怎么强调也不为过。在本文中，我们开发了 PCONet（一种卷积神经网络 (CNN)），用于从卵巢超声图像中检测多囊卵巢。我们还通过利用迁移学习方法对多囊卵巢超声图像进行分类，对 InceptionV3（一种预训练的 45 层卷积神经网络）进行了微调。我们在各种定量性能评估参数上对这两个模型进行了比较，并证明 PCONet 是这两个模型中的佼佼者，准确率达到 98.12%，而经过微调的 InceptionV3 在测试图像上的准确率达到 96.56%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PCONet的卷积神经网络架构，用于通过卵巢超声图像检测多囊卵巢综合征（PCOS）。
AI.motivation: 多囊卵巢综合征（PCOS）是育龄女性中常见的内分泌功能障碍，可能导致不孕及其他健康问题。早期准确检测PCOS对治疗至关重要，因此需要开发高效的自动检测方法。
AI.method: 开发了定制的PCONet模型，并通过迁移学习对预训练的InceptionV3模型进行微调，利用定量性能指标对比两种模型的分类效果。
AI.result: PCONet在测试图像上的准确率达到98.12%，而微调后的InceptionV3准确率为96.56%。
AI.conclusion: PCONet在检测多囊卵巢综合征的性能上优于微调后的InceptionV3模型，为PCOS的自动诊断提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Bin Xia,Yulun Zhang,Yitong Wang,Yapeng Tian,Wenming Yang,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Basic Binary Convolution Unit for Binarized Image Restoration Network
title_zh: 二值化图像恢复网络的基本二值卷积单元
comment: ICLR2023, code is available at https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/BBCU
comments: ICLR2023, code is available at https://github.com/Zj-BinXia/BBCU
abstract: Lighter and faster image restoration (IR) models are crucial for the deployment on resource-limited devices. Binary neural network (BNN), one of the most promising model compression methods, can dramatically reduce the computations and parameters of full-precision convolutional neural networks (CNN). However, there are different properties between BNN and full-precision CNN, and we can hardly use the experience of designing CNN to develop BNN. In this study, we reconsider components in binary convolution, such as residual connection, BatchNorm, activation function, and structure, for IR tasks. We conduct systematic analyses to explain each component's role in binary convolution and discuss the pitfalls. Specifically, we find that residual connection can reduce the information loss caused by binarization; BatchNorm can solve the value range gap between residual connection and binary convolution; The position of the activation function dramatically affects the performance of BNN. Based on our findings and analyses, we design a simple yet efficient basic binary convolution unit (BBCU). Furthermore, we divide IR networks into four parts and specially design variants of BBCU for each part to explore the benefit of binarizing these parts. We conduct experiments on different IR tasks, and our BBCU significantly outperforms other BNNs and lightweight models, which shows that BBCU can serve as a basic unit for binarized IR networks. All codes and models will be released.
summary: Lighter and faster image restoration (IR) models are crucial for the deployment on resource-limited devices. Binary neural network (BNN), one of the most promising model compression methods, can dramatically reduce the computations and parameters of full-precision convolutional neural networks (CNN). However, there are different properties between BNN and full-precision CNN, and we can hardly use the experience of designing CNN to develop BNN. In this study, we reconsider components in binary convolution, such as residual connection, BatchNorm, activation function, and structure, for IR tasks. We conduct systematic analyses to explain each component's role in binary convolution and discuss the pitfalls. Specifically, we find that residual connection can reduce the information loss caused by binarization; BatchNorm can solve the value range gap between residual connection and binary convolution; The position of the activation function dramatically affects the performance of BNN. Based on our findings and analyses, we design a simple yet efficient basic binary convolution unit (BBCU). Furthermore, we divide IR networks into four parts and specially design variants of BBCU for each part to explore the benefit of binarizing these parts. We conduct experiments on different IR tasks, and our BBCU significantly outperforms other BNNs and lightweight models, which shows that BBCU can serve as a basic unit for binarized IR networks. All codes and models will be released.
abstract_zh: 更轻、更快的图像恢复 (IR) 模型对于资源有限的设备上的部署至关重要。二元神经网络（BNN）是最有前途的模型压缩方法之一，可以大大减少全精度卷积神经网络（CNN）的计算量和参数。然而，BNN 和全精度 CNN 之间存在不同的特性，我们很难利用设计 CNN 的经验来开发 BNN。在本研究中，我们重新考虑 IR 任务中的二值卷积组件，例如残差连接、BatchNorm、激活函数和结构。我们进行系统分析来解释每个组件在二值卷积中的作用并讨论其中的陷阱。具体来说，我们发现残差连接可以减少二值化带来的信息损失； BatchNorm可以解决残差连接和二值卷积之间的取值范围差距；激活函数的位置极大地影响 BNN 的性能。根据我们的发现和分析，我们设计了一个简单而高效的基本二进制卷积单元（BBCU）。此外，我们将 IR 网络分为四个部分，并为每个部分专门设计了 BBCU 变体，以探索二值化这些部分的好处。我们对不同的 IR 任务进行了实验，我们的 BBCU 显着优于其他 BNN 和轻量级模型，这表明 BBCU 可以作为二值化 IR 网络的基本单元。所有代码和型号将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于二值化图像修复网络的基本二值卷积单元（BBCU），以提升二值神经网络在图像修复任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 二值神经网络（BNN）能显著减少计算量和参数量，但其设计与全精度CNN存在差异，现有CNN设计经验难以直接迁移至BNN，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 通过系统分析二值卷积中的残差连接、BatchNorm、激活函数等组件的作用，设计出高效的基本二值卷积单元（BBCU），并针对图像修复网络的不同部分定制化改进。
AI.result: 实验表明，BBCU在多种图像修复任务中显著优于其他二值网络和轻量级模型，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: BBCU可作为二值化图像修复网络的基础单元，为资源受限设备部署提供高效解决方案。

search_text: Basic Binary Convolution Unit for Binarized Image Restoration Network 二值化图像恢复网络的基本二值卷积单元 Lighter and faster image restoration (IR) models are crucial for the deployment on resource-limited devices. Binary neural network (BNN), one of the most promising model compression methods, can dramatically reduce the computations and parameters of full-precision convolutional neural networks (CNN). However, there are different properties between BNN and full-precision CNN, and we can hardly use the experience of designing CNN to develop BNN. In this study, we reconsider components in binary convolution, such as residual connection, BatchNorm, activation function, and structure, for IR tasks. We conduct systematic analyses to explain each component's role in binary convolution and discuss the pitfalls. Specifically, we find that residual connection can reduce the information loss caused by binarization; BatchNorm can solve the value range gap between residual connection and binary convolution; The position of the activation function dramatically affects the performance of BNN. Based on our findings and analyses, we design a simple yet efficient basic binary convolution unit (BBCU). Furthermore, we divide IR networks into four parts and specially design variants of BBCU for each part to explore the benefit of binarizing these parts. We conduct experiments on different IR tasks, and our BBCU significantly outperforms other BNNs and lightweight models, which shows that BBCU can serve as a basic unit for binarized IR networks. title: Systematic Generalization and Emergent Structures in Transformers Trained on Structured Tasks
title_zh: 在结构化任务上训练的 Transformer 中的系统泛化和紧急结构
abstract: Transformer networks have seen great success in natural language processing and machine vision, where task objectives such as next word prediction and image classification benefit from nuanced context sensitivity across high-dimensional inputs. However, there is an ongoing debate about how and when transformers can acquire highly structured behavior and achieve systematic generalization. Here, we explore how well a causal transformer can perform a set of algorithmic tasks, including copying, sorting, and hierarchical compositions of these operations. We demonstrate strong generalization to sequences longer than those used in training by replacing the standard positional encoding typically used in transformers with labels arbitrarily paired with items in the sequence. We search for the layer and head configuration sufficient to solve these tasks, then probe for signs of systematic processing in latent representations and attention patterns. We show that two-layer transformers learn reliable solutions to multi-level problems, develop signs of task decomposition, and encode input items in a way that encourages the exploitation of shared computation across related tasks. These results provide key insights into how attention layers support structured computation both within a task and across multiple tasks.
summary: Transformer networks have seen great success in natural language processing and machine vision, where task objectives such as next word prediction and image classification benefit from nuanced context sensitivity across high-dimensional inputs. However, there is an ongoing debate about how and when transformers can acquire highly structured behavior and achieve systematic generalization. Here, we explore how well a causal transformer can perform a set of algorithmic tasks, including copying, sorting, and hierarchical compositions of these operations. We demonstrate strong generalization to sequences longer than those used in training by replacing the standard positional encoding typically used in transformers with labels arbitrarily paired with items in the sequence. We search for the layer and head configuration sufficient to solve these tasks, then probe for signs of systematic processing in latent representations and attention patterns. We show that two-layer transformers learn reliable solutions to multi-level problems, develop signs of task decomposition, and encode input items in a way that encourages the exploitation of shared computation across related tasks. These results provide key insights into how attention layers support structured computation both within a task and across multiple tasks.
abstract_zh: Transformer 网络在自然语言处理和机器视觉领域取得了巨大成功，其中下一个单词预测和图像分类等任务目标受益于高维输入的微妙上下文敏感性。然而，关于 Transformer 如何以及何时获得高度结构化的行为并实现系统泛化一直存在争论。在这里，我们探讨因果转换器如何很好地执行一组算法任务，包括复制、排序和这些操作的分层组合。通过用与序列中的项目任意配对的标签替换变压器中通常使用的标准位置编码，我们展示了对比训练中使用的序列更长的序列的强泛化能力。我们搜索足以解决这些任务的层和头配置，然后探索潜在表示和注意模式中系统处理的迹象。我们表明，两层转换器学习多级问题的可靠解决方案，开发任务分解的迹象，并以鼓励跨相关任务利用共享计算的方式对输入项进行编码。这些结果提供了关于注意力层如何支持任务内和跨多个任务的结构化计算的关键见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Transformer模型在结构化任务（如复制、排序）中的系统泛化能力及潜在结构，探索其如何通过注意力机制实现跨任务的结构化计算。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在自然语言处理和计算机视觉中表现优异，但其是否能习得高度结构化行为并实现系统泛化仍存在争议，需通过算法任务验证其内在机制。
AI.method: 采用因果Transformer模型，替换标准位置编码为任意标签对序列项的配对，分析不同层和头的配置，并探测潜在表示与注意力模式中的系统化处理迹象。
AI.result: 两层Transformer能可靠解决多层级问题，展现任务分解能力，并通过共享计算编码输入项，实现对训练序列外更长序列的泛化。
AI.conclusion: 注意力层在单任务内部及跨任务间支持结构化计算，揭示了Transformer处理算法任务时的系统化行为与泛化机制。

search_text: Systematic Generalization and Emergent Structures in Transformers Trained on Structured Tasks 在结构化任务上训练的 Transformer 中的系统泛化和紧急结构 Transformer networks have seen great success in natural language processing and machine vision, where task objectives such as next word prediction and image classification benefit from nuanced context sensitivity across high-dimensional inputs. However, there is an ongoing debate about how and when transformers can acquire highly structured behavior and achieve systematic generalization. Here, we explore how well a causal transformer can perform a set of algorithmic tasks, including copying, sorting, and hierarchical compositions of these operations. We demonstrate strong generalization to sequences longer than those used in training by replacing the standard positional encoding typically used in transformers with labels arbitrarily paired with items in the sequence. We search for the layer and head configuration sufficient to solve these tasks, then probe for signs of systematic processing in latent representations and attention patterns. We show that two-layer transformers learn reliable solutions to multi-level problems, develop signs of task decomposition, and encode input items in a way that encourages the exploitation of shared computation across related tasks. These results provide key insights into how attention layers support structured computation both within a task and across multiple tasks. title: Physical Computing: A Category Theoretic Perspective on Physical Computation and System Compositionality
title_zh: 物理计算：物理计算和系统组合性的范畴论视角
abstract: This paper introduces a category theory-based framework to redefine physical computing in light of advancements in quantum computing and non-standard computing systems. By integrating classical definitions within this broader perspective, the paper rigorously recontextualizes what constitutes physical computing devices and processes. It demonstrates how the compositional nature and relational structures of physical computing systems can be coherently formalized using category theory. This approach not only encapsulates recent formalisms in physical computing but also offers a structured method to explore the dynamic interactions within these systems.
summary: This paper introduces a category theory-based framework to redefine physical computing in light of advancements in quantum computing and non-standard computing systems. By integrating classical definitions within this broader perspective, the paper rigorously recontextualizes what constitutes physical computing devices and processes. It demonstrates how the compositional nature and relational structures of physical computing systems can be coherently formalized using category theory. This approach not only encapsulates recent formalisms in physical computing but also offers a structured method to explore the dynamic interactions within these systems.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于范畴论的框架，根据量子计算和非标准计算系统的进步重新定义物理计算。通过将经典定义融入到这个更广泛的视角中，本文严格地重新解释了物理计算设备和过程的构成。它演示了如何使用范畴论连贯地形式化物理计算系统的组成性质和关系结构。这种方法不仅封装了物理计算中最新的形式主义，而且还提供了一种结构化方法来探索这些系统内的动态交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于范畴论的框架，重新定义物理计算并整合经典与现代计算系统。
AI.motivation: 为应对量子计算等新型系统的挑战，需构建更通用的理论框架以统一描述物理计算的组成性与动态交互。
AI.method: 通过范畴论形式化物理计算系统的组合结构与关系，整合经典定义并扩展至非标准计算模型。
AI.result: 建立统一的数学框架，可严谨描述物理计算设备及过程，并为系统交互分析提供结构化工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅兼容现有理论，还为跨学科研究提供了形式化分析新型计算系统的通用范式。

authors_text: David A. Bader,Fuhuan Li,Anya Ganeshan,Ahmet Gundogdu,Jason Lew,Oliver Alvarado Rodriguez,Zhihui Du
title: Triangle Counting Through Cover-Edges
title_zh: 通过盖边缘进行三角形计数
comment: The 27th Annual IEEE High Performance Extreme Computing Conference (HPEC), Virtual, September 25-29, 2023. Graph Challenge Student Innovation Award
comments: The 27th Annual IEEE High Performance Extreme Computing Conference (HPEC), Virtual, September 25-29, 2023. Graph Challenge Student Innovation Award
abstract: Counting and finding triangles in graphs is often used in real-world analytics to characterize cohesiveness and identify communities in graphs. In this paper, we propose the novel concept of a cover-edge set that can be used to find triangles more efficiently. We use a breadth-first search (BFS) to quickly generate a compact cover-edge set. Novel sequential and parallel triangle counting algorithms are presented that employ cover-edge sets. The sequential algorithm avoids unnecessary triangle-checking operations, and the parallel algorithm is communication-efficient. The parallel algorithm can asymptotically reduce communication on massive graphs such as from real social networks and synthetic graphs from the Graph500 Benchmark. In our estimate from massive-scale Graph500 graphs, our new parallel algorithm can reduce the communication on a scale 36 graph by 1156x and on a scale 42 graph by 2368x.
summary: Counting and finding triangles in graphs is often used in real-world analytics to characterize cohesiveness and identify communities in graphs. In this paper, we propose the novel concept of a cover-edge set that can be used to find triangles more efficiently. We use a breadth-first search (BFS) to quickly generate a compact cover-edge set. Novel sequential and parallel triangle counting algorithms are presented that employ cover-edge sets. The sequential algorithm avoids unnecessary triangle-checking operations, and the parallel algorithm is communication-efficient. The parallel algorithm can asymptotically reduce communication on massive graphs such as from real social networks and synthetic graphs from the Graph500 Benchmark. In our estimate from massive-scale Graph500 graphs, our new parallel algorithm can reduce the communication on a scale 36 graph by 1156x and on a scale 42 graph by 2368x.
abstract_zh: 计算和查找图中的三角形通常用于现实世界的分析中，以表征内聚性并识别图中的社区。在本文中，我们提出了覆盖边缘集的新概念，可用于更有效地查找三角形。我们使用广度优先搜索（BFS）来快速生成紧凑的覆盖边缘集。提出了采用覆盖边缘集的新颖的顺序和并行三角形计数算法。顺序算法避免了不必要的三角检查操作，并行算法通信效率高。并行算法可以渐近减少海量图上的通信，例如来自真实社交网络和 Graph500 基准的合成图。根据我们对大规模 Graph500 图的估计，我们的新并行算法可以将 36 尺度图上的通信减少 1156 倍，将 42 尺度图上的通信减少 2368 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过覆盖边集合高效计数图中三角形的方法，优化了传统算法在大规模图上的效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有三角形计数算法在处理大规模图（如社交网络）时存在计算效率低、通信开销大的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用广度优先搜索（BFS）生成紧凑的覆盖边集合，并设计顺序与并行算法，通过覆盖边减少冗余计算与通信开销。
AI.result: 在Graph500基准测试中，新并行算法使大规模图通信量减少1156倍（规模36）至2368倍（规模42）。
AI.conclusion: 覆盖边集合方法显著提升了三角形计数的效率，尤其适用于超大规模图分析场景。

authors_text: Kyle Gao,Yina Gao,Hongjie He,Dening Lu,Linlin Xu,Jonathan Li
title: NeRF: Neural Radiance Field in 3D Vision: A Comprehensive Review (Updated Post-Gaussian Splatting)
title_zh: NeRF：3D 视觉中的神经辐射场：综合回顾（更新后高斯泼溅）
abstract: In March 2020, Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) revolutionized Computer Vision, allowing for implicit, neural network-based scene representation and novel view synthesis. NeRF models have found diverse applications in robotics, urban mapping, autonomous navigation, virtual reality/augmented reality, and more. In August 2023, Gaussian Splatting, a direct competitor to the NeRF-based framework, was proposed, gaining tremendous momentum and overtaking NeRF-based research in terms of interest as the dominant framework for novel view synthesis. We present a comprehensive survey of NeRF papers from the past five years (2020-2025). These include papers from the pre-Gaussian Splatting era, where NeRF dominated the field for novel view synthesis and 3D implicit and hybrid representation neural field learning. We also include works from the post-Gaussian Splatting era where NeRF and implicit/hybrid neural fields found more niche applications. Our survey is organized into architecture and application-based taxonomies in the pre-Gaussian Splatting era, as well as a categorization of active research areas for NeRF, neural field, and implicit/hybrid neural representation methods. We provide an introduction to the theory of NeRF and its training via differentiable volume rendering. We also present a benchmark comparison of the performance and speed of classical NeRF, implicit and hybrid neural representation, and neural field models, and an overview of key datasets.

We also include works from the post-Gaussian Splatting era where NeRF and implicit/hybrid neural fields found more niche applications. Our survey is organized into architecture and application-based taxonomies in the pre-Gaussian Splatting era, as well as a categorization of active research areas for NeRF, neural field, and implicit/hybrid neural representation methods. We provide an introduction to the theory of NeRF and its training via differentiable volume rendering. We also present a benchmark comparison of the performance and speed of classical NeRF, implicit and hybrid neural representation, and neural field models, and an overview of key datasets.
abstract_zh: 2020 年 3 月，神经辐射场 (NeRF) 彻底改变了计算机视觉，允许基于神经网络的隐式场景表示和新颖的视图合成。 NeRF 模型在机器人、城市测绘、自主导航、虚拟现实/增强现实等领域有着广泛的应用。 2023 年 8 月，基于 NeRF 的框架的直接竞争对手 Gaussian Splatting 被提出，获得了巨大的发展势头，并在兴趣方面超越了基于 NeRF 的研究，成为新颖视图合成的主导框架。我们对过去五年（2020-2025）的 NeRF 论文进行了全面调查。其中包括前高斯泼溅时代的论文，其中 NeRF 在新颖视图合成以及 3D 隐式和混合表示神经场学习领域占据主导地位。我们还包括后高斯泼溅时代的作品，其中 NeRF 和隐式/混合神经领域找到了更多的利基应用。我们的调查分为前高斯泼溅时代的架构和基于应用的分类法，以及 NeRF、神经场和隐式/混合神经表示方法的活跃研究领域的分类。我们介绍了 NeRF 的理论及其通过可微分体渲染进行的训练。我们还提供了经典 NeRF、隐式和混合神经表示以及神经场模型的性能和速度的基准比较，以及关键数据集的概述。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了2020年至2025年间NeRF（神经辐射场）及相关技术的发展，涵盖Gaussian Splatting出现前后的研究进展。
AI.motivation: NeRF在三维视觉领域引发革命性变革，但Gaussian Splatting的出现改变了研究格局，需系统梳理NeRF的技术演进与应用现状。
AI.method: 按时间线（Gaussian Splatting前后）分类，结合架构与应用维度建立技术分类体系，并通过基准测试对比不同方法的性能与速度。
AI.result: 构建了NeRF技术的完整分类框架，总结了其在机器人、城市建模等领域的应用，并分析了Gaussian Splatting兴起后NeRF的转型方向。
AI.conclusion: NeRF仍是三维隐式表示的重要基础，但Gaussian Splatting的高效性使其成为新型视图合成的主流框架，未来研究需关注两者的互补性。

title: Optimized Decoders for Mixed-Order Ambisonics
title_zh: 混合阶高保真度立体声响优化解码器
abstract: In this paper we discuss the motivation, design, and analysis of ambisonic decoders for systems where the vertical order is less than the horizontal order, known as mixed-order Ambisonic systems. This can be due to the use of microphone arrays that emphasize horizontal spatial resolution or speaker arrays that provide sparser coverage vertically. First, we review Ambisonic reproduction criteria, as defined by Gerzon, and summarize recent results on the relative perceptual importance of the various criteria. Then we show that using full-order decoders with mixed-order program material results in poorer performance than with a properly designed mixed-order decoder. We then introduce a new implementation of a decoder optimizer that draws upon techniques from machine learning for quick and robust convergence, discuss the construction of the objective function, and apply it to the problem of designing two-band decoders for mixed-order signal sets and non-uniform loudspeaker layouts. Results of informal listening tests are summarized and future directions discussed.
summary: In this paper we discuss the motivation, design, and analysis of ambisonic decoders for systems where the vertical order is less than the horizontal order, known as mixed-order Ambisonic systems. This can be due to the use of microphone arrays that emphasize horizontal spatial resolution or speaker arrays that provide sparser coverage vertically. First, we review Ambisonic reproduction criteria, as defined by Gerzon, and summarize recent results on the relative perceptual importance of the various criteria. Then we show that using full-order decoders with mixed-order program material results in poorer performance than with a properly designed mixed-order decoder. We then introduce a new implementation of a decoder optimizer that draws upon techniques from machine learning for quick and robust convergence, discuss the construction of the objective function, and apply it to the problem of designing two-band decoders for mixed-order signal sets and non-uniform loudspeaker layouts. Results of informal listening tests are summarized and future directions discussed.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们讨论了垂直阶次小于水平阶次的系统（称为混合阶高保真度立体声响系统）的高保真度立体声响解码器的动机、设计和分析。这可能是由于使用了强调水平空间分辨率的麦克风阵列或提供稀疏垂直覆盖的扬声器阵列。首先，我们回顾 Gerzon 定义的 Ambisonic 再现标准，并总结有关各种标准的相对感知重要性的最新结果。然后我们表明，使用具有混合阶程序材料的全阶解码器会导致比正确设计的混合阶解码器性能更差。然后，我们介绍了解码器优化器的新实现，该实现利用机器学习技术实现快速、稳健的收敛，讨论目标函数的构造，并将其应用于针对混合阶信号集和非均匀扬声器布局设计双频段解码器的问题。总结了非正式听力测试的结果并讨论了未来的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了混合阶Ambisonic系统中优化解码器的设计与分析，以提升音频空间再现质量。
AI.motivation: 现有全阶解码器在处理垂直阶数低于水平阶数的混合阶Ambisonic内容时性能不足，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 基于Gerzon的Ambisonic再现准则，结合机器学习技术构建目标函数，设计适用于混合阶信号和非均匀扬声器布局的两频段解码器优化方案。
AI.result: 非正式听音测试表明优化后的解码器在空间感知和音质表现上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合阶解码器优化可有效提升Ambisonic系统性能，机器学习方法为解码器设计提供新思路，未来需进一步验证和标准化。
