abstract_zh: 少样本学习是机器学习的一个重要但具有挑战性的问题，旨在仅从较少的标记训练样本中进行学习。由于深度学习需要大量标记数据集，这在现实世界中是不可行的，因此它已成为一个活跃的研究领域。从一些例子中学习也是向像人类一样学习的重要尝试。事实证明，少样本学习在机器学习应用的不同领域（尤其是图像分类）具有非常好的前景。由于它是一项最新技术，因此大多数研究人员只关注 Mini-ImageNet 和 Omniglot 等常见图像数据集，从而专注于理解和解决与其概念相关的问题。少样本学习还为解决阿姆哈拉语等资源匮乏的语言提供了机会。在本研究中，解决了使用少样本学习的离线手写阿姆哈拉语字符识别问题。特别是，原型网络（流行且简单的小样本学习类型）被作为基线实现。利用在阿姆哈拉字母的性质中探索的具有行方向和列方向相似性的机会，提出了一种增强训练集的新方法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于基线方法。这项研究首次实现了阿姆哈拉语字符的小样本学习。更重要的是，该研究的结果开辟了检验训练片段对小样本学习影响的新方法，这是需要探索的重要问题之一。本研究使用的数据集是使用作为本研究的一部分开发的 Android 应用程序从母语阿姆哈拉语作者那里收集的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于少量样本学习（Few-shot Learning）的离线手写阿姆哈拉语字符识别方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习需要大量标注数据，而阿姆哈拉语等低资源语言缺乏足够标注数据，传统方法难以应用。少量样本学习可解决此问题，并探索人类学习方式。
AI.method: 以原型网络（Prototypical Networks）为基线，利用阿姆哈拉语字母行列相似性特性，提出新的训练集增强方法。
AI.result: 新方法在实验中优于基线模型，首次将少量样本学习应用于阿姆哈拉语字符识别，并揭示了训练集设计对少量样本学习的影响。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为低资源语言的字符识别提供了新思路，同时为少量样本学习中训练集设计的优化方向提供了实证支持。

authors_text: Xialei Liu,Yu-Song Hu,Xu-Sheng Cao,Andrew D. Bagdanov,Ke Li,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: Long-Tailed Class Incremental Learning
title_zh: 长尾类增量学习
abstract: In class incremental learning (CIL) a model must learn new classes in a sequential manner without forgetting old ones. However, conventional CIL methods consider a balanced distribution for each new task, which ignores the prevalence of long-tailed distributions in the real world. In this work we propose two long-tailed CIL scenarios, which we term ordered and shuffled LT-CIL. Ordered LT-CIL considers the scenario where we learn from head classes collected with more samples than tail classes which have few. Shuffled LT-CIL, on the other hand, assumes a completely random long-tailed distribution for each task. We systematically evaluate existing methods in both LT-CIL scenarios and demonstrate very different behaviors compared to conventional CIL scenarios. Additionally, we propose a two-stage learning baseline with a learnable weight scaling layer for reducing the bias caused by long-tailed distribution in LT-CIL and which in turn also improves the performance of conventional CIL due to the limited exemplars. Our results demonstrate the superior performance (up to 6.44 points in average incremental accuracy) of our approach on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet-Subset. The code is available at https://github.com/xialeiliu/Long-Tailed-CIL
summary: In class incremental learning (CIL) a model must learn new classes in a sequential manner without forgetting old ones. However, conventional CIL methods consider a balanced distribution for each new task, which ignores the prevalence of long-tailed distributions in the real world. In this work we propose two long-tailed CIL scenarios, which we term ordered and shuffled LT-CIL. Ordered LT-CIL considers the scenario where we learn from head classes collected with more samples than tail classes which have few. Shuffled LT-CIL, on the other hand, assumes a completely random long-tailed distribution for each task. We systematically evaluate existing methods in both LT-CIL scenarios and demonstrate very different behaviors compared to conventional CIL scenarios. Additionally, we propose a two-stage learning baseline with a learnable weight scaling layer for reducing the bias caused by long-tailed distribution in LT-CIL and which in turn also improves the performance of conventional CIL due to the limited exemplars. Our results demonstrate the superior performance (up to 6.44 points in average incremental accuracy) of our approach on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet-Subset. The code is available at https://github.com/xialeiliu/Long-Tailed-CIL
abstract_zh: 在类增量学习（CIL）中，模型必须按顺序学习新类，而不会忘记旧类。然而，传统的 CIL 方法考虑每个新任务的平衡分布，忽略了现实世界中长尾分布的普遍性。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种长尾 CIL 场景，我们将其称为有序和混洗 LT-CIL。有序 LT-CIL 考虑这样的场景：我们从收集的样本较多的头类中学习，而不是从样本较少的尾类中学习。另一方面，打乱的 LT-CIL 为每个任务假设完全随机的长尾分布。我们系统地评估了 LT-CIL 场景中的现有方法，并展示了与传统 CIL 场景相比非常不同的行为。此外，我们提出了一个带有可学习权重缩放层的两阶段学习基线，用于减少 LT-CIL 中长尾分布引起的偏差，反过来又提高了由于样本有限而导致的传统 CIL 的性能。我们的结果证明了我们的方法在 CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet-Subset 上的卓越性能（平均增量精度高达 6.44 点）。代码可在 https://github.com/xialeiliu/Long-Tailed-CIL 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究长尾分布下的类别增量学习问题，提出两种新的LT-CIL场景并设计改进方法以解决传统CIL方法在长尾数据中的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统CIL方法假设每个任务数据分布平衡，但现实场景中长尾分布普遍存在，导致现有方法在长尾数据下表现不佳，需针对性改进。
AI.method: 提出有序LT-CIL和随机LT-CIL两种场景，设计两阶段学习框架并引入可学习权重缩放层，以缓解长尾分布偏差并提升传统CIL性能。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和ImageNet-Subset数据集上，方法平均增量准确率提升最高达6.44点，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了长尾CIL的挑战，验证了现有方法在长尾场景下的局限性，为后续研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Dang-Khanh Nguyen,Sudarshan Pant,Ngoc-Huynh Ho,Guee-Sang Lee,Soo-Huyng Kim,Hyung-Jeong Yang
title: Fine-tuning Wav2vec for Vocal-burst Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 微调 Wav2vec 以实现突发声音情绪识别
abstract: The ACII Affective Vocal Bursts (A-VB) competition introduces a new topic in affective computing, which is understanding emotional expression using the non-verbal sound of humans. We are familiar with emotion recognition via verbal vocal or facial expression. However, the vocal bursts such as laughs, cries, and signs, are not exploited even though they are very informative for behavior analysis. The A-VB competition comprises four tasks that explore non-verbal information in different spaces. This technical report describes the method and the result of SclabCNU Team for the tasks of the challenge. We achieved promising results compared to the baseline model provided by the organizers.
summary: The ACII Affective Vocal Bursts (A-VB) competition introduces a new topic in affective computing, which is understanding emotional expression using the non-verbal sound of humans. We are familiar with emotion recognition via verbal vocal or facial expression. However, the vocal bursts such as laughs, cries, and signs, are not exploited even though they are very informative for behavior analysis. The A-VB competition comprises four tasks that explore non-verbal information in different spaces. This technical report describes the method and the result of SclabCNU Team for the tasks of the challenge. We achieved promising results compared to the baseline model provided by the organizers.
abstract_zh: ACII Affective Vocal Bursts (A-VB) 竞赛引入了情感计算的一个新主题，即使用人类的非语言声音来理解情感表达。我们熟悉通过言语或面部表情进行情感识别。然而，尽管笑声、哭声和手势等声音爆发对于行为分析来说信息量很大，但它们并没有被利用。 A-VB 竞赛包括四项探索不同空间中非语言信息的任务。本技术报告描述了 SclabCNU 团队完成挑战任务的方法和结果。与组织者提供的基线模型相比，我们取得了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是通过微调Wav2vec模型，利用非语言声音（如笑声、哭声）进行情感识别，参与ACII A-VB竞赛并取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管言语和面部表情是常见的情感识别途径，但非语言声音（如笑声、哭声）蕴含丰富情感信息，却未被充分研究，因此需探索其在情感分析中的应用。
AI.method: 采用预训练的Wav2vec模型，针对非语言声音数据进行微调，优化模型以识别情感类别。
AI.result: 相比竞赛提供的基线模型，SclabCNU团队的方法在任务中取得了更优的识别效果。
AI.conclusion: 微调Wav2vec模型能有效提升非语言声音情感识别性能，为非言语情感分析提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Bastiaan Tamm,Helena Balabin,Rik Vandenberghe,Hugo Van hamme
title: Pre-trained Speech Representations as Feature Extractors for Speech Quality Assessment in Online Conferencing Applications
title_zh: 预训练的语音表示作为在线会议应用中语音质量评估的特征提取器
abstract: Speech quality in online conferencing applications is typically assessed through human judgements in the form of the mean opinion score (MOS) metric. Since such a labor-intensive approach is not feasible for large-scale speech quality assessments in most settings, the focus has shifted towards automated MOS prediction through end-to-end training of deep neural networks (DNN). Instead of training a network from scratch, we propose to leverage the speech representations from the pre-trained wav2vec-based XLS-R model. However, the number of parameters of such a model exceeds task-specific DNNs by several orders of magnitude, which poses a challenge for resulting fine-tuning procedures on smaller datasets. Therefore, we opt to use pre-trained speech representations from XLS-R in a feature extraction rather than a fine-tuning setting, thereby significantly reducing the number of trainable model parameters. We compare our proposed XLS-R-based feature extractor to a Mel-frequency cepstral coefficient (MFCC)-based one, and experiment with various combinations of bidirectional long short term memory (Bi-LSTM) and attention pooling feedforward (AttPoolFF) networks trained on the output of the feature extractors. We demonstrate the increased performance of pre-trained XLS-R embeddings in terms a reduced root mean squared error (RMSE) on the ConferencingSpeech 2022 MOS prediction task.
summary: Speech quality in online conferencing applications is typically assessed through human judgements in the form of the mean opinion score (MOS) metric. Since such a labor-intensive approach is not feasible for large-scale speech quality assessments in most settings, the focus has shifted towards automated MOS prediction through end-to-end training of deep neural networks (DNN). Instead of training a network from scratch, we propose to leverage the speech representations from the pre-trained wav2vec-based XLS-R model. However, the number of parameters of such a model exceeds task-specific DNNs by several orders of magnitude, which poses a challenge for resulting fine-tuning procedures on smaller datasets. Therefore, we opt to use pre-trained speech representations from XLS-R in a feature extraction rather than a fine-tuning setting, thereby significantly reducing the number of trainable model parameters. We compare our proposed XLS-R-based feature extractor to a Mel-frequency cepstral coefficient (MFCC)-based one, and experiment with various combinations of bidirectional long short term memory (Bi-LSTM) and attention pooling feedforward (AttPoolFF) networks trained on the output of the feature extractors. We demonstrate the increased performance of pre-trained XLS-R embeddings in terms a reduced root mean squared error (RMSE) on the ConferencingSpeech 2022 MOS prediction task.
abstract_zh: 在线会议应用程序中的语音质量通常通过人工判断以平均意见得分 (MOS) 指标的形式进行评估。由于这种劳动密集型方法在大多数情况下不适用于大规模语音质量评估，因此重点已转向通过深度神经网络 (DNN) 的端到端训练进行自动 MOS 预测。我们建议利用基于 wav2vec 的预训练 XLS-R 模型的语音表示，而不是从头开始训练网络。然而，此类模型的参数数量超过特定于任务的 DNN 几个数量级，这对较小数据集上的微调过程提出了挑战。因此，我们选择在特征提取中使用 XLS-R 的预训练语音表示，而不是微调设置，从而显着减少可训练模型参数的数量。我们将我们提出的基于 XLS-R 的特征提取器与基于梅尔频率倒谱系数 (MFCC) 的特征提取器进行比较，并实验了根据特征提取器的输出训练的双向长期短期记忆 (Bi-LSTM) 和注意池前馈 (AttPoolFF) 网络的各种组合。我们在 ConferencingSpeech 2022 MOS 预测任务中证明了预训练 XLS-R 嵌入在降低均方根误差 (RMSE) 方面的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预训练的XLS-R模型作为特征提取器，用于在线会议应用中的语音质量评估，以替代传统的端到端深度神经网络训练方法。
AI.motivation: 人工评估语音质量（MOS）效率低下，而端到端训练的深度神经网络参数量庞大，难以在小数据集上进行微调，因此需寻找更高效的特征提取方法。
AI.method: 采用XLS-R预训练模型提取语音特征，结合Bi-LSTM和AttPoolFF网络进行建模，并与基于MFCC的传统方法对比验证效果。
AI.result: 在ConferencingSpeech 2022数据集上，XLS-R特征提取器的RMSE显著低于MFCC方法，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 预训练语音表征（如XLS-R）作为特征提取器可有效提升语音质量评估性能，且参数量更少，适合实际应用。

We compare our proposed XLS-R-based feature extractor to a Mel-frequency cepstral coefficient (MFCC)-based one, and experiment with various combinations of bidirectional long short term memory (Bi-LSTM) and attention pooling feedforward (AttPoolFF) networks trained on the output of the feature extractors. authors_text: Linfeng Liu,Siyu Liu,Lu Zhang,Xuan Vinh To,Fatima Nasrallah,Shekhar S. Chandra
title: Cascaded Multi-Modal Mixing Transformers for Alzheimer's Disease Classification with Incomplete Data
title_zh: 用于数据不完整的阿尔茨海默病分类的级联多模态混合变压器
abstract: Accurate medical classification requires a large number of multi-modal data, and in many cases, different feature types. Previous studies have shown promising results when using multi-modal data, outperforming single-modality models when classifying diseases such as Alzheimer's Disease (AD). However, those models are usually not flexible enough to handle missing modalities. Currently, the most common workaround is discarding samples with missing modalities which leads to considerable data under-utilization. Adding to the fact that labeled medical images are already scarce, the performance of data-driven methods like deep learning can be severely hampered. Therefore, a multi-modal method that can handle missing data in various clinical settings is highly desirable. In this paper, we present Multi-Modal Mixing Transformer (3MAT), a disease classification transformer that not only leverages multi-modal data but also handles missing data scenarios. In this work, we test 3MT for AD and Cognitively normal (CN) classification and mild cognitive impairment (MCI) conversion prediction to progressive MCI (pMCI) or stable MCI (sMCI) using clinical and neuroimaging data. The model uses a novel Cascaded Modality Transformer architecture with cross-attention to incorporate multi-modal information for more informed predictions. We propose a novel modality dropout mechanism to ensure an unprecedented level of modality independence and robustness to handle missing data scenarios. The result is a versatile network that enables the mixing of arbitrary numbers of modalities with different feature types and also ensures full data utilization missing data scenarios. The model is trained and evaluated on the ADNI dataset with the SOTRA performance and further evaluated with the AIBL dataset with missing data.
summary: Accurate medical classification requires a large number of multi-modal data, and in many cases, different feature types. Previous studies have shown promising results when using multi-modal data, outperforming single-modality models when classifying diseases such as Alzheimer's Disease (AD). However, those models are usually not flexible enough to handle missing modalities. Currently, the most common workaround is discarding samples with missing modalities which leads to considerable data under-utilization. Adding to the fact that labeled medical images are already scarce, the performance of data-driven methods like deep learning can be severely hampered. Therefore, a multi-modal method that can handle missing data in various clinical settings is highly desirable. In this paper, we present Multi-Modal Mixing Transformer (3MAT), a disease classification transformer that not only leverages multi-modal data but also handles missing data scenarios. In this work, we test 3MT for AD and Cognitively normal (CN) classification and mild cognitive impairment (MCI) conversion prediction to progressive MCI (pMCI) or stable MCI (sMCI) using clinical and neuroimaging data. The model uses a novel Cascaded Modality Transformer architecture with cross-attention to incorporate multi-modal information for more informed predictions. We propose a novel modality dropout mechanism to ensure an unprecedented level of modality independence and robustness to handle missing data scenarios. The result is a versatile network that enables the mixing of arbitrary numbers of modalities with different feature types and also ensures full data utilization missing data scenarios. The model is trained and evaluated on the ADNI dataset with the SOTRA performance and further evaluated with the AIBL dataset with missing data.
abstract_zh: 准确的医学分类需要大量的多模态数据，并且在许多情况下需要不同的特征类型。先前的研究已经显示出使用多模态数据的有希望的结果，在对阿尔茨海默病（AD）等疾病进行分类时，其表现优于单模态模型。然而，这些模型通常不够灵活，无法处理缺失的模式。目前，最常见的解决方法是丢弃缺少模式的样本，这会导致大量数据未得到充分利用。除了标记的医学图像已经稀缺之外，深度学习等数据驱动方法的性能可能会受到严重阻碍。因此，非常需要一种能够处理各种临床环境中缺失数据的多模式方法。在本文中，我们提出了多模态混合变压器（3MAT），这是一种疾病分类变压器，不仅可以利用多模态数据，还可以处理丢失的数据场景。在这项工作中，我们使用临床和神经影像数据测试 3MT 的 AD 和认知正常 (CN) 分类以及轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 向进行性 MCI (pMCI) 或稳定 MCI (sMCI) 的转换预测。该模型使用新颖的级联模态转换器架构，具有交叉注意力，可合并多模态信息以进行更明智的预测。我们提出了一种新颖的模态丢失机制，以确保前所未有的模态独立性和稳健性来处理丢失的数据场景。其结果是一个多功能网络，可以混合任意数量的具有不同特征类型的模态，并确保在缺失数据场景下充分利用数据。该模型在具有 SOTRA 性能的 ADNI 数据集上进行训练和评估，并使用缺失数据的 AIBL 数据集进行进一步评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为3MAT的多模态混合Transformer模型，用于处理阿尔茨海默病分类中的不完整数据问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态模型在处理缺失模态时通常通过丢弃样本解决，导致数据利用率低且影响模型性能，尤其在医疗数据稀缺的情况下问题更为严重。
AI.method: 设计级联模态Transformer架构结合交叉注意力机制，提出模态丢弃机制以增强模态独立性与鲁棒性，支持任意数量不同特征类型的模态混合。
AI.result: 在ADNI和AIBL数据集上验证，模型在AD/CN分类及MCI转化预测任务中表现出色，有效利用了不完整数据。
AI.conclusion: 3MAT通过灵活处理缺失模态和多模态融合，在医疗数据不完整场景下实现了更高效、稳健的疾病分类。

search_text: Cascaded Multi-Modal Mixing Transformers for Alzheimer's Disease Classification with Incomplete Data 用于数据不完整的阿尔茨海默病分类的级联多模态混合变压器 Accurate medical classification requires a large number of multi-modal data, and in many cases, different feature types. Previous studies have shown promising results when using multi-modal data, outperforming single-modality models when classifying diseases such as Alzheimer's Disease (AD). However, those models are usually not flexible enough to handle missing modalities. Currently, the most common workaround is discarding samples with missing modalities which leads to considerable data under-utilization. Adding to the fact that labeled medical images are already scarce, the performance of data-driven methods like deep learning can be severely hampered. Therefore, a multi-modal method that can handle missing data in various clinical settings is highly desirable. In this paper, we present Multi-Modal Mixing Transformer (3MAT), a disease classification transformer that not only leverages multi-modal data but also handles missing data scenarios. In this work, we test 3MT for AD and Cognitively normal (CN) classification and mild cognitive impairment (MCI) conversion prediction to progressive MCI (pMCI) or stable MCI (sMCI) using clinical and neuroimaging data. The model uses a novel Cascaded Modality Transformer architecture with cross-attention to incorporate multi-modal information for more informed predictions. We propose a novel modality dropout mechanism to ensure an unprecedented level of modality independence and robustness to handle missing data scenarios. The result is a versatile network that enables the mixing of arbitrary numbers of modalities with different feature types and also ensures full data utilization missing data scenarios. The model is trained and evaluated on the ADNI dataset with the SOTRA performance and further evaluated with the AIBL dataset with missing data. 准确的医学分类需要大量的多模态数据，并且在许多情况下需要不同的特征类型。先前的研究已经显示出使用多模态数据的有希望的结果，在对阿尔茨海默病（AD）等疾病进行分类时，其表现优于单模态模型。然而，这些模型通常不够灵活，无法处理缺失的模式。目前，最常见的解决方法是丢弃缺少模式的样本，这会导致大量数据未得到充分利用。除了标记的医学图像已经稀缺之外，深度学习等数据驱动方法的性能可能会受到严重阻碍。因此，非常需要一种能够处理各种临床环境中缺失数据的多模式方法。在本文中，我们提出了多模态混合变压器（3MAT），这是一种疾病分类变压器，不仅可以利用多模态数据，还可以处理丢失的数据场景。在这项工作中，我们使用临床和神经影像数据测试 3MT 的 AD 和认知正常 (CN) 分类以及轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 向进行性 MCI (pMCI) 或稳定 MCI (sMCI) 的转换预测。该模型使用新颖的级联模态转换器架构，具有交叉注意力，可合并多模态信息以进行更明智的预测。我们提出了一种新颖的模态丢失机制，以确保前所未有的模态独立性和稳健性来处理丢失的数据场景。其结果是一个多功能网络，可以混合任意数量的具有不同特征类型的模态，并确保在缺失数据场景下充分利用数据。该模型在具有 SOTRA 性能的 ADNI 数据集上进行训练和评估，并使用缺失数据的 AIBL 数据集进行进一步评估。 本文提出一种名为3MAT的多模态混合Transformer模型，用于处理阿尔茨海默病分类中的不完整数据问题。 Linfeng Liu,Siyu Liu,Lu Zhang,Xuan Vinh To,Fatima Nasrallah,Shekhar S. Chandra eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Blindly Deconvolving Super-noisy Blurry Image Sequences
title_zh: 盲目去卷积超噪声模糊图像序列
abstract: Image blur and image noise are imaging artifacts intrinsically arising in image acquisition. In this paper, we consider multi-frame blind deconvolution (MFBD), where image blur is described by the convolution of an unobservable, undeteriorated image and an unknown filter, and the objective is to recover the undeteriorated image from a sequence of its blurry and noisy observations. We present two new methods for MFBD, which, in contrast to previous work, do not require the estimation of the unknown filters. The first method is based on likelihood maximization and requires careful initialization to cope with the non-convexity of the loss function. The second method circumvents this requirement and exploits that the solution of likelihood maximization emerges as an eigenvector of a specifically constructed matrix, if the signal subspace spanned by the observations has a sufficiently large dimension. We describe a pre-processing step, which increases the dimension of the signal subspace by artificially generating additional observations. We also propose an extension of the eigenvector method, which copes with insufficient dimensions of the signal subspace by estimating a footprint of the unknown filters (that is a vector of the size of the filters, only one is required for the whole image sequence). We have applied the eigenvector method to synthetically generated image sequences and performed a quantitative comparison with a previous method, obtaining strongly improved results.
summary: Image blur and image noise are imaging artifacts intrinsically arising in image acquisition. In this paper, we consider multi-frame blind deconvolution (MFBD), where image blur is described by the convolution of an unobservable, undeteriorated image and an unknown filter, and the objective is to recover the undeteriorated image from a sequence of its blurry and noisy observations. We present two new methods for MFBD, which, in contrast to previous work, do not require the estimation of the unknown filters. The first method is based on likelihood maximization and requires careful initialization to cope with the non-convexity of the loss function. The second method circumvents this requirement and exploits that the solution of likelihood maximization emerges as an eigenvector of a specifically constructed matrix, if the signal subspace spanned by the observations has a sufficiently large dimension. We describe a pre-processing step, which increases the dimension of the signal subspace by artificially generating additional observations. We also propose an extension of the eigenvector method, which copes with insufficient dimensions of the signal subspace by estimating a footprint of the unknown filters (that is a vector of the size of the filters, only one is required for the whole image sequence). We have applied the eigenvector method to synthetically generated image sequences and performed a quantitative comparison with a previous method, obtaining strongly improved results.
abstract_zh: 图像模糊和图像噪声是图像采集过程中本质上产生的成像伪影。在本文中，我们考虑多帧盲反卷积（MFBD），其中图像模糊是通过不可观察的、未恶化的图像和未知滤波器的卷积来描述的，目标是从一系列模糊和噪声的观察中恢复未恶化的图像。我们提出了两种新的 MFBD 方法，与之前的工作相比，它们不需要估计未知的滤波器。第一种方法基于似然最大化，需要仔细初始化以应对损失函数的非凸性。第二种方法规避了这一要求，并利用了如果观测所跨越的信号子空间具有足够大的维度，则似然最大化的解作为专门构造的矩阵的特征向量出现。我们描述了一个预处理步骤，该步骤通过人为生成额外的观测值来增加信号子空间的维度。我们还提出了特征向量方法的扩展，它通过估计未知滤波器的足迹（即滤波器大小的向量，整个图像序列只需要一个）来应对信号子空间维度不足的问题。我们将特征向量方法应用于合成生成的图像序列，并与以前的方法进行定量比较，获得了显着改进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种无需估计未知模糊滤波器的多帧盲去卷积方法，用于从超噪模糊图像序列中恢复清晰图像。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖估计未知模糊滤波器，但高噪声环境下难以准确估计，且计算复杂度高。
AI.method: 第一种方法基于似然最大化并需精细初始化；第二种方法通过构造矩阵的特征向量求解，辅以预处理步骤扩展信号子空间，并提出滤波器足迹估计扩展方法。
AI.result: 在合成图像序列实验中，特征向量方法较之前方法显著提升去噪和去模糊效果。
AI.conclusion: 无需直接估计模糊滤波器的特征向量方法，在超噪场景下实现更鲁棒的图像恢复。

authors_text: Kuan Cheng,Shaofeng H. -C. Jiang,Luojian Wei,Zhide Wei
title: On The Relative Error of Random Fourier Features for Preserving Kernel Distance
title_zh: 关于保持核距离的随机傅里叶特征的相对误差
abstract: The method of random Fourier features (RFF), proposed in a seminal paper by Rahimi and Recht (NIPS'07), is a powerful technique to find approximate low-dimensional representations of points in (high-dimensional) kernel space, for shift-invariant kernels. While RFF has been analyzed under various notions of error guarantee, the ability to preserve the kernel distance with \emph{relative} error is less understood. We show that for a significant range of kernels, including the well-known Laplacian kernels, RFF cannot approximate the kernel distance with small relative error using low dimensions. We complement this by showing as long as the shift-invariant kernel is analytic, RFF with $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ dimensions achieves $ε$-relative error for pairwise kernel distance of $n$ points, and the dimension bound is improved to $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1}\log k)$ for the specific application of kernel $k$-means. Finally, going beyond RFF, we make the first step towards data-oblivious dimension-reduction for general shift-invariant kernels, and we obtain a similar $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ dimension bound for Laplacian kernels. We also validate the dimension-error tradeoff of our methods on simulated datasets, and they demonstrate superior performance compared with other popular methods including random-projection and Nyström methods.
summary: The method of random Fourier features (RFF), proposed in a seminal paper by Rahimi and Recht (NIPS'07), is a powerful technique to find approximate low-dimensional representations of points in (high-dimensional) kernel space, for shift-invariant kernels. While RFF has been analyzed under various notions of error guarantee, the ability to preserve the kernel distance with \emph{relative} error is less understood. We show that for a significant range of kernels, including the well-known Laplacian kernels, RFF cannot approximate the kernel distance with small relative error using low dimensions. We complement this by showing as long as the shift-invariant kernel is analytic, RFF with $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ dimensions achieves $ε$-relative error for pairwise kernel distance of $n$ points, and the dimension bound is improved to $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1}\log k)$ for the specific application of kernel $k$-means. Finally, going beyond RFF, we make the first step towards data-oblivious dimension-reduction for general shift-invariant kernels, and we obtain a similar $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ dimension bound for Laplacian kernels. We also validate the dimension-error tradeoff of our methods on simulated datasets, and they demonstrate superior performance compared with other popular methods including random-projection and Nyström methods.
abstract_zh: Rahimi 和 Recht (NIPS'07) 在一篇开创性论文中提出的随机傅里叶特征 (RFF) 方法是一种强大的技术，可以为平移不变核找到（高维）核空间中点的近似低维表示。虽然 RFF 已经在各种误差保证概念下进行了分析，但用 \emph{relative} 误差保持核距离的能力却鲜为人知。我们表明，对于很大范围的核，包括众所周知的拉普拉斯核，RFF 无法使用低维度以较小的相对误差来近似核距离。我们通过证明只要平移不变核是解析的，具有 $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ 维度的 RFF 对 $n$ 点的成对核距离实现 $ε$ 相对误差，并且对于核 $k$-means 的特定应用，维度界限改进为 $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1}\log k)$ 来对此进行补充。最后，超越 RFF，我们向一般平移不变核的数据忽略维数缩减迈出了第一步，并且我们获得了拉普拉斯核的类似 $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ 维数界限。我们还在模拟数据集上验证了我们的方法的维度误差权衡，并且与其他流行的方法（包括随机投影和 Nyström 方法）相比，它们表现出了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究随机傅里叶特征（RFF）在保持核距离时的相对误差问题，分析其在不同核函数和维度下的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管RFF已被广泛研究，但其在保持核距离时的相对误差特性尚不明确，尤其对于低维近似是否存在限制需进一步探讨。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实验验证，研究RFF在不同核函数（如拉普拉斯核）下的相对误差界，并提出针对解析核和核k-均值的改进维度上界，同时探索数据无关的降维方法。
AI.result: 发现对于拉普拉斯核等，低维RFF无法实现小相对误差；但对于解析核，RFF在$\\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \\log n)$维度下可达到$ε$-相对误差，且在核k-均值中进一步优化为$\\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \\log k)$。实验表明其性能优于随机投影和Nyström方法。
AI.conclusion: RFF的相对误差性能依赖于核函数类型和维度，本文提出的理论界和方法在保持核距离任务中具有优势，为后续研究提供新方向。

ai_content.method: 通过理论分析与实验验证，研究RFF在不同核函数（如拉普拉斯核）下的相对误差界，并提出针对解析核和核k-均值的改进维度上界，同时探索数据无关的降维方法。
ai_content.result: 发现对于拉普拉斯核等，低维RFF无法实现小相对误差；但对于解析核，RFF在$\\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \\log n)$维度下可达到$ε$-相对误差，且在核k-均值中进一步优化为$\\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \\log k)$。实验表明其性能优于随机投影和Nyström方法。
ai_content.conclusion: RFF的相对误差性能依赖于核函数类型和维度，本文提出的理论界和方法在保持核距离任务中具有优势，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: On The Relative Error of Random Fourier Features for Preserving Kernel Distance 关于保持核距离的随机傅里叶特征的相对误差 The method of random Fourier features (RFF), proposed in a seminal paper by Rahimi and Recht (NIPS'07), is a powerful technique to find approximate low-dimensional representations of points in (high-dimensional) kernel space, for shift-invariant kernels. While RFF has been analyzed under various notions of error guarantee, the ability to preserve the kernel distance with \emph{relative} error is less understood. We show that for a significant range of kernels, including the well-known Laplacian kernels, RFF cannot approximate the kernel distance with small relative error using low dimensions. We complement this by showing as long as the shift-invariant kernel is analytic, RFF with $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ dimensions achieves $ε$-relative error for pairwise kernel distance of $n$ points, and the dimension bound is improved to $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1}\log k)$ for the specific application of kernel $k$-means. Finally, going beyond RFF, we make the first step towards data-oblivious dimension-reduction for general shift-invariant kernels, and we obtain a similar $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ dimension bound for Laplacian kernels. We also validate the dimension-error tradeoff of our methods on simulated datasets, and they demonstrate superior performance compared with other popular methods including random-projection and Nyström methods. Rahimi 和 Recht (NIPS'07) 在一篇开创性论文中提出的随机傅里叶特征 (RFF) 方法是一种强大的技术，可以为平移不变核找到（高维）核空间中点的近似低维表示。虽然 RFF 已经在各种误差保证概念下进行了分析，但用 \emph{relative} 误差保持核距离的能力却鲜为人知。我们表明，对于很大范围的核，包括众所周知的拉普拉斯核，RFF 无法使用低维度以较小的相对误差来近似核距离。我们通过证明只要平移不变核是解析的，具有 $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ 维度的 RFF 对 $n$ 点的成对核距离实现 $ε$ 相对误差，并且对于核 $k$-means 的特定应用，维度界限改进为 $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1}\log k)$ 来对此进行补充。最后，超越 RFF，我们向一般平移不变核的数据忽略维数缩减迈出了第一步，并且我们获得了拉普拉斯核的类似 $\mathrm{poly}(ε^{-1} \log n)$ 维数界限。我们还在模拟数据集上验证了我们的方法的维度误差权衡，并且与其他流行的方法（包括随机投影和 Nyström 方法）相比，它们表现出了卓越的性能。 本文研究随机傅里叶特征（RFF）在保持核距离时的相对误差问题，分析其在不同核函数和维度下的表现。 Kuan Cheng,Shaofeng H. -C. Jiang,Luojian Wei,Zhide Wei cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Ahmed Zahloote,Al-hasan Saleh,Ayman Ghanem,Hiba Hasan,Asem Dreibaty,Ali Abodaraa,Nermeen Suleiman,Nour Naameh,Ali Ibrahim,Zeinab mahfoud
title: An experimental study of algorithms for obtaining a singly connected subgraph
title_zh: 单连通子图获取算法的实验研究
abstract: A directed graph G = (V,E) is singly connected if for any two vertices v, u of V, the directed graph G contains at most one simple path from v to u. In this paper, we study different algorithms to find a feasible but necessarily optimal solution to the following problem. Given a directed acyclic graph G = (V, E), find a subset H of E of minimum size such that the subgraph (V, E-H) is singly connected. Moreover, we prove that this problem can be solved in polynomial time for a special kind of directed graphs.
summary: A directed graph G = (V,E) is singly connected if for any two vertices v, u of V, the directed graph G contains at most one simple path from v to u. In this paper, we study different algorithms to find a feasible but necessarily optimal solution to the following problem. Given a directed acyclic graph G = (V, E), find a subset H of E of minimum size such that the subgraph (V, E-H) is singly connected. Moreover, we prove that this problem can be solved in polynomial time for a special kind of directed graphs.
abstract_zh: 有向图 G = (V,E) 是单连通的，如果对于 V 的任意两个顶点 v, u，有向图 G 至多包含一条从 v 到 u 的简单路径。在本文中，我们研究不同的算法，以找到以下问题的可行但必然最优的解决方案。给定一个有向无环图 G = (V, E)，找到 E 的最小大小的子集 H，使得子图 (V, E-H) 是单连通的。此外，我们证明对于一种特殊的有向图，这个问题可以在多项式时间内解决。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在有向无环图中寻找最小边集以形成单连通子图的算法。
AI.motivation: 单连通子图在图论和实际应用中具有重要性，但现有方法可能无法高效处理此类问题，因此需要探索多项式时间算法。
AI.method: 设计并实验比较多种算法，同时通过理论分析证明特殊有向图的多项式时间可解性。
AI.result: 证明了特定有向图下该问题可在多项式时间内解决，并提供了可行的算法方案。
AI.conclusion: 针对特殊有向图的多项式时间算法有效，未来可进一步研究更一般情况的解决方案。

authors_text: Binghao Liu,Boyu Yang,Lingxi Xie,Ren Wang,Qi Tian,Qixiang Ye
title: Learnable Distribution Calibration for Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning
title_zh: 用于少样本类增量学习的可学习分布校准
abstract: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) faces challenges of memorizing old class distributions and estimating new class distributions given few training samples. In this study, we propose a learnable distribution calibration (LDC) approach, with the aim to systematically solve these two challenges using a unified framework. LDC is built upon a parameterized calibration unit (PCU), which initializes biased distributions for all classes based on classifier vectors (memory-free) and a single covariance matrix. The covariance matrix is shared by all classes, so that the memory costs are fixed. During base training, PCU is endowed with the ability to calibrate biased distributions by recurrently updating sampled features under the supervision of real distributions. During incremental learning, PCU recovers distributions for old classes to avoid `forgetting', as well as estimating distributions and augmenting samples for new classes to alleviate `over-fitting' caused by the biased distributions of few-shot samples. LDC is theoretically plausible by formatting a variational inference procedure. It improves FSCIL's flexibility as the training procedure requires no class similarity priori. Experiments on CUB200, CIFAR100, and mini-ImageNet datasets show that LDC outperforms the state-of-the-arts by 4.64%, 1.98%, and 3.97%, respectively. LDC's effectiveness is also validated on few-shot learning scenarios.
summary: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) faces challenges of memorizing old class distributions and estimating new class distributions given few training samples. In this study, we propose a learnable distribution calibration (LDC) approach, with the aim to systematically solve these two challenges using a unified framework. LDC is built upon a parameterized calibration unit (PCU), which initializes biased distributions for all classes based on classifier vectors (memory-free) and a single covariance matrix. The covariance matrix is shared by all classes, so that the memory costs are fixed. During base training, PCU is endowed with the ability to calibrate biased distributions by recurrently updating sampled features under the supervision of real distributions. During incremental learning, PCU recovers distributions for old classes to avoid `forgetting', as well as estimating distributions and augmenting samples for new classes to alleviate `over-fitting' caused by the biased distributions of few-shot samples. LDC is theoretically plausible by formatting a variational inference procedure. It improves FSCIL's flexibility as the training procedure requires no class similarity priori. Experiments on CUB200, CIFAR100, and mini-ImageNet datasets show that LDC outperforms the state-of-the-arts by 4.64%, 1.98%, and 3.97%, respectively. LDC's effectiveness is also validated on few-shot learning scenarios.
abstract_zh: 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）面临着记住旧类分布和在给定少量训练样本的情况下估计新类分布的挑战。在本研究中，我们提出了一种可学习的分布校准（LDC）方法，旨在使用统一的框架系统地解决这两个挑战。 LDC 基于参数化校准单元 (PCU) 构建，该单元根据分类器向量（无内存）和单个协方差矩阵初始化所有类的偏置分布。协方差矩阵由所有类共享，因此内存成本是固定的。在基础训练期间，PCU 具有通过在真实分布的监督下反复更新采样特征来校准偏差分布的能力。在增量学习过程中，PCU 恢复旧类的分布以避免“遗忘”，并估计分布并增加新类的样本，以减轻由少样本样本的偏差分布引起的“过度拟合”。通过格式化变分推理过程，LDC 在理论上是合理的。它提高了 FSCIL 的灵活性，因为训练过程不需要先验的类相似性。在 CUB200、CIFAR100 和 mini-ImageNet 数据集上的实验表明，LDC 的性能分别比现有技术高出 4.64%、1.98% 和 3.97%。 LDC 的有效性也在小样本学习场景中得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可学习的分布校准方法（LDC），用于解决少样本类增量学习（FSCIL）中旧类分布记忆和新类分布估计的挑战。
AI.motivation: FSCIL面临在少量样本下记忆旧类分布和估计新类分布的难题，现有方法难以统一处理这两类问题且存在遗忘和过拟合风险。
AI.method: 基于参数化校准单元（PCU），利用分类器向量初始化所有类的偏倚分布，并通过共享协方差矩阵降低内存成本。通过变分推断框架，PCU在基础训练中校准分布，在增量学习中恢复旧类分布并生成新类样本。
AI.result: 在CUB200、CIFAR100和mini-ImageNet数据集上分别优于现有方法4.64%、1.98%和3.97%，并在少样本场景中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: LDC通过统一框架解决了FSCIL的核心问题，无需类别相似性先验，提升了方法的灵活性和性能。

LDC is theoretically plausible by formatting a variational inference procedure. It improves FSCIL's flexibility as the training procedure requires no class similarity priori. Experiments on CUB200, CIFAR100, and mini-ImageNet datasets show that LDC outperforms the state-of-the-arts by 4.64%, 1.98%, and 3.97%, respectively. LDC's effectiveness is also validated on few-shot learning scenarios. 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）面临着记住旧类分布和在给定少量训练样本的情况下估计新类分布的挑战。在本研究中，我们提出了一种可学习的分布校准（LDC）方法，旨在使用统一的框架系统地解决这两个挑战。 LDC 基于参数化校准单元 (PCU) 构建，该单元根据分类器向量（无内存）和单个协方差矩阵初始化所有类的偏置分布。协方差矩阵由所有类共享，因此内存成本是固定的。在基础训练期间，PCU 具有通过在真实分布的监督下反复更新采样特征来校准偏差分布的能力。在增量学习过程中，PCU 恢复旧类的分布以避免“遗忘”，并估计分布并增加新类的样本，以减轻由少样本样本的偏差分布引起的“过度拟合”。通过格式化变分推理过程，LDC 在理论上是合理的。它提高了 FSCIL 的灵活性，因为训练过程不需要先验的类相似性。在 CUB200、CIFAR100 和 mini-ImageNet 数据集上的实验表明，LDC 的性能分别比现有技术高出 4.64%、1.98% 和 3.97%。 LDC 的有效性也在小样本学习场景中得到了验证。 本文提出了一种可学习的分布校准方法（LDC），用于解决少样本类增量学习（FSCIL）中旧类分布记忆和新类分布估计的挑战。 Binghao Liu,Boyu Yang,Lingxi Xie,Ren Wang,Qi Tian,Qixiang Ye cs.CV

title: Unbiased quantum phase estimation
title_zh: 无偏量子相位估计
abstract: Quantum phase estimation algorithm (PEA) is one of the most important algorithms in early studies of quantum computation. It is also a key for many other quantum algorithms, such as the quantum counting algorithm and the Shor's integer factorization algorithm. However, we find that the PEA is not an unbiased estimation, which prevents the estimation error from achieving an arbitrarily small level. In this paper, we propose an unbiased phase estimation algorithm (UPEA) based on the original PEA, and study its application in quantum counting. We also show that a maximum likelihood post-processing step can further improve its robustness. In the end, we apply UPEA to quantum counting, and use an additional correction step to make the quantum counting algorithm unbiased.
summary: Quantum phase estimation algorithm (PEA) is one of the most important algorithms in early studies of quantum computation. It is also a key for many other quantum algorithms, such as the quantum counting algorithm and the Shor's integer factorization algorithm. However, we find that the PEA is not an unbiased estimation, which prevents the estimation error from achieving an arbitrarily small level. In this paper, we propose an unbiased phase estimation algorithm (UPEA) based on the original PEA, and study its application in quantum counting. We also show that a maximum likelihood post-processing step can further improve its robustness. In the end, we apply UPEA to quantum counting, and use an additional correction step to make the quantum counting algorithm unbiased.
abstract_zh: 量子相位估计算法（PEA）是量子计算早期研究中最重要的算法之一。它也是许多其他量子算法的关键，例如量子计数算法和 Shor 整数分解算法。然而，我们发现 PEA 并不是一个无偏估计，这使得估计误差无法达到任意小的水平。本文在原始PEA的基础上提出了一种无偏相位估计算法（UPEA），并研究了其在量子计数中的应用。我们还表明，最大似然后处理步骤可以进一步提高其稳健性。最后，我们将UPEA应用于量子计数，并使用额外的校正步骤使量子计数算法无偏。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无偏量子相位估计算法（UPEA），并改进量子计数算法以消除估计偏差
AI.motivation: 传统量子相位估计算法（PEA）存在偏差，限制了估计误差的最小化，需改进以实现更精确的量子计算应用
AI.method: 基于原始PEA设计无偏算法UPEA，结合最大似然后处理，并引入校正步骤优化量子计数流程
AI.result: UPEA显著提升量子计数鲁棒性，校正后实现无偏估计，验证了算法有效性
AI.conclusion: 无偏量子相位估计算法有效解决传统方法的偏差问题，为量子计算关键应用提供更精确的理论支持

authors_text: Hongwei Wu,Junlin Wang,Xin Wang,Hui Nan,Yaxin Wang,Haonan Jing,Kaixuan Shi
title: Attention Augmented ConvNeXt UNet For Rectal Tumour Segmentation
title_zh: 用于直肠肿瘤分割的注意力增强 ConvNeXt UNet
comment: I plan to replace this article, and supplement and confirm the structure and experimental content of this article
comments: I plan to replace this article, and supplement and confirm the structure and experimental content of this article
abstract: It is a challenge to segment the location and size of rectal cancer tumours through deep learning. In this paper, in order to improve the ability of extracting suffi-cient feature information in rectal tumour segmentation, attention enlarged ConvNeXt UNet (AACN-UNet), is proposed. The network mainly includes two improvements: 1) the encoder stage of UNet is changed to ConvNeXt structure for encoding operation, which can not only integrate multi-scale semantic information on a large scale, but al-so reduce information loss and extract more feature information from CT images; 2) CBAM attention mechanism is added to improve the connection of each feature in channel and space, which is conducive to extracting the effective feature of the target and improving the segmentation accuracy.The experiment with UNet and its variant network shows that AACN-UNet is 0.9% ,1.1% and 1.4% higher than the current best results in P, F1 and Miou.Compared with the training time, the number of parameters in UNet network is less. This shows that our proposed AACN-UNet has achieved ex-cellent results in CT image segmentation of rectal cancer.
summary: It is a challenge to segment the location and size of rectal cancer tumours through deep learning. In this paper, in order to improve the ability of extracting suffi-cient feature information in rectal tumour segmentation, attention enlarged ConvNeXt UNet (AACN-UNet), is proposed. The network mainly includes two improvements: 1) the encoder stage of UNet is changed to ConvNeXt structure for encoding operation, which can not only integrate multi-scale semantic information on a large scale, but al-so reduce information loss and extract more feature information from CT images; 2) CBAM attention mechanism is added to improve the connection of each feature in channel and space, which is conducive to extracting the effective feature of the target and improving the segmentation accuracy.The experiment with UNet and its variant network shows that AACN-UNet is 0.9% ,1.1% and 1.4% higher than the current best results in P, F1 and Miou.Compared with the training time, the number of parameters in UNet network is less. This shows that our proposed AACN-UNet has achieved ex-cellent results in CT image segmentation of rectal cancer.
abstract_zh: 通过深度学习来分割直肠癌肿瘤的位置和大小是一个挑战。本文为了提高直肠肿瘤分割中提取足够特征信息的能力，提出了注意力放大ConvNeXt UNet（AACN-UNet）。该网络主要包括两点改进：1）UNet的编码器阶段改为ConvNeXt结构进行编码操作，不仅可以大规模融合多尺度语义信息，还可以减少信息损失，从CT图像中提取更多特征信息； 2）加入CBAM注意力机制，改善通道和空间中各特征的连接，有利于提取目标的有效特征，提高分割精度。通过UNet及其变体网络的实验表明，AACN-UNet比目前P、F1和Miou中最好的结果提高了0.9%、1.1%和1.4%。与训练时间相比，UNet网络的参数数量更少。这表明我们提出的AACN-UNet在直肠癌CT图像分割方面取得了优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种改进的UNet模型（AACN-UNet）用于提高直肠肿瘤CT图像分割的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在直肠肿瘤分割中存在特征信息提取不足、信息损失大等问题，需提升模型对多尺度语义信息的整合能力及特征表达精度。
AI.method: 1) 将UNet编码器替换为ConvNeXt结构以增强多尺度特征提取；2) 引入CBAM注意力机制强化通道与空间特征关联。
AI.result: 在P、F1、Miou指标上分别优于当前最佳结果0.9%、1.1%、1.4%，且参数量更少、训练时间更短。
AI.conclusion: AACN-UNet通过结构改进与注意力机制有效提升了直肠癌CT图像分割的准确性与效率。

title: Contour-Aware Equipotential Learning for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的轮廓感知等势学习
abstract: With increasing demands for high-quality semantic segmentation in the industry, hard-distinguishing semantic boundaries have posed a significant threat to existing solutions. Inspired by real-life experience, i.e., combining varied observations contributes to higher visual recognition confidence, we present the equipotential learning (EPL) method. This novel module transfers the predicted/ground-truth semantic labels to a self-defined potential domain to learn and infer decision boundaries along customized directions. The conversion to the potential domain is implemented via a lightweight differentiable anisotropic convolution without incurring any parameter overhead. Besides, the designed two loss functions, the point loss and the equipotential line loss implement anisotropic field regression and category-level contour learning, respectively, enhancing prediction consistencies in the inter/intra-class boundary areas. More importantly, EPL is agnostic to network architectures, and thus it can be plugged into most existing segmentation models. This paper is the first attempt to address the boundary segmentation problem with field regression and contour learning. Meaningful performance improvements on Pascal Voc 2012 and Cityscapes demonstrate that the proposed EPL module can benefit the off-the-shelf fully convolutional network models when recognizing semantic boundary areas. Besides, intensive comparisons and analysis show the favorable merits of EPL for distinguishing semantically-similar and irregular-shaped categories.
summary: With increasing demands for high-quality semantic segmentation in the industry, hard-distinguishing semantic boundaries have posed a significant threat to existing solutions. Inspired by real-life experience, i.e., combining varied observations contributes to higher visual recognition confidence, we present the equipotential learning (EPL) method. This novel module transfers the predicted/ground-truth semantic labels to a self-defined potential domain to learn and infer decision boundaries along customized directions. The conversion to the potential domain is implemented via a lightweight differentiable anisotropic convolution without incurring any parameter overhead. Besides, the designed two loss functions, the point loss and the equipotential line loss implement anisotropic field regression and category-level contour learning, respectively, enhancing prediction consistencies in the inter/intra-class boundary areas. More importantly, EPL is agnostic to network architectures, and thus it can be plugged into most existing segmentation models. This paper is the first attempt to address the boundary segmentation problem with field regression and contour learning. Meaningful performance improvements on Pascal Voc 2012 and Cityscapes demonstrate that the proposed EPL module can benefit the off-the-shelf fully convolutional network models when recognizing semantic boundary areas. Besides, intensive comparisons and analysis show the favorable merits of EPL for distinguishing semantically-similar and irregular-shaped categories.
abstract_zh: 随着行业对高质量语义分割的需求不断增加，难以区分的语义边界对现有解决方案构成了重大威胁。受现实生活经验的启发，即结合不同的观察结果有助于提高视觉识别的置信度，我们提出了等电位学习（EPL）方法。这个新颖的模块将预测/真实语义标签转移到自定义的潜在域，以沿着定制方向学习和推断决策边界。到势域的转换是通过轻量级可微各向异性卷积实现的，不会产生任何参数开销。此外，设计的两个损失函数，点损失和等势线损失，分别实现了各向异性场回归和类别级轮廓学习，增强了类间/类内边界区域的预测一致性。更重要的是，EPL 与网络架构无关，因此它可以插入大多数现有的分段模型中。本文是首次尝试用场回归和轮廓学习来解决边界分割问题。 Pascal Voc 2012 和 Cityscapes 的显着性能改进表明，所提出的 EPL 模块在识别语义边界区域时可以使现成的全卷积网络模型受益。此外，深入的比较和分析表明EPL在区分语义相似和不规则形状的类别方面具有良好的优点。

AI.tldr: 提出等势学习方法解决语义分割中的边界区分问题
AI.motivation: 现有方法在区分语义边界上存在挑战，受多视角观察提升识别置信度的启发，提出新方法
AI.method: 通过自定义势能域转换和各向异性卷积，结合点损失与等势线损失函数，实现边界区域的预测一致性，且模块可适配多种网络架构
AI.result: 在Pascal Voc 2012和Cityscapes数据集上显著提升边界识别效果，尤其在相似类别和不规则形状区分上表现优异
AI.conclusion: EPL方法有效提升边界分割性能，具有架构无关性，首次结合场回归与轮廓学习解决边界问题，验证其优越性

search_text: Contour-Aware Equipotential Learning for Semantic Segmentation 用于语义分割的轮廓感知等势学习 With increasing demands for high-quality semantic segmentation in the industry, hard-distinguishing semantic boundaries have posed a significant threat to existing solutions. Inspired by real-life experience, i.e., combining varied observations contributes to higher visual recognition confidence, we present the equipotential learning (EPL) method. This novel module transfers the predicted/ground-truth semantic labels to a self-defined potential domain to learn and infer decision boundaries along customized directions. The conversion to the potential domain is implemented via a lightweight differentiable anisotropic convolution without incurring any parameter overhead. Besides, the designed two loss functions, the point loss and the equipotential line loss implement anisotropic field regression and category-level contour learning, respectively, enhancing prediction consistencies in the inter/intra-class boundary areas. More importantly, EPL is agnostic to network architectures, and thus it can be plugged into most existing segmentation models. This paper is the first attempt to address the boundary segmentation problem with field regression and contour learning. Meaningful performance improvements on Pascal Voc 2012 and Cityscapes demonstrate that the proposed EPL module can benefit the off-the-shelf fully convolutional network models when recognizing semantic boundary areas. Besides, intensive comparisons and analysis show the favorable merits of EPL for distinguishing semantically-similar and irregular-shaped categories. 随着行业对高质量语义分割的需求不断增加，难以区分的语义边界对现有解决方案构成了重大威胁。受现实生活经验的启发，即结合不同的观察结果有助于提高视觉识别的置信度，我们提出了等电位学习（EPL）方法。这个新颖的模块将预测/真实语义标签转移到自定义的潜在域，以沿着定制方向学习和推断决策边界。到势域的转换是通过轻量级可微各向异性卷积实现的，不会产生任何参数开销。此外，设计的两个损失函数，点损失和等势线损失，分别实现了各向异性场回归和类别级轮廓学习，增强了类间/类内边界区域的预测一致性。更重要的是，EPL 与网络架构无关，因此它可以插入大多数现有的分段模型中。本文是首次尝试用场回归和轮廓学习来解决边界分割问题。 Pascal Voc 2012 和 Cityscapes 的显着性能改进表明，所提出的 EPL 模块在识别语义边界区域时可以使现成的全卷积网络模型受益。此外，深入的比较和分析表明EPL在区分语义相似和不规则形状的类别方面具有良好的优点。 提出等势学习方法解决语义分割中的边界区分问题 Xu Yin,Dongbo Min,Yuchi Huo,Sung-Eui Yoon cs.CV

authors_text: Shuangrui Ding,Weidi Xie,Yabo Chen,Rui Qian,Xiaopeng Zhang,Hongkai Xiong,Qi Tian
title: Motion-inductive Self-supervised Object Discovery in Videos
title_zh: 视频中的运动感应自监督对象发现
abstract: In this paper, we consider the task of unsupervised object discovery in videos. Previous works have shown promising results via processing optical flows to segment objects. However, taking flow as input brings about two drawbacks. First, flow cannot capture sufficient cues when objects remain static or partially occluded. Second, it is challenging to establish temporal coherency from flow-only input, due to the missing texture information. To tackle these limitations, we propose a model for directly processing consecutive RGB frames, and infer the optical flow between any pair of frames using a layered representation, with the opacity channels being treated as the segmentation. Additionally, to enforce object permanence, we apply temporal consistency loss on the inferred masks from randomly-paired frames, which refer to the motions at different paces, and encourage the model to segment the objects even if they may not move at the current time point. Experimentally, we demonstrate superior performance over previous state-of-the-art methods on three public video segmentation datasets (DAVIS2016, SegTrackv2, and FBMS-59), while being computationally efficient by avoiding the overhead of computing optical flow as input.
summary: In this paper, we consider the task of unsupervised object discovery in videos. Previous works have shown promising results via processing optical flows to segment objects. However, taking flow as input brings about two drawbacks. First, flow cannot capture sufficient cues when objects remain static or partially occluded. Second, it is challenging to establish temporal coherency from flow-only input, due to the missing texture information. To tackle these limitations, we propose a model for directly processing consecutive RGB frames, and infer the optical flow between any pair of frames using a layered representation, with the opacity channels being treated as the segmentation. Additionally, to enforce object permanence, we apply temporal consistency loss on the inferred masks from randomly-paired frames, which refer to the motions at different paces, and encourage the model to segment the objects even if they may not move at the current time point. Experimentally, we demonstrate superior performance over previous state-of-the-art methods on three public video segmentation datasets (DAVIS2016, SegTrackv2, and FBMS-59), while being computationally efficient by avoiding the overhead of computing optical flow as input.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑视频中无监督对象发现的任务。之前的工作通过处理光流来分割物体已经显示出有希望的结果。然而，以流量作为输入会带来两个缺点。首先，当物体保持静态或部分遮挡时，流无法捕获足够的线索。其次，由于缺少纹理信息，从仅流输入建立时间一致性具有挑战性。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种直接处理连续 RGB 帧的模型，并使用分层表示来推断任意一对帧之间的光流，其中不透明通道被视为分段。此外，为了增强对象的持久性，我们对随机配对帧推断的掩模应用时间一致性损失，这些掩模指的是不同速度的运动，并鼓励模型对对象进行分割，即使它们在当前时间点可能不移动。通过实验，我们在三个公共视频分割数据集（DAVIS2016、SegTrackv2 和 FBMS-59）上展示了优于先前最先进方法的性能，同时通过避免计算光流作为输入的开销来提高计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需依赖光流输入的自监督视频物体发现方法，通过直接处理连续RGB帧并利用分层表示推断光流，实现更高效的视频分割。
AI.motivation: 现有基于光流的视频物体发现方法在物体静止或部分遮挡时无法捕捉足够线索，且缺乏纹理信息导致时间一致性难以建立。
AI.method: 直接处理连续RGB帧，使用分层表示推断帧间光流（以不透明度通道作为分割结果），并通过随机配对帧的时序一致性损失强化物体永久性。
AI.result: 在DAVIS2016、SegTrackv2和FBMS-59三个数据集上优于现有最先进方法，且避免了光流计算的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过直接处理RGB帧和时序一致性约束，解决了光流输入的局限性，在保持计算效率的同时提升了视频分割性能。

title: A Dual-Attention Learning Network with Word and Sentence Embedding for Medical Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 用于医学视觉问答的具有单词和句子嵌入的双注意学习网络
abstract: Research in medical visual question answering (MVQA) can contribute to the development of computeraided diagnosis. MVQA is a task that aims to predict accurate and convincing answers based on given medical images and associated natural language questions. This task requires extracting medical knowledge-rich feature content and making fine-grained understandings of them. Therefore, constructing an effective feature extraction and understanding scheme are keys to modeling. Existing MVQA question extraction schemes mainly focus on word information, ignoring medical information in the text. Meanwhile, some visual and textual feature understanding schemes cannot effectively capture the correlation between regions and keywords for reasonable visual reasoning. In this study, a dual-attention learning network with word and sentence embedding (WSDAN) is proposed. We design a module, transformer with sentence embedding (TSE), to extract a double embedding representation of questions containing keywords and medical information. A dualattention learning (DAL) module consisting of self-attention and guided attention is proposed to model intensive intramodal and intermodal interactions. With multiple DAL modules (DALs), learning visual and textual co-attention can increase the granularity of understanding and improve visual reasoning. Experimental results on the ImageCLEF 2019 VQA-MED (VQA-MED 2019) and VQA-RAD datasets demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods. According to the ablation studies and Grad-CAM maps, WSDAN can extract rich textual information and has strong visual reasoning ability.
summary: Research in medical visual question answering (MVQA) can contribute to the development of computeraided diagnosis. MVQA is a task that aims to predict accurate and convincing answers based on given medical images and associated natural language questions. This task requires extracting medical knowledge-rich feature content and making fine-grained understandings of them. Therefore, constructing an effective feature extraction and understanding scheme are keys to modeling. Existing MVQA question extraction schemes mainly focus on word information, ignoring medical information in the text. Meanwhile, some visual and textual feature understanding schemes cannot effectively capture the correlation between regions and keywords for reasonable visual reasoning. In this study, a dual-attention learning network with word and sentence embedding (WSDAN) is proposed. We design a module, transformer with sentence embedding (TSE), to extract a double embedding representation of questions containing keywords and medical information. A dualattention learning (DAL) module consisting of self-attention and guided attention is proposed to model intensive intramodal and intermodal interactions. With multiple DAL modules (DALs), learning visual and textual co-attention can increase the granularity of understanding and improve visual reasoning. Experimental results on the ImageCLEF 2019 VQA-MED (VQA-MED 2019) and VQA-RAD datasets demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods. According to the ablation studies and Grad-CAM maps, WSDAN can extract rich textual information and has strong visual reasoning ability.
abstract_zh: 医学视觉问答（MVQA）的研究有助于计算机辅助诊断的发展。 MVQA 是一项旨在根据给定的医学图像和相关自然语言问题预测准确且令人信服的答案的任务。这项任务需要提取医学知识丰富的特征内容并对其进行细粒度的理解。因此，构建有效的特征提取和理解方案是建模的关键。现有的MVQA问题提取方案主要关注单词信息，忽略了文本中的医学信息。同时，一些视觉和文本特征理解方案无法有效捕获区域和关键词之间的相关性以进行合理的视觉推理。在这项研究中，提出了一种带有词和句子嵌入的双注意力学习网络（WSDAN）。我们设计了一个模块，带有句子嵌入的变压器（TSE），来提取包含关键词和医疗信息的问题的双重嵌入表示。提出了由自我注意和引导注意组成的双重注意学习（DAL）模块来模拟密集的模式内和模式间交互。通过多个 DAL 模块（DAL），学习视觉和文本共同注意力可以增加理解的粒度并改善视觉推理。 ImageCLEF 2019 VQA-MED (VQA-MED 2019) 和 VQA-RAD 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法优于以前的最先进方法。根据消融研究和Grad-CAM图，WSDAN可以提取丰富的文本信息，并具有很强的视觉推理能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合词和句子嵌入的双注意力学习网络（WSDAN），用于提升医疗视觉问答（MVQA）任务的准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有MVQA方法主要关注词信息而忽略医学文本中的关键信息，且难以有效捕捉视觉区域与文本关键词间的关联，导致视觉推理能力不足。
AI.method: 设计包含双嵌入表示的TSE模块提取医学关键词信息，并通过自注意力与引导注意力组成的DAL模块建模多模态交互，利用多级DAL增强细粒度理解与视觉推理。
AI.result: 在ImageCLEF 2019 VQA-MED和VQA-RAD数据集上优于现有方法，消融实验和Grad-CAM验证了模型对文本信息的强提取能力和视觉推理有效性。
AI.conclusion: WSDAN通过双注意力机制有效融合医学文本与视觉特征，为医疗辅助诊断提供了更精准的视觉问答解决方案。

Therefore, constructing an effective feature extraction and understanding scheme are keys to modeling. Meanwhile, some visual and textual feature understanding schemes cannot effectively capture the correlation between regions and keywords for reasonable visual reasoning. In this study, a dual-attention learning network with word and sentence embedding (WSDAN) is proposed. We design a module, transformer with sentence embedding (TSE), to extract a double embedding representation of questions containing keywords and medical information. A dualattention learning (DAL) module consisting of self-attention and guided attention is proposed to model intensive intramodal and intermodal interactions. With multiple DAL modules (DALs), learning visual and textual co-attention can increase the granularity of understanding and improve visual reasoning. Experimental results on the ImageCLEF 2019 VQA-MED (VQA-MED 2019) and VQA-RAD datasets demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods. According to the ablation studies and Grad-CAM maps, WSDAN can extract rich textual information and has strong visual reasoning ability. 医学视觉问答（MVQA）的研究有助于计算机辅助诊断的发展。 MVQA 是一项旨在根据给定的医学图像和相关自然语言问题预测准确且令人信服的答案的任务。这项任务需要提取医学知识丰富的特征内容并对其进行细粒度的理解。因此，构建有效的特征提取和理解方案是建模的关键。现有的MVQA问题提取方案主要关注单词信息，忽略了文本中的医学信息。同时，一些视觉和文本特征理解方案无法有效捕获区域和关键词之间的相关性以进行合理的视觉推理。在这项研究中，提出了一种带有词和句子嵌入的双注意力学习网络（WSDAN）。我们设计了一个模块，带有句子嵌入的变压器（TSE），来提取包含关键词和医疗信息的问题的双重嵌入表示。提出了由自我注意和引导注意组成的双重注意学习（DAL）模块来模拟密集的模式内和模式间交互。通过多个 DAL 模块（DAL），学习视觉和文本共同注意力可以增加理解的粒度并改善视觉推理。 ImageCLEF 2019 VQA-MED (VQA-MED 2019) 和 VQA-RAD 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法优于以前的最先进方法。根据消融研究和Grad-CAM图，WSDAN可以提取丰富的文本信息，并具有很强的视觉推理能力。 本文提出一种结合词和句子嵌入的双注意力学习网络（WSDAN），用于提升医疗视觉问答（MVQA）任务的准确性和可解释性。 Xiaofei Huang,Hongfang Gong cs.CV

title: Nested Search versus Limited Discrepancy Search
title_zh: 嵌套搜索与有限差异搜索
abstract: Limited Discrepancy Search (LDS) is a popular algorithm to search a state space with a heuristic to order the possible actions. Nested Search (NS) is another algorithm to search a state space with the same heuristic. NS spends more time on the move associated to the best heuristic playout while LDS spends more time on the best heuristic move. They both use similar times for the same level of search. We advocate in this paper that it is often better to follow the best heuristic playout as in NS than to follow the heuristic as in LDS.
summary: Limited Discrepancy Search (LDS) is a popular algorithm to search a state space with a heuristic to order the possible actions. Nested Search (NS) is another algorithm to search a state space with the same heuristic. NS spends more time on the move associated to the best heuristic playout while LDS spends more time on the best heuristic move. They both use similar times for the same level of search. We advocate in this paper that it is often better to follow the best heuristic playout as in NS than to follow the heuristic as in LDS.
abstract_zh: 有限差异搜索 (LDS) 是一种流行的算法，用于通过启发式搜索状态空间来对可能的操作进行排序。嵌套搜索（NS）是另一种使用相同启发式搜索状态空间的算法。 NS 在与最佳启发式玩法相关的移动上花费更多时间，而 LDS 在最佳启发式移动上花费更多时间。他们都使用相似的时间来进行相同级别的搜索。我们在本文中主张，遵循 NS 中的最佳启发式播放通常比遵循 LDS 中的启发式更好。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了嵌套搜索（NS）与有限分歧搜索（LDS）两种算法在启发式搜索中的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 启发式搜索中如何有效利用最佳路径信息存在争议，需验证不同搜索策略的效率差异。
AI.method: 通过对比NS（侧重最佳启发式玩法）与LDS（侧重最佳启发式移动）的时间分配机制及搜索效果。
AI.result: NS在遵循最佳启发式玩法时通常比LDS更优，且两者同层级搜索耗时相近。
AI.conclusion: 在多数场景下，优先遵循最佳启发式玩法的NS算法优于传统LDS方法。

title: Differentiable Parsing and Visual Grounding of Natural Language Instructions for Object Placement
title_zh: 用于对象放置的自然语言指令的可微分析和视觉基础
abstract: We present a new method, PARsing And visual GrOuNding (ParaGon), for grounding natural language in object placement tasks. Natural language generally describes objects and spatial relations with compositionality and ambiguity, two major obstacles to effective language grounding. For compositionality, ParaGon parses a language instruction into an object-centric graph representation to ground objects individually. For ambiguity, ParaGon uses a novel particle-based graph neural network to reason about object placements with uncertainty. Essentially, ParaGon integrates a parsing algorithm into a probabilistic, data-driven learning framework. It is fully differentiable and trained end-to-end from data for robustness against complex, ambiguous language input.
summary: We present a new method, PARsing And visual GrOuNding (ParaGon), for grounding natural language in object placement tasks. Natural language generally describes objects and spatial relations with compositionality and ambiguity, two major obstacles to effective language grounding. For compositionality, ParaGon parses a language instruction into an object-centric graph representation to ground objects individually. For ambiguity, ParaGon uses a novel particle-based graph neural network to reason about object placements with uncertainty. Essentially, ParaGon integrates a parsing algorithm into a probabilistic, data-driven learning framework. It is fully differentiable and trained end-to-end from data for robustness against complex, ambiguous language input.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法，PARsing 和视觉 GrOuNding (ParaGon)，用于在对象放置任务中奠定自然语言的基础。自然语言通常描述具有组合性和歧义的对象和空间关系，这是有效语言基础的两个主要障碍。对于组合性，ParaGon 将语言指令解析为以对象为中心的图形表示，以单独地处理对象。为了避免歧义，ParaGon 使用一种新颖的基于粒子的图神经网络来推理不确定的对象放置。本质上，ParaGon 将解析算法集成到概率性、数据驱动的学习框架中。它是完全可微分的，并且可以从数据中进行端到端训练，以确保对复杂、模糊的语言输入的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ParaGon的新方法，用于在物体放置任务中对接自然语言指令，解决组合性和歧义性两大挑战。
AI.motivation: 自然语言描述物体和空间关系时存在组合性与歧义性，这阻碍了有效语言对接，现有方法难以处理复杂场景下的语言不确定性。
AI.method: ParaGon将解析算法嵌入概率学习框架，通过对象中心图表示处理组合性，并采用基于粒子的图神经网络建模不确定性，实现端到端可微训练。
AI.result: 方法在复杂和模糊语言输入下表现出鲁棒性，能够有效解析并对接自然语言指令中的物体放置任务。
AI.conclusion: ParaGon通过整合解析与概率推理，为自然语言对接任务提供了处理组合性与歧义性的有效解决方案。

authors_text: Ruihua Han,Shuai Wang,Shuaijun Wang,Zeqing Zhang,Qianru Zhang,Yonina C. Eldar,Qi Hao,Jia Pan
title: RDA: An Accelerated Collision Free Motion Planner for Autonomous Navigation in Cluttered Environments
title_zh: RDA：用于杂乱环境中自主导航的加速无碰撞运动规划器
comment: Published in: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters ( Volume: 8, Issue: 3, March 2023) (https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10036019)
comments: Published in: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters ( Volume: 8, Issue: 3, March 2023) (https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10036019)
abstract: Autonomous motion planning is challenging in multi-obstacle environments due to nonconvex collision avoidance constraints. Directly applying numerical solvers to these nonconvex formulations fails to exploit the constraint structures, resulting in excessive computation time. In this paper, we present an accelerated collision-free motion planner, namely regularized dual alternating direction method of multipliers (RDADMM or RDA for short), for the model predictive control (MPC) based motion planning problem. The proposed RDA addresses nonconvex motion planning via solving a smooth biconvex reformulation via duality and allows the collision avoidance constraints to be computed in parallel for each obstacle to reduce computation time significantly. We validate the performance of the RDA planner through path-tracking experiments with car-like robots in both simulation and real-world settings. Experimental results show that the proposed method generates smooth collision-free trajectories with less computation time compared with other benchmarks and performs robustly in cluttered environments. The source code is available at https://github.com/hanruihua/RDA_planner.
summary: Autonomous motion planning is challenging in multi-obstacle environments due to nonconvex collision avoidance constraints. Directly applying numerical solvers to these nonconvex formulations fails to exploit the constraint structures, resulting in excessive computation time. In this paper, we present an accelerated collision-free motion planner, namely regularized dual alternating direction method of multipliers (RDADMM or RDA for short), for the model predictive control (MPC) based motion planning problem. The proposed RDA addresses nonconvex motion planning via solving a smooth biconvex reformulation via duality and allows the collision avoidance constraints to be computed in parallel for each obstacle to reduce computation time significantly. We validate the performance of the RDA planner through path-tracking experiments with car-like robots in both simulation and real-world settings. Experimental results show that the proposed method generates smooth collision-free trajectories with less computation time compared with other benchmarks and performs robustly in cluttered environments. The source code is available at https://github.com/hanruihua/RDA_planner.
abstract_zh: 由于非凸避碰约束，自主运动规划在多障碍物环境中具有挑战性。直接将数值求解器应用于这些非凸公式无法利用约束结构，导致计算时间过长。在本文中，我们针对基于模型预测控制（MPC）的运动规划问题提出了一种加速无碰撞运动规划器，即正则化双交替方向乘法器（简称RDADMM或RDA）。所提出的 RDA 通过对偶性求解平滑双凸重构来解决非凸运动规划，并允许并行计算每个障碍物的防撞约束，以显着减少计算时间。我们通过在模拟和现实环境中使用类汽车机器人进行路径跟踪实验来验证 RDA 规划器的性能。实验结果表明，与其他基准相比，该方法可以用更少的计算时间生成平滑的无碰撞轨迹，并且在杂乱的环境中表现稳健。源代码可在 https://github.com/hanruihua/RDA_planner 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种加速避障运动规划器RDA，用于解决自主导航中复杂环境下的非凸碰撞避免问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数值求解器难以处理非凸约束结构，导致计算时间过长，需开发更高效的运动规划方法。
AI.method: 通过将非凸问题转化为平滑双凸形式并利用对偶性，结合并行计算每个障碍物的碰撞约束，提出RDA算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，RDA在仿真和真实环境中均能生成平滑无碰撞轨迹，计算时间显著少于其他基准方法。
AI.conclusion: RDA有效解决了复杂环境下的非凸运动规划问题，具有计算高效和鲁棒性强的优势。

result: 实验表明，RDA在仿真和真实环境中均能生成平滑无碰撞轨迹，计算时间显著少于其他基准方法。
conclusion: RDA有效解决了复杂环境下的非凸运动规划问题，具有计算高效和鲁棒性强的优势。
search_text: RDA: An Accelerated Collision Free Motion Planner for Autonomous Navigation in Cluttered Environments RDA：用于杂乱环境中自主导航的加速无碰撞运动规划器 Autonomous motion planning is challenging in multi-obstacle environments due to nonconvex collision avoidance constraints. Directly applying numerical solvers to these nonconvex formulations fails to exploit the constraint structures, resulting in excessive computation time. In this paper, we present an accelerated collision-free motion planner, namely regularized dual alternating direction method of multipliers (RDADMM or RDA for short), for the model predictive control (MPC) based motion planning problem. The proposed RDA addresses nonconvex motion planning via solving a smooth biconvex reformulation via duality and allows the collision avoidance constraints to be computed in parallel for each obstacle to reduce computation time significantly. We validate the performance of the RDA planner through path-tracking experiments with car-like robots in both simulation and real-world settings. Experimental results show that the proposed method generates smooth collision-free trajectories with less computation time compared with other benchmarks and performs robustly in cluttered environments. The source code is available at https://github.com/hanruihua/RDA_planner. 由于非凸避碰约束，自主运动规划在多障碍物环境中具有挑战性。直接将数值求解器应用于这些非凸公式无法利用约束结构，导致计算时间过长。在本文中，我们针对基于模型预测控制（MPC）的运动规划问题提出了一种加速无碰撞运动规划器，即正则化双交替方向乘法器（简称RDADMM或RDA）。所提出的 RDA 通过对偶性求解平滑双凸重构来解决非凸运动规划，并允许并行计算每个障碍物的防撞约束，以显着减少计算时间。我们通过在模拟和现实环境中使用类汽车机器人进行路径跟踪实验来验证 RDA 规划器的性能。实验结果表明，与其他基准相比，该方法可以用更少的计算时间生成平滑的无碰撞轨迹，并且在杂乱的环境中表现稳健。源代码可在 https://github.com/hanruihua/RDA_planner 获取。 本文提出一种加速避障运动规划器RDA，用于解决自主导航中复杂环境下的非凸碰撞避免问题。 Ruihua Han,Shuai Wang,Shuaijun Wang,Zeqing Zhang,Qianru Zhang,Yonina C. Eldar,Qi Hao,Jia Pan cs.RO

title: Cut-Paste Consistency Learning for Semi-Supervised Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: 用于半监督病变分割的剪切粘贴一致性学习
abstract: Semi-supervised learning has the potential to improve the data-efficiency of training data-hungry deep neural networks, which is especially important for medical image analysis tasks where labeled data is scarce. In this work, we present a simple semi-supervised learning method for lesion segmentation tasks based on the ideas of cut-paste augmentation and consistency regularization. By exploiting the mask information available in the labeled data, we synthesize partially labeled samples from the unlabeled images so that the usual supervised learning objective (e.g., binary cross entropy) can be applied. Additionally, we introduce a background consistency term to regularize the training on the unlabeled background regions of the synthetic images. We empirically verify the effectiveness of the proposed method on two public lesion segmentation datasets, including an eye fundus photograph dataset and a brain CT scan dataset. The experiment results indicate that our method achieves consistent and superior performance over other self-training and consistency-based methods without introducing sophisticated network components.
summary: Semi-supervised learning has the potential to improve the data-efficiency of training data-hungry deep neural networks, which is especially important for medical image analysis tasks where labeled data is scarce. In this work, we present a simple semi-supervised learning method for lesion segmentation tasks based on the ideas of cut-paste augmentation and consistency regularization. By exploiting the mask information available in the labeled data, we synthesize partially labeled samples from the unlabeled images so that the usual supervised learning objective (e.g., binary cross entropy) can be applied. Additionally, we introduce a background consistency term to regularize the training on the unlabeled background regions of the synthetic images. We empirically verify the effectiveness of the proposed method on two public lesion segmentation datasets, including an eye fundus photograph dataset and a brain CT scan dataset. The experiment results indicate that our method achieves consistent and superior performance over other self-training and consistency-based methods without introducing sophisticated network components.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习有潜力提高训练需要大量数据的深度神经网络的数据效率，这对于标记数据稀缺的医学图像分析任务尤其重要。在这项工作中，我们基于剪切粘贴增强和一致性正则化的思想，提出了一种用于病变分割任务的简单半监督学习方法。通过利用标记数据中可用的掩模信息，我们从未标记的图像中合成部分标记的样本，以便可以应用通常的监督学习目标（例如二元交叉熵）。此外，我们引入了背景一致性项来规范对合成图像的未标记背景区域的训练。我们在两个公共病变分割数据集（包括眼底照片数据集和脑 CT 扫描数据集）上实证验证了所提出方法的有效性。实验结果表明，我们的方法比其他自训练和基于一致性的方法实现了一致和优越的性能，而无需引入复杂的网络组件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于切割粘贴增强和一致性正则化的半监督学习方法，用于医学图像中的病变分割任务。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析中标注数据稀缺，而深度学习模型需要大量数据。半监督学习能提升数据效率，但现有方法复杂且效果有限，需更简单有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用标注数据的掩码信息，通过切割粘贴增强生成部分标注的伪样本，并在无标注图像的背景区域引入一致性正则化项，结合二元交叉熵损失进行训练。
AI.result: 在眼底照片和脑部CT两个公开数据集上验证，该方法在无需复杂网络结构的情况下，性能优于其他自训练和一致性方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过简单的切割粘贴和背景一致性约束，有效提升了半监督病变分割的性能，为医学图像分析提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Design of Fuzzy Logic Controller for Washing Machine
title_zh: 洗衣机模糊逻辑控制器设计
abstract: Things are becoming more advanced as technology advances,and machines now perform the majority of the manual work. The most often used home appliance is the washing machine for cloths. In this paper, we used the Mamdani approach and created an algorithm based on multi-input multi-output. The algorithm is implemented in Python.The results of this simulation show that the washing machine provides better execution at a low computation cost
summary: Things are becoming more advanced as technology advances,and machines now perform the majority of the manual work. The most often used home appliance is the washing machine for cloths. In this paper, we used the Mamdani approach and created an algorithm based on multi-input multi-output. The algorithm is implemented in Python.The results of this simulation show that the washing machine provides better execution at a low computation cost
abstract_zh: 随着技术的进步，事情变得越来越先进，机器现在可以完成大部分的手工工作。最常用的家用电器是洗衣机。在本文中，我们使用Mamdani方法并创建了一种基于多输入多输出的算法。该算法是用Python实现的。模拟结果表明洗衣机以较低的计算成本提供了更好的执行力

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于模糊逻辑控制器的洗衣机控制系统。
AI.motivation: 随着技术的发展，洗衣机等家用电器逐渐承担了更多的手动工作，因此需要更高效的控制方法以提高性能。
AI.method: 本文采用Mamdani方法，设计了一个多输入多输出的模糊逻辑控制算法，并在Python中实现。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该洗衣机控制系统在较低的计算成本下具有更好的执行效果。
AI.conclusion: 模糊逻辑控制器能够有效提升洗衣机的控制性能，且计算成本较低，具有实际应用价值。

title: Structure-Aware NeRF without Posed Camera via Epipolar Constraint
title_zh: 通过极线约束无需姿势相机的结构感知 NeRF
abstract: The neural radiance field (NeRF) for realistic novel view synthesis requires camera poses to be pre-acquired by a structure-from-motion (SfM) approach. This two-stage strategy is not convenient to use and degrades the performance because the error in the pose extraction can propagate to the view synthesis. We integrate the pose extraction and view synthesis into a single end-to-end procedure so they can benefit from each other. For training NeRF models, only RGB images are given, without pre-known camera poses. The camera poses are obtained by the epipolar constraint in which the identical feature in different views has the same world coordinates transformed from the local camera coordinates according to the extracted poses. The epipolar constraint is jointly optimized with pixel color constraint. The poses are represented by a CNN-based deep network, whose input is the related frames. This joint optimization enables NeRF to be aware of the scene's structure that has an improved generalization performance. Extensive experiments on a variety of scenes demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Code is available at https://github.com/XTU-PR-LAB/SaNerf.
summary: The neural radiance field (NeRF) for realistic novel view synthesis requires camera poses to be pre-acquired by a structure-from-motion (SfM) approach. This two-stage strategy is not convenient to use and degrades the performance because the error in the pose extraction can propagate to the view synthesis. We integrate the pose extraction and view synthesis into a single end-to-end procedure so they can benefit from each other. For training NeRF models, only RGB images are given, without pre-known camera poses. The camera poses are obtained by the epipolar constraint in which the identical feature in different views has the same world coordinates transformed from the local camera coordinates according to the extracted poses. The epipolar constraint is jointly optimized with pixel color constraint. The poses are represented by a CNN-based deep network, whose input is the related frames. This joint optimization enables NeRF to be aware of the scene's structure that has an improved generalization performance. Extensive experiments on a variety of scenes demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Code is available at https://github.com/XTU-PR-LAB/SaNerf.
abstract_zh: 用于逼真新颖视图合成的神经辐射场 (NeRF) 需要通过运动结构 (SfM) 方法预先获取相机姿势。这种两阶段策略使用起来并不方便，并且会降低性能，因为姿势提取中的错误会传播到视图合成。我们将姿势提取和视图合成集成到单个端到端过程中，以便它们可以相互受益。对于训练 NeRF 模型，仅给出 RGB 图像，没有预先知道的相机姿势。相机位姿是通过极线约束获得的，其中不同视图中的相同特征具有根据提取的位姿从本地相机坐标转换而来的相同世界坐标。对极约束与像素颜色约束联合优化。这些姿势由基于 CNN 的深度网络表示，其输入是相关帧。这种联合优化使 NeRF 能够了解场景的结构，从而提高泛化性能。对各种场景的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/XTU-PR-LAB/SaNerf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预知相机姿态的结构感知NeRF方法，通过联合优化极线约束与像素颜色约束实现端到端训练。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF依赖结构从运动(SfM)获取相机姿态，存在流程繁琐且误差传播问题，本文旨在通过端到端方式联合优化姿态估计与视图合成。
AI.method: 利用CNN网络从RGB图像估计相机姿态，通过极线约束确保不同视角特征点坐标一致性，并与像素颜色约束联合优化，使NeRF感知场景结构。
AI.result: 在多场景实验中验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结构感知的端到端优化提升了NeRF的泛化性能，解决了传统两阶段流程的局限性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过结构感知的端到端优化提升了NeRF的泛化性能，解决了传统两阶段流程的局限性。

tldr: 本文提出一种无需预知相机姿态的结构感知NeRF方法，通过联合优化极线约束与像素颜色约束实现端到端训练。
motivation: 传统NeRF依赖结构从运动(SfM)获取相机姿态，存在流程繁琐且误差传播问题，本文旨在通过端到端方式联合优化姿态估计与视图合成。
method: 利用CNN网络从RGB图像估计相机姿态，通过极线约束确保不同视角特征点坐标一致性，并与像素颜色约束联合优化，使NeRF感知场景结构。
result: 在多场景实验中验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
conclusion: 该方法通过结构感知的端到端优化提升了NeRF的泛化性能，解决了传统两阶段流程的局限性。
search_text: Structure-Aware NeRF without Posed Camera via Epipolar Constraint 通过极线约束无需姿势相机的结构感知 NeRF The neural radiance field (NeRF) for realistic novel view synthesis requires camera poses to be pre-acquired by a structure-from-motion (SfM) approach. This two-stage strategy is not convenient to use and degrades the performance because the error in the pose extraction can propagate to the view synthesis. We integrate the pose extraction and view synthesis into a single end-to-end procedure so they can benefit from each other. For training NeRF models, only RGB images are given, without pre-known camera poses. The camera poses are obtained by the epipolar constraint in which the identical feature in different views has the same world coordinates transformed from the local camera coordinates according to the extracted poses. The epipolar constraint is jointly optimized with pixel color constraint. The poses are represented by a CNN-based deep network, whose input is the related frames. This joint optimization enables NeRF to be aware of the scene's structure that has an improved generalization performance. Extensive experiments on a variety of scenes demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Code is available at https://github.com/XTU-PR-LAB/SaNerf. 用于逼真新颖视图合成的神经辐射场 (NeRF) 需要通过运动结构 (SfM) 方法预先获取相机姿势。这种两阶段策略使用起来并不方便，并且会降低性能，因为姿势提取中的错误会传播到视图合成。我们将姿势提取和视图合成集成到单个端到端过程中，以便它们可以相互受益。对于训练 NeRF 模型，仅给出 RGB 图像，没有预先知道的相机姿势。相机位姿是通过极线约束获得的，其中不同视图中的相同特征具有根据提取的位姿从本地相机坐标转换而来的相同世界坐标。对极约束与像素颜色约束联合优化。这些姿势由基于 CNN 的深度网络表示，其输入是相关帧。这种联合优化使 NeRF 能够了解场景的结构，从而提高泛化性能。对各种场景的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/XTU-PR-LAB/SaNerf 获取。 本文提出一种无需预知相机姿态的结构感知NeRF方法，通过联合优化极线约束与像素颜色约束实现端到端训练。 Shu Chen,Yang Zhang,Yaxin Xu,Beiji Zou cs.CV

title: Configuration Tracking Control of a Multi-Segment Soft Robotic Arm Using a Cosserat Rod Model
title_zh: 使用 Cosserat 杆模型的多节软机械臂的构形跟踪控制
abstract: Controlling soft continuum robotic arms is challenging due to their hyper-redundancy and dexterity. In this paper we demonstrate, for the first time, closed-loop control of the configuration space variables of a soft robotic arm, composed of independently controllable segments, using a Cosserat rod model of the robot and the distributed sensing and actuation capabilities of the segments. Our controller solves the inverse dynamic problem by simulating the Cosserat rod model in MATLAB using a computationally efficient numerical solution scheme, and it applies the computed control output to the actual robot in real time. The position and orientation of the tip of each segment are measured in real time, while the remaining unknown variables that are needed to solve the inverse dynamics are estimated simultaneously in the simulation. We implement the controller on a multi-segment silicone robotic arm with pneumatic actuation, using a motion capture system to measure the segments' positions and orientations. The controller is used to reshape the arm into configurations that are achieved through different combinations of bending and extension deformations in 3D space. The resulting tracking performance indicates the effectiveness of the controller and the accuracy of the simulated Cosserat rod model that is used to estimate the unmeasured variables.
summary: Controlling soft continuum robotic arms is challenging due to their hyper-redundancy and dexterity. In this paper we demonstrate, for the first time, closed-loop control of the configuration space variables of a soft robotic arm, composed of independently controllable segments, using a Cosserat rod model of the robot and the distributed sensing and actuation capabilities of the segments. Our controller solves the inverse dynamic problem by simulating the Cosserat rod model in MATLAB using a computationally efficient numerical solution scheme, and it applies the computed control output to the actual robot in real time. The position and orientation of the tip of each segment are measured in real time, while the remaining unknown variables that are needed to solve the inverse dynamics are estimated simultaneously in the simulation. We implement the controller on a multi-segment silicone robotic arm with pneumatic actuation, using a motion capture system to measure the segments' positions and orientations. The controller is used to reshape the arm into configurations that are achieved through different combinations of bending and extension deformations in 3D space. The resulting tracking performance indicates the effectiveness of the controller and the accuracy of the simulated Cosserat rod model that is used to estimate the unmeasured variables.
abstract_zh: 由于软连续体机械臂具有超冗余性和灵活性，控制它们具有挑战性。在本文中，我们首次使用机器人的 Cosserat 杆模型以及各节段的分布式传感和驱动能力，演示了对由独立可控节段组成的软机器人臂的配置空间变量的闭环控制。我们的控制器通过使用计算高效的数值求解方案在 MATLAB 中模拟 Cosserat 杆模型来解决逆动态问题，并将计算的控制输出实时应用于实际机器人。实时测量每个段尖端的位置和方向，同时在模拟中估计求解逆动力学所需的剩余未知变量。我们在具有气动驱动的多段硅胶机械臂上实现控制器，使用运动捕捉系统来测量各段的位置和方向。该控制器用于将手臂重塑为通过 3D 空间中弯曲和伸展变形的不同组合实现的配置。由此产生的跟踪性能表明控制器的有效性以及用于估计未测量变量的模拟 Cosserat 杆模型的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Cosserat杆模型的多段软体机械臂配置跟踪控制方法，通过实时仿真与实际机器人交互实现精确控制。
AI.motivation: 软体机械臂因高冗余度和灵活性导致控制困难，传统方法难以准确估计未测量变量，需开发新型控制框架提升精度与实时性。
AI.method: 采用Cosserat杆模型建立机器人动力学方程，结合MATLAB高效数值解法实时求解逆动力学问题，并通过运动捕捉系统获取末端位姿数据，同步估计未测量变量实现闭环控制。
AI.result: 控制器成功使多段硅胶机械臂在三维空间中完成多种弯曲与伸展组合的配置重塑，验证了控制算法与模型估计的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现多段软体机械臂配置空间变量的闭环控制，证明了Cosserat杆模型结合实时估计的有效性，为复杂变形控制提供了新思路。
