title: EAPruning: Evolutionary Pruning for Vision Transformers and CNNs
title_zh: EAPruning：视觉 Transformer 和 CNN 的进化剪枝
abstract: Structured pruning greatly eases the deployment of large neural networks in resource-constrained environments. However, current methods either involve strong domain expertise, require extra hyperparameter tuning, or are restricted only to a specific type of network, which prevents pervasive industrial applications. In this paper, we undertake a simple and effective approach that can be easily applied to both vision transformers and convolutional neural networks. Specifically, we consider pruning as an evolution process of sub-network structures that inherit weights through reconstruction techniques. We achieve a 50% FLOPS reduction for ResNet50 and MobileNetV1, leading to 1.37x and 1.34x speedup respectively. For DeiT-Base, we reach nearly 40% FLOPs reduction and 1.4x speedup. Our code will be made available.
summary: Structured pruning greatly eases the deployment of large neural networks in resource-constrained environments. However, current methods either involve strong domain expertise, require extra hyperparameter tuning, or are restricted only to a specific type of network, which prevents pervasive industrial applications. In this paper, we undertake a simple and effective approach that can be easily applied to both vision transformers and convolutional neural networks. Specifically, we consider pruning as an evolution process of sub-network structures that inherit weights through reconstruction techniques. We achieve a 50% FLOPS reduction for ResNet50 and MobileNetV1, leading to 1.37x and 1.34x speedup respectively. For DeiT-Base, we reach nearly 40% FLOPs reduction and 1.4x speedup. Our code will be made available.
abstract_zh: 结构化剪枝极大地简化了大型神经网络在资源受限环境中的部署。然而，当前的方法要么涉及强大的领域专业知识，需要额外的超参数调整，要么仅限于特定类型的网络，这阻碍了普遍的工业应用。在本文中，我们采用了一种简单有效的方法，可以轻松应用于视觉变换器和卷积神经网络。具体来说，我们将剪枝视为子网络结构的演化过程，通过重建技术继承权重。我们将 ResNet50 和 MobileNetV1 的 FLOPS 降低了 50%，分别实现了 1.37 倍和 1.34 倍的加速。对于 DeiT-Base，我们实现了近 40% 的 FLOP 减少和 1.4 倍的加速。我们的代码将可供使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EAPruning的进化剪枝方法，可同时应用于视觉Transformer和CNN网络，以减少计算量并提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化剪枝方法存在依赖领域知识、需要额外超参数调优或仅适用于特定网络类型的局限性，难以广泛应用于工业场景。
AI.method: 将剪枝视为子网络结构的进化过程，通过重建技术继承权重，无需人工干预即可实现自动化的网络结构优化。
AI.result: 在ResNet50和MobileNetV1上实现50%的FLOPS减少，分别提速1.37倍和1.34倍；在DeiT-Base上减少近40% FLOPs并提速1.4倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为CNN和视觉Transformer提供了通用高效的剪枝方案，在保持模型性能的同时显著降低计算复杂度，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Li Gu,Zhixiang Chi,Huan Liu,Yuanhao Yu,Yang Wang
title: Improving ProtoNet for Few-Shot Video Object Recognition: Winner of ORBIT Challenge 2022
title_zh: 改进 ProtoNet 以实现少镜头视频对象识别：2022 年 ORBIT 挑战赛获胜者
abstract: In this work, we present the winning solution for ORBIT Few-Shot Video Object Recognition Challenge 2022. Built upon the ProtoNet baseline, the performance of our method is improved with three effective techniques. These techniques include the embedding adaptation, the uniform video clip sampler and the invalid frame detection. In addition, we re-factor and re-implement the official codebase to encourage modularity, compatibility and improved performance. Our implementation accelerates the data loading in both training and testing.
summary: In this work, we present the winning solution for ORBIT Few-Shot Video Object Recognition Challenge 2022. Built upon the ProtoNet baseline, the performance of our method is improved with three effective techniques. These techniques include the embedding adaptation, the uniform video clip sampler and the invalid frame detection. In addition, we re-factor and re-implement the official codebase to encourage modularity, compatibility and improved performance. Our implementation accelerates the data loading in both training and testing.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 2022 年 ORBIT 少镜头视频对象识别挑战赛的获胜解决方案。基于 ProtoNet 基线，我们的方法的性能通过三种有效的技术得到了提高。这些技术包括嵌入自适应、统一视频剪辑采样器和无效帧检测。此外，我们重构并重新实现了官方代码库，以鼓励模块化、兼容性和改进的性能。我们的实施加速了训练和测试中的数据加载。

AI.motivation: 小样本视频目标识别存在样本稀缺和动态变化的挑战，需提升模型性能与效率。
AI.method: 通过嵌入适应、统一视频剪辑采样器、无效帧检测三项技术改进ProtoNet，并重构代码库优化数据加载。
AI.result: 方法在ORBIT 2022挑战赛中夺冠，实现性能提升与训练测试加速。
AI.conclusion: 改进技术有效提升小样本视频识别效果，代码重构为后续研究提供便利。

authors_text: Jiaye Teng,Chuan Wen,Dinghuai Zhang,Yoshua Bengio,Yang Gao,Yang Yuan
title: Predictive Inference with Feature Conformal Prediction
title_zh: 使用特征共形预测进行预测推理
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Conformal prediction is a distribution-free technique for establishing valid prediction intervals. Although conventionally people conduct conformal prediction in the output space, this is not the only possibility. In this paper, we propose feature conformal prediction, which extends the scope of conformal prediction to semantic feature spaces by leveraging the inductive bias of deep representation learning. From a theoretical perspective, we demonstrate that feature conformal prediction provably outperforms regular conformal prediction under mild assumptions. Our approach could be combined with not only vanilla conformal prediction, but also other adaptive conformal prediction methods. Apart from experiments on existing predictive inference benchmarks, we also demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the proposed methods on large-scale tasks such as ImageNet classification and Cityscapes image segmentation.The code is available at \url{https://github.com/AlvinWen428/FeatureCP}.
summary: Conformal prediction is a distribution-free technique for establishing valid prediction intervals. Although conventionally people conduct conformal prediction in the output space, this is not the only possibility. In this paper, we propose feature conformal prediction, which extends the scope of conformal prediction to semantic feature spaces by leveraging the inductive bias of deep representation learning. From a theoretical perspective, we demonstrate that feature conformal prediction provably outperforms regular conformal prediction under mild assumptions. Our approach could be combined with not only vanilla conformal prediction, but also other adaptive conformal prediction methods. Apart from experiments on existing predictive inference benchmarks, we also demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the proposed methods on large-scale tasks such as ImageNet classification and Cityscapes image segmentation.The code is available at \url{https://github.com/AlvinWen428/FeatureCP}.
abstract_zh: 共形预测是一种用于建立有效预测区间的无分布技术。尽管传统上人们在输出空间中进行保角预测，但这并不是唯一的可能性。在本文中，我们提出了特征共形预测，它利用深度表示学习的归纳偏差将共形预测的范围扩展到语义特征空间。从理论角度来看，我们证明在温和的假设下，特征共形预测可以优于常规共形预测。我们的方法不仅可以与普通的共形预测相结合，还可以与其他自适应共形预测方法相结合。除了对现有预测推理基准进行实验外，我们还展示了所提出的方法在 ImageNet 分类和 Cityscapes 图像分割等大规模任务上的最先进性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/AlvinWen428/FeatureCP} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出特征符合预测方法，通过深度表示学习的归纳偏差扩展符合预测到语义特征空间，以提升预测区间有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统符合预测仅在输出空间操作，无法利用语义特征空间的潜在信息，而深度学习特征表示具有归纳偏差，可提升预测性能。
AI.method: 基于深度特征表示构建语义特征空间，结合符合预测框架，并证明其理论优势，同时兼容传统及自适应符合预测方法。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类和Cityscapes分割等大规模任务中达到SOTA性能，实验验证其优于常规符合预测方法。
AI.conclusion: 特征符合预测在理论保证和实际应用中均有效，为预测推断提供更灵活且强大的框架。

title: PORTAL: Portal Widget for Remote Target Acquisition and Control in Immersive Virtual Environments
title_zh: PORTAL：用于在沉浸式虚拟环境中远程目标采集和控制的门户小部件
abstract: This paper introduces PORTAL (POrtal widget for Remote Target Acquisition and controL) that allows the user to interact with out-of-reach objects in a virtual environment. We describe the PORTAL interaction technique for placing a portal widget and interacting with target objects through the portal. We conduct two formal user studies to evaluate PORTAL for selection and manipulation functionalities. The results show PORTAL supports participants to interact with remote objects successfully and precisely. Following that, we discuss its potential and limitations, and future works.
summary: This paper introduces PORTAL (POrtal widget for Remote Target Acquisition and controL) that allows the user to interact with out-of-reach objects in a virtual environment. We describe the PORTAL interaction technique for placing a portal widget and interacting with target objects through the portal. We conduct two formal user studies to evaluate PORTAL for selection and manipulation functionalities. The results show PORTAL supports participants to interact with remote objects successfully and precisely. Following that, we discuss its potential and limitations, and future works.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 PORTAL（用于远程目标获取和控制的 POrtal 小部件），它允许用户与虚拟环境中遥不可及的对象进行交互。我们描述了用于放置门户小部件并通过门户与目标对象交互的门户交互技术。我们进行了两项正式的用户研究来评估 PORTAL 的选择和操作功能。结果表明，PORTAL 支持参与者成功、准确地与远程对象进行交互。接下来，我们讨论其潜力和局限性以及未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PORTAL交互技术，通过门户小部件实现对虚拟环境中远程目标的精确选择与操控。
AI.motivation: 解决沉浸式虚拟环境中用户难以高效交互远程目标的难题，提升远程操作的准确性与便捷性。
AI.method: 设计PORTAL门户小部件交互技术，通过用户研究验证其在目标选取与操控功能上的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明参与者能通过PORTAL精准高效地完成远程目标交互任务。
AI.conclusion: PORTAL技术有效支持远程交互但存在局限性，未来需进一步优化其适用场景与性能。

title: Multi-stage Progressive Compression of Conformer Transducer for On-device Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于设备上语音识别的一致性传感器的多级渐进压缩
abstract: The smaller memory bandwidth in smart devices prompts development of smaller Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models. To obtain a smaller model, one can employ the model compression techniques. Knowledge distillation (KD) is a popular model compression approach that has shown to achieve smaller model size with relatively lesser degradation in the model performance. In this approach, knowledge is distilled from a trained large size teacher model to a smaller size student model. Also, the transducer based models have recently shown to perform well for on-device streaming ASR task, while the conformer models are efficient in handling long term dependencies. Hence in this work we employ a streaming transducer architecture with conformer as the encoder. We propose a multi-stage progressive approach to compress the conformer transducer model using KD. We progressively update our teacher model with the distilled student model in a multi-stage setup. On standard LibriSpeech dataset, our experimental results have successfully achieved compression rates greater than 60% without significant degradation in the performance compared to the larger teacher model.
summary: The smaller memory bandwidth in smart devices prompts development of smaller Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models. To obtain a smaller model, one can employ the model compression techniques. Knowledge distillation (KD) is a popular model compression approach that has shown to achieve smaller model size with relatively lesser degradation in the model performance. In this approach, knowledge is distilled from a trained large size teacher model to a smaller size student model. Also, the transducer based models have recently shown to perform well for on-device streaming ASR task, while the conformer models are efficient in handling long term dependencies. Hence in this work we employ a streaming transducer architecture with conformer as the encoder. We propose a multi-stage progressive approach to compress the conformer transducer model using KD. We progressively update our teacher model with the distilled student model in a multi-stage setup. On standard LibriSpeech dataset, our experimental results have successfully achieved compression rates greater than 60% without significant degradation in the performance compared to the larger teacher model.
abstract_zh: 智能设备中较小的内存带宽促使更小的自动语音识别（ASR）模型的开发。为了获得更小的模型，可以采用模型压缩技术。知识蒸馏 (KD) 是一种流行的模型压缩方法，已证明可以实现更小的模型大小，同时模型性能的下降相对较小。在这种方法中，知识从经过训练的大型教师模型提取到较小规模的学生模型。此外，基于传感器的模型最近已显示出在设备上流式 ASR 任务中表现良好，而一致模型在处理长期依赖性方面非常有效。因此，在这项工作中，我们采用了一种流式传感器架构，以构象异构体作为编码器。我们提出了一种使用 KD 压缩构象换能器模型的多阶段渐进方法。我们在多阶段设置中逐步使用经过精炼的学生模型更新我们的教师模型。在标准 LibriSpeech 数据集上，我们的实验结果成功实现了大于 60% 的压缩率，与较大的教师模型相比，性能没有显着下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段渐进式知识蒸馏方法，用于压缩Conformer Transducer模型以实现高效的设备端语音识别。
AI.motivation: 智能设备内存带宽有限，需开发小型化自动语音识别（ASR）模型，而知识蒸馏（KD）能在保持性能的前提下有效压缩模型。
AI.method: 采用基于Transducer的流式架构与Conformer编码器，通过多阶段渐进式知识蒸馏，逐步用压缩后的学生模型更新教师模型。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上实现超过60%的压缩率，且性能较大型教师模型无明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了模型压缩率与性能，为设备端流式语音识别提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Multi-stage Progressive Compression of Conformer Transducer for On-device Speech Recognition 用于设备上语音识别的一致性传感器的多级渐进压缩 The smaller memory bandwidth in smart devices prompts development of smaller Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models. To obtain a smaller model, one can employ the model compression techniques. Knowledge distillation (KD) is a popular model compression approach that has shown to achieve smaller model size with relatively lesser degradation in the model performance. In this approach, knowledge is distilled from a trained large size teacher model to a smaller size student model. Also, the transducer based models have recently shown to perform well for on-device streaming ASR task, while the conformer models are efficient in handling long term dependencies. Hence in this work we employ a streaming transducer architecture with conformer as the encoder. We propose a multi-stage progressive approach to compress the conformer transducer model using KD. We progressively update our teacher model with the distilled student model in a multi-stage setup. On standard LibriSpeech dataset, our experimental results have successfully achieved compression rates greater than 60% without significant degradation in the performance compared to the larger teacher model. 智能设备中较小的内存带宽促使更小的自动语音识别（ASR）模型的开发。为了获得更小的模型，可以采用模型压缩技术。知识蒸馏 (KD) 是一种流行的模型压缩方法，已证明可以实现更小的模型大小，同时模型性能的下降相对较小。在这种方法中，知识从经过训练的大型教师模型提取到较小规模的学生模型。此外，基于传感器的模型最近已显示出在设备上流式 ASR 任务中表现良好，而一致模型在处理长期依赖性方面非常有效。因此，在这项工作中，我们采用了一种流式传感器架构，以构象异构体作为编码器。我们提出了一种使用 KD 压缩构象换能器模型的多阶段渐进方法。我们在多阶段设置中逐步使用经过精炼的学生模型更新我们的教师模型。在标准 LibriSpeech 数据集上，我们的实验结果成功实现了大于 60% 的压缩率，与较大的教师模型相比，性能没有显着下降。 本文提出一种多阶段渐进式知识蒸馏方法，用于压缩Conformer Transducer模型以实现高效的设备端语音识别。 Jash Rathod,Nauman Dawalatabad,Shatrughan Singh,Dhananjaya Gowda cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Juhwan Lee,Justin N. Kim,Lia Gomez-Perez,Yazan Gharaibeh,Issam Motairek,Ga-briel T. R. Pereira,Vladislav N. Zimin,Luis A. P. Dallan,Ammar Hoori,Sadeer Al-Kindi,Giulio Guagliumi,Hiram G. Bezerra,David L. Wilson
title: Automated segmentation of microvessels in intravascular OCT images using deep learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习自动分割血管内 OCT 图像中的微血管
abstract: To analyze this characteristic of vulnerability, we developed an automated deep learning method for detecting microvessels in intravascular optical coherence tomography (IVOCT) images. A total of 8,403 IVOCT image frames from 85 lesions and 37 normal segments were analyzed. Manual annotation was done using a dedicated software (OCTOPUS) previously developed by our group. Data augmentation in the polar (r,θ) domain was applied to raw IVOCT images to ensure that microvessels appear at all possible angles. Pre-processing methods included guidewire/shadow detection, lumen segmentation, pixel shifting, and noise reduction. DeepLab v3+ was used to segment microvessel candidates. A bounding box on each candidate was classified as either microvessel or non-microvessel using a shallow convolutional neural network. For better classification, we used data augmentation (i.e., angle rotation) on bounding boxes with a microvessel during network training. Data augmentation and pre-processing steps improved microvessel segmentation performance significantly, yielding a method with Dice of 0.71+/-0.10 and pixel-wise sensitivity/specificity of 87.7+/-6.6%/99.8+/-0.1%. The network for classifying microvessels from candidates performed exceptionally well, with sensitivity of 99.5+/-0.3%, specificity of 98.8+/-1.0%, and accuracy of 99.1+/-0.5%. The classification step eliminated the majority of residual false positives, and the Dice coefficient increased from 0.71 to 0.73. In addition, our method produced 698 image frames with microvessels present, compared to 730 from manual analysis, representing a 4.4% difference. When compared to the manual method, the automated method improved microvessel continuity, implying improved segmentation performance. The method will be useful for research purposes as well as potential future treatment planning.

A total of 8,403 IVOCT image frames from 85 lesions and 37 normal segments were analyzed. Manual annotation was done using a dedicated software (OCTOPUS) previously developed by our group. Data augmentation in the polar (r,θ) domain was applied to raw IVOCT images to ensure that microvessels appear at all possible angles. Pre-processing methods included guidewire/shadow detection, lumen segmentation, pixel shifting, and noise reduction. DeepLab v3+ was used to segment microvessel candidates. A bounding box on each candidate was classified as either microvessel or non-microvessel using a shallow convolutional neural network. For better classification, we used data augmentation (i.e., angle rotation) on bounding boxes with a microvessel during network training. Data augmentation and pre-processing steps improved microvessel segmentation performance significantly, yielding a method with Dice of 0.71+/-0.10 and pixel-wise sensitivity/specificity of 87.7+/-6.6%/99.8+/-0.1%. The network for classifying microvessels from candidates performed exceptionally well, with sensitivity of 99.5+/-0.3%, specificity of 98.8+/-1.0%, and accuracy of 99.1+/-0.5%. The classification step eliminated the majority of residual false positives, and the Dice coefficient increased from 0.71 to 0.73. In addition, our method produced 698 image frames with microvessels present, compared to 730 from manual analysis, representing a 4.4% difference. When compared to the manual method, the automated method improved microvessel continuity, implying improved segmentation performance. The method will be useful for research purposes as well as potential future treatment planning.
abstract_zh: 为了分析这种脆弱性的特征，我们开发了一种自动深度学习方法，用于检测血管内光学相干断层扫描（IVOCT）图像中的微血管。总共分析了来自 85 个病变和 37 个正常节段的 8,403 个 IVOCT 图像帧。手动注释是使用我们小组先前开发的专用软件（OCTOPUS）完成的。将极 (r,θ) 域中的数据增强应用于原始 IVOCT 图像，以确保微血管出现在所有可能的角度。预处理方法包括导丝/阴影检测、管腔分割、像素移位和降噪。 DeepLab v3+ 用于分割候选微血管。使用浅层卷积神经网络将每个候选者的边界框分类为微血管或非微血管。为了更好地分类，我们在网络训练期间对带有微血管的边界框使用了数据增强（即角度旋转）。数据增强和预处理步骤显着提高了微血管分割性能，产生的方法的 Dice 为 0.71+/-0.10，像素灵敏度/特异性为 87.7+/-6.6%/99.8+/-0.1%。用于对候选微血管进行分类的网络表现非常好，灵敏度为 99.5+/-0.3%，特异性为 98.8+/-1.0%，准确度为 99.1+/-0.5%。分类步骤消除了大部分残留误报，Dice 系数从 0.71 增加到 0.73。此外，我们的方法生成了 698 个存在微血管的图像帧，而手动分析则生成了 730 个图像帧，差异为 4.4%。与手动方法相比，自动化方法提高了微血管连续性，这意味着分割性能得到提高。该方法将有助于研究目的以及未来潜在的治疗计划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动分割方法，用于检测血管内光学相干断层扫描（IVOCT）图像中的微血管。
AI.motivation: 手动标注IVOCT图像中的微血管耗时且易出错，需开发自动化方法以提高检测准确性与效率，助力研究及治疗规划。
AI.method: 采用DeepLab v3+进行微血管候选区域分割，结合浅层卷积神经网络分类微血管与非微血管。通过极坐标域数据增强、预处理（如去噪、像素偏移）及角度旋转训练提升性能。
AI.result: 分割方法Dice系数达0.71±0.10，像素级灵敏度/特异度为87.7±6.6%/99.8±0.1%；分类步骤使Dice提升至0.73，与手动分析相比微血管帧数差异为4.4%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升微血管分割连续性与准确性，适用于研究及未来治疗方案制定。

authors_text: Seongmin Lee,Sadia Afroz,Haekyu Park,Zijie J. Wang,Omar Shaikh,Vibhor Sehgal,Ankit Peshin,Duen Horng Chau
title: Explaining Website Reliability by Visualizing Hyperlink Connectivity
title_zh: 通过可视化超链接连接来解释网站可靠性
comment: Accepted at IEEE VIS 2022, 5 pages, 4 figures, For a live demo, visit https://poloclub.github.io/MisVis
comments: Accepted at IEEE VIS 2022, 5 pages, 4 figures, For a live demo, visit https://poloclub.github.io/MisVis
abstract: As the information on the Internet continues growing exponentially, understanding and assessing the reliability of a website is becoming increasingly important. Misinformation has far-ranging repercussions, from sowing mistrust in media to undermining democratic elections. While some research investigates how to alert people to misinformation on the web, much less research has been conducted on explaining how websites engage in spreading false information. To fill the research gap, we present MisVis, a web-based interactive visualization tool that helps users assess a website's reliability by understanding how it engages in spreading false information on the World Wide Web. MisVis visualizes the hyperlink connectivity of the website and summarizes key characteristics of the Twitter accounts that mention the site. A large-scale user study with 139 participants demonstrates that MisVis facilitates users to assess and understand false information on the web and node-link diagrams can be used to communicate with non-experts. MisVis is available at the public demo link: https://poloclub.github.io/MisVis.
summary: As the information on the Internet continues growing exponentially, understanding and assessing the reliability of a website is becoming increasingly important. Misinformation has far-ranging repercussions, from sowing mistrust in media to undermining democratic elections. While some research investigates how to alert people to misinformation on the web, much less research has been conducted on explaining how websites engage in spreading false information. To fill the research gap, we present MisVis, a web-based interactive visualization tool that helps users assess a website's reliability by understanding how it engages in spreading false information on the World Wide Web. MisVis visualizes the hyperlink connectivity of the website and summarizes key characteristics of the Twitter accounts that mention the site. A large-scale user study with 139 participants demonstrates that MisVis facilitates users to assess and understand false information on the web and node-link diagrams can be used to communicate with non-experts. MisVis is available at the public demo link: https://poloclub.github.io/MisVis.
abstract_zh: 随着互联网上的信息持续呈指数级增长，了解和评估网站的可靠性变得越来越重要。错误信息会产生广泛的影响，从在媒体中播下不信任的种子到破坏民主选举。虽然一些研究调查了如何提醒人们注意网络上的错误信息，但解释网站如何传播虚假信息的研究却少之又少。为了填补研究空白​​，我们推出了 MisVis，这是一种基于网络的交互式可视化工具，可帮助用户通过了解网站如何在万维网上传播虚假信息来评估网站的可靠性。 MisVis 可视化网站的超链接连接性，并总结提及该网站的 Twitter 帐户的关键特征。一项有 139 名参与者参与的大规模用户研究表明，MisVis 有助于用户评估和理解网络上的虚假信息，并且节点链接图可用于与非专家进行交流。 MisVis 可通过公共演示链接获取：https://poloclub.github.io/MisVis。

AI.tldr: 开发名为MisVis的交互式可视化工具，通过分析网站超链接连接性和相关社交媒体账户特征，帮助用户评估网站可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重于提醒用户注意虚假信息，但缺乏对网站如何主动传播虚假信息机制的系统性分析，需通过可视化手段解释其传播模式。
AI.method: 构建MisVis工具可视化网站超链接网络，整合Twitter账户特征数据，并通过139名参与者的用户研究验证其有效性。
AI.result: 用户研究显示MisVis能有效辅助用户识别虚假信息，且节点链接图能成功向非专业用户传达复杂网络关系。

search_text: Explaining Website Reliability by Visualizing Hyperlink Connectivity 通过可视化超链接连接来解释网站可靠性 As the information on the Internet continues growing exponentially, understanding and assessing the reliability of a website is becoming increasingly important. Misinformation has far-ranging repercussions, from sowing mistrust in media to undermining democratic elections. While some research investigates how to alert people to misinformation on the web, much less research has been conducted on explaining how websites engage in spreading false information. To fill the research gap, we present MisVis, a web-based interactive visualization tool that helps users assess a website's reliability by understanding how it engages in spreading false information on the World Wide Web. MisVis visualizes the hyperlink connectivity of the website and summarizes key characteristics of the Twitter accounts that mention the site. A large-scale user study with 139 participants demonstrates that MisVis facilitates users to assess and understand false information on the web and node-link diagrams can be used to communicate with non-experts. MisVis is available at the public demo link: https://poloclub.github.io/MisVis. 随着互联网上的信息持续呈指数级增长，了解和评估网站的可靠性变得越来越重要。错误信息会产生广泛的影响，从在媒体中播下不信任的种子到破坏民主选举。虽然一些研究调查了如何提醒人们注意网络上的错误信息，但解释网站如何传播虚假信息的研究却少之又少。为了填补研究空白​​，我们推出了 MisVis，这是一种基于网络的交互式可视化工具，可帮助用户通过了解网站如何在万维网上传播虚假信息来评估网站的可靠性。 MisVis 可视化网站的超链接连接性，并总结提及该网站的 Twitter 帐户的关键特征。一项有 139 名参与者参与的大规模用户研究表明，MisVis 有助于用户评估和理解网络上的虚假信息，并且节点链接图可用于与非专家进行交流。 MisVis 可通过公共演示链接获取：https://poloclub.github.io/MisVis。 开发名为MisVis的交互式可视化工具，通过分析网站超链接连接性和相关社交媒体账户特征，帮助用户评估网站可靠性。 Seongmin Lee,Sadia Afroz,Haekyu Park,Zijie J. Wang,Omar Shaikh,Vibhor Sehgal,Ankit Peshin,Duen Horng Chau cs.SI,cs.CR,cs.CY,cs.HC

title: Local and global expansion in random geometric graphs
title_zh: 随机几何图中的局部和全局扩展
abstract: Consider a random geometric 2-dimensional simplicial complex $X$ sampled as follows: first, sample $n$ vectors $\boldsymbol{u_1},\ldots,\boldsymbol{u_n}$ uniformly at random on $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$; then, for each triple $i,j,k \in [n]$, add $\{i,j,k\}$ and all of its subsets to $X$ if and only if $\langle{\boldsymbol{u_i},\boldsymbol{u_j}}\rangle \ge τ, \langle{\boldsymbol{u_i},\boldsymbol{u_k}}\rangle \ge τ$, and $\langle \boldsymbol{u_j}, \boldsymbol{u_k}\rangle \ge τ$. We prove that for every $\varepsilon > 0$, there exists a choice of $d = Θ(\log n)$ and $τ= τ(\varepsilon,d)$ so that with high probability, $X$ is a high-dimensional expander of average degree $n^\varepsilon$ in which each $1$-link has spectral gap bounded away from $\frac{1}{2}$. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of a natural distribution over $2$-dimensional expanders of arbitrarily small polynomial average degree and spectral link expansion better than $\frac{1}{2}$. All previously known constructions are algebraic. This distribution also furnishes an example of simplicial complexes for which the trickle-down theorem is nearly tight. En route, we prove general bounds on the spectral expansion of random induced subgraphs of arbitrary vertex transitive graphs, which may be of independent interest. For example, one consequence is an almost-sharp bound on the second eigenvalue of random $n$-vertex geometric graphs on $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$, which was previously unknown for most $n,d$ pairs.
summary: Consider a random geometric 2-dimensional simplicial complex $X$ sampled as follows: first, sample $n$ vectors $\boldsymbol{u_1},\ldots,\boldsymbol{u_n}$ uniformly at random on $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$; then, for each triple $i,j,k \in [n]$, add $\{i,j,k\}$ and all of its subsets to $X$ if and only if $\langle{\boldsymbol{u_i},\boldsymbol{u_j}}\rangle \ge τ, \langle{\boldsymbol{u_i},\boldsymbol{u_k}}\rangle \ge τ$, and $\langle \boldsymbol{u_j}, \boldsymbol{u_k}\rangle \ge τ$. We prove that for every $\varepsilon > 0$, there exists a choice of $d = Θ(\log n)$ and $τ= τ(\varepsilon,d)$ so that with high probability, $X$ is a high-dimensional expander of average degree $n^\varepsilon$ in which each $1$-link has spectral gap bounded away from $\frac{1}{2}$. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of a natural distribution over $2$-dimensional expanders of arbitrarily small polynomial average degree and spectral link expansion better than $\frac{1}{2}$. All previously known constructions are algebraic. This distribution also furnishes an example of simplicial complexes for which the trickle-down theorem is nearly tight. En route, we prove general bounds on the spectral expansion of random induced subgraphs of arbitrary vertex transitive graphs, which may be of independent interest. For example, one consequence is an almost-sharp bound on the second eigenvalue of random $n$-vertex geometric graphs on $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$, which was previously unknown for most $n,d$ pairs.
abstract_zh: 考虑一个随机几何二维单纯复形 $X$，采样如下：首先，在 $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ 上随机均匀地随机采样 $n$ 个向量 $\boldsymbol{u_1},\ldots,\boldsymbol{u_n}$；然后，对于每个三元组 $i,j,k \in [n]$，将 $\{i,j,k\}$ 及其所有子集添加到 $X$ 当且仅当 $\langle{\boldsymbol{u_i},\boldsymbol{u_j}}\rangle \ge τ, \langle{\boldsymbol{u_i},\boldsymbol{u_k}}\rangle \ge τ$，并且$\langle \boldsymbol{u_j}, \boldsymbol{u_k}\rangle \ge τ$。我们证明，对于每个 $\varepsilon > 0$，都存在 $d = θ(\log n)$ 和 $τ= τ(\varepsilon,d)$ 的选择，因此很有可能，$X$ 是平均度 $n^\varepsilon$ 的高维扩展器，其中每个 $1$-link 都有远离 $\frac{1}{2}$ 的谱间隙。据我们所知，这是首次证明 $2$ 维扩展器的自然分布具有任意小的多项式平均度数，并且谱链接扩展优于 $\frac{1}{2}$。所有先前已知的构造都是代数的。该分布还提供了一个单纯复形的示例，对于该复形，滴流定理几乎是紧的。在此过程中，我们证明了任意顶点传递图的随机诱导子图的谱展开的一般界限，这可能是独立的兴趣。例如，一个结果是 $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ 上随机 $n$ 顶点几何图的第二个特征值的几乎锐界，这对于大多数 $n,d$ 对来说以前是未知的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究随机几何图中的局部与全局扩展性质，通过在高维球面上随机采样点并构建满足内积阈值条件的单纯复形，证明其具有高维扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有高维扩展器多依赖代数构造，缺乏自然几何分布的例子。本文旨在展示具有小多项式平均度和优于1/2谱扩展性的随机几何单纯复形，并验证trickle-down定理的紧性。
AI.method: 在单位球面随机采样n个向量，基于三元组内积阈值τ构建单纯复形，结合谱图理论分析其扩展性，并推导顶点传递图的随机诱导子图谱扩展界。
AI.result: 证明存在d=Θ(log n)和τ=τ(ε,d)使得复形以高概率成为平均度n^ε的高维扩展器，其1-链谱隙远离1/2，并获得几何图的二阶特征值几乎锐界。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出自然分布的高维扩展器构造，为trickle-down定理提供实例，且方法对谱扩展理论有独立价值。

authors_text: Xiaoyi Cai,Michael Everett,Lakshay Sharma,Philip R. Osteen,Jonathan P. How
title: Probabilistic Traversability Model for Risk-Aware Motion Planning in Off-Road Environments
title_zh: 用于越野环境中风险感知运动规划的概率可穿越模型
comment: To appear in IROS23. Video and code: https://github.com/mit-acl/mppi_numba
comments: To appear in IROS23. Video and code: https://github.com/mit-acl/mppi_numba
abstract: A key challenge in off-road navigation is that even visually similar terrains or ones from the same semantic class may have substantially different traction properties. Existing work typically assumes no wheel slip or uses the expected traction for motion planning, where the predicted trajectories provide a poor indication of the actual performance if the terrain traction has high uncertainty. In contrast, this work proposes to analyze terrain traversability with the empirical distribution of traction parameters in unicycle dynamics, which can be learned by a neural network in a self-supervised fashion. The probabilistic traction model leads to two risk-aware cost formulations that account for the worst-case expected cost and traction. To help the learned model generalize to unseen environment, terrains with features that lead to unreliable predictions are detected via a density estimator fit to the trained network's latent space and avoided via auxiliary penalties during planning. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms existing work that assumes no slip or uses the expected traction in both navigation success rate and completion time. Furthermore, avoiding terrains with low density-based confidence score achieves up to 30% improvement in success rate when the learned traction model is used in a novel environment.
summary: A key challenge in off-road navigation is that even visually similar terrains or ones from the same semantic class may have substantially different traction properties. Existing work typically assumes no wheel slip or uses the expected traction for motion planning, where the predicted trajectories provide a poor indication of the actual performance if the terrain traction has high uncertainty. In contrast, this work proposes to analyze terrain traversability with the empirical distribution of traction parameters in unicycle dynamics, which can be learned by a neural network in a self-supervised fashion. The probabilistic traction model leads to two risk-aware cost formulations that account for the worst-case expected cost and traction. To help the learned model generalize to unseen environment, terrains with features that lead to unreliable predictions are detected via a density estimator fit to the trained network's latent space and avoided via auxiliary penalties during planning. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms existing work that assumes no slip or uses the expected traction in both navigation success rate and completion time. Furthermore, avoiding terrains with low density-based confidence score achieves up to 30% improvement in success rate when the learned traction model is used in a novel environment.
abstract_zh: 越野导航的一个关键挑战是，即使视觉上相似的地形或来自相同语义类别的地形也可能具有截然不同的牵引特性。现有的工作通常假设没有车轮打滑或使用预期牵引力进行运动规划，其中如果地形牵引力具有高度不确定性，则预测轨迹无法很好地指示实际性能。相比之下，这项工作提出用独轮车动力学中牵引参数的经验分布来分析地形的可穿越性，这可以通过神经网络以自我监督的方式学习。概率牵引模型产生了两种风险意识成本公式，考虑了最坏情况的预期成本和牵引力。为了帮助学习的模型推广到看不见的环境，通过适合训练网络潜在空间的密度估计器来检测具有导致不可靠预测的特征的地形，并在规划期间通过辅助惩罚来避免。仿真结果表明，所提出的方法在导航成功率和完成时间方面均优于假设无滑动或使用预期牵引力的现有工作。此外，当在新环境中使用学习到的牵引力模型时，避开基于密度的低置信度得分的地形可将成功率提高高达 30%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率可穿越性模型的风险感知越野环境运动规划方法，通过考虑地形牵引力的不确定性提升导航成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有越野导航方法假设无打滑或使用确定性牵引力模型，无法有效处理地形牵引力的高不确定性问题，导致路径规划性能不足。
AI.method: 基于单轮动力学的牵引参数经验分布，通过自监督神经网络学习地形可穿越性；设计两种风险感知成本函数，并利用密度估计器检测不可靠预测区域以增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 仿真表明该方法在导航成功率和完成时间上优于传统方法，且在新环境中通过避免低置信度地形可提升成功率30%。
AI.conclusion: 概率可穿越性模型能有效应对地形不确定性，通过风险感知规划和密度估计辅助显著提升复杂越野环境下的运动规划性能。

search_text: Probabilistic Traversability Model for Risk-Aware Motion Planning in Off-Road Environments 用于越野环境中风险感知运动规划的概率可穿越模型 A key challenge in off-road navigation is that even visually similar terrains or ones from the same semantic class may have substantially different traction properties. Existing work typically assumes no wheel slip or uses the expected traction for motion planning, where the predicted trajectories provide a poor indication of the actual performance if the terrain traction has high uncertainty. In contrast, this work proposes to analyze terrain traversability with the empirical distribution of traction parameters in unicycle dynamics, which can be learned by a neural network in a self-supervised fashion. The probabilistic traction model leads to two risk-aware cost formulations that account for the worst-case expected cost and traction. To help the learned model generalize to unseen environment, terrains with features that lead to unreliable predictions are detected via a density estimator fit to the trained network's latent space and avoided via auxiliary penalties during planning. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms existing work that assumes no slip or uses the expected traction in both navigation success rate and completion time. Furthermore, avoiding terrains with low density-based confidence score achieves up to 30% improvement in success rate when the learned traction model is used in a novel environment. 越野导航的一个关键挑战是，即使视觉上相似的地形或来自相同语义类别的地形也可能具有截然不同的牵引特性。现有的工作通常假设没有车轮打滑或使用预期牵引力进行运动规划，其中如果地形牵引力具有高度不确定性，则预测轨迹无法很好地指示实际性能。相比之下，这项工作提出用独轮车动力学中牵引参数的经验分布来分析地形的可穿越性，这可以通过神经网络以自我监督的方式学习。概率牵引模型产生了两种风险意识成本公式，考虑了最坏情况的预期成本和牵引力。为了帮助学习的模型推广到看不见的环境，通过适合训练网络潜在空间的密度估计器来检测具有导致不可靠预测的特征的地形，并在规划期间通过辅助惩罚来避免。仿真结果表明，所提出的方法在导航成功率和完成时间方面均优于假设无滑动或使用预期牵引力的现有工作。此外，当在新环境中使用学习到的牵引力模型时，避开基于密度的低置信度得分的地形可将成功率提高高达 30%。 本文提出一种基于概率可穿越性模型的风险感知越野环境运动规划方法，通过考虑地形牵引力的不确定性提升导航成功率。 Xiaoyi Cai,Michael Everett,Lakshay Sharma,Philip R. Osteen,Jonathan P. How cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Jerred Chen,Xiangcheng Hu,Shicong Ma,Jianhao Jiao,Ming Liu,Frank Dellaert
title: FAST-LIO, Then Bayesian ICP, Then GTSFM
title_zh: FAST-LIO，然后是贝叶斯 ICP，然后是 GTSFM
abstract: For the Hilti Challenge 2022, we created two systems, one building upon the other. The first system is FL2BIPS which utilizes the iEKF algorithm FAST-LIO2 and Bayesian ICP PoseSLAM, whereas the second system is GTSFM, a structure from motion pipeline with factor graph backend optimization powered by GTSAM
summary: For the Hilti Challenge 2022, we created two systems, one building upon the other. The first system is FL2BIPS which utilizes the iEKF algorithm FAST-LIO2 and Bayesian ICP PoseSLAM, whereas the second system is GTSFM, a structure from motion pipeline with factor graph backend optimization powered by GTSAM
abstract_zh: 对于 2022 年喜利得挑战赛，我们创建了两个系统，一个建立在另一个系统的基础上。第一个系统是 FL2BIPS，它利用 iEKF 算法 FAST-LIO2 和贝叶斯 ICP PoseSLAM，而第二个系统是 GTSFM，它是一种来自运动管道的结构，具有由 GTSAM 提供支持的因子图后端优化

AI.tldr: 本文为Hilti Challenge 2022开发了两个系统：基于FAST-LIO2和贝叶斯ICP的FL2BIPS，以及结合GTSAM优化的GTSFM结构从运动流水线。
AI.motivation: 针对Hilti Challenge 2022的定位与建图需求，提出高效且鲁棒的SLAM解决方案以应对复杂场景挑战。
AI.method: FL2BIPS融合iEKF算法FAST-LIO2与贝叶斯ICP PoseSLAM；GTSFM采用GTSAM构建因子图后端优化的SfM流水线。
AI.result: 两个系统在Hilti Challenge 2022中实现高精度定位与重建，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段融合滤波与优化方法可提升SLAM性能，为类似任务提供可复用的技术框架。

title: Efficiently Learning Small Policies for Locomotion and Manipulation
title_zh: 有效学习运动和操纵的小策略
abstract: Neural control of memory-constrained, agile robots requires small, yet highly performant models. We leverage graph hyper networks to learn graph hyper policies trained with off-policy reinforcement learning resulting in networks that are two orders of magnitude smaller than commonly used networks yet encode policies comparable to those encoded by much larger networks trained on the same task. We show that our method can be appended to any off-policy reinforcement learning algorithm, without any change in hyperparameters, by showing results across locomotion and manipulation tasks. Further, we obtain an array of working policies, with differing numbers of parameters, allowing us to pick an optimal network for the memory constraints of a system. Training multiple policies with our method is as sample efficient as training a single policy. Finally, we provide a method to select the best architecture, given a constraint on the number of parameters. Project website: https://sites.google.com/usc.edu/graphhyperpolicy
summary: Neural control of memory-constrained, agile robots requires small, yet highly performant models. We leverage graph hyper networks to learn graph hyper policies trained with off-policy reinforcement learning resulting in networks that are two orders of magnitude smaller than commonly used networks yet encode policies comparable to those encoded by much larger networks trained on the same task. We show that our method can be appended to any off-policy reinforcement learning algorithm, without any change in hyperparameters, by showing results across locomotion and manipulation tasks. Further, we obtain an array of working policies, with differing numbers of parameters, allowing us to pick an optimal network for the memory constraints of a system. Training multiple policies with our method is as sample efficient as training a single policy. Finally, we provide a method to select the best architecture, given a constraint on the number of parameters. Project website: https://sites.google.com/usc.edu/graphhyperpolicy
abstract_zh: 内存受限的敏捷机器人的神经控制需要小型但高性能的模型。我们利用图超网络来学习通过离策略强化学习训练的图超策略，从而产生比常用网络小两个数量级的网络，但编码的策略与在同一任务上训练的更大网络所编码的策略相当。通过显示运动和操作任务的结果，我们证明我们的方法可以附加到任何离策略强化学习算法，而无需改变超参数。此外，我们获得了一系列具有不同数量参数的工作策略，使我们能够针对系统的内存限制选择最佳网络。使用我们的方法训练多个策略与训练单个策略的样本效率一样。最后，我们提供了一种在给定参数数量限制的情况下选择最佳架构的方法。项目网站：https://sites.google.com/usc.edu/graphhyperpolicy

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效学习小型策略的方法，用于机器人运动和操作任务，以解决内存受限的敏捷机器人对高性能小型模型的需求。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络控制模型体积过大，难以满足内存受限的机器人需求，而现有方法难以在保持性能的同时显著减小模型规模。
AI.method: 利用图超网络（graph hyper networks）结合离线策略强化学习，生成参数量减少两个数量级但仍保持高性能的图超策略，并提供参数约束下的架构选择方法。
AI.result: 在运动和操作任务中验证了方法有效性，生成的模型体积比传统网络小100倍且性能相当，支持多策略并行训练且样本效率与单策略相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为内存受限系统提供了可扩展的高效策略生成方案，通过架构选择可适配不同硬件约束，具有实际工程应用价值。

authors_text: Rachel Thomasson,Etienne Roberge,Mark R. Cutkosky,Jean-Philippe Roberge
title: Going In Blind: Object Motion Classification using Distributed Tactile Sensing for Safe Reaching in Clutter
title_zh: 盲入：使用分布式触觉感知进行物体运动分类，以在杂乱中安全到达
comment: This paper has been accepted to be presented at the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted to be presented at the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Robotic manipulators navigating cluttered shelves or cabinets may find it challenging to avoid contact with obstacles. Indeed, rearranging obstacles may be necessary to access a target. Rather than planning explicit motions that place obstacles into a desired pose, we suggest allowing incidental contacts to rearrange obstacles while monitoring contacts for safety. Bypassing object identification, we present a method for categorizing object motions from tactile data collected from incidental contacts with a capacitive tactile skin on an Allegro Hand. We formalize tactile cues associated with categories of object motion, demonstrating that they can determine with $>90$% accuracy whether an object is movable and whether a contact is causing the object to slide stably (safe contact) or tip (unsafe).
summary: Robotic manipulators navigating cluttered shelves or cabinets may find it challenging to avoid contact with obstacles. Indeed, rearranging obstacles may be necessary to access a target. Rather than planning explicit motions that place obstacles into a desired pose, we suggest allowing incidental contacts to rearrange obstacles while monitoring contacts for safety. Bypassing object identification, we present a method for categorizing object motions from tactile data collected from incidental contacts with a capacitive tactile skin on an Allegro Hand. We formalize tactile cues associated with categories of object motion, demonstrating that they can determine with $>90$% accuracy whether an object is movable and whether a contact is causing the object to slide stably (safe contact) or tip (unsafe).
abstract_zh: 机器人操纵器在杂乱的架子或橱柜中导航可能会发现避免接触障碍物具有挑战性。事实上，为了接近目标可能需要重新布置障碍物。我们建议允许偶然接触重新排列障碍物，同时监控接触以确保安全，而不是计划将障碍物置于所需姿势的明确运动。绕过物体识别，我们提出了一种根据与 Allegro Hand 上的电容式触觉皮肤的偶然接触收集的触觉数据对物体运动进行分类的方法。我们将与物体运动类别相关的触觉线索形式化，证明它们可以以>90%的准确度确定物体是否可移动以及接触是否导致物体稳定滑动（安全接触）或倾斜（不安全）。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于分布式触觉传感的物体运动分类方法，用于在杂乱环境中实现安全抓取。
AI.motivation: 机器人机械手在杂乱环境中抓取时容易碰到障碍物，需要安全地重新排列障碍物，但传统方法复杂，需要更简单安全的解决方案。
AI.method: 使用电容式触觉皮肤收集数据，通过触觉特征分类物体运动，判断移动性和接触安全性。
AI.result: 在触觉数据分类中达到超过90%的准确率，有效区分物体移动性和接触安全性。
AI.conclusion: 无需物体识别，仅用触觉数据即可有效分类物体运动，为复杂环境中的安全抓取提供新方法。

authors_text: Rahul Duggal,Shengyun Peng,Hao Zhou,Duen Horng Chau
title: IMB-NAS: Neural Architecture Search for Imbalanced Datasets
title_zh: IMB-NAS：不平衡数据集的神经架构搜索
abstract: Class imbalance is a ubiquitous phenomenon occurring in real world data distributions. To overcome its detrimental effect on training accurate classifiers, existing work follows three major directions: class re-balancing, information transfer, and representation learning. In this paper, we propose a new and complementary direction for improving performance on long tailed datasets - optimizing the backbone architecture through neural architecture search (NAS). We find that an architecture's accuracy obtained on a balanced dataset is not indicative of good performance on imbalanced ones. This poses the need for a full NAS run on long tailed datasets which can quickly become prohibitively compute intensive. To alleviate this compute burden, we aim to efficiently adapt a NAS super-network from a balanced source dataset to an imbalanced target one. Among several adaptation strategies, we find that the most effective one is to retrain the linear classification head with reweighted loss, while freezing the backbone NAS super-network trained on a balanced source dataset. We perform extensive experiments on multiple datasets and provide concrete insights to optimize architectures for long tailed datasets.
summary: Class imbalance is a ubiquitous phenomenon occurring in real world data distributions. To overcome its detrimental effect on training accurate classifiers, existing work follows three major directions: class re-balancing, information transfer, and representation learning. In this paper, we propose a new and complementary direction for improving performance on long tailed datasets - optimizing the backbone architecture through neural architecture search (NAS). We find that an architecture's accuracy obtained on a balanced dataset is not indicative of good performance on imbalanced ones. This poses the need for a full NAS run on long tailed datasets which can quickly become prohibitively compute intensive. To alleviate this compute burden, we aim to efficiently adapt a NAS super-network from a balanced source dataset to an imbalanced target one. Among several adaptation strategies, we find that the most effective one is to retrain the linear classification head with reweighted loss, while freezing the backbone NAS super-network trained on a balanced source dataset. We perform extensive experiments on multiple datasets and provide concrete insights to optimize architectures for long tailed datasets.
abstract_zh: 类别不平衡是现实世界数据分布中普遍存在的现象。为了克服其对训练准确分类器的不利影响，现有工作遵循三个主要方向：类别重新平衡、信息传递和表示学习。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的补充方向来提高长尾数据集的性能 - 通过神经架构搜索（NAS）优化主干架构。我们发现，在平衡数据集上获得的架构准确性并不表示在不平衡数据集上具有良好的性能。这就需要在长尾数据集上运行完整的 NAS，而这些数据集很快就会变得计算密集型。为了减轻这种计算负担，我们的目标是有效地将 NAS 超级网络从平衡的源数据集调整为不平衡的目标数据集。在几种适应策略中，我们发现最有效的一种是通过重新加权损失来重新训练线性分类头，同时冻结在平衡源数据集上训练的骨干 NAS 超级网络。我们对多个数据集进行了广泛的实验，并提供了优化长尾数据集架构的具体见解。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的神经架构搜索方法（IMB-NAS），专门针对不平衡数据集优化神经网络架构，以提高分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理不平衡数据集时效果有限，且在平衡数据集上表现好的架构不一定适用于不平衡数据集，因此需要一种高效的NAS方法来适应不平衡数据。
AI.method: 通过迁移学习将平衡数据集训练的NAS超网络适配到不平衡数据集，冻结主干网络，仅重新训练分类头，并采用加权损失函数优化。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验验证了方法的有效性，证明了该方法能有效提升长尾数据集的分类性能，并提供了优化架构的具体见解。
AI.conclusion: IMB-NAS方法在提升长尾数据集分类性能方面表现出色，且计算成本较低，为不平衡数据集的NAS研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Hojung Choi,Dane Brouwer,Michael A. Lin,Kyle T. Yoshida,Carine Rognon,Benjamin Stephens-Fripp,Allison M. Okamura,Mark R. Cutkosky
title: Deep Learning Classification of Touch Gestures Using Distributed Normal and Shear Force
title_zh: 使用分布式法向力和剪切力对触摸手势进行深度学习分类
abstract: When humans socially interact with another agent (e.g., human, pet, or robot) through touch, they do so by applying varying amounts of force with different directions, locations, contact areas, and durations. While previous work on touch gesture recognition has focused on the spatio-temporal distribution of normal forces, we hypothesize that the addition of shear forces will permit more reliable classification. We present a soft, flexible skin with an array of tri-axial tactile sensors for the arm of a person or robot. We use it to collect data on 13 touch gesture classes through user studies and train a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to learn spatio-temporal features from the recorded data. The network achieved a recognition accuracy of 74% with normal and shear data, compared to 66% using only normal force data. Adding distributed shear data improved classification accuracy for 11 out of 13 touch gesture classes.
summary: When humans socially interact with another agent (e.g., human, pet, or robot) through touch, they do so by applying varying amounts of force with different directions, locations, contact areas, and durations. While previous work on touch gesture recognition has focused on the spatio-temporal distribution of normal forces, we hypothesize that the addition of shear forces will permit more reliable classification. We present a soft, flexible skin with an array of tri-axial tactile sensors for the arm of a person or robot. We use it to collect data on 13 touch gesture classes through user studies and train a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to learn spatio-temporal features from the recorded data. The network achieved a recognition accuracy of 74% with normal and shear data, compared to 66% using only normal force data. Adding distributed shear data improved classification accuracy for 11 out of 13 touch gesture classes.
abstract_zh: 当人类通过触摸与另一个主体（例如人类、宠物或机器人）进行社交互动时，他们通过在不同方向、位置、接触区域和持续时间上施加不同大小的力来实现这一点。虽然以前关于触摸手势识别的工作主要集中在法向力的时空分布上，但我们假设添加剪切力将允许更可靠的分类。我们为人或机器人的手臂提供了一种柔软、灵活的皮肤，带有一系列三轴触觉传感器。我们使用它通过用户研究收集 13 个触摸手势类别的数据，并训练卷积神经网络 (CNN) 从记录的数据中学习时空特征。该网络使用法向力和剪切力数据的识别准确率达到 74%，而仅使用法向力数据的识别准确率达到 66%。添加分布式剪切数据提高了 13 个触摸手势类别中的 11 个类别的分类准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文利用深度学习方法，结合分布式正常力和剪切力数据对触觉手势进行分类。
AI.motivation: 传统触觉手势识别仅依赖正常力数据，而本文认为引入剪切力信息可提升分类可靠性。
AI.method: 开发柔性三轴触觉传感器阵列采集13类手势数据，使用卷积神经网络提取时空特征进行分类。
AI.result: 融合剪切力数据后整体识别准确率从66%提升至74%，其中11个手势类别分类性能得到改善。
AI.conclusion: 分布式剪切力数据有效增强了触觉手势分类的准确性，为多模态触觉感知提供新思路。

We use it to collect data on 13 touch gesture classes through user studies and train a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to learn spatio-temporal features from the recorded data. The network achieved a recognition accuracy of 74% with normal and shear data, compared to 66% using only normal force data. Adding distributed shear data improved classification accuracy for 11 out of 13 touch gesture classes. 当人类通过触摸与另一个主体（例如人类、宠物或机器人）进行社交互动时，他们通过在不同方向、位置、接触区域和持续时间上施加不同大小的力来实现这一点。虽然以前关于触摸手势识别的工作主要集中在法向力的时空分布上，但我们假设添加剪切力将允许更可靠的分类。我们为人或机器人的手臂提供了一种柔软、灵活的皮肤，带有一系列三轴触觉传感器。我们使用它通过用户研究收集 13 个触摸手势类别的数据，并训练卷积神经网络 (CNN) 从记录的数据中学习时空特征。该网络使用法向力和剪切力数据的识别准确率达到 74%，而仅使用法向力数据的识别准确率达到 66%。添加分布式剪切数据提高了 13 个触摸手势类别中的 11 个类别的分类准确性。 本文利用深度学习方法，结合分布式正常力和剪切力数据对触觉手势进行分类。 Hojung Choi,Dane Brouwer,Michael A. Lin,Kyle T. Yoshida,Carine Rognon,Benjamin Stephens-Fripp,Allison M. Okamura,Mark R. Cutkosky cs.RO,cs.HC

title: Alignment-guided Temporal Attention for Video Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于视频动作识别的对齐引导时间注意力
abstract: Temporal modeling is crucial for various video learning tasks. Most recent approaches employ either factorized (2D+1D) or joint (3D) spatial-temporal operations to extract temporal contexts from the input frames. While the former is more efficient in computation, the latter often obtains better performance. In this paper, we attribute this to a dilemma between the sufficiency and the efficiency of interactions among various positions in different frames. These interactions affect the extraction of task-relevant information shared among frames. To resolve this issue, we prove that frame-by-frame alignments have the potential to increase the mutual information between frame representations, thereby including more task-relevant information to boost effectiveness. Then we propose Alignment-guided Temporal Attention (ATA) to extend 1-dimensional temporal attention with parameter-free patch-level alignments between neighboring frames. It can act as a general plug-in for image backbones to conduct the action recognition task without any model-specific design. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superiority and generality of our module.
summary: Temporal modeling is crucial for various video learning tasks. Most recent approaches employ either factorized (2D+1D) or joint (3D) spatial-temporal operations to extract temporal contexts from the input frames. While the former is more efficient in computation, the latter often obtains better performance. In this paper, we attribute this to a dilemma between the sufficiency and the efficiency of interactions among various positions in different frames. These interactions affect the extraction of task-relevant information shared among frames. To resolve this issue, we prove that frame-by-frame alignments have the potential to increase the mutual information between frame representations, thereby including more task-relevant information to boost effectiveness. Then we propose Alignment-guided Temporal Attention (ATA) to extend 1-dimensional temporal attention with parameter-free patch-level alignments between neighboring frames. It can act as a general plug-in for image backbones to conduct the action recognition task without any model-specific design. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superiority and generality of our module.
abstract_zh: 时间建模对于各种视频学习任务至关重要。最近的方法采用分解 (2D+1D) 或联合 (3D) 时空操作来从输入帧中提取时间上下文。虽然前者的计算效率更高，但后者通常获得更好的性能。在本文中，我们将此归因于不同框架中不同位置之间交互的充分性和效率之间的困境。这些交互影响帧之间共享的任务相关信息的提取。为了解决这个问题，我们证明逐帧对齐有可能增加帧表示之间的相互信息，从而包含更多与任务相关的信息以提高效率。然后，我们提出对齐引导时间注意力（ATA），通过相邻帧之间的无参数补丁级对齐来扩展一维时间注意力。它可以充当图像主干网的通用插件来执行动作识别任务，而无需任何特定于模型的设计。对多个基准的广泛实验证明了我们模块的优越性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Alignment-guided Temporal Attention (ATA)的模块，用于改进视频动作识别中的时间建模方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在效率与效果间存在矛盾：分离的2D+1D操作计算高效但性能较差，联合的3D操作性能更优但效率低。作者认为帧间交互的充分性与效率是关键问题。
AI.method: 通过证明帧间对齐能提升表示间的互信息，提出无需参数的patch级邻帧对齐机制，扩展1D时间注意力模块，作为通用插件集成到图像主干网络中。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该模块在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了动作识别性能，并具有良好的方法通用性。
AI.conclusion: ATA模块通过优化帧间信息交互，在效率与效果间取得平衡，为视频动作识别提供了通用且有效的新解决方案。

title: Underspecification in Language Modeling Tasks: A Causality-Informed Study of Gendered Pronoun Resolution
title_zh: 语言建模任务中的不规范：性别代词解析的因果关系研究
abstract: Modern language modeling tasks are often underspecified: for a given token prediction, many words may satisfy the user's intent of producing natural language at inference time, however only one word will minimize the task's loss function at training time. We introduce a simple causal mechanism to describe the role underspecification plays in the generation of spurious correlations. Despite its simplicity, our causal model directly informs the development of two lightweight black-box evaluation methods, that we apply to gendered pronoun resolution tasks on a wide range of LLMs to 1) aid in the detection of inference-time task underspecification by exploiting 2) previously unreported gender vs. time and gender vs. location spurious correlations on LLMs with a range of A) sizes: from BERT-base to GPT-4 Turbo Preview, B) pre-training objectives: from masked & autoregressive language modeling to a mixture of these objectives, and C) training stages: from pre-training only to reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). Code and open-source demos available at https://github.com/2dot71mily/uspec.
summary: Modern language modeling tasks are often underspecified: for a given token prediction, many words may satisfy the user's intent of producing natural language at inference time, however only one word will minimize the task's loss function at training time. We introduce a simple causal mechanism to describe the role underspecification plays in the generation of spurious correlations. Despite its simplicity, our causal model directly informs the development of two lightweight black-box evaluation methods, that we apply to gendered pronoun resolution tasks on a wide range of LLMs to 1) aid in the detection of inference-time task underspecification by exploiting 2) previously unreported gender vs. time and gender vs. location spurious correlations on LLMs with a range of A) sizes: from BERT-base to GPT-4 Turbo Preview, B) pre-training objectives: from masked & autoregressive language modeling to a mixture of these objectives, and C) training stages: from pre-training only to reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). Code and open-source demos available at https://github.com/2dot71mily/uspec.
abstract_zh: 现代语言建模任务通常是不明确的：对于给定的标记预测，许多单词可能满足用户在推理时产生自然语言的意图，但是只有一个单词才能在训练时最小化任务的损失函数。我们引入了一种简单的因果机制来描述规格不足在虚假相关性的生成中所扮演的角色。尽管很简单，我们的因果模型直接为两种轻量级黑盒评估方法的开发提供了信息，我们将其应用于各种法学硕士的性别代词解析任务，以1）通过利用2）之前未报告的法学硕士上的性别与时间和性别与位置的虚假相关性来检测推理时间任务的不规范，具有一系列A）大小：从BERT-base到GPT-4 Turbo Preview，B）预训练目标：从屏蔽和自回归语言建模到这些目标的混合，以及 C) 训练阶段：从仅预训练到基于人类反馈的强化学习 (RLHF)。代码和开源演示可在 https://github.com/2dot71mily/uspec 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究语言模型任务中未指定性（underspecification）如何通过因果机制导致性别代词解析中的虚假关联，并提出两种轻量级评估方法检测这一问题。
AI.motivation: 现代语言模型在推理时可能因任务未指定性产生多个合理输出，但训练时仅优化单一目标，导致模型学习到与任务无关的虚假关联（如性别与时间、地点的关联），需系统研究其成因及检测方法。
AI.method: 引入因果模型解释未指定性如何引发虚假关联，开发两种黑盒评估方法：1）检测推理时任务未指定性；2）利用性别与时间/地点的未报道虚假关联进行模型分析，覆盖不同规模、预训练目标和训练阶段的LLM。
AI.result: 在BERT-base到GPT-4 Turbo等多类模型中发现性别与时间、地点的虚假关联，验证了因果模型的有效性，并通过开源工具实现检测。
AI.conclusion: 未指定性是语言模型产生虚假关联的核心原因，提出的评估方法可有效检测此类问题，为模型设计与训练提供因果视角的改进方向。

authors_text: Yunuo Chen,Minchen Li,Wenlong Lu,Chuyuan Fu,Chenfanfu Jiang
title: Midas: A Multi-Joint Robotics Simulator with Intersection-Free Frictional Contact
title_zh: Midas：具有无相交摩擦接触的多关节机器人模拟器
abstract: We introduce Midas, a robotics simulation framework based on the Incremental Potential Contact (IPC) model. Our simulator guarantees intersection-free, stable, and accurate resolution of frictional contact. We demonstrate the efficacy of our framework with experimental validations on high-precision tasks and through comparisons with Bullet physics. A reinforcement learning pipeline using Midas is also developed and tested to perform intersection-free peg-in-hole tasks.
summary: We introduce Midas, a robotics simulation framework based on the Incremental Potential Contact (IPC) model. Our simulator guarantees intersection-free, stable, and accurate resolution of frictional contact. We demonstrate the efficacy of our framework with experimental validations on high-precision tasks and through comparisons with Bullet physics. A reinforcement learning pipeline using Midas is also developed and tested to perform intersection-free peg-in-hole tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Midas，一个基于增量电位接触 (IPC) 模型的机器人仿真框架。我们的模拟器可保证摩擦接触的无交叉、稳定且准确的解析。我们通过高精度任务的实验验证以及与 Bullet 物理学的比较来证明我们的框架的有效性。还开发并测试了使用 Midas 的强化学习管道，以执行无交叉的钉孔任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Midas，一种基于增量势接触模型的多关节机器人模拟框架，能够实现无交叠的摩擦接触解析。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟器在处理复杂摩擦接触时存在交叠和不稳定性，影响高精度机器人任务的仿真效果。
AI.method: 采用增量势接触（IPC）模型，通过逐步计算潜在接触点并优化约束条件，确保无交叠且精确的摩擦接触解析。
AI.result: 实验验证显示，Midas在高精度任务中表现优于Bullet物理引擎，并成功通过强化学习管道实现无交叠的插孔任务。
AI.conclusion: Midas为机器人仿真提供了稳定、精确的接触解析方案，适用于复杂摩擦场景下的高精度任务训练。

search_text: Midas: A Multi-Joint Robotics Simulator with Intersection-Free Frictional Contact Midas：具有无相交摩擦接触的多关节机器人模拟器 We introduce Midas, a robotics simulation framework based on the Incremental Potential Contact (IPC) model. Our simulator guarantees intersection-free, stable, and accurate resolution of frictional contact. We demonstrate the efficacy of our framework with experimental validations on high-precision tasks and through comparisons with Bullet physics. A reinforcement learning pipeline using Midas is also developed and tested to perform intersection-free peg-in-hole tasks. 我们介绍 Midas，一个基于增量电位接触 (IPC) 模型的机器人仿真框架。我们的模拟器可保证摩擦接触的无交叉、稳定且准确的解析。我们通过高精度任务的实验验证以及与 Bullet 物理学的比较来证明我们的框架的有效性。还开发并测试了使用 Midas 的强化学习管道，以执行无交叉的钉孔任务。 本文提出Midas，一种基于增量势接触模型的多关节机器人模拟框架，能够实现无交叠的摩擦接触解析。 Yunuo Chen,Minchen Li,Wenlong Lu,Chuyuan Fu,Chenfanfu Jiang cs.RO

authors_text: Jun Fang,Mingze Xu,Hao Chen,Bing Shuai,Zhuowen Tu,Joseph Tighe
title: An In-depth Study of Stochastic Backpropagation
title_zh: 随机反向传播的深入研究
abstract: In this paper, we provide an in-depth study of Stochastic Backpropagation (SBP) when training deep neural networks for standard image classification and object detection tasks. During backward propagation, SBP calculates the gradients by only using a subset of feature maps to save the GPU memory and computational cost. We interpret SBP as an efficient way to implement stochastic gradient decent by performing backpropagation dropout, which leads to considerable memory saving and training process speedup, with a minimal impact on the overall model accuracy. We offer some good practices to apply SBP in training image recognition models, which can be adopted in learning a wide range of deep neural networks. Experiments on image classification and object detection show that SBP can save up to 40% of GPU memory with less than 1% accuracy degradation.
summary: In this paper, we provide an in-depth study of Stochastic Backpropagation (SBP) when training deep neural networks for standard image classification and object detection tasks. During backward propagation, SBP calculates the gradients by only using a subset of feature maps to save the GPU memory and computational cost. We interpret SBP as an efficient way to implement stochastic gradient decent by performing backpropagation dropout, which leads to considerable memory saving and training process speedup, with a minimal impact on the overall model accuracy. We offer some good practices to apply SBP in training image recognition models, which can be adopted in learning a wide range of deep neural networks. Experiments on image classification and object detection show that SBP can save up to 40% of GPU memory with less than 1% accuracy degradation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们深入研究了为标准图像分类和对象检测任务训练深度神经网络时的随机反向传播（SBP）。在反向传播过程中，SBP 仅使用特征图的子集来计算梯度，以节省 GPU 内存和计算成本。我们将 SBP 解释为通过执行反向传播 dropout 来实现随机梯度下降的有效方法，这会节省大量内存并加速训练过程，同时对整体模型精度的影响最小。我们提供了一些在训练图像识别模型中应用 SBP 的良好实践，这些实践可以用于学习各种深度神经网络。图像分类和目标检测实验表明，SBP 可以节省高达 40% 的 GPU 内存，同时精度下降不到 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文深入研究了随机反向传播（SBP）在深度神经网络训练中的应用，通过在反向传播中使用特征图子集以节省GPU内存和计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播在训练深层网络时消耗大量内存和计算资源，而SBP通过随机采样特征图提供了一种高效替代方案，以降低资源消耗并保持模型性能。
AI.method: 在反向传播过程中仅使用部分特征图计算梯度，将其解释为随机梯度下降的高效实现方式，并通过反向传播dropout技术减少内存占用。
AI.result: 实验表明，SBP在图像分类和目标检测任务中可节省高达40%的GPU内存，且模型准确率下降不足1%。
AI.conclusion: SBP是一种有效的深度学习训练优化方法，能够在显著降低资源消耗的同时保持较高模型精度，适用于多种深度神经网络场景。

title: Robust Person Identification: A WiFi Vision-based Approach
title_zh: 强大的人员识别：基于 WiFi 视觉的方法
abstract: Person re-identification (Re-ID) has become increasingly important as it supports a wide range of security applications. Traditional person Re-ID mainly relies on optical camera-based systems, which incur several limitations due to the changes in the appearance of people, occlusions, and human poses. In this work, we propose a WiFi vision-based system, 3D-ID, for person Re-ID in 3D space. Our system leverages the advances of WiFi and deep learning to help WiFi devices see, identify, and recognize people. In particular, we leverage multiple antennas on next-generation WiFi devices and 2D AoA estimation of the signal reflections to enable WiFi to visualize a person in the physical environment. We then leverage deep learning to digitize the visualization of the person into 3D body representation and extract both the static body shape and dynamic walking patterns for person Re-ID. Our evaluation results under various indoor environments show that the 3D-ID system achieves an overall rank-1 accuracy of 85.3%. Results also show that our system is resistant to various attacks. The proposed 3D-ID is thus very promising as it could augment or complement camera-based systems.
summary: Person re-identification (Re-ID) has become increasingly important as it supports a wide range of security applications. Traditional person Re-ID mainly relies on optical camera-based systems, which incur several limitations due to the changes in the appearance of people, occlusions, and human poses. In this work, we propose a WiFi vision-based system, 3D-ID, for person Re-ID in 3D space. Our system leverages the advances of WiFi and deep learning to help WiFi devices see, identify, and recognize people. In particular, we leverage multiple antennas on next-generation WiFi devices and 2D AoA estimation of the signal reflections to enable WiFi to visualize a person in the physical environment. We then leverage deep learning to digitize the visualization of the person into 3D body representation and extract both the static body shape and dynamic walking patterns for person Re-ID. Our evaluation results under various indoor environments show that the 3D-ID system achieves an overall rank-1 accuracy of 85.3%. Results also show that our system is resistant to various attacks. The proposed 3D-ID is thus very promising as it could augment or complement camera-based systems.
abstract_zh: 人员重新识别 (Re-ID) 变得越来越重要，因为它支持广泛的安全应用。传统的行人重识别主要依赖于基于光学摄像头的系统，由于人的外观、遮挡和人体姿势的变化，该系统存在一些局限性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 WiFi 视觉的系统 3D-ID，用于 3D 空间中的人员重新识别。我们的系统利用 WiFi 和深度学习的进步来帮助 WiFi 设备看到、识别和识别人。特别是，我们利用下一代 WiFi 设备上的多个天线和信号反射的 2D AoA 估计，使 WiFi 能够可视化物理环境中的人。然后，我们利用深度学习将人的可视化数字化为 3D 身体表示，并提取静态身体形状和动态行走模式以进行人重新识别。我们在各种室内环境下的评估结果表明，3D-ID系统的整体Rank-1准确率达到85.3%。结果还表明我们的系统能够抵抗各种攻击。因此，所提出的 3D-ID 非常有前途，因为它可以增强或补充基于摄像头的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于WiFi视觉的3D人体重识别系统3D-ID，用于在室内环境中实现鲁棒的人体识别。
AI.motivation: 传统基于光学摄像头的人体重识别系统存在外观变化、遮挡和姿态变化等局限性，需探索更可靠的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用WiFi设备多天线和2D方位角估计技术实现人体物理环境可视化，并通过深度学习将可视化信息转化为3D人体表示，提取静态体型和动态步态特征。
AI.result: 在多种室内环境下达到85.3%的rank-1准确率，且系统对各类攻击具有抗干扰能力。
AI.conclusion: 3D-ID系统为摄像头系统提供了有效的补充，具有在安全领域应用的广阔前景。

The proposed 3D-ID is thus very promising as it could augment or complement camera-based systems. 人员重新识别 (Re-ID) 变得越来越重要，因为它支持广泛的安全应用。传统的行人重识别主要依赖于基于光学摄像头的系统，由于人的外观、遮挡和人体姿势的变化，该系统存在一些局限性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 WiFi 视觉的系统 3D-ID，用于 3D 空间中的人员重新识别。我们的系统利用 WiFi 和深度学习的进步来帮助 WiFi 设备看到、识别和识别人。特别是，我们利用下一代 WiFi 设备上的多个天线和信号反射的 2D AoA 估计，使 WiFi 能够可视化物理环境中的人。然后，我们利用深度学习将人的可视化数字化为 3D 身体表示，并提取静态身体形状和动态行走模式以进行人重新识别。我们在各种室内环境下的评估结果表明，3D-ID系统的整体Rank-1准确率达到85.3%。结果还表明我们的系统能够抵抗各种攻击。因此，所提出的 3D-ID 非常有前途，因为它可以增强或补充基于摄像头的系统。 本文提出了一种基于WiFi视觉的3D人体重识别系统3D-ID，用于在室内环境中实现鲁棒的人体识别。 Yili Ren,Jie Yang cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.HC

title: A Taxonomy of Semantic Information in Robot-Assisted Disaster Response
title_zh: 机器人辅助灾难响应中语义信息的分类
abstract: This paper proposes a taxonomy of semantic information in robot-assisted disaster response. Robots are increasingly being used in hazardous environment industries and emergency response teams to perform various tasks. Operational decision-making in such applications requires a complex semantic understanding of environments that are remote from the human operator. Low-level sensory data from the robot is transformed into perception and informative cognition. Currently, such cognition is predominantly performed by a human expert, who monitors remote sensor data such as robot video feeds. This engenders a need for AI-generated semantic understanding capabilities on the robot itself. Current work on semantics and AI lies towards the relatively academic end of the research spectrum, hence relatively removed from the practical realities of first responder teams. We aim for this paper to be a step towards bridging this divide. We first review common robot tasks in disaster response and the types of information such robots must collect. We then organize the types of semantic features and understanding that may be useful in disaster operations into a taxonomy of semantic information. We also briefly review the current state-of-the-art semantic understanding techniques. We highlight potential synergies, but we also identify gaps that need to be bridged to apply these ideas. We aim to stimulate the research that is needed to adapt, robustify, and implement state-of-the-art AI semantics methods in the challenging conditions of disasters and first responder scenarios.

abstract_zh: 本文提出了机器人辅助灾难响应中语义信息的分类法。机器人越来越多地应用于危险环境行业和应急响应团队来执行各种任务。此类应用中的操作决策需要对远离人类操作员的环境进行复杂的语义理解。来自机器人的低级感官数据被转化为感知和信息认知。目前，这种认知主要由人类专家执行，他们监视机器人视频源等远程传感器数据。这就产生了机器人本身对人工智能生成的语义理解能力的需求。目前关于语义和人工智能的工作属于研究范围的相对学术端，因此相对远离急救人员团队的实际情况。我们的目标是让本文成为弥合这一分歧的一步。我们首先回顾灾难响应中的常见机器人任务以及此类机器人必须收集的信息类型。然后，我们将在灾难行动中可能有用的语义特征和理解类型组织成语义信息分类。我们还简要回顾了当前最先进的语义理解技术。我们强调潜在的协同效应，但我们也确定了应用这些想法需要弥合的差距。我们的目标是促进在灾难和急救人员场景的挑战性条件下适应、强化和实施最先进的人工智能语义方法所需的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人辅助灾难响应的语义信息分类法，旨在弥合学术研究与实际应急响应需求之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人在灾难响应中依赖人工专家处理远程传感器数据，而现有AI语义理解技术多停留在学术层面，难以满足实际救援场景的复杂需求。
AI.method: 通过分析灾难响应中机器人的常见任务及所需信息类型，构建语义特征与理解的分类体系，并综述现有语义理解技术的优缺点。
AI.result: 建立了灾难响应场景下的语义信息分类框架，明确了技术应用的潜在协同效应及需解决的关键技术缺口。
AI.conclusion: 该分类法为未来研究提供了方向，需进一步优化和实施先进AI语义技术以适应灾难环境的挑战性条件。

authors_text: Pankaj K. Agarwal,Tzvika Geft,Dan Halperin,Erin Taylor
title: Multi-Robot Motion Planning for Unit Discs with Revolving Areas
title_zh: 具有回转区域的单元盘多机器人运动规划
abstract: We study the problem of motion planning for a collection of $n$ labeled unit disc robots in a polygonal environment. We assume that the robots have revolving areas around their start and final positions: that each start and each final is contained in a radius $2$ disc lying in the free space, not necessarily concentric with the start or final position, which is free from other start or final positions. This assumption allows a weakly-monotone motion plan, in which robots move according to an ordering as follows: during the turn of a robot $R$ in the ordering, it moves fully from its start to final position, while other robots do not leave their revolving areas. As $R$ passes through a revolving area, a robot $R'$ that is inside this area may move within the revolving area to avoid a collision. Notwithstanding the existence of a motion plan, we show that minimizing the total traveled distance in this setting, specifically even when the motion plan is restricted to be weakly-monotone, is APX-hard, ruling out any polynomial-time $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm. On the positive side, we present the first constant-factor approximation algorithm for computing a feasible weakly-monotone motion plan. The total distance traveled by the robots is within an $O(1)$ factor of that of the optimal motion plan, which need not be weakly monotone. Our algorithm extends to an online setting in which the polygonal environment is fixed but the initial and final positions of robots are specified in an online manner. Finally, we observe that the overhead in the overall cost that we add while editing the paths to avoid robot-robot collision can vary significantly depending on the ordering we chose. Finding the best ordering in this respect is known to be NP-hard, and we provide a polynomial time $O(\log n \log \log n)$-approximation algorithm for this problem.

We assume that the robots have revolving areas around their start and final positions: that each start and each final is contained in a radius $2$ disc lying in the free space, not necessarily concentric with the start or final position, which is free from other start or final positions. This assumption allows a weakly-monotone motion plan, in which robots move according to an ordering as follows: during the turn of a robot $R$ in the ordering, it moves fully from its start to final position, while other robots do not leave their revolving areas. As $R$ passes through a revolving area, a robot $R'$ that is inside this area may move within the revolving area to avoid a collision. Notwithstanding the existence of a motion plan, we show that minimizing the total traveled distance in this setting, specifically even when the motion plan is restricted to be weakly-monotone, is APX-hard, ruling out any polynomial-time $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm. On the positive side, we present the first constant-factor approximation algorithm for computing a feasible weakly-monotone motion plan. The total distance traveled by the robots is within an $O(1)$ factor of that of the optimal motion plan, which need not be weakly monotone. Our algorithm extends to an online setting in which the polygonal environment is fixed but the initial and final positions of robots are specified in an online manner. Finally, we observe that the overhead in the overall cost that we add while editing the paths to avoid robot-robot collision can vary significantly depending on the ordering we chose. Finding the best ordering in this respect is known to be NP-hard, and we provide a polynomial time $O(\log n \log \log n)$-approximation algorithm for this problem.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了多边形环境中一组 $n$ 标记单元盘机器人的运动规划问题。我们假设机器人在其起始位置和最终位置周围有旋转区域：每个起始位置和每个最终位置都包含在自由空间中半径为 $2$ 的圆盘中，不一定与起始位置或最终位置同心，与其他起始位置或最终位置无关。这个假设允许弱单调运动计划，其中机器人按照如下顺序移动：在顺序中的机器人 $R$ 转动期间，它从起始位置完全移动到最终位置，而其他机器人不离开其旋转区域。当$R$经过旋转区域时，位于该区域内的机器人$R'$可以在旋转区域内移动以避免碰撞。尽管存在运动计划，但我们表明，在这种设置下最小化总行进距离，特别是即使运动计划被限制为弱单调时，也是 APX 困难的，从而排除了任何多项式时间 $(1+ε)$ 近似算法。从积极的一面来看，我们提出了第一个用于计算可行的弱单调运动计划的常数因子近似算法。机器人行进的总距离在最佳运动计划的 $O(1)$ 因子之内，该计划不必是弱单调的。我们的算法扩展到在线设置，其中多边形环境是固定的，但机器人的初始和最终位置以在线方式指定。最后，我们观察到，在编辑路径以避免机器人与机器人碰撞时添加的总成本的开销可能会根据我们选择的顺序而显着变化。众所周知，在这方面找到最佳排序是 NP 困难的，我们为这个问题提供了一个多项式时间 $O(\log n \log \log n)$ 近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多机器人系统中，单位圆盘机器人在具有旋转区域的多边形环境中进行运动规划的问题，旨在避免碰撞并优化总移动距离。
AI.motivation: 在多机器人路径规划中，如何高效避免碰撞并最小化总移动距离是核心挑战。传统方法在动态环境或复杂约束下可能失效，因此需要新的规划策略。
AI.method: 提出弱单调运动规划方法，通过为机器人分配旋转区域，允许按顺序移动并动态调整路径以避免碰撞；设计常数因子近似算法，并扩展至在线场景，同时提供排序问题的对数近似算法。
AI.result: 证明最小化总距离在弱单调约束下是APX难问题，但提出首个常数因子近似算法，且适用于在线环境；排序问题的近似比为O(log n log log n)。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多机器人规划的复杂性，提供了可行的近似解决方案，为实际应用中的动态路径规划提供了理论支持与算法工具。

search_text: Multi-Robot Motion Planning for Unit Discs with Revolving Areas 具有回转区域的单元盘多机器人运动规划 We study the problem of motion planning for a collection of $n$ labeled unit disc robots in a polygonal environment. We assume that the robots have revolving areas around their start and final positions: that each start and each final is contained in a radius $2$ disc lying in the free space, not necessarily concentric with the start or final position, which is free from other start or final positions. This assumption allows a weakly-monotone motion plan, in which robots move according to an ordering as follows: during the turn of a robot $R$ in the ordering, it moves fully from its start to final position, while other robots do not leave their revolving areas. As $R$ passes through a revolving area, a robot $R'$ that is inside this area may move within the revolving area to avoid a collision. Notwithstanding the existence of a motion plan, we show that minimizing the total traveled distance in this setting, specifically even when the motion plan is restricted to be weakly-monotone, is APX-hard, ruling out any polynomial-time $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm. On the positive side, we present the first constant-factor approximation algorithm for computing a feasible weakly-monotone motion plan. The total distance traveled by the robots is within an $O(1)$ factor of that of the optimal motion plan, which need not be weakly monotone. Our algorithm extends to an online setting in which the polygonal environment is fixed but the initial and final positions of robots are specified in an online manner. Finally, we observe that the overhead in the overall cost that we add while editing the paths to avoid robot-robot collision can vary significantly depending on the ordering we chose. Finding the best ordering in this respect is known to be NP-hard, and we provide a polynomial time $O(\log n \log \log n)$-approximation algorithm for this problem. 我们研究了多边形环境中一组 $n$ 标记单元盘机器人的运动规划问题。我们假设机器人在其起始位置和最终位置周围有旋转区域：每个起始位置和每个最终位置都包含在自由空间中半径为 $2$ 的圆盘中，不一定与起始位置或最终位置同心，与其他起始位置或最终位置无关。这个假设允许弱单调运动计划，其中机器人按照如下顺序移动：在顺序中的机器人 $R$ 转动期间，它从起始位置完全移动到最终位置，而其他机器人不离开其旋转区域。当$R$经过旋转区域时，位于该区域内的机器人$R'$可以在旋转区域内移动以避免碰撞。尽管存在运动计划，但我们表明，在这种设置下最小化总行进距离，特别是即使运动计划被限制为弱单调时，也是 APX 困难的，从而排除了任何多项式时间 $(1+ε)$ 近似算法。从积极的一面来看，我们提出了第一个用于计算可行的弱单调运动计划的常数因子近似算法。机器人行进的总距离在最佳运动计划的 $O(1)$ 因子之内，该计划不必是弱单调的。我们的算法扩展到在线设置，其中多边形环境是固定的，但机器人的初始和最终位置以在线方式指定。最后，我们观察到，在编辑路径以避免机器人与机器人碰撞时添加的总成本的开销可能会根据我们选择的顺序而显着变化。众所周知，在这方面找到最佳排序是 NP 困难的，我们为这个问题提供了一个多项式时间 $O(\log n \log \log n)$ 近似算法。 本文研究了在多机器人系统中，单位圆盘机器人在具有旋转区域的多边形环境中进行运动规划的问题，旨在避免碰撞并优化总移动距离。 Pankaj K. Agarwal,Tzvika Geft,Dan Halperin,Erin Taylor cs.RO,cs.CG

title: Adversarial Robustness of Representation Learning for Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 知识图表示学习的对抗鲁棒性
comment: PhD Thesis at Trinity College Dublin, Ireland
comments: PhD Thesis at Trinity College Dublin, Ireland
abstract: Knowledge graphs represent factual knowledge about the world as relationships between concepts and are critical for intelligent decision making in enterprise applications. New knowledge is inferred from the existing facts in the knowledge graphs by encoding the concepts and relations into low-dimensional feature vector representations. The most effective representations for this task, called Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE), are learned through neural network architectures. Due to their impressive predictive performance, they are increasingly used in high-impact domains like healthcare, finance and education. However, are the black-box KGE models adversarially robust for use in domains with high stakes? This thesis argues that state-of-the-art KGE models are vulnerable to data poisoning attacks, that is, their predictive performance can be degraded by systematically crafted perturbations to the training knowledge graph. To support this argument, two novel data poisoning attacks are proposed that craft input deletions or additions at training time to subvert the learned model's performance at inference time. These adversarial attacks target the task of predicting the missing facts in knowledge graphs using KGE models, and the evaluation shows that the simpler attacks are competitive with or outperform the computationally expensive ones. The thesis contributions not only highlight and provide an opportunity to fix the security vulnerabilities of KGE models, but also help to understand the black-box predictive behaviour of KGE models.
summary: Knowledge graphs represent factual knowledge about the world as relationships between concepts and are critical for intelligent decision making in enterprise applications. New knowledge is inferred from the existing facts in the knowledge graphs by encoding the concepts and relations into low-dimensional feature vector representations. The most effective representations for this task, called Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGE), are learned through neural network architectures. Due to their impressive predictive performance, they are increasingly used in high-impact domains like healthcare, finance and education. However, are the black-box KGE models adversarially robust for use in domains with high stakes? This thesis argues that state-of-the-art KGE models are vulnerable to data poisoning attacks, that is, their predictive performance can be degraded by systematically crafted perturbations to the training knowledge graph. To support this argument, two novel data poisoning attacks are proposed that craft input deletions or additions at training time to subvert the learned model's performance at inference time. These adversarial attacks target the task of predicting the missing facts in knowledge graphs using KGE models, and the evaluation shows that the simpler attacks are competitive with or outperform the computationally expensive ones. The thesis contributions not only highlight and provide an opportunity to fix the security vulnerabilities of KGE models, but also help to understand the black-box predictive behaviour of KGE models.
abstract_zh: 知识图将有关世界的事实知识表示为概念之间的关系，对于企业应用程序中的智能决策至关重要。通过将概念和关系编码为低维特征向量表示，从知识图中的现有事实推断出新知识。该任务最有效的表示称为知识图嵌入（KGE），是通过神经网络架构学习的。由于其令人印象深刻的预测性能，它们越来越多地应用于医疗保健、金融和教育等高影响力领域。然而，黑盒 KGE 模型在高风险领域的使用是否具有强大的对抗性？本文认为，最先进的 KGE 模型容易受到数据中毒攻击，也就是说，它们的预测性能可能会因对训练知识图进行系统性干扰而降低。为了支持这一论点，提出了两种新颖的数据中毒攻击，它们在训练时进行输入删除或添加，以破坏学习模型在推理时的性能。这些对抗性攻击的目标是使用 KGE 模型预测知识图中缺失的事实，评估表明，更简单的攻击可以与计算成本较高的攻击相媲美或优于它们。论文贡献不仅强调并提供了修复 KGE 模型安全漏洞的机会，而且有助于理解 KGE 模型的黑盒预测行为。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究知识图谱嵌入模型（KGE）在对抗性攻击下的鲁棒性，提出两种数据投毒攻击方法以破坏其预测性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管KGE模型在医疗、金融等高风险领域广泛应用，但其作为黑箱模型的安全性尚未得到充分验证，存在潜在的对抗攻击风险。
AI.method: 设计两种新颖的数据投毒攻击方法：在训练阶段系统性地删除或添加输入数据，以在推理阶段削弱模型预测缺失事实的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，简单攻击方法在效率上优于或匹敌复杂攻击，且能有效降级KGE模型的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了KGE模型的安全漏洞，为改进其鲁棒性提供了方向，同时深化了对黑箱预测行为的理解。
