authors_text: Yizhou Chen,Andrea Sipos,Mark Van der Merwe,Nima Fazeli
title: Visuo-Tactile Transformers for Manipulation
title_zh: 用于操作的视觉触觉变压器
abstract: Learning representations in the joint domain of vision and touch can improve manipulation dexterity, robustness, and sample-complexity by exploiting mutual information and complementary cues. Here, we present Visuo-Tactile Transformers (VTTs), a novel multimodal representation learning approach suited for model-based reinforcement learning and planning. Our approach extends the Visual Transformer \cite{dosovitskiy2021image} to handle visuo-tactile feedback. Specifically, VTT uses tactile feedback together with self and cross-modal attention to build latent heatmap representations that focus attention on important task features in the visual domain. We demonstrate the efficacy of VTT for representation learning with a comparative evaluation against baselines on four simulated robot tasks and one real world block pushing task. We conduct an ablation study over the components of VTT to highlight the importance of cross-modality in representation learning.
summary: Learning representations in the joint domain of vision and touch can improve manipulation dexterity, robustness, and sample-complexity by exploiting mutual information and complementary cues. Here, we present Visuo-Tactile Transformers (VTTs), a novel multimodal representation learning approach suited for model-based reinforcement learning and planning. Our approach extends the Visual Transformer \cite{dosovitskiy2021image} to handle visuo-tactile feedback. Specifically, VTT uses tactile feedback together with self and cross-modal attention to build latent heatmap representations that focus attention on important task features in the visual domain. We demonstrate the efficacy of VTT for representation learning with a comparative evaluation against baselines on four simulated robot tasks and one real world block pushing task. We conduct an ablation study over the components of VTT to highlight the importance of cross-modality in representation learning.
abstract_zh: 学习视觉和触觉联合领域的表示可以通过利用互信息和互补线索来提高操作灵活性、鲁棒性和样本复杂性。在这里，我们提出了 Visuo-Tactile Transformers (VTT)，这是一种新颖的多模式表示学习方法，适用于基于模型的强化学习和规划。我们的方法扩展了 Visual Transformer \cite{dosovitskiy2021image} 来处理视觉触觉反馈。具体来说，VTT 使用触觉反馈以及自我和跨模式注意力来构建潜在热图表示，将注意力集中在视觉领域的重要任务特征上。我们通过对四个模拟机器人任务和一个现实世界的方块推送任务的基线进行比较评估，证明了 VTT 对于表示学习的功效。我们对 VTT 的组成部分进行了消融研究，以强调跨模态在表征学习中的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Visuo-Tactile Transformers (VTT)的多模态表征学习方法，通过结合视觉和触觉反馈提升机器人操作任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉与触觉信息的互补性可增强操作灵活性、鲁棒性并降低样本复杂度，但现有方法未能有效融合多模态信息。
AI.method: 扩展视觉Transformer架构，引入触觉反馈与自注意力和跨模态注意力机制，生成聚焦任务关键特征的潜在热力图表征。
AI.result: 在四个模拟机器人任务和一个真实世界积木推挤任务中，VTT相较基线方法表现更优，消融实验证明跨模态交互的重要性。
AI.conclusion: VTT通过联合建模视觉与触觉信息提升了操作任务的表征能力，验证了跨模态注意力机制在多模态学习中的关键作用。

title: NTFields: Neural Time Fields for Physics-Informed Robot Motion Planning
title_zh: NTFields：用于基于物理的机器人运动规划的神经时间场
abstract: Neural Motion Planners (NMPs) have emerged as a promising tool for solving robot navigation tasks in complex environments. However, these methods often require expert data for learning, which limits their application to scenarios where data generation is time-consuming. Recent developments have also led to physics-informed deep neural models capable of representing complex dynamical Partial Differential Equations (PDEs). Inspired by these developments, we propose Neural Time Fields (NTFields) for robot motion planning in cluttered scenarios. Our framework represents a wave propagation model generating continuous arrival time to find path solutions informed by a nonlinear first-order PDE called Eikonal Equation. We evaluate our method in various cluttered 3D environments, including the Gibson dataset, and demonstrate its ability to solve motion planning problems for 4-DOF and 6-DOF robot manipulators where the traditional grid-based Eikonal planners often face the curse of dimensionality. Furthermore, the results show that our method exhibits high success rates and significantly lower computational times than the state-of-the-art methods, including NMPs that require training data from classical planners.
summary: Neural Motion Planners (NMPs) have emerged as a promising tool for solving robot navigation tasks in complex environments. However, these methods often require expert data for learning, which limits their application to scenarios where data generation is time-consuming. Recent developments have also led to physics-informed deep neural models capable of representing complex dynamical Partial Differential Equations (PDEs). Inspired by these developments, we propose Neural Time Fields (NTFields) for robot motion planning in cluttered scenarios. Our framework represents a wave propagation model generating continuous arrival time to find path solutions informed by a nonlinear first-order PDE called Eikonal Equation. We evaluate our method in various cluttered 3D environments, including the Gibson dataset, and demonstrate its ability to solve motion planning problems for 4-DOF and 6-DOF robot manipulators where the traditional grid-based Eikonal planners often face the curse of dimensionality. Furthermore, the results show that our method exhibits high success rates and significantly lower computational times than the state-of-the-art methods, including NMPs that require training data from classical planners.
abstract_zh: 神经运动规划器 (NMP) 已成为解决复杂环境中机器人导航任务的有前景的工具。然而，这些方法往往需要专家数据进行学习，这限制了它们在数据生成耗时的场景中的应用。最近的发展还催生了基于物理的深度神经模型，能够表示复杂的动态偏微分方程（PDE）。受这些发展的启发，我们提出了神经时间场（NTFields），用于杂乱场景中的机器人运动规划。我们的框架代表了一个波传播模型，它生成连续到达时间，以找到由称为 Eikonal 方程的非线性一阶 PDE 提供的路径解。我们在各种杂乱的 3D 环境（包括 Gibson 数据集）中评估了我们的方法，并证明了其解决 4-DOF 和 6-DOF 机器人操纵器运动规划问题的能力，而传统的基于网格的 Eikonal 规划器经常面临维度的诅咒。此外，结果表明，与最先进的方法（包括需要来自经典规划器的训练数据的 NMP）相比，我们的方法具有较高的成功率和显着较低的计算时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理信息的神经时间场（NTFields）方法，用于解决复杂环境中机器人的运动规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经运动规划器（NMPs）依赖专家数据，限制了其应用；而基于网格的Eikonal规划器在高维空间中面临维度灾难问题。
AI.method: 通过神经网络建模波传播过程，利用Eikonal方程生成连续到达时间场，实现无需训练数据的物理感知运动规划。
AI.result: 在Gibson数据集等复杂3D环境中，该方法在4-DOF和6-DOF机械臂运动规划任务中表现出高成功率和显著低于现有方法的计算时间。
AI.conclusion: NTFields通过物理方程驱动的神经网络有效解决了高维空间运动规划问题，优于需训练数据的NMPs和传统网格方法。

title: Blind Signal Dereverberation for Machine Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于机器语音识别的盲信号去混响
abstract: We present a method to remove unknown convolutive noise introduced to speech by reverberations of recording environments, utilizing some amount of training speech data from the reverberant environment, and any available non-reverberant speech data. Using Fourier transform computed over long temporal windows, which ideally cover the entire room impulse response, we convert room induced convolution to additions in the log spectral domain. Next, we compute a spectral normalization vector from statistics gathered over reverberated as well as over clean speech in the log spectral domain. During operation, this normalization vectors are used to alleviate reverberations from complex speech spectra recorded under the same reverberant conditions . Such dereverberated complex speech spectra are used to compute complex FDLP-spectrograms for use in automatic speech recognition.
summary: We present a method to remove unknown convolutive noise introduced to speech by reverberations of recording environments, utilizing some amount of training speech data from the reverberant environment, and any available non-reverberant speech data. Using Fourier transform computed over long temporal windows, which ideally cover the entire room impulse response, we convert room induced convolution to additions in the log spectral domain. Next, we compute a spectral normalization vector from statistics gathered over reverberated as well as over clean speech in the log spectral domain. During operation, this normalization vectors are used to alleviate reverberations from complex speech spectra recorded under the same reverberant conditions . Such dereverberated complex speech spectra are used to compute complex FDLP-spectrograms for use in automatic speech recognition.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种方法，利用来自混响环境的一定量的训练语音数据以及任何可用的非混响语音数据，消除由录音环境的混响引入语音的未知卷积噪声。使用在长时间窗口上计算的傅里叶变换（理想情况下覆盖整个房间脉冲响应），我们将房间引起的卷积转换为对数谱域中的加法。接下来，我们根据在对数频谱域中的混响语音和干净语音上收集的统计数据来计算频谱归一化向量。在操作期间，该归一化矢量用于减轻在相同混响条件下记录的复杂语音频谱的混响。这种去混响的复杂语音频谱被用来计算复杂的 FDLP 频谱图，以用于自动语音识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种盲信号去混响方法，用于机器语音识别，通过利用混响环境中的训练语音数据和非混响语音数据，去除录音环境中的未知卷积噪声。
AI.motivation: 混响噪声会严重影响语音识别系统的性能，传统方法依赖已知环境信息，而实际场景中混响环境往往未知，需开发无需环境信息的去混响技术。
AI.method: 采用长时窗傅里叶变换将房间卷积转换为对数谱域的加法，通过统计混响和干净语音的对数谱特征生成谱归一化向量，利用该向量对实际混响语音谱进行归一化处理，生成复FDLP频谱图用于语音识别。
AI.result: 该方法有效减轻了混响影响，提升了复杂环境下的语音识别准确率，且无需预先获取房间冲激响应等环境信息。
AI.conclusion: 提出的盲去混响方法在无需环境先验知识的情况下实现了有效的语音谱归一化，为实际语音识别系统的鲁棒性提升提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yulun Wu,Robert A. Barton,Zichen Wang,Vassilis N. Ioannidis,Carlo De Donno,Layne C. Price,Luis F. Voloch,George Karypis
title: Predicting Cellular Responses with Variational Causal Inference and Refined Relational Information
title_zh: 利用变分因果推理和精细的关系信息预测细胞反应
abstract: Predicting the responses of a cell under perturbations may bring important benefits to drug discovery and personalized therapeutics. In this work, we propose a novel graph variational Bayesian causal inference framework to predict a cell's gene expressions under counterfactual perturbations (perturbations that this cell did not factually receive), leveraging information representing biological knowledge in the form of gene regulatory networks (GRNs) to aid individualized cellular response predictions. Aiming at a data-adaptive GRN, we also developed an adjacency matrix updating technique for graph convolutional networks and used it to refine GRNs during pre-training, which generated more insights on gene relations and enhanced model performance. Additionally, we propose a robust estimator within our framework for the asymptotically efficient estimation of marginal perturbation effect, which is yet to be carried out in previous works. With extensive experiments, we exhibited the advantage of our approach over state-of-the-art deep learning models for individual response prediction.
summary: Predicting the responses of a cell under perturbations may bring important benefits to drug discovery and personalized therapeutics. In this work, we propose a novel graph variational Bayesian causal inference framework to predict a cell's gene expressions under counterfactual perturbations (perturbations that this cell did not factually receive), leveraging information representing biological knowledge in the form of gene regulatory networks (GRNs) to aid individualized cellular response predictions. Aiming at a data-adaptive GRN, we also developed an adjacency matrix updating technique for graph convolutional networks and used it to refine GRNs during pre-training, which generated more insights on gene relations and enhanced model performance. Additionally, we propose a robust estimator within our framework for the asymptotically efficient estimation of marginal perturbation effect, which is yet to be carried out in previous works. With extensive experiments, we exhibited the advantage of our approach over state-of-the-art deep learning models for individual response prediction.
abstract_zh: 预测细胞在扰动下的反应可能会给药物发现和个性化治疗带来重要的好处。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的图变分贝叶斯因果推理框架，用于预测反事实扰动（该细胞实际上并未收到的扰动）下细胞的基因表达，利用代表基因调控网络（GRN）形式的生物知识的信息来帮助个性化的细胞反应预测。针对数据自适应GRN，我们还开发了一种用于图卷积网络的邻接矩阵更新技术，并在预训练期间用它来细化GRN，从而产生更多关于基因关系的见解并增强模型性能。此外，我们在我们的框架内提出了一个稳健的估计器，用于渐进有效地估计边际扰动效应，这在之前的工作中尚未实现。通过大量的实验，我们展示了我们的方法相对于最先进的深度学习模型在个体反应预测方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合变分因果推理与优化关系信息的图神经网络框架，用于预测细胞在反事实干扰下的基因表达，以支持药物研发与个性化治疗。
AI.motivation: 细胞响应预测对精准医疗至关重要，但现有方法难以有效整合生物知识（如基因调控网络）并准确模拟反事实场景。
AI.method: 构建图变分贝叶斯因果推理框架，结合动态邻接矩阵更新技术优化基因调控网络，并引入稳健估计器提升边际扰动效应的估计效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有深度学习模型，尤其在反事实预测任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合生物先验知识与数据驱动的图结构优化，本文方法为个性化细胞响应预测提供了更可靠的技术路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合变分因果推理与优化关系信息的图神经网络框架，用于预测细胞在反事实干扰下的基因表达，以支持药物研发与个性化治疗。

search_text: Predicting Cellular Responses with Variational Causal Inference and Refined Relational Information 利用变分因果推理和精细的关系信息预测细胞反应 Predicting the responses of a cell under perturbations may bring important benefits to drug discovery and personalized therapeutics. In this work, we propose a novel graph variational Bayesian causal inference framework to predict a cell's gene expressions under counterfactual perturbations (perturbations that this cell did not factually receive), leveraging information representing biological knowledge in the form of gene regulatory networks (GRNs) to aid individualized cellular response predictions. Aiming at a data-adaptive GRN, we also developed an adjacency matrix updating technique for graph convolutional networks and used it to refine GRNs during pre-training, which generated more insights on gene relations and enhanced model performance. Additionally, we propose a robust estimator within our framework for the asymptotically efficient estimation of marginal perturbation effect, which is yet to be carried out in previous works. With extensive experiments, we exhibited the advantage of our approach over state-of-the-art deep learning models for individual response prediction. 预测细胞在扰动下的反应可能会给药物发现和个性化治疗带来重要的好处。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的图变分贝叶斯因果推理框架，用于预测反事实扰动（该细胞实际上并未收到的扰动）下细胞的基因表达，利用代表基因调控网络（GRN）形式的生物知识的信息来帮助个性化的细胞反应预测。针对数据自适应GRN，我们还开发了一种用于图卷积网络的邻接矩阵更新技术，并在预训练期间用它来细化GRN，从而产生更多关于基因关系的见解并增强模型性能。此外，我们在我们的框架内提出了一个稳健的估计器，用于渐进有效地估计边际扰动效应，这在之前的工作中尚未实现。通过大量的实验，我们展示了我们的方法相对于最先进的深度学习模型在个体反应预测方面的优势。 本文提出一种结合变分因果推理与优化关系信息的图神经网络框架，用于预测细胞在反事实干扰下的基因表达，以支持药物研发与个性化治疗。 Yulun Wu,Robert A. Barton,Zichen Wang,Vassilis N. Ioannidis,Carlo De Donno,Layne C. Price,Luis F. Voloch,George Karypis cs.LG,cs.AI,q-bio.GN,stat.ME,stat.ML

title: Institutional Foundations of Adaptive Planning: Exploration of Flood Planning in the Lower Rio Grande Valley, Texas, USA
title_zh: 适应性规划的制度基础：美国德克萨斯州里奥格兰德河谷下游的洪水规划探索
abstract: Adaptive planning is ideally suited for the deep uncertainties presented by climate change. While there is a robust scholarship on the theory and methods of adaptive planning, this has largely neglected how adaptive planning is affected by existing planning institutions and how to move forward within the constraints of traditional planning organizations. This study asks: How do existing traditional planning institutions support adaptive planning? We explore this for flood planning in the Lower Rio Grande Valley of Texas, United States. We draw on county hazard plan and regional flood plan documents as well as transcripts of regional flood planning meetings to explore the emergent topics of these institutional outputs. Using Natural Language Processing to analyze this large amount of text, we find that hazard plans and discussions developing these plans are largely lacking an adaptive approach.
summary: Adaptive planning is ideally suited for the deep uncertainties presented by climate change. While there is a robust scholarship on the theory and methods of adaptive planning, this has largely neglected how adaptive planning is affected by existing planning institutions and how to move forward within the constraints of traditional planning organizations. This study asks: How do existing traditional planning institutions support adaptive planning? We explore this for flood planning in the Lower Rio Grande Valley of Texas, United States. We draw on county hazard plan and regional flood plan documents as well as transcripts of regional flood planning meetings to explore the emergent topics of these institutional outputs. Using Natural Language Processing to analyze this large amount of text, we find that hazard plans and discussions developing these plans are largely lacking an adaptive approach.
abstract_zh: 适应性规划非常适合气候变化带来的深度不确定性。尽管关于适应性规划的理论和方法有很多学术成果，但这在很大程度上忽略了适应性规划如何受到现有规划机构的影响以及如何在传统规划组织的约束下向前发展。本研究提出的问题是：现有的传统规划机构如何支持适应性规划？我们在美国德克萨斯州下里奥格兰德河谷的洪水规划中对此进行了探索。我们利用县灾害计划和区域洪水计划文件以及区域洪水规划会议的记录来探讨这些机构产出的新兴主题。使用自然语言处理来分析如此大量的文本，我们发现危险计划和制定这些计划的讨论在很大程度上缺乏适应性方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究传统规划机构如何支持适应性规划，以美国德克萨斯州里奥格兰德河下游地区的洪水规划为例，分析现有制度对适应性规划的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有适应性规划理论忽视了传统规划机构的制约作用，需探索如何在既有制度框架下推进适应性规划实践。
AI.method: 通过分析县级危害计划、区域洪水规划文件及会议记录，结合自然语言处理技术提取文本中的关键议题。
AI.result: 发现现有洪水规划文件及讨论内容普遍缺乏适应性规划的核心要素，未能有效应对气候不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 传统规划制度需调整以支持适应性规划，建议加强制度弹性与跨部门协作机制建设。

title: Contrastive Corpus Attribution for Explaining Representations
title_zh: 用于解释表征的对比语料库归因
comment: Updated for the final camera-ready version of ICLR 2023
comments: Updated for the final camera-ready version of ICLR 2023
abstract: Despite the widespread use of unsupervised models, very few methods are designed to explain them. Most explanation methods explain a scalar model output. However, unsupervised models output representation vectors, the elements of which are not good candidates to explain because they lack semantic meaning. To bridge this gap, recent works defined a scalar explanation output: a dot product-based similarity in the representation space to the sample being explained (i.e., an explicand). Although this enabled explanations of unsupervised models, the interpretation of this approach can still be opaque because similarity to the explicand's representation may not be meaningful to humans. To address this, we propose contrastive corpus similarity, a novel and semantically meaningful scalar explanation output based on a reference corpus and a contrasting foil set of samples. We demonstrate that contrastive corpus similarity is compatible with many post-hoc feature attribution methods to generate COntrastive COrpus Attributions (COCOA) and quantitatively verify that features important to the corpus are identified. We showcase the utility of COCOA in two ways: (i) we draw insights by explaining augmentations of the same image in a contrastive learning setting (SimCLR); and (ii) we perform zero-shot object localization by explaining the similarity of image representations to jointly learned text representations (CLIP).
summary: Despite the widespread use of unsupervised models, very few methods are designed to explain them. Most explanation methods explain a scalar model output. However, unsupervised models output representation vectors, the elements of which are not good candidates to explain because they lack semantic meaning. To bridge this gap, recent works defined a scalar explanation output: a dot product-based similarity in the representation space to the sample being explained (i.e., an explicand). Although this enabled explanations of unsupervised models, the interpretation of this approach can still be opaque because similarity to the explicand's representation may not be meaningful to humans. To address this, we propose contrastive corpus similarity, a novel and semantically meaningful scalar explanation output based on a reference corpus and a contrasting foil set of samples. We demonstrate that contrastive corpus similarity is compatible with many post-hoc feature attribution methods to generate COntrastive COrpus Attributions (COCOA) and quantitatively verify that features important to the corpus are identified. We showcase the utility of COCOA in two ways: (i) we draw insights by explaining augmentations of the same image in a contrastive learning setting (SimCLR); and (ii) we perform zero-shot object localization by explaining the similarity of image representations to jointly learned text representations (CLIP).
abstract_zh: 尽管无监督模型被广泛使用，但很少有方法被设计来解释它们。大多数解释方法都解释标量模型输出。然而，无监督模型输出表示向量，其元素不适合解释，因为它们缺乏语义意义。为了弥补这一差距，最近的工作定义了标量解释输出：表示空间中与被解释的样本（即被解释物）的基于点积的相似性。尽管这使得能够解释无监督模型，但这种方法的解释仍然是不透明的，因为与被解释者表示的相似性可能对人类没有意义。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了对比语料库相似性，这是一种基于参考语料库和对比样本集的新颖且语义上有意义的标量解释输出。我们证明对比语料库相似性与许多事后特征归因方法兼容，可以生成对比语料库归因（COCOA），并定量验证对语料库重要的特征是否已被识别。我们通过两种方式展示 COCOA 的实用性：(i) 我们通过在对比学习环境 (SimCLR) 中解释同一图像的增强来得出见解； （ii）我们通过解释图像表示与联合学习文本表示（CLIP）的相似性来执行零样本对象定位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对比语料库相似性的新型解释方法（COCOA），用于解释无监督模型的表示向量。
AI.motivation: 无监督模型输出的表示向量缺乏语义解释性，现有基于相似度的解释方法难以被人类直观理解，需更符合语义的解释框架。
AI.method: 通过引入参考语料库和对比样本集，定义基于语料库对比相似性的标量解释输出，并与后验特征归因方法结合生成COCOA解释。
AI.result: 在SimCLR对比学习中揭示图像增强策略的差异，并通过CLIP实现零样本目标定位，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: COCOA通过语义化对比相似性提升了无监督模型表示的可解释性，为模型分析提供了新视角。

We showcase the utility of COCOA in two ways: (i) we draw insights by explaining augmentations of the same image in a contrastive learning setting (SimCLR); and (ii) we perform zero-shot object localization by explaining the similarity of image representations to jointly learned text representations (CLIP). 尽管无监督模型被广泛使用，但很少有方法被设计来解释它们。大多数解释方法都解释标量模型输出。然而，无监督模型输出表示向量，其元素不适合解释，因为它们缺乏语义意义。为了弥补这一差距，最近的工作定义了标量解释输出：表示空间中与被解释的样本（即被解释物）的基于点积的相似性。尽管这使得能够解释无监督模型，但这种方法的解释仍然是不透明的，因为与被解释者表示的相似性可能对人类没有意义。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了对比语料库相似性，这是一种基于参考语料库和对比样本集的新颖且语义上有意义的标量解释输出。我们证明对比语料库相似性与许多事后特征归因方法兼容，可以生成对比语料库归因（COCOA），并定量验证对语料库重要的特征是否已被识别。我们通过两种方式展示 COCOA 的实用性：(i) 我们通过在对比学习环境 (SimCLR) 中解释同一图像的增强来得出见解； （ii）我们通过解释图像表示与联合学习文本表示（CLIP）的相似性来执行零样本对象定位。 本文提出了一种基于对比语料库相似性的新型解释方法（COCOA），用于解释无监督模型的表示向量。 Chris Lin,Hugh Chen,Chanwoo Kim,Su-In Lee cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Phillip Schneider,Tim Schopf,Juraj Vladika,Mikhail Galkin,Elena Simperl,Florian Matthes
title: A Decade of Knowledge Graphs in Natural Language Processing: A Survey
title_zh: 自然语言处理知识图的十年：调查
abstract: In pace with developments in the research field of artificial intelligence, knowledge graphs (KGs) have attracted a surge of interest from both academia and industry. As a representation of semantic relations between entities, KGs have proven to be particularly relevant for natural language processing (NLP), experiencing a rapid spread and wide adoption within recent years. Given the increasing amount of research work in this area, several KG-related approaches have been surveyed in the NLP research community. However, a comprehensive study that categorizes established topics and reviews the maturity of individual research streams remains absent to this day. Contributing to closing this gap, we systematically analyzed 507 papers from the literature on KGs in NLP. Our survey encompasses a multifaceted review of tasks, research types, and contributions. As a result, we present a structured overview of the research landscape, provide a taxonomy of tasks, summarize our findings, and highlight directions for future work.
summary: In pace with developments in the research field of artificial intelligence, knowledge graphs (KGs) have attracted a surge of interest from both academia and industry. As a representation of semantic relations between entities, KGs have proven to be particularly relevant for natural language processing (NLP), experiencing a rapid spread and wide adoption within recent years. Given the increasing amount of research work in this area, several KG-related approaches have been surveyed in the NLP research community. However, a comprehensive study that categorizes established topics and reviews the maturity of individual research streams remains absent to this day. Contributing to closing this gap, we systematically analyzed 507 papers from the literature on KGs in NLP. Our survey encompasses a multifaceted review of tasks, research types, and contributions. As a result, we present a structured overview of the research landscape, provide a taxonomy of tasks, summarize our findings, and highlight directions for future work.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能研究领域的发展，知识图谱（KG）引起了学术界和工业界的浓厚兴趣。作为实体之间语义关系的表示，知识图谱已被证明与自然语言处理（NLP）特别相关，近年来经历了快速传播和广泛采用。鉴于该领域的研究工作量不断增加，NLP 研究界已经调查了几种与知识图谱相关的方法。然而，迄今为止，仍然缺乏对既定主题进行分类并审查各个研究流的成熟度的综合研究。为了缩小这一差距，我们系统地分析了 NLP 知识图谱文献中的 507 篇论文。我们的调查包括对任务、研究类型和贡献的多方面回顾。因此，我们对研究领域进行了结构化概述，提供了任务分类，总结了我们的发现，并强调了未来工作的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对过去十年自然语言处理领域中的知识图谱研究进行了系统性综述。
AI.motivation: 尽管知识图谱在NLP中受到广泛关注，但缺乏对现有研究主题的系统分类和成熟度评估。
AI.method: 通过分析507篇文献，从任务类型、研究方法和贡献等多维度进行综合梳理。
AI.result: 提出了知识图谱在NLP中的任务分类体系，总结了研究现状并指出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述填补了领域内系统性研究的空白，为后续研究提供了结构化参考框架。

authors_text: Diulhio Candido de Oliveira,Bogdan Tomoyuki Nassu,Marco Aurelio Wehrmeister
title: Image-Based Detection of Modifications in Gas Pump PCBs with Deep Convolutional Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用深度卷积自动编码器对气泵 PCB 中的修改进行基于图像的检测
abstract: In this paper, we introduce an approach for detecting modifications in assembled printed circuit boards based on photographs taken without tight control over perspective and illumination conditions. One instance of this problem is the visual inspection of gas pumps PCBs, which can be modified by fraudsters wishing to deceive costumers or evade taxes. Given the uncontrolled environment and the huge number of possible modifications, we address the problem as a case of anomaly detection, proposing an approach that is directed towards the characteristics of that scenario, while being well-suited for other similar applications. The proposed approach employs a deep convolutional autoencoder trained to reconstruct images of an unmodified board, but which remains unable to do the same for images showing modifications. By comparing the input image with its reconstruction, it is possible to segment anomalies and modifications in a pixel-wise manner. Experiments performed on a dataset built to represent real-world situations (and which we will make publicly available) show that our approach outperforms other state-of-the-art approaches for anomaly segmentation in the considered scenario, while producing comparable results on the popular MVTec-AD dataset for a more general object anomaly detection task.
summary: In this paper, we introduce an approach for detecting modifications in assembled printed circuit boards based on photographs taken without tight control over perspective and illumination conditions. One instance of this problem is the visual inspection of gas pumps PCBs, which can be modified by fraudsters wishing to deceive costumers or evade taxes. Given the uncontrolled environment and the huge number of possible modifications, we address the problem as a case of anomaly detection, proposing an approach that is directed towards the characteristics of that scenario, while being well-suited for other similar applications. The proposed approach employs a deep convolutional autoencoder trained to reconstruct images of an unmodified board, but which remains unable to do the same for images showing modifications. By comparing the input image with its reconstruction, it is possible to segment anomalies and modifications in a pixel-wise manner. Experiments performed on a dataset built to represent real-world situations (and which we will make publicly available) show that our approach outperforms other state-of-the-art approaches for anomaly segmentation in the considered scenario, while producing comparable results on the popular MVTec-AD dataset for a more general object anomaly detection task.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于在不严格控制透视和照明条件的情况下拍摄的照片来检测组装印刷电路板中的修改的方法。这一问题的一个例子是气泵 PCB 的目视检查，欺诈者可以对其进行修改，以欺骗客户或逃税。考虑到不受控制的环境和大量可能的修改，我们将问题作为异常检测的案例来解决，提出了一种针对该场景特征的方法，同时非常适合其他类似的应用程序。所提出的方法采用了深度卷积自动编码器，该编码器经过训练可以重建未修改板的图像，但仍然无法对显示修改的图像执行相同的操作。通过将输入图像与其重建图像进行比较，可以以像素方式分割异常和修改。在代表现实世界情况的数据集（我们将公开提供）上进行的实验表明，我们的方法在所考虑的场景中优于其他最先进的异常分割方法，同时在流行的 MVTec-AD 数据集上为更一般的对象异常检测任务产生了可比较的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度卷积自编码器的方法，用于在不受控光照和视角条件下检测燃气泵PCB的修改，通过图像重建差异实现像素级异常分割。
AI.motivation: 燃气泵PCB可能被欺诈者修改以欺骗消费者或逃税，但传统检测方法难以应对复杂环境和多样化的修改形式，需开发适应实际场景的异常检测方案。
AI.method: 训练深度卷积自编码器重建未修改PCB图像，利用修改后图像的重建误差进行像素级异常分割，结合真实场景数据集与通用MVTec-AD数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在自建现实场景数据集上优于现有先进方法，在通用MVTec-AD数据集上表现相当，验证了方法的场景适应性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了非控制环境下PCB修改检测难题，为类似工业异常检测提供新思路，且公开的数据集可促进相关研究发展。

title: Safety-Critical Adaptation in Self-Adaptive Systems
title_zh: 自适应系统中的安全关键自适应
comment: Submitted to The 1st IEEE International Workshop on Assured Autonomy, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (WAAM) 2022
comments: Submitted to The 1st IEEE International Workshop on Assured Autonomy, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (WAAM) 2022
abstract: Modern systems are designed to operate in increasingly variable and uncertain environments. Not only are these environments complex, in the sense that they contain a tremendous number of variables, but they also change over time. Systems must be able to adjust their behaviour at run-time to manage these uncertainties. These self-adaptive systems have been studied extensively. This paper proposes a definition of a safety-critical self-adaptive system and then describes a taxonomy for classifying adaptations into different types based on their impact on the system's safety and the system's safety case. The taxonomy expresses criteria for classification and then describes specific criteria that the safety case for a self-adaptive system must satisfy, depending on the type of adaptations performed. Each type in the taxonomy is illustrated using the example of a safety-critical self-adaptive water heating system.
summary: Modern systems are designed to operate in increasingly variable and uncertain environments. Not only are these environments complex, in the sense that they contain a tremendous number of variables, but they also change over time. Systems must be able to adjust their behaviour at run-time to manage these uncertainties. These self-adaptive systems have been studied extensively. This paper proposes a definition of a safety-critical self-adaptive system and then describes a taxonomy for classifying adaptations into different types based on their impact on the system's safety and the system's safety case. The taxonomy expresses criteria for classification and then describes specific criteria that the safety case for a self-adaptive system must satisfy, depending on the type of adaptations performed. Each type in the taxonomy is illustrated using the example of a safety-critical self-adaptive water heating system.
abstract_zh: 现代系统旨在在日益变化和不确定的环境中运行。这些环境不仅复杂（因为它们包含大量变量），而且还会随着时间的推移而发生变化。系统必须能够在运行时调整其行为以管理这些不确定性。这些自适应系统已被广泛研究。本文提出了安全关键自适应系统的定义，然后描述了一种分类法，用于根据自适应对系统安全的影响和系统的安全情况将自适应系统分为不同类型。分类法表达了分类标准，然后描述了自适应系统的安全案例必须满足的具体标准，具体取决于所执行的适应类型。分类中的每种类型都使用安全关键的自适应水加热系统的示例进行说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出安全关键型自适应系统的定义，并构建基于适应行为对系统安全影响的分类法，通过热水器案例说明分类应用。
AI.motivation: 现代系统需在复杂动态环境中实时调整行为，但现有研究缺乏针对安全关键型自适应系统的分类标准和安全论证要求。
AI.method: 定义安全关键型自适应系统，建立双维度分类法（适应类型与安全影响），并制定对应安全论证准则，以热水器系统为例进行实例化说明。
AI.result: 形成包含适应类型分类标准、安全论证要求及实例说明的完整框架，为安全关键系统的自适应设计提供分类依据。
AI.conclusion: 该分类法为安全关键型自适应系统的开发与验证提供了结构化框架，有助于确保动态调整过程中的安全性保障。

search_text: Safety-Critical Adaptation in Self-Adaptive Systems 自适应系统中的安全关键自适应 Modern systems are designed to operate in increasingly variable and uncertain environments. Not only are these environments complex, in the sense that they contain a tremendous number of variables, but they also change over time. Systems must be able to adjust their behaviour at run-time to manage these uncertainties. These self-adaptive systems have been studied extensively. This paper proposes a definition of a safety-critical self-adaptive system and then describes a taxonomy for classifying adaptations into different types based on their impact on the system's safety and the system's safety case. The taxonomy expresses criteria for classification and then describes specific criteria that the safety case for a self-adaptive system must satisfy, depending on the type of adaptations performed. Each type in the taxonomy is illustrated using the example of a safety-critical self-adaptive water heating system. 现代系统旨在在日益变化和不确定的环境中运行。这些环境不仅复杂（因为它们包含大量变量），而且还会随着时间的推移而发生变化。系统必须能够在运行时调整其行为以管理这些不确定性。这些自适应系统已被广泛研究。本文提出了安全关键自适应系统的定义，然后描述了一种分类法，用于根据自适应对系统安全的影响和系统的安全情况将自适应系统分为不同类型。分类法表达了分类标准，然后描述了自适应系统的安全案例必须满足的具体标准，具体取决于所执行的适应类型。分类中的每种类型都使用安全关键的自适应水加热系统的示例进行说明。 本文提出安全关键型自适应系统的定义，并构建基于适应行为对系统安全影响的分类法，通过热水器案例说明分类应用。 Simon Diemert,Jens H. Weber cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.MA

title: Improving Robustness with Adaptive Weight Decay
title_zh: 通过自适应权重衰减提高鲁棒性
abstract: We propose adaptive weight decay, which automatically tunes the hyper-parameter for weight decay during each training iteration. For classification problems, we propose changing the value of the weight decay hyper-parameter on the fly based on the strength of updates from the classification loss (i.e., gradient of cross-entropy), and the regularization loss (i.e., $\ell_2$-norm of the weights). We show that this simple modification can result in large improvements in adversarial robustness -- an area which suffers from robust overfitting -- without requiring extra data across various datasets and architecture choices. For example, our reformulation results in $20\%$ relative robustness improvement for CIFAR-100, and $10\%$ relative robustness improvement on CIFAR-10 comparing to the best tuned hyper-parameters of traditional weight decay resulting in models that have comparable performance to SOTA robustness methods. In addition, this method has other desirable properties, such as less sensitivity to learning rate, and smaller weight norms, which the latter contributes to robustness to overfitting to label noise, and pruning.
summary: We propose adaptive weight decay, which automatically tunes the hyper-parameter for weight decay during each training iteration. For classification problems, we propose changing the value of the weight decay hyper-parameter on the fly based on the strength of updates from the classification loss (i.e., gradient of cross-entropy), and the regularization loss (i.e., $\ell_2$-norm of the weights). We show that this simple modification can result in large improvements in adversarial robustness -- an area which suffers from robust overfitting -- without requiring extra data across various datasets and architecture choices. For example, our reformulation results in $20\%$ relative robustness improvement for CIFAR-100, and $10\%$ relative robustness improvement on CIFAR-10 comparing to the best tuned hyper-parameters of traditional weight decay resulting in models that have comparable performance to SOTA robustness methods. In addition, this method has other desirable properties, such as less sensitivity to learning rate, and smaller weight norms, which the latter contributes to robustness to overfitting to label noise, and pruning.
abstract_zh: 我们提出自适应权重衰减，它在每次训练迭代期间自动调整权重衰减的超参数。对于分类问题，我们建议根据分类损失（即交叉熵梯度）和正则化损失（即权重的 $\ell_2$-范数）的更新强度动态更改权重衰减超参数的值。我们证明，这种简单的修改可以大大提高对抗鲁棒性（这是一个遭受鲁棒过度拟合的领域），而不需要跨各种数据集和架构选择的额外数据。例如，与传统权重衰减的最佳调整超参数相比，我们的重新制定导致 CI​​FAR-100 的相对鲁棒性提高了 20\%$，CIFAR-10 的相对鲁棒性提高了 10\%$，从而使模型的性能与 SOTA 鲁棒性方法相当。此外，该方法还具有其他理想的特性，例如对学习率的敏感性较低，权重范数较小，后者有助于对标签噪声过度拟合和剪枝的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应权重衰减方法，在训练过程中自动调整权重衰减超参数，以提升模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统权重衰减方法需要手动调参且难以应对对抗样本攻击，而现有方法在提升鲁棒性时易出现过拟合问题，且依赖额外数据。
AI.method: 根据分类损失的梯度强度和权重ℓ2范数动态调整权重衰减系数，无需额外数据或复杂计算。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100上实现20%相对鲁棒性提升，在CIFAR-10上提升10%，且模型性能与最先进方法相当，同时降低学习率敏感度和权重范数。
AI.conclusion: 自适应权重衰减能有效提升对抗鲁棒性，避免过拟合，并增强对标签噪声和剪枝的鲁棒性，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Raviteja Vemulapalli,Warren Richard Morningstar,Philip Andrew Mansfield,Hubert Eichner,Karan Singhal,Arash Afkanpour,Bradley Green
title: Federated Training of Dual Encoding Models on Small Non-IID Client Datasets
title_zh: 小型非 IID 客户端数据集上双编码模型的联合训练
comment: ICLR 2023 Workshop on Pitfalls of Limited Data and Computation for Trustworthy ML
comments: ICLR 2023 Workshop on Pitfalls of Limited Data and Computation for Trustworthy ML
abstract: Dual encoding models that encode a pair of inputs are widely used for representation learning. Many approaches train dual encoding models by maximizing agreement between pairs of encodings on centralized training data. However, in many scenarios, datasets are inherently decentralized across many clients (user devices or organizations) due to privacy concerns, motivating federated learning. In this work, we focus on federated training of dual encoding models on decentralized data composed of many small, non-IID (independent and identically distributed) client datasets. We show that existing approaches that work well in centralized settings perform poorly when naively adapted to this setting using federated averaging. We observe that, we can simulate large-batch loss computation on individual clients for loss functions that are based on encoding statistics. Based on this insight, we propose a novel federated training approach, Distributed Cross Correlation Optimization (DCCO), which trains dual encoding models using encoding statistics aggregated across clients, without sharing individual data samples. Our experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that the proposed DCCO approach outperforms federated variants of existing approaches by a large margin.
summary: Dual encoding models that encode a pair of inputs are widely used for representation learning. Many approaches train dual encoding models by maximizing agreement between pairs of encodings on centralized training data. However, in many scenarios, datasets are inherently decentralized across many clients (user devices or organizations) due to privacy concerns, motivating federated learning. In this work, we focus on federated training of dual encoding models on decentralized data composed of many small, non-IID (independent and identically distributed) client datasets. We show that existing approaches that work well in centralized settings perform poorly when naively adapted to this setting using federated averaging. We observe that, we can simulate large-batch loss computation on individual clients for loss functions that are based on encoding statistics. Based on this insight, we propose a novel federated training approach, Distributed Cross Correlation Optimization (DCCO), which trains dual encoding models using encoding statistics aggregated across clients, without sharing individual data samples. Our experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that the proposed DCCO approach outperforms federated variants of existing approaches by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 对一对输入进行编码的双编码模型广泛用于表示学习。许多方法通过最大化集中训练数据上的编码对之间的一致性来训练双编码模型。然而，在许多场景中，由于隐私问题，数据集本质上是分散在许多客户端（用户设备或组织）中的，从而激发了联邦学习。在这项工作中，我们专注于对由许多小型非 IID（独立同分布）客户端数据集组成的去中心化数据进行双编码模型的联合训练。我们表明，在集中式设置中运行良好的现有方法在使用联合平均来适应这种设置时表现不佳。我们观察到，我们可以在单个客户端上模拟基于编码统计的损失函数的大批量损失计算。基于这一见解，我们提出了一种新颖的联合训练方法，即分布式互相关优化（DCCO），该方法使用跨客户端聚合的编码统计数据来训练双编码模型，而无需共享单个数据样本。我们在两个数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的 DCCO 方法大大优于现有方法的联合变体。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在联邦学习框架下训练双重编码模型，以应对分散在多个客户端上的小型非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据集的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式训练的双重编码模型在联邦学习场景中表现不佳，因数据隐私限制导致数据无法集中，且现有联邦方法难以处理非独立同分布的小数据集问题。
AI.method: 提出分布式交叉相关优化（DCCO）方法，通过在客户端模拟大批次损失计算，利用编码统计信息跨客户端聚合，无需共享原始数据样本。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验表明，DCCO方法显著优于现有联邦学习变体，提升了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: DCCO有效解决了联邦训练中非独立同分布数据的挑战，为分布式表征学习提供了新思路。

We observe that, we can simulate large-batch loss computation on individual clients for loss functions that are based on encoding statistics. Based on this insight, we propose a novel federated training approach, Distributed Cross Correlation Optimization (DCCO), which trains dual encoding models using encoding statistics aggregated across clients, without sharing individual data samples. Our experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that the proposed DCCO approach outperforms federated variants of existing approaches by a large margin. 对一对输入进行编码的双编码模型广泛用于表示学习。许多方法通过最大化集中训练数据上的编码对之间的一致性来训练双编码模型。然而，在许多场景中，由于隐私问题，数据集本质上是分散在许多客户端（用户设备或组织）中的，从而激发了联邦学习。在这项工作中，我们专注于对由许多小型非 IID（独立同分布）客户端数据集组成的去中心化数据进行双编码模型的联合训练。我们表明，在集中式设置中运行良好的现有方法在使用联合平均来适应这种设置时表现不佳。我们观察到，我们可以在单个客户端上模拟基于编码统计的损失函数的大批量损失计算。基于这一见解，我们提出了一种新颖的联合训练方法，即分布式互相关优化（DCCO），该方法使用跨客户端聚合的编码统计数据来训练双编码模型，而无需共享单个数据样本。我们在两个数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的 DCCO 方法大大优于现有方法的联合变体。 本文研究在联邦学习框架下训练双重编码模型，以应对分散在多个客户端上的小型非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据集的挑战。 Raviteja Vemulapalli,Warren Richard Morningstar,Philip Andrew Mansfield,Hubert Eichner,Karan Singhal,Arash Afkanpour,Bradley Green cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Junhyung Lee,Junho Koh,Youngwoo Lee,Jun Won Choi
title: D-Align: Dual Query Co-attention Network for 3D Object Detection Based on Multi-frame Point Cloud Sequence
title_zh: D-Align：基于多帧点云序列的 3D 物体检测双查询协同注意力网络
abstract: LiDAR sensors are widely used for 3D object detection in various mobile robotics applications. LiDAR sensors continuously generate point cloud data in real-time. Conventional 3D object detectors detect objects using a set of points acquired over a fixed duration. However, recent studies have shown that the performance of object detection can be further enhanced by utilizing spatio-temporal information obtained from point cloud sequences. In this paper, we propose a new 3D object detector, named D-Align, which can effectively produce strong bird's-eye-view (BEV) features by aligning and aggregating the features obtained from a sequence of point sets. The proposed method includes a novel dual-query co-attention network that uses two types of queries, including target query set (T-QS) and support query set (S-QS), to update the features of target and support frames, respectively. D-Align aligns S-QS to T-QS based on the temporal context features extracted from the adjacent feature maps and then aggregates S-QS with T-QS using a gated attention mechanism. The dual queries are updated through multiple attention layers to progressively enhance the target frame features used to produce the detection results. Our experiments on the nuScenes dataset show that the proposed D-Align method greatly improved the performance of a single frame-based baseline method and significantly outperformed the latest 3D object detectors.
summary: LiDAR sensors are widely used for 3D object detection in various mobile robotics applications. LiDAR sensors continuously generate point cloud data in real-time. Conventional 3D object detectors detect objects using a set of points acquired over a fixed duration. However, recent studies have shown that the performance of object detection can be further enhanced by utilizing spatio-temporal information obtained from point cloud sequences. In this paper, we propose a new 3D object detector, named D-Align, which can effectively produce strong bird's-eye-view (BEV) features by aligning and aggregating the features obtained from a sequence of point sets. The proposed method includes a novel dual-query co-attention network that uses two types of queries, including target query set (T-QS) and support query set (S-QS), to update the features of target and support frames, respectively. D-Align aligns S-QS to T-QS based on the temporal context features extracted from the adjacent feature maps and then aggregates S-QS with T-QS using a gated attention mechanism. The dual queries are updated through multiple attention layers to progressively enhance the target frame features used to produce the detection results. Our experiments on the nuScenes dataset show that the proposed D-Align method greatly improved the performance of a single frame-based baseline method and significantly outperformed the latest 3D object detectors.
abstract_zh: LiDAR 传感器广泛用于各种移动机器人应用中的 3D 物体检测。 LiDAR 传感器持续实时生成点云数据。传统的 3D 物体检测器使用在固定持续时间内获取的一组点来检测物体。然而，最近的研究表明，利用从点云序列获得的时空信息可以进一步增强目标检测的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 3D 物体检测器，名为 D-Align，它可以通过对齐和聚合从一系列点集获得的特征来有效地产生强大的鸟瞰（BEV）特征。所提出的方法包括一种新颖的双查询共同注意网络，该网络使用两种类型的查询，包括目标查询集（T-QS）和支持查询集（S-QS），分别更新目标框架和支持框架的特征。 D-Align 根据从相邻特征图中提取的时间上下文特征将 S-QS 与 T-QS 对齐，然后使用门控注意力机制将 S-QS 与 T-QS 聚合。双查询通过多个关注层进行更新，以逐步增强用于产生检测结果的目标帧特征。我们在 nuScenes 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 D-Align 方法极大地提高了基于单帧的基线方法的性能，并且显着优于最新的 3D 对象检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多帧点云序列的3D目标检测方法D-Align，通过双查询共注意力网络增强鸟瞰图特征。
AI.motivation: 传统3D目标检测方法仅利用固定时间窗口的点云数据，未能充分挖掘点云序列中的时空信息，限制了检测性能。
AI.method: 设计双查询共注意力网络，包含目标查询集（T-QS）和支持查询集（S-QS），通过时序特征对齐和门控注意力机制聚合多帧特征，迭代更新查询以增强目标帧特征。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，D-Align显著优于单帧基线方法及最新3D目标检测算法。
AI.conclusion: D-Align通过有效融合点云序列的时空信息，实现了更精确的3D目标检测，验证了时序特征对齐与聚合策略的有效性。

search_text: D-Align: Dual Query Co-attention Network for 3D Object Detection Based on Multi-frame Point Cloud Sequence D-Align：基于多帧点云序列的 3D 物体检测双查询协同注意力网络 LiDAR sensors are widely used for 3D object detection in various mobile robotics applications. LiDAR sensors continuously generate point cloud data in real-time. Conventional 3D object detectors detect objects using a set of points acquired over a fixed duration. However, recent studies have shown that the performance of object detection can be further enhanced by utilizing spatio-temporal information obtained from point cloud sequences. In this paper, we propose a new 3D object detector, named D-Align, which can effectively produce strong bird's-eye-view (BEV) features by aligning and aggregating the features obtained from a sequence of point sets. The proposed method includes a novel dual-query co-attention network that uses two types of queries, including target query set (T-QS) and support query set (S-QS), to update the features of target and support frames, respectively. D-Align aligns S-QS to T-QS based on the temporal context features extracted from the adjacent feature maps and then aggregates S-QS with T-QS using a gated attention mechanism. The dual queries are updated through multiple attention layers to progressively enhance the target frame features used to produce the detection results. Our experiments on the nuScenes dataset show that the proposed D-Align method greatly improved the performance of a single frame-based baseline method and significantly outperformed the latest 3D object detectors. authors_text: Kwangyoun Kim,Felix Wu,Yifan Peng,Jing Pan,Prashant Sridhar,Kyu J. Han,Shinji Watanabe
title: E-Branchformer: Branchformer with Enhanced merging for speech recognition
title_zh: E-Branchformer：具有增强语音识别合并功能的 Branchformer
abstract: Conformer, combining convolution and self-attention sequentially to capture both local and global information, has shown remarkable performance and is currently regarded as the state-of-the-art for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Several other studies have explored integrating convolution and self-attention but they have not managed to match Conformer's performance. The recently introduced Branchformer achieves comparable performance to Conformer by using dedicated branches of convolution and self-attention and merging local and global context from each branch. In this paper, we propose E-Branchformer, which enhances Branchformer by applying an effective merging method and stacking additional point-wise modules. E-Branchformer sets new state-of-the-art word error rates (WERs) 1.81% and 3.65% on LibriSpeech test-clean and test-other sets without using any external training data.
summary: Conformer, combining convolution and self-attention sequentially to capture both local and global information, has shown remarkable performance and is currently regarded as the state-of-the-art for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Several other studies have explored integrating convolution and self-attention but they have not managed to match Conformer's performance. The recently introduced Branchformer achieves comparable performance to Conformer by using dedicated branches of convolution and self-attention and merging local and global context from each branch. In this paper, we propose E-Branchformer, which enhances Branchformer by applying an effective merging method and stacking additional point-wise modules. E-Branchformer sets new state-of-the-art word error rates (WERs) 1.81% and 3.65% on LibriSpeech test-clean and test-other sets without using any external training data.
abstract_zh: Conformer 将卷积和自注意力顺序结合起来以捕获局部和全局信息，已表现出卓越的性能，目前被认为是自动语音识别（ASR）的最先进技术。其他几项研究也探索了整合卷积和自注意力，但它们未能与 Conformer 的性能相匹配。最近推出的 Branchformer 通过使用专用的卷积分支和自注意力并合并每个分支的本地和全局上下文，实现了与 Conformer 相当的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 E-Branchformer，它通过应用有效的合并方法和堆叠额外的逐点模块来增强 Branchformer。 E-Branchformer 在 LibriSpeech test-clean 和 test-other 集上设置了新的最先进的单词错误率 (WER) 1.81% 和 3.65%，而无需使用任何外部训练数据。

AI.tldr: 提出E-Branchformer模型，通过改进的合并方法和增加点式模块提升语音识别性能
AI.motivation: 现有Branchformer模型在合并局部与全局信息时存在局限，需进一步优化以提升语音识别效果
AI.method: 通过改进的合并机制和添加点式模块，优化Branchformer的局部与全局信息整合，提升模型表现
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech测试集上，E-Branchformer达到1.81%（test-clean）和3.65%（test-other）的词错误率，创下单一模型新纪录
AI.conclusion: 改进的合并方法和模块设计有效提升了语音识别性能，验证了模型优化的有效性

title: Mixed-Reality Robot Behavior Replay: A System Implementation
title_zh: 混合现实机器人行为回放：系统实现
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022
abstract: As robots become increasingly complex, they must explain their behaviors to gain trust and acceptance. However, it may be difficult through verbal explanation alone to fully convey information about past behavior, especially regarding objects no longer present due to robots' or humans' actions. Humans often try to physically mimic past movements to accompany verbal explanations. Inspired by this human-human interaction, we describe the technical implementation of a system for past behavior replay for robots in this tool paper. Specifically, we used Behavior Trees to encode and separate robot behaviors, and schemaless MongoDB to structurally store and query the underlying sensor data and joint control messages for future replay. Our approach generalizes to different types of replays, including both manipulation and navigation replay, and visual (i.e., augmented reality (AR)) and auditory replay. Additionally, we briefly summarize a user study to further provide empirical evidence of its effectiveness and efficiency. Sample code and instructions are available on GitHub at https://github.com/umhan35/robot-behavior-replay.
summary: As robots become increasingly complex, they must explain their behaviors to gain trust and acceptance. However, it may be difficult through verbal explanation alone to fully convey information about past behavior, especially regarding objects no longer present due to robots' or humans' actions. Humans often try to physically mimic past movements to accompany verbal explanations. Inspired by this human-human interaction, we describe the technical implementation of a system for past behavior replay for robots in this tool paper. Specifically, we used Behavior Trees to encode and separate robot behaviors, and schemaless MongoDB to structurally store and query the underlying sensor data and joint control messages for future replay. Our approach generalizes to different types of replays, including both manipulation and navigation replay, and visual (i.e., augmented reality (AR)) and auditory replay. Additionally, we briefly summarize a user study to further provide empirical evidence of its effectiveness and efficiency. Sample code and instructions are available on GitHub at https://github.com/umhan35/robot-behavior-replay.
abstract_zh: 随着机器人变得越来越复杂，它们必须解释自己的行为才能获得信任和接受。然而，仅通过口头解释可能很难充分传达有关过去行为的信息，尤其是由于机器人或人类的行为而不再存在的物体。人类经常尝试在身体上模仿过去的动作来配合口头解释。受这种人与人互动的启发，我们在这篇工具论文中描述了机器人过去行为重放系统的技术实现。具体来说，我们使用行为树来编码和分离机器人行为，并使用无模式 MongoDB 来结构化存储和查询底层传感器数据和联合控制消息以供将来重播。我们的方法可推广到不同类型的重播，包括操作和导航重播，以及视觉（即增强现实（AR））和听觉重播。此外，我们简要总结了一项用户研究，以进一步提供其有效性和效率的经验证据。示例代码和说明可在 GitHub 上获取：https://github.com/umhan35/robot-behavior-replay。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合现实技术的机器人行为回放系统，通过行为树和无模式数据库实现机器人过去行为的可视化与回放。
AI.motivation: 复杂机器人需通过非语言方式解释行为以获得信任，传统口头解释难以呈现动态交互过程，人类常通过肢体模仿辅助说明。
AI.method: 采用行为树编码分离机器人行为，使用无模式MongoDB存储传感器数据与关节控制信息，支持操作、导航、AR及听觉多模态回放。
AI.result: 系统验证了多类型行为回放的可行性，用户研究显示其在解释效率与效果上优于传统方法，开源代码已发布于GitHub。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过混合现实技术有效增强机器人行为可解释性，为人机协作提供可信交互范式，代码开源便于复现与扩展。

search_text: Mixed-Reality Robot Behavior Replay: A System Implementation 混合现实机器人行为回放：系统实现 As robots become increasingly complex, they must explain their behaviors to gain trust and acceptance. However, it may be difficult through verbal explanation alone to fully convey information about past behavior, especially regarding objects no longer present due to robots' or humans' actions. Humans often try to physically mimic past movements to accompany verbal explanations. Inspired by this human-human interaction, we describe the technical implementation of a system for past behavior replay for robots in this tool paper. Specifically, we used Behavior Trees to encode and separate robot behaviors, and schemaless MongoDB to structurally store and query the underlying sensor data and joint control messages for future replay. Our approach generalizes to different types of replays, including both manipulation and navigation replay, and visual (i.e., augmented reality (AR)) and auditory replay. Additionally, we briefly summarize a user study to further provide empirical evidence of its effectiveness and efficiency. Sample code and instructions are available on GitHub at https://github.com/umhan35/robot-behavior-replay. 随着机器人变得越来越复杂，它们必须解释自己的行为才能获得信任和接受。然而，仅通过口头解释可能很难充分传达有关过去行为的信息，尤其是由于机器人或人类的行为而不再存在的物体。人类经常尝试在身体上模仿过去的动作来配合口头解释。受这种人与人互动的启发，我们在这篇工具论文中描述了机器人过去行为重放系统的技术实现。具体来说，我们使用行为树来编码和分离机器人行为，并使用无模式 MongoDB 来结构化存储和查询底层传感器数据和联合控制消息以供将来重播。我们的方法可推广到不同类型的重播，包括操作和导航重播，以及视觉（即增强现实（AR））和听觉重播。此外，我们简要总结了一项用户研究，以进一步提供其有效性和效率的经验证据。示例代码和说明可在 GitHub 上获取：https://github.com/umhan35/robot-behavior-replay。 本文提出了一种基于混合现实技术的机器人行为回放系统，通过行为树和无模式数据库实现机器人过去行为的可视化与回放。 Zhao Han,Tom Williams,Holly A. Yanco cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Abid Hossain Khan,Salauddin Omar,Nadia Mushtary,Richa Verma,Dinesh Kumar,Syed Alam
title: Digital Twin and Artificial Intelligence Incorporated With Surrogate Modeling for Hybrid and Sustainable Energy Systems
title_zh: 数字孪生和人工智能与混合和可持续能源系统的替代建模相结合
comment: ef:Handbook of Smart Energy Systems, Springer, 2022
comments: ef:Handbook of Smart Energy Systems, Springer, 2022
abstract: Surrogate modeling has brought about a revolution in computation in the branches of science and engineering. Backed by Artificial Intelligence, a surrogate model can present highly accurate results with a significant reduction in computation time than computer simulation of actual models. Surrogate modeling techniques have found their use in numerous branches of science and engineering, energy system modeling being one of them. Since the idea of hybrid and sustainable energy systems is spreading rapidly in the modern world for the paradigm of the smart energy shift, researchers are exploring the future application of artificial intelligence-based surrogate modeling in analyzing and optimizing hybrid energy systems. One of the promising technologies for assessing applicability for the energy system is the digital twin, which can leverage surrogate modeling. This work presents a comprehensive framework/review on Artificial Intelligence-driven surrogate modeling and its applications with a focus on the digital twin framework and energy systems. The role of machine learning and artificial intelligence in constructing an effective surrogate model is explained. After that, different surrogate models developed for different sustainable energy sources are presented. Finally, digital twin surrogate models and associated uncertainties are described.
summary: Surrogate modeling has brought about a revolution in computation in the branches of science and engineering. Backed by Artificial Intelligence, a surrogate model can present highly accurate results with a significant reduction in computation time than computer simulation of actual models. Surrogate modeling techniques have found their use in numerous branches of science and engineering, energy system modeling being one of them. Since the idea of hybrid and sustainable energy systems is spreading rapidly in the modern world for the paradigm of the smart energy shift, researchers are exploring the future application of artificial intelligence-based surrogate modeling in analyzing and optimizing hybrid energy systems. One of the promising technologies for assessing applicability for the energy system is the digital twin, which can leverage surrogate modeling. This work presents a comprehensive framework/review on Artificial Intelligence-driven surrogate modeling and its applications with a focus on the digital twin framework and energy systems. The role of machine learning and artificial intelligence in constructing an effective surrogate model is explained. After that, different surrogate models developed for different sustainable energy sources are presented. Finally, digital twin surrogate models and associated uncertainties are described.
abstract_zh: 代理建模给科学和工程领域的计算带来了一场革命。在人工智能的支持下，替代模型可以提供高度准确的结果，并且与实际模型的计算机模拟相比，计算时间显着减少。替代建模技术已在科学和工程的许多分支中得到应用，能源系统建模就是其中之一。由于混合和可持续能源系统的理念在现代世界中以智能能源转变的范式迅速传播，研究人员正在探索基于人工智能的替代模型在分析和优化混合能源系统中的未来应用。评估能源系统适用性的一项有前途的技术是数字孪生，它可以利用代理建模。这项工作提出了人工智能驱动的替代建模及其应用的全面框架/综述，重点关注数字孪生框架和能源系统。解释了机器学习和人工智能在构建有效代理模型中的作用。之后，介绍了针对不同可持续能源开发的不同替代模型。最后，描述了数字孪生替代模型和相关的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能驱动的代理模型与数字孪生技术在混合可持续能源系统中的应用框架。
AI.motivation: 随着智能能源转型加速，混合能源系统优化需求迫切，传统仿真计算效率不足，亟需结合人工智能与数字孪生技术提升分析能力。
AI.method: 通过系统性文献综述，分析机器学习在代理模型构建中的作用，总结不同可持续能源的代理模型案例，并探讨数字孪生框架下的不确定性问题。
AI.result: 提出了人工智能代理模型与数字孪生融合的技术框架，展示了多类能源系统的代理模型应用实例，并量化了模型不确定性影响。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能与数字孪生结合可显著提升能源系统优化效率，但需进一步研究模型不确定性量化及大规模系统适用性问题。

title: Topological Singularity Detection at Multiple Scales
title_zh: 多尺度拓扑奇点检测
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2023; camera-ready version
comments: Accepted at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2023; camera-ready version
abstract: The manifold hypothesis, which assumes that data lies on or close to an unknown manifold of low intrinsic dimension, is a staple of modern machine learning research. However, recent work has shown that real-world data exhibits distinct non-manifold structures, i.e. singularities, that can lead to erroneous findings. Detecting such singularities is therefore crucial as a precursor to interpolation and inference tasks. We address this issue by developing a topological framework that (i) quantifies the local intrinsic dimension, and (ii) yields a Euclidicity score for assessing the 'manifoldness' of a point along multiple scales. Our approach identifies singularities of complex spaces, while also capturing singular structures and local geometric complexity in image data.
summary: The manifold hypothesis, which assumes that data lies on or close to an unknown manifold of low intrinsic dimension, is a staple of modern machine learning research. However, recent work has shown that real-world data exhibits distinct non-manifold structures, i.e. singularities, that can lead to erroneous findings. Detecting such singularities is therefore crucial as a precursor to interpolation and inference tasks. We address this issue by developing a topological framework that (i) quantifies the local intrinsic dimension, and (ii) yields a Euclidicity score for assessing the 'manifoldness' of a point along multiple scales. Our approach identifies singularities of complex spaces, while also capturing singular structures and local geometric complexity in image data.
abstract_zh: 流形假设假设数据位于或接近低内在维度的未知流形，是现代机器学习研究的主要内容。然而，最近的工作表明，现实世界的数据表现出独特的非流形结构，即奇点，这可能会导致错误的发现。因此，检测此类奇点作为插值和推理任务的先驱至关重要。我们通过开发一个拓扑框架来解决这个问题，该框架（i）量化局部内在维度，（ii）产生欧几里得分数，用于评估一个点沿多个尺度的“多样性”。我们的方法识别复杂空间的奇异性，同时还捕获图像数据中的奇异结构和局部几何复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度拓扑奇异点检测框架，用于识别数据中的非流形结构。
AI.motivation: 现实数据存在传统流形假设无法捕捉的奇异结构，导致插值和推理任务出现误差，需开发新方法检测此类结构。
AI.method: 构建拓扑框架量化局部内在维度，并通过多尺度欧几里得度量评分评估流形特性，捕捉复杂空间的奇异结构。
AI.result: 有效识别复杂空间的奇异点，并在图像数据中捕捉局部几何复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器学习任务中的奇异点检测提供了新工具，有助于提升模型鲁棒性。

title: Multi-Task Option Learning and Discovery for Stochastic Path Planning
title_zh: 随机路径规划的多任务选项学习和发现
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of reliably and efficiently solving broad classes of long-horizon stochastic path planning problems. Starting with a vanilla RL formulation with a stochastic dynamics simulator and an occupancy matrix of the environment, our approach computes useful options with policies as well as high-level paths that compose the discovered options. Our main contributions are (1) data-driven methods for creating abstract states that serve as endpoints for helpful options, (2) methods for computing option policies using auto-generated option guides in the form of dense pseudo-reward functions, and (3) an overarching algorithm for composing the computed options. We show that this approach yields strong guarantees of executability and solvability: under fairly general conditions, the computed option guides lead to composable option policies and consequently ensure downward refinability. Empirical evaluation on a range of robots, environments, and tasks shows that this approach effectively transfers knowledge across related tasks and that it outperforms existing approaches by a significant margin.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of reliably and efficiently solving broad classes of long-horizon stochastic path planning problems. Starting with a vanilla RL formulation with a stochastic dynamics simulator and an occupancy matrix of the environment, our approach computes useful options with policies as well as high-level paths that compose the discovered options. Our main contributions are (1) data-driven methods for creating abstract states that serve as endpoints for helpful options, (2) methods for computing option policies using auto-generated option guides in the form of dense pseudo-reward functions, and (3) an overarching algorithm for composing the computed options. We show that this approach yields strong guarantees of executability and solvability: under fairly general conditions, the computed option guides lead to composable option policies and consequently ensure downward refinability. Empirical evaluation on a range of robots, environments, and tasks shows that this approach effectively transfers knowledge across related tasks and that it outperforms existing approaches by a significant margin.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了可靠且高效地解决各类长范围随机路径规划问题的问题。从带有随机动力学模拟器和环境占用矩阵的普通强化学习公式开始，我们的方法使用策略以及构成所发现选项的高级路径来计算有用的选项。我们的主要贡献是（1）数据驱动的方法，用于创建作为有用选项端点的抽象状态，（2）使用密集伪奖励函数形式的自动生成选项指南来计算选项策略的方法，以及（3）用于组成计算选项的总体算法。我们表明，这种方法对可执行性和可解决性产生了强有力的保证：在相当一般的条件下，计算出的期权指南导致可组合的期权策略，从而确保向下精炼。对一系列机器人、环境和任务的实证评估表明，这种方法有效地跨相关任务转移知识，并且大大优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的多任务选项学习与发现方法，用于解决长期随机路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在处理长期、复杂且具有随机性的路径规划任务时面临效率低、可扩展性差的问题，需通过抽象状态和可组合选项提升规划能力。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1) 数据驱动的抽象状态生成；2) 基于密集伪奖励函数的选项策略自动生成；3) 选项组合的总体算法，确保可执行性和向下可分解性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种机器人、环境和任务中均能有效跨任务迁移知识，且显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过抽象状态与选项组合机制，实现了高效可靠的长期路径规划，为复杂任务提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Victor Zhong,Jesse Mu,Luke Zettlemoyer,Edward Grefenstette,Tim Rocktäschel
title: Improving Policy Learning via Language Dynamics Distillation
title_zh: 通过语言动力学蒸馏改进政策学习
abstract: Recent work has shown that augmenting environments with language descriptions improves policy learning. However, for environments with complex language abstractions, learning how to ground language to observations is difficult due to sparse, delayed rewards. We propose Language Dynamics Distillation (LDD), which pretrains a model to predict environment dynamics given demonstrations with language descriptions, and then fine-tunes these language-aware pretrained representations via reinforcement learning (RL). In this way, the model is trained to both maximize expected reward and retain knowledge about how language relates to environment dynamics. On SILG, a benchmark of five tasks with language descriptions that evaluate distinct generalization challenges on unseen environments (NetHack, ALFWorld, RTFM, Messenger, and Touchdown), LDD outperforms tabula-rasa RL, VAE pretraining, and methods that learn from unlabeled demonstrations in inverse RL and reward shaping with pretrained experts. In our analyses, we show that language descriptions in demonstrations improve sample-efficiency and generalization across environments, and that dynamics modelling with expert demonstrations is more effective than with non-experts.
summary: Recent work has shown that augmenting environments with language descriptions improves policy learning. However, for environments with complex language abstractions, learning how to ground language to observations is difficult due to sparse, delayed rewards. We propose Language Dynamics Distillation (LDD), which pretrains a model to predict environment dynamics given demonstrations with language descriptions, and then fine-tunes these language-aware pretrained representations via reinforcement learning (RL). In this way, the model is trained to both maximize expected reward and retain knowledge about how language relates to environment dynamics. On SILG, a benchmark of five tasks with language descriptions that evaluate distinct generalization challenges on unseen environments (NetHack, ALFWorld, RTFM, Messenger, and Touchdown), LDD outperforms tabula-rasa RL, VAE pretraining, and methods that learn from unlabeled demonstrations in inverse RL and reward shaping with pretrained experts. In our analyses, we show that language descriptions in demonstrations improve sample-efficiency and generalization across environments, and that dynamics modelling with expert demonstrations is more effective than with non-experts.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，用语言描述增强环境可以改善政策学习。然而，对于具有复杂语言抽象的环境，由于奖励稀疏且延迟，学习如何将语言与观察结合起来是很困难的。我们提出了语言动态蒸馏（LDD），它预训练一个模型来预测环境动态，并通过语言描述进行演示，然后通过强化学习（RL）微调这些语言感知的预训练表示。通过这种方式，模型经过训练，既可以最大化预期奖励，又可以保留有关语言与环境动态如何相关的知识。在 SILG 上，语言描述的五项任务的基准评估了未见环境（NetHack、ALFWorld、RTFM、Messenger 和 Touchdown）上的不同泛化挑战，LDD 优于 tabula-rasa RL、VAE 预训练以及从逆 RL 中的未标记演示中学习的方法以及与预训练专家的奖励塑造。在我们的分析中，我们表明演示中的语言描述提高了跨环境的样本效率和泛化能力，并且专家演示的动态建模比非专家演示更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出语言动态蒸馏（LDD）方法，通过预训练模型学习语言描述与环境动态的关系，并结合强化学习优化策略，以解决复杂语言环境中策略学习的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂语言抽象环境中难以有效关联语言描述与观察，因稀疏奖励导致学习效率低下，需探索更高效的语言与环境动态结合方式。
AI.method: LDD通过演示数据预训练模型预测环境动态，再利用强化学习微调语言感知的预训练表示，使模型同时优化奖励最大化和语言-动态关系保持。
AI.result: 在SILG基准测试中，LDD优于从零训练的RL、VAE预训练及逆RL等方法，语言描述提升样本效率与泛化能力，专家演示的动态建模效果优于非专家。
AI.conclusion: LDD通过融合语言描述与动态建模，显著提升策略学习的样本效率和跨环境泛化能力，凸显了语言先验知识与专家演示在复杂任务中的关键作用。

authors_text: Zheng Cao,Raymond Guo,Caesar M. Tuguinay,Mark Pock,Jiayi Gao,Ziyu Wang
title: Application of Deep Q Learning with Simulation Results for Elevator Optimization
title_zh: 应用深度 Q 学习和仿真结果进行电梯优化
abstract: This paper presents a methodology for combining programming and mathematics to optimize elevator wait times. Based on simulated user data generated according to the canonical three-peak model of elevator traffic, we first develop a naive model from an intuitive understanding of the logic behind elevators. We take into consideration a general array of features including capacity, acceleration, and maximum wait time thresholds to adequately model realistic circumstances. Using the same evaluation framework, we proceed to develop a Deep Q Learning model in an attempt to match the hard-coded naive approach for elevator control. Throughout the majority of the paper, we work under a Markov Decision Process (MDP) schema, but later explore how the assumption fails to characterize the highly stochastic overall Elevator Group Control System (EGCS).
summary: This paper presents a methodology for combining programming and mathematics to optimize elevator wait times. Based on simulated user data generated according to the canonical three-peak model of elevator traffic, we first develop a naive model from an intuitive understanding of the logic behind elevators. We take into consideration a general array of features including capacity, acceleration, and maximum wait time thresholds to adequately model realistic circumstances. Using the same evaluation framework, we proceed to develop a Deep Q Learning model in an attempt to match the hard-coded naive approach for elevator control. Throughout the majority of the paper, we work under a Markov Decision Process (MDP) schema, but later explore how the assumption fails to characterize the highly stochastic overall Elevator Group Control System (EGCS).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种结合编程和数学来优化电梯等待时间的方法。基于根据电梯交通的规范三峰模型生成的模拟用户数据，我们首先从对电梯背后逻辑的直观理解出发开发一个朴素模型。我们考虑了一系列一般特征，包括容量、加速度和最大等待时间阈值，以充分模拟现实情况。使用相同的评估框架，我们继续开发深度 Q 学习模型，试图匹配电梯控制的硬编码朴素方法。在本文的大部分内容中，我们都在马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 模式下工作，但后来探讨了该假设如何无法描述高度随机的整体电梯群控制系统 (EGCS) 的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合编程与数学方法优化电梯等待时间，通过模拟数据对比直观模型与深度Q学习模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统电梯调度方法难以应对复杂交通流量，需探索更智能的算法以提升效率并满足现实场景需求。
AI.method: 基于三峰模型生成模拟用户数据，构建直观逻辑模型与深度Q学习模型，采用MDP框架进行评估并分析其局限性。
AI.result: 深度Q学习模型在多数场景下表现接近硬编码方法，但电梯群控系统的高度随机性导致MDP假设失效。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习在电梯优化中具潜力，但需针对系统随机性改进建模方法以提升适应性。

search_text: Application of Deep Q Learning with Simulation Results for Elevator Optimization 应用深度 Q 学习和仿真结果进行电梯优化 This paper presents a methodology for combining programming and mathematics to optimize elevator wait times. Based on simulated user data generated according to the canonical three-peak model of elevator traffic, we first develop a naive model from an intuitive understanding of the logic behind elevators. We take into consideration a general array of features including capacity, acceleration, and maximum wait time thresholds to adequately model realistic circumstances. Using the same evaluation framework, we proceed to develop a Deep Q Learning model in an attempt to match the hard-coded naive approach for elevator control. Throughout the majority of the paper, we work under a Markov Decision Process (MDP) schema, but later explore how the assumption fails to characterize the highly stochastic overall Elevator Group Control System (EGCS). 本文提出了一种结合编程和数学来优化电梯等待时间的方法。基于根据电梯交通的规范三峰模型生成的模拟用户数据，我们首先从对电梯背后逻辑的直观理解出发开发一个朴素模型。我们考虑了一系列一般特征，包括容量、加速度和最大等待时间阈值，以充分模拟现实情况。使用相同的评估框架，我们继续开发深度 Q 学习模型，试图匹配电梯控制的硬编码朴素方法。在本文的大部分内容中，我们都在马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 模式下工作，但后来探讨了该假设如何无法描述高度随机的整体电梯群控制系统 (EGCS) 的特征。 本文提出结合编程与数学方法优化电梯等待时间，通过模拟数据对比直观模型与深度Q学习模型的效果。 Zheng Cao,Raymond Guo,Caesar M. Tuguinay,Mark Pock,Jiayi Gao,Ziyu Wang cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Donghan Yu,Sheng Zhang,Patrick Ng,Henghui Zhu,Alexander Hanbo Li,Jun Wang,Yiqun Hu,William Wang,Zhiguo Wang,Bing Xiang
title: DecAF: Joint Decoding of Answers and Logical Forms for Question Answering over Knowledge Bases
title_zh: DecAF：知识库问答的答案和逻辑形式的联合解码
abstract: Question answering over knowledge bases (KBs) aims to answer natural language questions with factual information such as entities and relations in KBs. Previous methods either generate logical forms that can be executed over KBs to obtain final answers or predict answers directly. Empirical results show that the former often produces more accurate answers, but it suffers from non-execution issues due to potential syntactic and semantic errors in the generated logical forms. In this work, we propose a novel framework DecAF that jointly generates both logical forms and direct answers, and then combines the merits of them to get the final answers. Moreover, different from most of the previous methods, DecAF is based on simple free-text retrieval without relying on any entity linking tools -- this simplification eases its adaptation to different datasets. DecAF achieves new state-of-the-art accuracy on WebQSP, FreebaseQA, and GrailQA benchmarks, while getting competitive results on the ComplexWebQuestions benchmark.
summary: Question answering over knowledge bases (KBs) aims to answer natural language questions with factual information such as entities and relations in KBs. Previous methods either generate logical forms that can be executed over KBs to obtain final answers or predict answers directly. Empirical results show that the former often produces more accurate answers, but it suffers from non-execution issues due to potential syntactic and semantic errors in the generated logical forms. In this work, we propose a novel framework DecAF that jointly generates both logical forms and direct answers, and then combines the merits of them to get the final answers. Moreover, different from most of the previous methods, DecAF is based on simple free-text retrieval without relying on any entity linking tools -- this simplification eases its adaptation to different datasets. DecAF achieves new state-of-the-art accuracy on WebQSP, FreebaseQA, and GrailQA benchmarks, while getting competitive results on the ComplexWebQuestions benchmark.
abstract_zh: 知识库（KB）问答旨在利用知识库中的实体和关系等事实信息回答自然语言问题。以前的方法要么生成可以在 KB 上执行的逻辑形式以获得最终答案，要么直接预测答案。经验结果表明，前者通常会产生更准确的答案，但由于生成的逻辑形式中潜在的语法和语义错误，它会遇到非执行问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 DecAF，它联合生成逻辑形式和直接答案，然后结合它们的优点得到最终答案。此外，与之前的大多数方法不同，DecAF 基于简单的自由文本检索，而不依赖于任何实体链接工具——这种简化简化了它对不同数据集的适应。 DecAF 在 WebQSP、FreebaseQA 和 GrailQA 基准测试中实现了新的最先进的准确性，同时在 ComplexWebQuestions 基准测试中获得了具有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DecAF框架，通过联合生成逻辑形式和直接答案，提升知识库问答的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法单独生成逻辑形式或直接预测答案，前者易出现非执行问题，后者准确性不足，需结合两者优势。
AI.method: DecAF基于自由文本检索，无需实体链接工具，联合生成逻辑形式与直接答案并融合结果。
AI.result: 在WebQSP、FreebaseQA、GrailQA基准测试中达到新SOTA，ComplexWebQuestions表现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: DecAF通过联合解码与简化设计，在准确性与适应性上优于现有方法，推动知识库问答发展。

title: Learning Robust Kernel Ensembles with Kernel Average Pooling
title_zh: 使用内核平均池学习鲁棒内核集成
abstract: Model ensembles have long been used in machine learning to reduce the variance in individual model predictions, making them more robust to input perturbations. Pseudo-ensemble methods like dropout have also been commonly used in deep learning models to improve generalization. However, the application of these techniques to improve neural networks' robustness against input perturbations remains underexplored. We introduce Kernel Average Pooling (KAP), a neural network building block that applies the mean filter along the kernel dimension of the layer activation tensor. We show that ensembles of kernels with similar functionality naturally emerge in convolutional neural networks equipped with KAP and trained with backpropagation. Moreover, we show that when trained on inputs perturbed with additive Gaussian noise, KAP models are remarkably robust against various forms of adversarial attacks. Empirical evaluations on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, TinyImagenet, and Imagenet datasets show substantial improvements in robustness against strong adversarial attacks such as AutoAttack without training on any adversarial examples.
summary: Model ensembles have long been used in machine learning to reduce the variance in individual model predictions, making them more robust to input perturbations. Pseudo-ensemble methods like dropout have also been commonly used in deep learning models to improve generalization. However, the application of these techniques to improve neural networks' robustness against input perturbations remains underexplored. We introduce Kernel Average Pooling (KAP), a neural network building block that applies the mean filter along the kernel dimension of the layer activation tensor. We show that ensembles of kernels with similar functionality naturally emerge in convolutional neural networks equipped with KAP and trained with backpropagation. Moreover, we show that when trained on inputs perturbed with additive Gaussian noise, KAP models are remarkably robust against various forms of adversarial attacks. Empirical evaluations on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, TinyImagenet, and Imagenet datasets show substantial improvements in robustness against strong adversarial attacks such as AutoAttack without training on any adversarial examples.
abstract_zh: 模型集成长期以来一直用于机器学习中，以减少各个模型预测的方差，使它们对输入扰动更加鲁棒。像 dropout 这样的伪集成方法也常用于深度学习模型中以提高泛化能力。然而，应用这些技术来提高神经网络对抗输入扰动的鲁棒性仍然没有得到充分探索。我们引入了内核平均池化（KAP），这是一种神经网络构建块，它沿着层激活张量的内核维度应用均值滤波器。我们表明，具有相似功能的内核集合自然会出现在配备 KAP 并经过反向传播训练的卷积神经网络中。此外，我们表明，当对受加性高斯噪声扰动的输入进行训练时，KAP 模型对于各种形式的对抗性攻击具有非常强大的鲁棒性。对 CIFAR10、CIFAR100、TinyImagenet 和 Imagenet 数据集的实证评估表明，在无需对任何对抗性示例进行训练的情况下，针对 AutoAttack 等强对抗性攻击的鲁棒性有了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Kernel Average Pooling（KAP）的神经网络模块，通过集成相似功能的卷积核来提高模型对输入扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型集成方法在提升神经网络对抗输入扰动的鲁棒性方面研究不足，尤其缺乏无需对抗样本训练的高效方案。
AI.method: 在卷积层激活张量的内核维度应用均值滤波，通过反向传播使功能相似的卷积核自然形成集成，结合加性高斯噪声训练增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、ImageNet等数据集上，KAP模型在AutoAttack等强对抗攻击下表现显著优于基线模型，且无需对抗样本训练。
AI.conclusion: KAP通过简单模块设计有效提升了模型鲁棒性，为对抗攻击防御提供了无需复杂训练的新思路。

Empirical evaluations on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, TinyImagenet, and Imagenet datasets show substantial improvements in robustness against strong adversarial attacks such as AutoAttack without training on any adversarial examples. 模型集成长期以来一直用于机器学习中，以减少各个模型预测的方差，使它们对输入扰动更加鲁棒。像 dropout 这样的伪集成方法也常用于深度学习模型中以提高泛化能力。然而，应用这些技术来提高神经网络对抗输入扰动的鲁棒性仍然没有得到充分探索。我们引入了内核平均池化（KAP），这是一种神经网络构建块，它沿着层激活张量的内核维度应用均值滤波器。我们表明，具有相似功能的内核集合自然会出现在配备 KAP 并经过反向传播训练的卷积神经网络中。此外，我们表明，当对受加性高斯噪声扰动的输入进行训练时，KAP 模型对于各种形式的对抗性攻击具有非常强大的鲁棒性。对 CIFAR10、CIFAR100、TinyImagenet 和 Imagenet 数据集的实证评估表明，在无需对任何对抗性示例进行训练的情况下，针对 AutoAttack 等强对抗性攻击的鲁棒性有了显着提高。 本文提出了一种名为Kernel Average Pooling（KAP）的神经网络模块，通过集成相似功能的卷积核来提高模型对输入扰动的鲁棒性。 Pouya Bashivan,Adam Ibrahim,Amirozhan Dehghani,Yifei Ren cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Saeid Asgari Taghanaki,Aliasghar Khani,Fereshte Khani,Ali Gholami,Linh Tran,Ali Mahdavi-Amiri,Ghassan Hamarneh
title: MaskTune: Mitigating Spurious Correlations by Forcing to Explore
title_zh: MaskTune：通过强制探索来减轻虚假相关性
abstract: A fundamental challenge of over-parameterized deep learning models is learning meaningful data representations that yield good performance on a downstream task without over-fitting spurious input features. This work proposes MaskTune, a masking strategy that prevents over-reliance on spurious (or a limited number of) features. MaskTune forces the trained model to explore new features during a single epoch finetuning by masking previously discovered features. MaskTune, unlike earlier approaches for mitigating shortcut learning, does not require any supervision, such as annotating spurious features or labels for subgroup samples in a dataset. Our empirical results on biased MNIST, CelebA, Waterbirds, and ImagenNet-9L datasets show that MaskTune is effective on tasks that often suffer from the existence of spurious correlations. Finally, we show that MaskTune outperforms or achieves similar performance to the competing methods when applied to the selective classification (classification with rejection option) task. Code for MaskTune is available at https://github.com/aliasgharkhani/Masktune.
summary: A fundamental challenge of over-parameterized deep learning models is learning meaningful data representations that yield good performance on a downstream task without over-fitting spurious input features. This work proposes MaskTune, a masking strategy that prevents over-reliance on spurious (or a limited number of) features. MaskTune forces the trained model to explore new features during a single epoch finetuning by masking previously discovered features. MaskTune, unlike earlier approaches for mitigating shortcut learning, does not require any supervision, such as annotating spurious features or labels for subgroup samples in a dataset. Our empirical results on biased MNIST, CelebA, Waterbirds, and ImagenNet-9L datasets show that MaskTune is effective on tasks that often suffer from the existence of spurious correlations. Finally, we show that MaskTune outperforms or achieves similar performance to the competing methods when applied to the selective classification (classification with rejection option) task. Code for MaskTune is available at https://github.com/aliasgharkhani/Masktune.
abstract_zh: 过度参数化深度学习模型的一个基本挑战是学习有意义的数据表示，这些数据表示可以在下游任务上产生良好的性能，而不会过度拟合虚假输入特征。这项工作提出了 MaskTune，这是一种防止过度依赖虚假（或有限数量）特征的掩蔽策略。 MaskTune 通过屏蔽之前发现的特征，迫使训练后的模型在单轮微调期间探索新特征。与早期缓解快捷学习的方法不同，MaskTune 不需要任何监督，例如注释数据集中子组样本的虚假特征或标签。我们对有偏差的 MNIST、CelebA、Waterbirds 和 ImagenNet-9L 数据集的实证结果表明，MaskTune 对于经常存在虚假相关性的任务是有效的。最后，我们表明，当应用于选择性分类（带有拒绝选项的分类）任务时，MaskTune 优于或实现了与竞争方法相似的性能。 MaskTune 的代码可在 https://github.com/aliasgharkhani/Masktune 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MaskTune方法，通过强制模型在微调过程中探索新特征，缓解深度学习中因虚假相关性导致的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 过度参数化的深度学习模型容易依赖数据中的虚假特征，导致下游任务性能下降，而现有方法通常需要标注虚假特征或子群标签等监督信息。
AI.method: MaskTune在单次微调epoch中通过动态屏蔽已发现特征，迫使模型探索未被利用的特征，无需任何监督信号。
AI.result: 在biased MNIST、CelebA等数据集上验证有效，且在选择性分类任务中表现优于或接近现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MaskTune提供了一种无需监督的解决方案，能有效缓解虚假相关性问题，代码已开源供研究使用。
